name: HBN-05327
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING TAX CREDITS TO ASSIST THE PRIVATE SECTOR IN ESTABLISHING NATION-WIDE PREGNANCY CARE CENTERS THAT WILL PROVIDE COUNSELING, CARE AND INFORMATION RELATED TO ALTERNATIVES TO ABORTION AND ARTIFICIAL CONTRACEPTION
congress_website_abstract: “The Pregnancy Care Centers Act of 2006”. The bill seeks the establishment of pregnancy health care centers that will provide pregnancy testing, pregnancy confirmation through ultrasound, mentoring and nurturing support, linkage to community resources, education, material aid, housing referral, abstinence education for unmarried persons and natural family planning for married couples who wish to postpone pregnancy.

name: HBN-05328
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A CONCRETE BILL OF RGHTS AND PRIVILEGES, WHICH SHALL PROMOTE, IMPROVE, AND/OR ALLEVIATE THE PLIGHT OF EXTENSION WORKERS
congress_website_abstract: “Magna Carta for Extension Workers”. The measure prescribes the rights and privileges of extension workers to promote their empowerment; and guarantees their right to participate in charting their political, economic, social, educational, moral and spiritual development.

name: HBN-05311
congress_website_title: AN ACT SUPPLETORY TO SEC. 45, CHAPTER IV OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE 1529 UPGRADING THE SYSTEM OF LAND REGISTRATION OF THE PHILIPPINES TO ENSURE THE GENUINENESS AND REGULARITY OF LAND TITLES AS A MATTER OF PUBLIC INTEREST
congress_website_abstract: “Fortification of Land Title Act”. The bill seeks to strengthen the method of land transfer and registration by way of restructuring the present forma of the Certificate of Title and solidifying the procedural aspect of registration.

name: HBN-05312
congress_website_title: AN ACT GOVERNING SPECIAL EDUCATION FOR CHILDREN WITH SPECIAL NEEDS OR INDIVIDUALS WITH DISABILITIES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: “Individuals with Disabilities Education Act (IDEA) of 2005”. The measure seeks to extend to children with disabilities free public education that emphasizes on special educational and related services designed to meet their unique needs and prepare them for further education, employment and independent living.

name: HBN-05313
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FORTY-TWO HUNDRED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE WIRETAPPING LAW
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the method of authentication of wiretapped materials to make them admissible as evidence in court. It also specifies which agency/ies of the government may be authorized to wiretap.

congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROTECT, PROMOTE AND SUPPORT PROPER INFANT AND YOUNG CHILD FEEDING, PENALIZING VIOLATIONS THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES, AMENDING THEREBY EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 51, THE NATIONAL MILK CODE OF 1986
congress_website_abstract: “Infant and Young Child Feeding Act”. The bill seeks to promote breastfeeding to improve the health of children. It provides for lactation support programs and rooming in provision in every healthcare facility.

congress_website_abstract: “Expanded Study Now Pay Later Plan (E-SNPLP) Act”. The bill seeks to make the “study now pay later plan” available to deserving college students in public and private schools.

congress_website_abstract: “Public School Teachers’ Insurance Act of 2006”. The bill seeks to improve the plight of teachers by granting them insurance benefits over and above the benefits given by the GSIS.

name: HBN-05321
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MAGNA CARTA FOR THE POOR
congress_website_abstract: “Magna Carta for the Poor”. The bill enunciates in unequivocal terms the basic irreducible rights of the poor, i.e., the right to employment, food, shelter, free quality education and free healthcare medicine.

name: HBN-05323
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE AUTOMATIC RELEASE OF THE SHARE OF THE BARANGAY IN THE PROCEEDS OF NATIONAL TAXES AND TAXES ON THE UTILIZATION AND DEVELOPMENT OF THE NATIONAL WEALTH, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE SECTION 286, CHAPTER 1 AND SECTION 293, CHAPTER 2, TITLE 3, BOOK II, RESPECTIVELY, OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides that THE SHARE OF THE BARANGAYS SHALL NOT BE SUBJECT TO ANY LIEN OR HOLDBACK THAT MAY BE IMPOSED BY PROVINCIAL, CITY OR MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENT.

name: HBN-05324
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE AUTOMATIC RETENTION BY THE BARANGAY OF ITS SHARE OF FIFTY PERCENT (50%) IN THE COMMUNITY TAX COLLECTED BY SAID BARANGAY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 164 OF R.A. NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes the barangay treasurer to automatically retain the 50% share of the barangay in the community tax collection and to remit the share of the city/municipality within 10 days after the end of the month.

name: HBN-05325
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT PHILIPPINES AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: “Emergency Management Philippines Act of 2006”. The bill proposes to establish an integrated and coordinated disaster management policy focused on preventing and reducing the risks of disasters, mitigating the severity of disasters, undertaking emergency preparedness, and initiating a rapid and effective response to disaster and post disaster recovery.

name: HBN-05326
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE EDUCATION SERVICE CONTRACTING FOR BASIC EDUCATION
congress_website_abstract: “Basic Education Service Contracting Act”. The bill provides for the basic education services that may be availed of by the government to include the following: a) instructional services of private schools, b) private management/supervision of certain public schools, c) private-public partnership for school building, and d) educational assessment and monitoring.

name: HBN-05300
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING MANDATORY BASIC IMMUNIZATION SERVICES AGAINST HEPATITIS-B FOR INFANTS AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 996, AS AMENDED, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates that all newborn infants be given first immunization against hepatitis-B within 12 hours after birth.

congress_website_abstract: “National Breastfeeding Awareness Month Act”. The bill designates August of every year as “National Breastfeeding Awareness Month” to promote and support breastfeeding as the normal, natural and preferred method of feeding infants and young children.

congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Coast Guard Act of 2006\". The bill seeks to establish the Philippine Coast Guard as an attached agency of the Department of Transportation and Communications and provides for its powers and functions and organzational structure.

name: HBN-05310
congress_website_title: AN ACT REDUCING THE USE OF PLASTIC BAGS, STYROFOAM CONTAINERS, DISPOSABLE PLASTIC UTENSILS, AND SIMILAR ITEMS IN ALL ESTABLISHMENTS IN THE COUNTRY
congress_website_abstract: “Plastic Bag Reduction Act”. The bill prohibits commercial establishments from a) providing their customers any plastic bag free of charge, b) the use of plastic bags thinner than 20 microns, and c) the use of styrofoam containers and plastic utensils. It also mandates commercial establishments to include the cost of the plastic bag, should the customer request for one, in the official receipt of the customer.

congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to authorize cities and municipalities to issue franchises for the operation of motorcycles as public utility vehicles.

congress_website_abstract: The bill exempts minimum wage earners from income taxation and lowers the income tax of low middle income earners. It also increases by 50% the personal exemptions enjoyed by every taxpayer.

congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING CONSUMER PROTECTION IN THE PURCHASE OF BRAND NEW MOTOR VEHICLES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Brand New Motor Vehicle Consumer Protection Act of 2006\" or \"Philippine Lemon Law\". The bill obliges the manufacturer or distributor or its authorized dealer or retailer to repair the non-conformity of vehicles , free of charge, until it conforms to the express warranty of the manufacturer or distributor.

congress_website_abstract: “Environment Adjudication Commission (EAC) Act”. The bill seeks to create an adjudication commission that will hear cases filed in violation of Philippine environmental laws.

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTBALISHING THE PHILIPPINE GOAT AND SHEEP CENTER
congress_website_abstract: “Philippine Goat and Sheep Center Act of 2006”. The bill provides for the establishment of the Philippine Goat and Sheep Center that will be responsible for the over-all productivity of the goat and sheep industry.

congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH MT. BALATUKAN RANGE NATURAL PARK, LOCATED IN THE PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL AS A PROTECTED AREA, AND ITS PERIPHERAL AREAS AS BUFFER ZONE, PROVIDING FOR ITS MANAGEMENT PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7586 (NIPAS ACT OF 1992) APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-05281
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR PEOPLE'S INITIATIVE TO AMEND THE CONSTITUTION
congress_website_abstract: \"People's Initiative to Amend the Constitution Act of 2006\". The bill provides for amendments to the Constitution to be directly proposed by the people through initiative upon the petition of at least 12% of the total number of registered voters of which every legislative district must be represented by at least three (3%) percent of the registered voters therein.

name: HBN-05282
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE DEPARTMENT OF INFORMATION AND COMMUNICATIONS TECHNOLOGY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Department of Information and Communications Technology Act of 2005\". The measure seeks the creation of the Department of Information and Communications Technology and defines its mandate, powers and functions, and organizational structure.

name: HBN-05283
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE OPERATION OF CELLULAR MOBILE TELEPHONE SERVICES TO PROTECT THE RIGHTS OF CELLULAR PHONE SUBSCRIBERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Cellular Phone Subscribers Protection Act of 2005\". The bill seeks the creation of a Subscribers' Protection Unit in the National Telecommunications Commission where subscribers can air and file their complaints. It also seeks a longer period of validity of SIM cards from two months to 12 months.

name: HBN-05284
title: PHILIPPINE VOIP ACT OF 2006
long_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE AND GOVERN THE DEVELOPMENT OF VOICE OVER INTERNET PROTOCOL IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE AND GOVERN THE DEVELOPMENT OF VOICE OVER INTERNET PROTOCOL IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine VOIP Act of 2005\". The bill requires any person or entity seeking to provide VOIP (voice over internet protocol) services for the use of the public to register with the National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) prior to operation. It also directs the NTC to determine interconnection access rates.

name: HBN-05285
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MAGNA CARTA FOR WOMEN
congress_website_abstract: \"The Magna Carta for Women\". The bill recognizes the role of women in nation building and affirms the fundamental equality before the law of women and men.

name: HBN-05275
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE ROLE OF PARENTS-TEACHERS ASSOCIATIONS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to encourage more participation from Parents-Teachers Associations and grants them the following incentives: a) participation in local government council meetings and school advisory boards, b) exemption from taxes, and c) accreditation by qualified accrediting agencies.

name: HBN-05276
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE LIVELIHOOD ENHANCEMENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM (LEAP) AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Livelihood Enhancement Assistance Program Act of 2006\". The bill seeks to establish an assistance program designed to enhance the capability and productivity of individuals engaged in livelihood activities.

name: HBN-05277
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FREE MEDICINE ASSISTANCE PROGRAM FOR THE POOR AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Free Medical Assistance Act of 2006\". The measure seeks to establish a free medical assistance program for the poor to be administered by the Department of Health through hospitals and health centers in all municipalities.

name: HBN-05278
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE BARANGAY INTEGRATED DEVELOPMENT APPROACH FOR NUTRITION IMPROVEMENT (BIDANI) OF THE RURAL POOR AS A NETWORK PROGRAM OF THE PARTICIPATING STATE COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks the establishment of the Barangay Integrated Development Approach for Nutrition Improvement (BIDANI) as a nutrition-in- development research program involving state colleges and universities.

name: HBN-05279
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A NATIONAL STUDENT LOAN PROGRAM FOR THE POOR AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"National Student Loan Program for the Poor Act of 2006\". The measure seeks to create a National Student Loan Program to help the poor and the needy by giving them access to tertiary education.

name: HBN-05280
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE MIMBILISAN PROTECTED LANDSCAPE LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF BALINGOAN AND TALISAYAN, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL, PROVIDING FOR ITS MANAGEMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT 7586

name: HBN-05269
title: SPECIAL EDUCATION ACT OF 2006
long_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AT LEAST ONE SPECIAL EDUCATION (SPED) CENTER FOR EACH SCHOOL DIVISION AND AT LEAST THREE SPED CENTERS IN BIG SCHOOL DIVISIONS FOR CHILDREN WITH SPECIAL NEEDS (CSNS), CREATING THE IMPLEMENTING MACHINERY THEREOF, PROVIDING GUIDELINES FOR GOVERNMENT FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE AND OTHER INCENTIVES AND SUPPORT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AT LEAST ONE (1) SPECIAL EDUCATION (SPED) CENTER FOR EACH SCHOOL DIVISION AND AT LEAST THREE (3) SPED CENTERS IN BIG SCHOOL DIVISIONS FOR CHILDREN WITH SPECIAL NEEDS (CSNs), CREATING THE IMPLEMENTING MACHINERY THEREOF, PROVIDING GUIDELINES FOR GOVERNMENT FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE AND FOR OTHER INCENTIVES AND SUPPORT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Special Education Act of 2006\". The bill aims to make basic education accessible to children with special needs (CSNs) and to ensure that CSNs are given the apportunity to fully develop their abilities, talents and interests so they can be more responsible for their lives.

name: HBN-05270
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN LOCAL AUTONOMY BY EQUITABLY DISTRIBUTING TO THE LOCAL GOVERNMENTS THE CHARITY FUND OF THE PHILIPPINE CHARITY SWEEPSTAKES OFFICE
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to equitably and immediately distribute the charity fund of the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office to local units for their health programs.

name: HBN-05271
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING CENTRALIZED PROCUREMENT OF PETROLEUM IN THE COUNTRY
congress_website_abstract: \"Centralized Petroleum Procurement Act of 2006\". The bill seeks the institution of a system of centralized procurement of imported crude oil and refined petroleum products. It also proposes the creation of the National Petroleum Exchange Corporation.

name: HBN-05272
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE DOWNSTREAM PETROLEUM INDUSTRY AND FOR OTHER RELATED PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Downstream Oil Industry Regulation Act of 2006\". The bill seeks the creation of the petroleum regulatory council and a buffer fund that shall be used to cushion consumers against drastic increases in petroleum prices.

name: HBN-05273
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE MONTH OF FEBRUARY OF EVERY YEAR AS \"LIVER CANCER AND HEPATITIS-B AWARENESS AND PREVENTION MONTH\"
congress_website_abstract: \"The Liver Cancer and Hepatitis-B Awareness and Prevention Month Act\". The bill designates the month of February of every year as National Liver Cancer and Hepatitis-B Awareness Month.

name: HBN-05274
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TAGUIG-PATEROS DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN TAGUIG, METRO MANILA INTO A MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER TO BE KNOWN AS THE SENATOR RENATO \"COMPANERO\" L. CAYETANO MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-05214
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MAGNA CARTA OF AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT WORKERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta of Agricultural Developement Workers\". The bill affirms the rights of government agricultural workers and provides a mechanism for their career development.

name: HBN-05215
congress_website_title: AN ACT LIMITING THE INVESTMENT OF FUNDS OF THE SOCIAL SECURITY SYSTEM AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION TWENTY SIX OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED EIGHTY TWO HUNDRED EIGHTY-TWO, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE SOCIAL SECURITY ACT OF 1997
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to trim down the areas of investments that the Social Security Service (SSS) may enter into to only those that assures predictability in order to protect SSS members from the vagaries of trade and commerce.

congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING MANDATORY BASIC IMMUNIZATION SERVICES FOR INFANTS INCLUDING HEPATITIS B VACCINATION
congress_website_abstract: “Basic Immunization Services for Infants Act”. The measure proposes a mandatory basic immunization service for infants, to wit: a) BCG vaccination against tuberculosis; b) inoculation against diphtheria, tetanus and pertussis; c) oral poliomyetitis immunization; d) protection against measles; e) immunization against hepatitis B; f) immunization against rubella; and g) other basic immunization services.

congress_website_abstract: “The Rights of Conscience Act of 2006”. The bill seeks to recognize and protect the civil rights of conscience of all individuals and institutional doctors, nurses and other health workers, employees and students.

congress_website_abstract: “Scrap Metals Export Ban Act”. To stem the export of scrap metals and, indirectly, to deter pilferage, the measure bans the exportation of scrap metal and imposes sanctions on those violating the ban.

congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes the creation of the One-Philippines Arterial Speedways Project Office which shall be responsible for the planning and implementation of the Speedways project with the following infrastructure components: construction of 6-lane concrete highways, pontoon bridges, tunnels, roll-on roll-off seaports, and the improvement and concreting of existing national roads and bridges interconnecting Luzon, Visayas and Mindanao.

congress_website_abstract: “Anti-Enforced or Involuntary Disappearance Act of 2005”. The salient features of the bill include the following, among others: a) it adopts the United Nations definition of enforced or involuntary disappearance, b) it considers enforced or involuntary disappearance as a continuing offense, and c) it prescribes reclusion temporal or reclusion perpetua as penalties for enforced or involuntary disappearance.

congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to increase the capitalization of the National Home Mortgage Finance Corporation and to convert a portion of its loan with the Social Security Service and the Home Development Mutual Fund representing accrued interests into preferred shares. It also increases the appropriation for the Community Mortgage Program to enable it to serve more beneficiaries.

congress_website_abstract: The bill integrates the socio-economic development plan as part of the obligations of contractors vying to utilize energy resources.

congress_website_abstract: \"The Public Assembly Act of 2005\". The bill requires that prior notice be given for the holding of a public assembly to the city/municipal mayor having jurisdiction over the venue. congress_website_abstract: \"English as the Medium of Instruction Act\". congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SEC. 6, 27, 28 AND 29 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9280 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CUSTOMS BROKERS ACT OF 2004, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to allow corporations to employ the services of an in-house customs broker in the preparation of export and import documents; declaration of customs duties and taxes; preparation, signing, filing, lodging and processing of import and export entries and other professional services in matters relating to customs and tariff laws, its procedures and practices.

name: HBN-04540
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING THE ADMINISTRATIVE DISCIPLINARY MACHINERY OF THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"PNP Administrative Disciplinary Machinery Act\". The measure proposes the creation of the People's Law Enforcement Board that shall hear and adjudicate all citizens complaints filed against any uniformed member of the Philippine National Police (PNP). It concretely defines the exclusive administrative disciplinary machinery of the uniformed members of the PNP.

name: HBN-04534
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE UTILIZATION AND MANAGEMENT OF NATURAL RESOURCES, ENVIRONMENTAL ASSETS OR SOCIAL AND ECOLOGICAL ENDOWMENTS FOR SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Environment Policy Act of 2005\". The bill institutionalizes a policy that would integrate and harmonize sectoral environmental laws and issuances. It seeks to update environmental policy and keeps our system of environment management abreast with current trends in sustainable development policies.

name: HBN-04535
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to remove the taints of unconstitutionality that infect some provisions of RA 9337. It also aims to ease the impact of the value-added tax on the prices of goods and services.

name: HBN-04536
title: MAGNA CARTA FOR SOCIAL WORKERS
long_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MAGNA CARTA FOR SOCIAL WORKERS
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MAGNA CARTA FOR SOCIAL WORKERS AND SOCIAL WELFARE AND DEVELOPMENT WORKERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for Social Workers and Social Welfare and Development Workers\". The bill institutionalizes social work as a distinct profession. It mandates that social work positions in all social welfare and development agencies be given to social workers. It also requires the creation of a social welfare and development officer position in the provincial, city or municipality governments.

name: HBN-04526
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING BENEFITS AND SPECIAL PRIVILEGES TO STUDENTS IN BOTH PUBLIC AND PRIVATE SCHOOLS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Students Privilege Act of 2005\". The bill grants students benefits and privileges similar to those enjoyed by senior citizens such as discounts on transportation fares, medicines, food and school supplies.

name: HBN-04527
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING AN ANNUAL MANDATORY DRUG TEST FOR ALL ELECTED GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION THIRTY-SIX OF REPUBLIC ACT NINETY ONE HUNDRED SIXTY-FIVE, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"COMPREHENSIVE DANGEROUS DRUGS ACT OF 2002
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires all elective government officials except the President, Vice President, Senate President and Speaker of the House of Representatives to undergo a mandatory annual drug test.

name: HBN-04531
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE NORTHERN PACIFIC BROADCASTING INCORPORATED (NPBI) A FRANCHISE TO CONSTRUCT, INSTALL, ESTABLISH, OPERATE AND MAINTAIN RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING STATIONS IN SURIGAO DEL NORTE

name: HBN-04532
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 9337, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS AN ACT AMENDING THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to repeal RA 9337 that lifted the value-added tax (VAT) exemptions, authorized the President to increase the VAT rate and increased the income tax on corporation from 32% to 35%.

congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6435, CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN MARCELINO EMERGENCY HOSPITAL (MAYOR LEOPOLDO F. RABANES MEMORIAL HOSPITAL) IN SAN MARCELINO, ZAMBALES, TO MIGUELA P. MAGSAYSAY HOSPITAL

name: HBN-04529
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING COMPULSORY MOTOR VEHICLE LIABILITY INSURANCE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires all motor vehicles to carry a Compulsory Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance that shall include Third Party Liability, Passenger Liability and Property Damage coverage. The insurance shall exclude On Damage and Against Theft and Loss coverage.

name: HBN-04530
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING FRESH MILK AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Fresh Milk Act of 2005\". The bill defines fresh milk as pasteurized fresh milk with limited shelf life and requires refrigeration. It declares UHT (ultra high temperature) milk or any milk other than fresh milk, represented or purported to be fresh milk, as mislabeled food.

name: HBN-04500
congress_website_title: AN ACT AFFIRMING THE SANCTITY OF THE CONSTITUTION AND MANDATING THE PROVINCES, CITIES AND AUTONOMOUS REGIONS OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES TO WITHHOLD RECOGNITION OF THE AUTHORITY OF THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT AND TO ASSUME ABSOLUTE POLITICAL, ADMINISTRATIVE, AND ECONOMIC AUTONOMIES, IN CASES WHERE SUCH AUTHORITY OF THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT IS ASSUMED BY ANY PART IN VIOLATION OF THE CONSTITUTION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Constitutional Sanctity Act of 2005\". The measure mandates all provinces, cities and autonomous regions to withhold recognition of the authority of the National Government (NG) and to assume political, administrative and economic autonomy in cases where such authority of the NG is assumed by any party in violation of the Constitution.

congress_website_abstract: \"The National Archives of the Philippines Act of 2005\". The bill defines and determines the appropriate procedure on how and which public records are to be disposed of. It provides for an independent, broad and long-term perspective to be applied to the management of public records.

name: HBN-04491
title: TREE FOR LEGACY ACT OF 2006
long_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A SELF-SUSTAINING FOREST MANAGEMENT PROGRAM TO BE KNOWN AS THE TREE FOR LEGACY PROGRAM, BY GIVING ECONOMIC AND OTHER INCENTIVES TO TREE PLANTERS ON PRIVATE AND PUBLIC FORESTLANDS

congress_website_abstract: The bill introduces a reforestation program (Tree for Legacy Program) covering private lands, protection forests, production forests, open public lands and other lands deemed appropriate for tree planting. The proposed program shall be administered by the local government units in partnership with the Department of Environment and Natural Resources.

name: HBN-04492
congress_website_title: AN ACT ABOLISHING THE AGE REQUIREMENT FOR APPLICANTS TAKING THE BOARD EXAMINATION FOR SOCIAL WORKERS, PROVIDING FOR THE CONTINUING SOCIAL WORK EDUCATION AND UPGRADING THE SUNDRY PROVISIONS RELATIVE TO THE PRACTICE OF SOCIAL WORK, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 12, 24 AND 26 OF THE REPUBLIC ACT 4373, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS SOCIAL WORKER'S LAW
congress_website_abstract: The bill gives young social work graduates the opportunity to take the board examination and become economically and socially productive by joining the workforce as professionals.

name: HBN-04493

congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to raise the ceiling on input tax from 70% to 90% of output value-added tax to generate revenues for the government. Furthermore, the proposed rate is deemed to be more acceptable to the business sector as it would enable them to recover more fully the tax passed on to them by their suppliers.

congress_website_abstract: \"Marcos Martial Law Regime Debt Cancellation Act\". The bill prohibits the inclusion in the General Appropriations Act and in supplementary budgets debt interest payments and principal amortization payments for loans incurred by or related to the Marcos martial law regime. congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING FULL TRANSPARENCY AND DISCLOSURE AMONG PUBLIC UTILITIES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Public Utilities Transparency and Disclosure Act of 2005\". The bill requires all public utilities to submit the following every year: a) audited financial statements, b) names and stockholdings of owners and stockholders, c) copy of all contracts whereby the utility company is a joint or principal debtor, creditor or guarantor, d) list of capital expenditures, and e) breakdown of previous year's collections and revenues.

congress_website_abstract: \"Coco-Biodiesel Act of 2005\". The bill mandates the use of coco-diesel as an additive to or substitute for diesel fuel and thereby bolster the development of the coco-biodiesel industry.

congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING THE ACQUISITION, USE, OPERATION AND MAINTENANCE OF GOVERNMENT MOTOR VEHICLES
congress_website_abstract: \"Government Motor Vehicle Act of 2005\". The measure identifies the government officials authorized to use government motor vehicles; and provides for their use, operation and disposal; repair and maintenance; and identification and markings. It prohibits government offices from acquiring or using luxury vehicles.

These training centers shall function under the scope and supervision of the TESDA and shall be based on a program prepared by the TESDA in coordination with the local development councils.

congress_website_abstract: \"Local Sectoral Representation Act of 2005\". The bill provides for the election of three sectoral representatives each in the Sangguniang Panlalawigan, Sangguniang Panlungsod and Sangguniang Barangay, to wit: one from the women sector; one from workers and one from any of the following - indigenous peoples, differently-abled persons, senior citizens, victims of calamities, and the urban poor.

congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Political Dynasty Act of 2005\". name: HBN-04289
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PETROLEUM PRICE CONTROL BOARD TO REGULATE PRICES OF OIL AND OTHER PETROLEUM PRODUCTS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Petroleum Price Control Act of 2005\". The measure proposes the creation of the Petroleum Price Control Board which shall be tasked to regulate the price of oil and other petroleum products.

name: HBN-04265
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING ARTICLE 26 OF THE FAMILY CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants the right to remarry to a Filipino citizen whose spouse was a Filipino citizen at the time of their marriage and who, thereafter, acquired a foreign citizenship at the time a divorce was obtained.

name: HBN-04266
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REGULATE THE CONSTRUCTION AND INSTALLATION OF BILLBOARDS AND SIGNAGES
congress_website_abstract: \"Billboard and Signage Act of 2005\". The bill lists the prohibitions with regard to the installation of billboards and signages, to wit: a) those that obstruct the view of vehicular or pedestrian traffick; b) those on posts or walls that obstruct roadways and pedestrian lanes; c) those that take the space reserved for safety and informative road signs; d) those that block any rural or urban natural vista; among others.

name: HBN-04267
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE ADDITIONAL AD VALOREM TAX ON IDLE LANDS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 236 OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to increase the ceiling of the ad valorem tax on idle lands from 5% to 10% of the assessed value of the property.

name: HBN-04268
congress_website_title: AN ACT RECLASSIFYING 102 HECTARES OF TIMBERLAND LOCATED IN BARANGAY STO. NINO, MUNICIPALITY OF SABLAYAN, PROVINCE OF OCCIDENTAL MINDORO, AS ALIENABLE AND DISPOSABLE LAND FOR RESIDENTIAL, COMMERCIAL, INDUSTRIAL AND OTHER PRODUCTIVE PURPOSES

name: HBN-04269
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL WATERSHED MANAGEMENT FORUM AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Watershed Management Forum Act of 2005\". The measure seeks to institutionalize the National Watershed Management Forum (NWMF) in order to provide a permanent venue for organized discussion on watershed management issues. It prescribes the composition of the NWMF, its functions and the roles and responsibilities of the lead agency and its agency members.

name: HBN-04270
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CHAPTER VI, PROHIBITIONS AND PENALTIES AND PROVIDING AN ADDITIONAL CHAPTER ON LEGAL ACTIONS TO R.A. 8550, ENTITLED: \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DEVELOPMENT, MANAGEMENT AND CONSERVATION OF THE FISHERIES AND AQUATIC RESOURCES, INTEGRATING ALL LAWS PERTINENT THERETO, AND FOR OTEHR PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks the imposition of higher penalties and stiffer fines on the illegal activities of commercial fishers in municipal waters.

congress_website_abstract: \"Informers and Anti-Corruption Witnesses Protection Act of 2004\". The bill sets up a system of reward and protection for informants by: a) establishing a monetary basis rewards system; b) protecting informants against reprisal and civil or criminal liability; and c) ensuring that public disclosures are made to the proper public entity.

name: HBN-04249
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 72 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 881 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE OMNIBUS ELECTION CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides that in the election of local officials in the event a candidate who obtains the highest number of votes is disqualified, the candidate with the next highest number of votes for the same position shall assume the vacated position notwithstanding the proclamation of the disqualified candidate.

name: HBN-04250
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ENHANCE THE PHILIPPINE INDUSTRIAL AND LABOR DISPUTE SETTLEMENT SYSTEM
congress_website_abstract: \"Industrial and Labor Dispute Settlement Act of 2004\". The bill seeks the use of alternative modes of dispute resolution, including mediation, in settling industrial or labor disputes. It provides for the creation of the National Mediation and Arbitration Board, its composition, functions and powers and jurisdiction.

name: HBN-04251
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING AN ANNUAL PRODUCTIVITY INCENTIVES TO ALL WORKERS IN THE PRIVATE SECTOR, ESTABLISHING MECHANISMS FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Workers Productivity Incentives Act of 2005\". The bill directs all business entities to grant their workers an annual productivity incentive bonus equivalent to not less than 10% of net profits before taxes.

name: HBN-04252
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PENALTIES FOR NON-COMPLIANCE OF THE PRESCRIBED INCREASES AND ADJUSTMENTS IN THE WAGE RATES OF WORKERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6727, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"WAGE RATIONALIZATION ACT', AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill increases the penalty on any person, corporation, partnership and other business entity for non-compliance with the prescribed wage increases from P25,000 to P50,000 plus moral damages not exceeding P30,000 for each affected worker and the cost of litigation.

name: HBN-04253
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEEKING TO IMPOSE A MORATORIUM ON LAND DISTRIBUTION UNDER THE COMPREHENSIVE AGRARIAN REFORM LAW OF 1988 AND TO SET ASIDE APPROPRIATED FUNDS FOR THE CARP TO FINANCE LIVELIHOOD PROGRAMS TO MAKE LANDS ALREADY DISTRIBUTED PRODUCTIVE
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to suspend the distribution of lands under the Comprehensive Agrarian Reform Law (CARL) and to utilize the funds earmarked for the CARL to finance livelihood programs for lands already distributed in order to make them productive.

The bill considers as professional squatter/s any person or groups of persons who occupy or possess the property of a landowner against his will, or who, having received a written demand to either vacate or pay rent to said landowner, refuses to do so within a period of 90 days.

congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes the institution of a pre-construction termite proofing in all private and public structures. It requires all applicants for a building permit to submit a \"written contract for pre-construction termite proofing with a duly licensed pest control operator\".

congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PENALIZE ANY PERSON WHO HIRES, PERSUADES, COERCES, INDUCES OR OTHERWISE ENGAGES CHILDREN FOR THE PURPOSE OF PERFORMING LASCIVIOUS ACTS CONSTITUTING INDECENT SHOWS OR EXHIBITION WITH OR WITHOUT THE USE OF SEX TOYS AND SIMILAR PARAPHERNALIA BROADCASTED OVER THE INTERNET WHETHER FOR PROFIT OR NOT AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 7610 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE SPECIAL PROTECTION OF CHILDREN AGAINST ABUSE, EXPLOITATION AND DISCRIMINATION ACT PROVIDING FOR PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes the penalty of reclusion temporal in its medium period on any person who engages a child to perform lascivious acts constituting indecent shows for broadcast over the internet.

name: HBN-04197
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REQUIRE ALL BUILDING OWNERS TO INSTALL, OPERATE AND MAINTAIN SECURITY CAMERA SYSTEM IN ALL ENCLOSED PARKING SPACES PROVIDING FOR PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Mandatory Installation of Security Cameras System in all Enclosed Parking Spaces of Buildings by their Respective Owners Law\". The bill exempts from the value-added tax all contracts of sale for the purchase or rental of security cameras and other equipment. It allows the purchase of security cameras and other equipment to be treated as \"Ordinary and Necessary Expenses\".

congress_website_title: AN ACT TO AMEND REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TEN, AS AMENDED, AND TO APPROPRIATE FUNDS TO IMPLEMENT ITS PROVISION
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants the surviving spouse of a justice or a retired justice of the Supreme Court and the Court of Appeals a monthly pension equivalent to 80% of the amount received by the justice or retired justice-pensioner until he/she remarries or dies.

name: HBN-04132
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 4 (PARAGRAPH 58) AND PROVIDING ADDITIONAL SECTION ON MUNICIPAL FISHERIES, CHAPTER 2, ARTICLE 1 OF R.A. 8550, ENTITLED: \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DEVELOPMENT, MANAGEMENT AND CONSERVATION OF THE FISHERIES AND AQUATIC RESOURCES, INTEGRATING ALL LAWS PERTINENT THERETO, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks the adoption of the archipelagic principle in the definition of municipal waters. It stipulates that \"where the territory of a municipality include several islands, the outer most points of such islands shall be used as base points and connected by archipelagic baselines, irrespective of the length of such baselines from the main coastlines\".

congress_website_abstract: \"Movie and Television Classifications Board or MTCB Act of 2005\". The bill seeks to abolish the Movie and Television Review and Classification Board (MTRCB) and creates, in its place, the MTCB. It provides for the adoption of the Miller's doctrine in classifying a film as \"X\". It creates the Review and Classification Board and abolishes the Appeals committee.

congress_website_abstract: \"The Subdivision and Condominium Buyers' Protective Decree Amendments of 2005\". The bill proposes the following amendments, among others: a) the cancellation of the registration with the Register of Deeds of a contract to sell that has been rescinded will not longer require a court order but simply an affidavit, and b) the deed of sale or contract to sell a lot or unit, subject of a mortgage, will be required to include a partial release clause or a provision guaranteeing the release of the title upon full payment.

congress_website_abstract: \"Subdivisions Green Parks Act of 2005\". The bill mandates the owner or developer of a subdivision project to plant trees in the open spaces reserved for the common use and enjoyment of lot owners and along roads. It directs the Department of Natural Resources and Environment and the Housing and Land Use Regulatory Board to determine the number of trees to be planted and the size of the green park.

congress_website_abstract: The measure grants city governments, through the Sangguniang Panglungsod, regulatory and franchising powers over the operation of public utility jeepneys plying routes exclusively within the city's territorial jurisdiction.

congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes a P0.50 specific tax on every short messaging service (SMS) to be shouldered by the cellular phone companies. The tax proceeds shall be used to fund the upgrading, modernization and improvement of the country's infrastructures.

congress_website_abstract: \"The Detention Prisoners Voting Act of 2005\". The measure extends to persons under preventive detention, who are not otherwise disqualified by law, the right to vote for the president, vice-president, senators and party-list representatives.

congress_website_abstract: The bill sets the compulsory retirement age of the officers and enlisted personnel of the Armed Forces of the Philippines and the Philippine National Police at 65 years and upon completion of a minimum of 15 years of active service.

congress_website_abstract: \"Industrial and Labor Dispute Settlement Act of 2004\". The bill provides for the creation of the National Mediation and Arbitration Board, its composition, organizational structure, jurisdiction, powers and functions.It also prescribes the mediation process and the arbitration procedure. It calls for the abolition of the National Labor Relations Commission and the National Conciliation and Mediation Board.

congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8545, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"EXPANDED GOVERNMENT ASSISTANCE TO STUDENTS AND TEACHERS IN PRIVATE EDUCATION ACT\" PROVIDING FOR AN EXPANDED VOUCHER OR COUPON SYSTEM IN SECONDARY AND TERTIARY EDUCATION, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to improve the voucher support system (introduced in the GASTPE or Expanded Government Assistance to Students and Teachers in Private Education Law) extended to secondary and tertiary students whose incomes are below the poverty line and who cannot be accommodated by public educational institutions due to lack of facilities.

congress_website_abstract: \"Act to Rationalize the Teaching of Religion in the Public Schools\". congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to increase the old age pension of veterans by P500.00 effective January 1st of the proceeding year and every year thereafter for the next five years from the effectivity of the act.

name: HBN-03846
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT 7942, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE MINING ACT OF 1995
congress_website_abstract: The bill calls for the repeal of the Mining Act of 1995 in view of the consequences brought about by large scale mining on the environment, health and the rights of indigenous peoples.

name: HBN-03848
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE WORKERS' COMPENSATION PROGRAM, THE WORK CONTIGENCY INSURANCE FUND, THE PHILIPPINE WORKERS' COMPENSATION AUTHORITY AND DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS AND AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE ARTICLES 166 TO 208-A OF TITLE 2 BOOK IV OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442, AS AMENDED OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Workers' Compensation Act of 2005\". The bill proposes a comprehensive and integrated implementation of the employees' compensation program that focuses not only on benefits payment but also on work contingency prevention and, in situations where workers would eventually suffer from work-connected sickness or injury, their rehabilitation into productive members of society.

name: HBN-03849
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A WORKING TIME FLEXIBILIZATION IN THE PRIVATE SECTOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES, THEREBY AMENDING ARTICLES 83, 85, AND 87 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE FOUR HUNDRED FORTY-TWO (PD 442), AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for a shortened or compressed work week by extending normal daily working hours but not to exceed 10 hours a day.

name: HBN-03850
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE JURISDICTION OF LABOR CASES BETWEEN THE NATIONAL LABOR RELATIONS COMMISSION (NLRC) AND THE REGIONAL OFFICES OF THE DEPARTMENT OF LABOR AND EMPLOYMENT (DOLE), AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE, ARTICLES 128 AND 217 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBER FOUR HUNDRED FORTY-TWO (PD 442), AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to transfer the jurisdiction over labor cases from the National Labor Relations Commission to the regional offices of the Department of Labor and Employment REGARDLESS OF THE AMOUNT OF CLAIM.

name: HBN-03851
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE EXCEPTIONS FROM THE NIGHT WORK PROHIBITION OF WOMEN EMPLOYEES, THEREBY AMENDING ARTICLE 131 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBER FOUR HUNDRED AND FORTY-TWO (PD 442), AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: To allow more women to work during nighttime, the bill seeks to lift certain prohibitions identified in Article 131 of the Labor Code, such as: a) in cases of emergency; b) in case of urgent work performed on machineries, equipment or installation, and c) where work is necessary to prevent the serious loss of perishable goods.

name: HBN-03852
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE LOCAL EMPLOYMENT AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The measure seeks to establish a local employment authority that shall be responsible for planning and managing the promotion, facilitation, generation and enhancement of local employment.

congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING THE COMPENSATION OF THE OFFICERS AND EMPLOYEES OF THE COMMISSION ON AUDIT AND AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1445 ENTITLED THE GOVERNMENT AUDITING CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES WITH THE VIEW TO FURTHER ENSURING AND STRENGTHENING THE COMMISSION'S INDEPENDENCE
congress_website_abstract: \"COA Compensation Rationalization Act.\" The measure exempts the compensation of the officials and employees of the Commission on Audit from RA 6758 (Compensation and Classification Act of 1989) and grants the Commission the authority to determine the same.

name: HBN-03856
congress_website_title: AN ACT REVISING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9136 ENTITLED \"AN ACT ORDAINING REFORMS IN THE ELECTRIC POWER INDUSTRY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN LAWS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: The measure proposes certain amendments to RA 9236 (Electric Power Industry Reform Act of EPIRA) in order to afford protection to end-users of electicity, to level the playing field and to recognize the rights of the industry players to a just and reasonable return on their investments.

name: HBN-03857
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1869 WHICH CONSOLIDATED AND AMENDED PRESIDENTIAL DECREES NOS. 1067-A, 1067-B, 1067-C, 1399 AND 1632, RELATIVE TO THE FRANCHISE AND POWERS OF THE PHILIPPINE AMUSEMENT AND GAMING CORPORATION (PAGCOR), AS AMENDED BY EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 260, SERIES OF 1987
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to limit PAGCOR's operation of gambling casinos to the Metro Manila and Clark Field areas only. It prohibits PAGCOR from sponsoring or operating any numbers game that caters to the poor.

name: HBN-03858
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE UNIVERSAL BROADCASTING CORPORATION A FRANCHISE TO CONSTRUCT, INSTALL, ESTABLISH, OPERATE AND MAINTAIN RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING STATIONS IN THE PHILIPPINES

name: HBN-03859
congress_website_title: AN ACT PUNISHING CULPABLE INSOLVENCY FOR NATURAL AND JURIDICAL PERSONS
congress_website_abstract: \"Culpable Insolvency Act of 2005\". The bill seeks to impose the death penalty on incorporators, principal shareholders, board of directors and officers of a corporation or partnership who divest his/her shares from the corporation or partnership involved in a major incident, disaster or catastrophe immediately after such incident, disaster or catastrophe or while an investigation is on-going.

name: HBN-03828
title: RECOGNITION TO TRIBAL PEACE PACT HOLDERS AS PERSONS IN AUTHORITY
long_title: AN ACT ACCORDING OFFICIAL STATUS AND LEGAL RECOGNITION TO TRIBAL PEACE PACT HOLDERS AS PERSONS IN AUTHORITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLE ONE HUNDRED AND FIFTY-TWO OF ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-EIGHT HUNDRED AND FIFTEEN, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_title: AN ACT ACCORDING OFFICIAL STATUS AND LEGAL RECOGNITION TO TRIBAL PEACE PACT HOLDERS AS PERSONS IN AUTHORITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLE ONE HUNDRED AND FIFTY-TWO OF ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-EIGHT HUNDRED AND FIFTEEN, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to include peace pact holders in the list of persons in authority such as the barangay councilman, barangay policeman, barangay leader, and others.
subjects: ['Tribal Peace Pact Holders (Recognition)', 'Revised Penal Code (1052, Amendments)']

name: HBN-03829
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CEMENTING AND WIDENING OF THE BARANGAY ROAD LINKING BARANGAYS NASAUG AND SAN RAFAEL IN MAASIN CITY, PROVINCE OF SOUTHERN LEYTE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03830
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING DRUG PRICES, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE THE DRUG PRICES REGULATION BOARD, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Drug Prices Regulation Act of 2005.\" The measure imposes price controls on medicines to bring down prices to reasonable and affordable levels. It establishes the Drug Prices Regulation Board and provides for its composition and powers.

name: HBN-03831
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PENALTIES FOR THE USE AND OPERATION OF ANY VEHICLE AS COMMON CARRIER WITHOUT A CERTIFICATE OF PUBLIC CONVENIENCE ISSUED IN THE NAME OF ITS USER OR OPERATOR, DECLARING AS PUNISHABLE SOME ACTS SIMILAR OR RELATED TO SUCH OPERATION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS OF THE PUBLIC SERVICE ACT AND THE LAND TRANSPORTATION AND TRAFFIC CODE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Operation of Common Carriers Law of 2005.\" The bill seeks to penalize grantees of certificates of public conveyance who allow, cause or tolerate another person to operate as a common carrier motor vehicles not owned, borrowed or leased by the grantee.

name: HBN-03832
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 24 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to provide tax relief to working families and wage earners by lowering the income tax rates which at present range from 5% - 34% to 4% - 32%.

name: HBN-03833
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE EDUCATION REHABILITATION CORPORATION, ESTABLISHING THE SPECIAL EDUCATION REVITALIZATION FUND, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Education Revitalization Act.\" The bill proposes to levy a tax of P1.00 per text message sent on all local text messages for a period of 5 years from the effectivity of the proposed act. The proceeds of the tax shall accrue to the Special Education Revitalization Fund to fund the nationwide rehabilitation and revitalization of our educational resources. It establishes the Philippine Rehabilitation Corporation which shall be responsible for the execution of the rehabilitation program.

name: HBN-03834
title: NO BIDDING SALE (GOVERNMENT-OWNED PROPERTIES)
long_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 12 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7279, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE URBAN DEVELOPMENT AND HOUSING ACT OF 1992, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE 'NO-BIDDING' SALE OF GOVERNMENT-OWNED PROPERTIES TO ITS OCCUPANTS FOR SOCIALIZED HOUSING, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7279 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE URBAN DEVELOPMENT AND HOUSING ACT OF 1992, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to eliminate the public bidding requirement in the sale of government properties provided that the subject property is certified by the Housing and Urban Development Coordinating Council and by the National Housing Authority for use as a socialized housing area. Only informal occupants who have resided on the property for at least 10 years shall qualify as beneficiaries.
subjects: ['No Bidding Sale (Government-Owned Properties)', 'Government Properties (No Bidding Sale)']

name: HBN-03835
title: SOCIALIZED AND LOW-COST HOUSING LOAN RESTRUCTURING ACT OF 2005
long_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A SOCIALIZED AND LOW-COST HOUSING LOAN RESTRUCTURING PROGRAM, PROVIDING THE MECHANISM THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A SOCIALIZED AND LOW-COST HOUSING LOAN RESTRUCTING PROGRAM, PROVIDING THE MECHANISM THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Socialized and Low-Cost Housing Loan Restructuring Act of 2005.\" The measure seeks to institute a restructuring program for all socialized housing loan accounts (loans amounting to P225,000 and below) and all low-cost housing loan accounts (loans amounting to over P225,000 but not exceeding P500,000) in government financing institutions.
subjects: ['Socialized/Low-Cost Housing Loan Program', 'Socialized Housing Loan Restructure']

name: HBN-03836
congress_website_title: AN ACT OFFICIALLY DECLARING THE NATIONAL SYMBOLS OF THE PHILIPPINES, DISSEMINATING ITS CULTURAL AND HISTORICAL SIGNIFICANCE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill declares the following as the national symbols of the country: a) Jose P. Rizal, national hero; b) barong tagalog and baro't saya, national attire; c) carabao, national animal; d) bahay kubo, national house; e) bangus, national fish; f) anahaw, national leaf; g) sipa, national sport; h) tinikling, national dance; and i) mango, national fruit.

name: HBN-03837
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE MANLELUAG SPRING NATIONAL PARK AS A PROTECTED AREA, PROVIDING FOR ITS MANAGEMENT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03838
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE PROPER AND AUTHORIZED USE OF GOVERNMENT VEHICLES, AND REGULATING ITS CARE AND CUSTODY, AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR ANY VIOLATION THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Government Vehicles Act.\" The bill prescribes the prohibited acts with regard to the use of government vehicles.

name: HBN-03839
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE PROTECTION AND PRESERVATION OF PHILIPPINE CULTURAL HERITAGE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Cultural Heritage Act of 2003\". The bill seeks to protect, preserve, conserve and promote the nation's cultural heritage, its properties and histories.

name: HBN-03840
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING THE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7305 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE MAGNA CARTA OF PUBLIC HEALTH WORKERS PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to promote the welfare of public health workers coming from the 4th, 5th and 6th class municipalities and provinces by directing the national government to entirely shoulder their salaries, allowances and other benefits.

name: HBN-03784
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A MECHANISM FOR AN OPEN SYSTEM OF HIGHER EDUCATION IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"Open Tertiary Education Act of 2005.\" The bill seeks to regulate the operation of colleges and universities that offer open and distance education.

name: HBN-03818
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTOMATICALLY ASSIGNING TO GOVERNMENT INSURANCE PROCEEDS OF CORPORATIONS UNDERTAKING INDUSTRIAL PROJECTS WHENEVER MAJOR ACCIDENT, DISASTER OR CATASTROPHIC EVENT OCCURS INVOLVING THEIR INDUSTRIAL PROJECT CAUSING DAMAGE TO PERSONS, PROPERTY AND ENVIRONMENT
congress_website_abstract: \"Industrial Disaster Insurance Act of 2005.\" The bill provides for the automatic assignment to the government of the insurance proceeds paid to corporations should a catastrophic event or accident occur causing grave damage to persons, property or environment. In this manner, the government can be assured that compensation for the damage caused will be indeminified.

name: HBN-03819
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A CREDIT INFORMATION BUREAU SYSTEM, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Credit Information Bureau System Act.\" The bill provides for the creation of a Credit Information Bureau, with the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas as the majority shareholder, that will have the power to collect and disseminate credit-related information and maintain the credit history and track record of borrowers.

name: HBN-03820
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SOUTHERN LUZON POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE (SLPC) IN LUCBAN, QUEZON, ITS UNITS AND SATELLITE CAMPUSES IN SAMPALOC, INFANTA, POLILIO, TAGKAWAYAN AND ALABAT, ALL IN THE PROVINCE OF QUEZON, AND THE LUCENA DUAL-TECH LIVELIHOOD AND TRAINING CENTER IN THE CITY OF LUCENA TO A STATE UNIVERSITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE SOUTHERN LUZON STATE UNIVERSITY (SLSU), APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03821
title: TREE PLANTING DAY (ARBOR DAY)
long_title: AN ACT TO PROVIDE THE REVIVAL OF ARBOR DAY BY VESTING IN PROVINCIAL, CITY AND MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENTS WITH THEIR COMPONENT BARANGAYS THE RESPONSIBILITIES FOR CELEBRATING THE DAY FOR TREE PLANTING AS AN ANNUAL EVENT
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROVIDE THE REVIVAL OF ARBOR DAY BY VESTING IN PROVINCIAL, CITY AND MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENTS WITH THEIR COMPONENT BARANGAYS THE RESPONSIBILITIES FOR CELEBRATING THE DAY FOR TREE PLANTING AS AN ANNUAL EVENT
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants provincial, city and municipal governments the responsibility and flexibility to choose the date to celebrate Arbor Day.

name: HBN-03822
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE HOUSING PROGRAM AND SERVICES FOR TEACHERS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Teachers' Housing Program and Services Act.\" The bill seeks to insitute a housing program and services exclusively for teachers through the provision of funds subject to low interest rates and easy payment schemes. It also seeks the participation of non-government organizations and private developers in the development of housing projects.

name: HBN-03823
congress_website_title: AN ACT REVISING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9136 ENTITLED \"AN ACT ORDAINING REFORMS IN THE ELECTRIC POWER INDUSTRY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE OF CERTAIN LAWS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides policies and measures that will prevent industry players from passing on the cost of their inefficiencies and onerous contracts to electricity consumers.

name: HBN-03824
congress_website_title: AN ACT CALLING FOR A CONSTITUTIONAL CONVENTION TO STUDY AND APPROVE PROPOSED AMENDMENTS TO, OR REVISIONS OF, THE 1987 CONSTITUTION, PROVIDING FOR PROPORTIONAL REPRESENTATION THEREIN AND OTHER DETAILS RELATING TO THE HOLDING OF THE CONVENTION, SETTING THE DATE OF ELECTION OF DELEGATES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Constitutional Convention Act.\" The measure prescribes the composition of the Constitutional convention, the qualifications and election of delegates, their compensation, rules and quorum.

name: HBN-03825
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL IDENTIFICATION SYSTEM
congress_website_abstract: \"National Identification System Act of 2006.\" The bill proposes the adoption of a national identification system that shall serve as the official identification card of Filipino citizens and alien permanent residents when dealing with all government institutions.

name: HBN-03826
congress_website_title: AN ACT ADOPTING THE SIMPLIFIED NET INCOME TAXATION FOR INDIVIDUALS ENGAGED IN TRADE/BUSINESS AND/OR PRACTICE OF PROFESSION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN SECTIONS OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: \"Simplified Net Income Tax Reform Act of 2005.\" The measure proposes the adoption of a simplified net income taxation scheme on the income of individuals engaged in trade or business or in the exercise of a profession. It allows the deduction from gross income of the direct costs incurred in the production of goods or rendition of services.

name: HBN-03827
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE INTERNATIONAL NEWS CORPORATION (INC) A FRANCHISE TO CONSTRUCT, INSTALL, ESTABLISH, OPERATE AND MAINTAIN RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING STATIONS IN THE PHILIPPINES

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE VISAYAS MARITIME STATE UNIVERSITY (VMSU) IN NORTHWESTERN LEYTE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03816
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING CERTAIN BENEFITS AND INCENTIVES TO ALL BARANGAY TANODS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE LOCAL GOVERNEMNT CODE OF 1991, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to grant barangay tanods the following benefits: a) a monthly honorarium of P600.00; b) 1,000 Christmas bonus; and c) free tuition and matriculation fees for their legitimate children attending state colleges and universities.

name: HBN-03817

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE WORKERS' COMPENSATION PROGRAM, THE WORK CONTINGENCY INSURANCE FUND, THE PHILIPPINE WORKERS' COMPENSATION AUTHORITY AND DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS AND AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE ARTICLES 166 TO 208-A OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE FOUR HUNDRED FORTY-TWO (PD 442), AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Workers' Compensation Act of 2005.\" The bill provides a clear description of the Workers Compensation Program and its components, namely, coverage, benefits, rehabilitation of occupationally disabled workers, and work contingency prevention. It seeks the creation of a Work Contingency Insurance Fund from which payment of benefits shall be sourced.

name: HBN-03796
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REPAIR/REHABILITATION OF THE ANTIAO CREEK IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATBALOGAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE COMPLETION OF THE CONSTRUCTION OF THE TALALORA-VILLAREAL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALALORA, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03800
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING AND PENALIZING ACTS 0F TERRORISM, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Terrorism Act of 2005.\" The bill defines the acts of terrorism and the penalties for the commission of terroristic acts. It provides for the creation of an Anti-Terrorism Council which shall coordinate, supervise and monitor the government's drive against domestic and international terrorism.

name: HBN-03801
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SENIOR CITIZENS' CENTER IN THE FIRST LEGISLATIVE DISTRICT OF SAMAR AND APPROPRIATE FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING MINIMUM WAGE EARNERS FROM INCOME TAX PAYMENTS, REDUCING THE INCOME TAX RATES OF INDIVIDUAL TAXPAYERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 24(a)(1)(c)OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to exempt minimum wage earners from income taxation and to impose higher tax rates on individuals earning more than P1.0 million annually.

name: HBN-03803
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT AND MANAGEMENT OF BALINSASAYAO TWIN LAKES IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF SIBULAN AND SAN JOSE, ALL IN THE PROVINCE OF NEGROS ORIENTAL, AS A NATURAL PARK, DEFINING ITS SCOPE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

congress_website_title: AN ACT REFORMING THE NATIONAL FOOD AUTHORITY, CONVERTING IT INTO A GOVERNMENT-OWNED SERVICE CORPORATION, DEFINING ITS POWERS TO INSURE FOOD SECURITY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"National Food Authority Reform Act of 2005.\" The measure seeks to convert the National Food Authority into a government-owned and controlled corporation with clearly defined powers to ensure the food security of the country.

name: HBN-03805
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING MARCH 21 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN VICTORIAS CITY, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTIAL

name: HBN-03807

name: HBN-03809
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL HIGH SCHOOL STUDENTS TO PLANT FIVE TREES AS A PRE-CONDITION FOR THEIR GRADUATION FROM HIGH SCHOOL
congress_website_abstract: The measure requires public and private high school students to plant 5 trees a year as a prerequisite for graduation from high school. It also requires grades 5, 6 and 7 pupils to plant/grow seedlings as part of their shop work in preparation for their graduation.

name: HBN-03810
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE LEYTE INSTITUTE, A PRIVATE HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BARUGO, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, INTO A PUBLIC NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE LEYTE INSTITUTE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03791
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A WORKING TIME FLEXIBILIZATION IN THE PRIVATE SECTOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES, THEREBY AMENDING ARTICLES 83, 85 AND 87 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE FOUR HUNDRED FORTY-TWO (PD 442) AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to modify the existing normal hours of work to allow for a flexible working time or compressed work week scheme.

name: HBN-03792
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE EXCEPTIONS FROM THE NIGHT WORK PROHIBITION OF WOMEN EMPLOYEES, THEREBY AMENDING ARTICLE 131 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE FOUR HUNDRED FORTY-TWO (PD 442), AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: To allow more women to work during nighttime, the bill seeks to lift certain prohibitions identified in Article 131 of the Labor Code, such as: a) in cases of emergencies; b) in case of urgent work performed on machineries, equipment or installation; and c) where work is necessary to prevent serious loss of perishable goods; among others.

name: HBN-03793
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PENALIZE DRIVING UNDER THE INFLUENCE OF ALCOHOL AND/OR DANGEROUS DRUGS
congress_website_abstract: \"Driving Under the Influence Act of 2005.\" The measure penalizes drivers found under the influence of alcohol or dangerours drugs with imprisonment of one year but not more than 2 years or a fine ranging from P20,000 to P80,000, or both. In addition, a 6-month suspension of the license shall be imposed for the 1st conviction, a 12-month suspension for the 2nd conviction and revocation of license and perpetual disqualification to hold a driver's license for the 3rd conviction.

name: HBN-03794
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MABACAN, MUNICIPALITY OF CALAUAN, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, TO BE KNOWN AS THE MABACAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03768
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A NATIONAL IDENTIFICATION SYSTEM, DEFINING ITS COVERAGE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure establishes a national identification system (NIS). The NIS shall preserve national security and expedite private and public transactions.

name: HBN-03769
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO CREATE A LOCAL HOUSING BOARD IN EVERY CITY AND MUNICIPALITY, PROVIDING FOR ITS POWERS AND DEFINING ITS DUTIES AND FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Local Housing Board Act.\" The bill mandates the creation of the Local Housing Board (LHB) in every city and first to third class municipality to formulate, implement and monitor policies on the provision of housing and on the observance of a just and humane procedure in cases of eviction and demolition. Mandates local government units to allocate 1% of their internal revenue allotment for the activities of the LHB.

name: HBN-03770
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING ALL SAFETY AND SECURITY FACILITIES OF ALL DOMESTIC AIRPORTS NATIONWIDE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the conduct of yearly monitoring and inspection of the security and safety facilities, features and equipment in all domestic airports nationwide.

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BAGONG BAYAN, MUNICIPALITY OF EL NIDO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, TO BE KNOWN AS THE WESTERN EL NIDO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, PROVIDING FOR ITS FUNDING AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE TUBBATAHA REEF NATIONAL MARINE PARK IN THE PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, AS A NATURAL PARK UNDER THE NIPAS ACT AND SEP LAW, PROVIDING FOR ITS MANAGEMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03763
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 198, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"PROVINCIAL WATER UTILITIES ACT OF 1973\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants the board of water districts the power to define the duties and fix the compensation and emoluments of the personnel of water districts.

name: HBN-03764
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PROVINCE OF WESTERN LEYTE FROM THE PROVINCE OF LAYTE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03765
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ORMOC CITY SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADES IN THE CITY OF ORMOC, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, INTO A STATE COLLEGE, TO BE KNOWN AS THE ORMOC CITY STATE COLLEGE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03766
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MAGNA CARTA FOR WOMEN
congress_website_abstract: \"The Magna Carta for Women.\" The bill seeks to address the wide-ranging needs and sectoral concerns of women, specially those in the marginalized sector. It concretizes women's participation and empowerment in all aspects of the family, community and society.

name: HBN-03767
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE ACT OF TERRORISM AS HEINOUS CRIME AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFORE
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Terrorism Act of 2005.\" The bill seeks to define terrorist activities and imposes the penalty of death on those found guilty of committing terrorism.

name: HBN-03753
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE COMPLETION OF THE BREAKWATER IN BARANGAY BUNTAY, MUNICIPALITY OF ZUMARRAGA, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03754
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A CONCRETE PAVEMENT IN BARANGAY PINAMITANAN, MUNICIPALITY OF MARABUT, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SANDOVAL BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SANDOVAL, MUNICIPALITY OF TAYTAY, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE SANDOVAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, PROVIDING FOR ITS FUNDS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03714
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONVERSION OF THE CORON SCHOOL OF FISHERIES ANNEX AT BORAC IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CORON, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE BORAC NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03715
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1464, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Smuggling Act of 2005.\" The bill provides systematic solutions to make the detection of smuggling easier. It seeks the creation of an Anti-Smuggling Commission with the power of subpoena decus tecum. It also increases the fines for outright smuggling from a maximum of P10,000 to a maximum of P2.0 million, and the prison term from the current 12 years to reclusion perpetua.

name: HBN-03716
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A LOCAL TOURISM OFFICE IN EVERY MUNICIPALITY THROUGHOUT THE COUNTRY
congress_website_abstract: The measure proposes to establish a local tourism office in every municipality so that local folks who know the place best will be able to advertise their own culture and heritage.

name: HBN-03717
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SOGOD, SOUTHERN LEYTE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03718
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING GOVERNMENT ASSISTANCE IN THE FORM OF SCHOLARSHIP GRANTS TO THE YOUTH ENGAGED IN AGRICULTURE TO MAXIMIZE PRODUCTIVITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Government Assistance in the Form of Scholarship Grants to the Youth for Agricultural Productivity Act.\" For the youth in rural areas to be true partners in development and nation-building, the bill provides scholarship grants to the youth who are engaged in agriculture in order to help them acquire skills in agricultural management and technology transfer.

name: HBN-03719
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A CENTER FOR THE TEACHER'S EXCELLENCE IN ALL THE LEGISLATIVE DISTRICTS THROUGHOUT THE COUNTRY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks the establishment of a Center for Teacher's Excellence in all legislative districts. The Center shall be tasked to develop and maintain a continuing program to upgrade the teaching competence and skills of teachers under the Department of Education, Culture and Sports.

name: HBN-03720
congress_website_title: AN ACT ABOLISHING THE AGE REQUIREMENT FOR APPLICANTS TAKING THE BOARD EXAMINATION FOR SOCIAL WORKERS, PROVIDING FOR THE CONTINUING SOCIAL WORK EDUCATION AND UPGRADING THE SUNDRY PROVISIONS RELATIVE TO THE PRACTICE OF SOCIAL WORK
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to give young social work graduates the opportunity to take the board examination for social workers and become economically and socially productive.

name: HBN-03721
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY NAPURO, MUNICIPALITY OF STA, MARGARITA, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, TO BE KNOWN AS THE NAPURO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03722
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A JOINT LEGISLATIVE-EXECUTIVE TAX COMMISSION, DEFINING ITS COMPOSITION, POWERS AND FUNCTIONS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure proposes the revival of the Joint Legislative-Executive Tax Commission as a means to fast track the passage of future tax and revenue measures. The Commission shall be composed of representatives from the executive department, the House of Representatives and the Senate.

name: HBN-03723
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442 OR THE PHILIPPINE LABOR CODE BY REPEALING ARTICLE 263(G)
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to revoke the power granted to the Secretary of Labor and Employment to assume jurisdiction over labor disputes and to decide and certify the same to the National Labor Relations Commission for compulsory arbitration.

name: HBN-03705
title: VALUE-ADDED TAX INCREASE ON SALE OF GOODS OR PROPERTIES
long_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 106, 107, 108, 109, 110 AND 111 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill expands the coverage of the valued added tax to include previously zero-rated and exempt transactions, as follows: a) sale of generated power by generation companies, b) sale or importation of petroleum products, c) sale or importation of raw materials used in the manufacture of petroleum products by the buyer/importer himself, d) importation of passenger/cargo vessels of more than 5,000 tons be used for international shipping, and e) services rendered in the exercise of the medical and legal professions.
subjects: ['Taxes (VAT on Sale of Goods/Properties)', 'Value-Added Tax Increase', 'National Internal Revenue Code (NIRC)']

name: HBN-03692
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING DECEMBER FIRST OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ARAYAT, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, TO BE KNOWN AS \"GEN. JOSE M. ALEJANDRINO DAY\"

name: HBN-03693
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PRE-NEED CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"Pre-Need Code of the Philippines.\" The bill direct pre-need companies to maintain their trust fund at a level equivalent to the actuarial reserve liability. It provides for a longer grace period of five months, termination values in the event the planholder opts to terminate his policy and the creation of a planholders' protection fund.

name: HBN-03694
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT 7916, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE ACT OF 1995\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides that the levy (five percent of gross value) imposed on all business enterprises located within economic zones (ecozones) be allocated as follows: a) 2% to the national government; b) 2% to the city/municipality where the enterprise is located; and c) 1% to the province having territorial jurisdiction over the area where the ecozone is located.

name: HBN-03695
congress_website_title: AN ACT NAMING THE FIVE (5) NEWLY CONSTRUCTED TWO-STOREY HIGH SCHOOL BUILDINGS IN THE PROVINCE OF ZAMBALES AS JESUS F. MAGSAYSAY HIGH SCHOOL

congress_website_abstract: The bill declares the conferment of a Bachelor of Laws degree equivalent to a Master degree for purposes of appointment to positions requiring such educational attainment.
