congress_website_abstract: \"State's Royalty Act of 2005.\" The bill proposes to charge mineral resources extractors a mining royalty equivalent to 12% of the net sales profit of the mineral resources extractor.

name: HBN-03760
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING MINING ROYALTIES TO INDIGENOUS PEOPLE AND OTHER COMMUNITIES AFFECTED BY MINING OPERATIONS AND ANY OTHER ACTIVITY ARISING FROM THE EXPLORATION, UTILIZATION, EXTRACTION AND DEVELOPMENT OF ANY MINERAL RESOURCE FROM ANY MASS OF LAND OR PROPERTY INCLUDING BODIES OF WATER AND ANY NATURAL RESOURCE THAT THESE PEOPLE AND COMMUNITIES OWN, OCCUPY AND UTILIZE FOR THEIR SOCIAL, ECONOMIC, CULTURAL AND COMMON WELFARE, ESTABLISHING MECHANISMS FOR ITS PROPER PAYMENT, COLLECTION AND ADMINISTRATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Mining Profits Withholding Act of 2005.\" The bill prescribes the rules to be observed in the repatriation of the profits and capital of foreign mining companies. It prescribes the mining royalty rates to be granted to indigenous people and other communities affected by mining operations.

congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING 50% OF PROFITS AND CAPITAL BY MINING COMPANIES OPERATING IN THE PHILIPPINES TO BE RETAINED IN GOVERNMENT BANKS FOR A MINIMUM PERIOD OF TWENTY-FIVE (25) YEARS, ESTABLISHING MECHANISMS FOR ITS PROPER RETENTION AND ADMINISTRATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Mining Profits Withholdings Act of 2005.\" The bill presrcibes the rules that shall govern the repatriation of profits and capital by foreign mining companies.

congress_website_title: AN ACT RECOGNIZING SOUTHVILLE INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL AS AN EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTION OF INTERNATIONAL CHARACTER, GRANTING CERTAIN PREROGATIVES TO HASTEN ITS GROWTH AS SUCH, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES (Senate concurred with HB03745)

congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to discourage elective officials from running for positions other than those they are presently holding in a permanent capacity by considering them ipso facto resigned from their respective offices upon the filing of their certificates of candidacy.

name: HBN-03736
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8436, ENTITLED \"AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE COMMISSION ON ELECTIONS TO USE AN AUTOMATED ELECTION SYSTEM IN THE MAY 11, 1998 NATIONAL OR LOCAL ELECTIONS AND IN SUBSEQUENT NATIONAL AND LOCAL ELECTORAL EXERCISES, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to delete the requirements for an optical mark reader counting machine and, in lieu thereof, use an \"appropriate technology to count votes.\" It allows the storage of election data in compact disc drives and compact discs. It authorizes the COMELEC to acquire the necessary materials through \"purchase, lease or otherwise.\"

name: HBN-03737
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH AN EMBROIDERY TRAINING CENTER IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUMBAN IN THE PROVINCE OF LAGUNA AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03740
title: AGRICULTURAL COMPETITIVENESS ENHANCEMENT FUND, EXTENSION

congress_website_title: AN ACT TO EXTEND THE UTILIZATION PERIOD OF THE AGRICULTURAL COMPETITIVENESS ENHANCEMENT FUND, AMENDING SECTION 8 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8178, ENTITLED 'AN ACT REPLACING QUANTITATIVE IMPORT RESTRICTION ON AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTS, EXCEPT RICE, WITH TARIFFS, CREATING THE AGRICULTURAL COMPETITIVENESS ENHANCEMENT FUND, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES'
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the extension of the utilization period of the agricultural competitiveness enhancement fund (ACEF) until 2015 to coincide with the expiration of the agriculture and fisheries modernization act (AFMA).

name: HBN-03741
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE PRE-NEED INSURANCE CORPORATION, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND DUTIES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure aims to safeguard the interests of planholders by providing permanent and continuing insurance coverage on all pre-need in-force plans in the industry.

name: HBN-03742
title: RESETTING THE BARANGAY AND SK ELECTIONS TO MAY 2008
long_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164, RESETTING THE BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT RESETTING THE BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS, EXTENDING THE TERM OF OFFICE OF BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN OFFICIALS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for a synchronized barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections scheduled on the last Monday of October 2005 to be moved to the last Monday of May 2008 and every three years thereafter.

name: HBN-03743
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN INTEGRATED SCHOOL AT BARANGAY TIGBAWAN, MAASIN CITY, PROVINCE OF SOUTHERN LEYTE, TO BE KNOWN AS THE TIGBAWAN INTEGRATED SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03811
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE BANGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL SAN JOSE ANNEX IN BARANGAY SAN JOSE, MUNICIPALITY OF BANGA, PROVINCE OF SOUTH COTABATO, FROM THE BANGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE SAN JOSE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03812
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE AND HASTEN THE DEVELOPMENT OF MICROFINANCE NGOs IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"Microfinance NGOs Development Act of 2005.\" The measure grants donee institution status to NGOs to enable donors to claim their donations as a deduction from gross income for a period of 10 years from the effectivity of the proposed act.

name: HBN-03813
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING INDEPENDENT HEALTH AND ENVIRONMENT ASSESSMENT FOR ALL MINING PROJECTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE PHILIPPINE MINING ACT OF 1995
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires that an independent health and environmental assessment of the communities surrounding a mine site be conducted every 5 years from the start of mining operations until 10 years after its closure. An independent Assessment Fund shall be created for the purpose and deposited as a trust fund in a government depository bank.

name: HBN-03773
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR AN INTEGRATED AND COMPREHENSIVE NATIONAL POLICY ON RESPONSIBLE PARENTHOOD, POPULATION MANAGEMENT AND HUMAN DEVELOPMENT, CREATING A RESPONSIBLE PARENTHOOD AND POPULATION MANAGEMENT COUNCIL, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Responsible Parenthood and Population Management Act of 2005.\" The bill sets in place a national policy that assures adequate and continuing information on reproductive health and a full range of family planning methods (excluding abortion).

name: HBN-03774
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE BABALUS MINDORENSIS, COMMONLY KNOWN AS THE TAMARAW, AS THE NATIONAL MAMMAL AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure seeks to declare the tamarraw, which can only be found in the Philippines, as the national mammal.

name: HBN-03775
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 3 (B) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3518, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7169, ENTITLED \"AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE VETERANS BANK AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill limits the ownership of shares of stock in the Veterans Bank to 1,000 shares per veteran, widow or compulsory heir. It also proposes to extend ownership of the Bank's stocks to veterans other than World War II veterans.

name: HBN-03776
title: ANTI-RED TAPE ACT OF 2006
long_title: AN CT TO IMPROVE EFFICIENCY IN THE DELIVERY OF GOVERNMENT SERVICE TO THE PUBLIC BY REDUCING BUREAUCRATIC RED TAPE, PREVENTING GRAFT AND CORRUPTION, AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO IMPROVE EFFICIENCY IN THE DELIVERY OF GOVERNMENT SERVICE TO THE PUBLIC BY REDUCING BUREAUCRATIC RED TAPE, PREVENTING GRAFT AND CORRUPTION AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Red Tape Act of 2005.\" The bill defines certain terms such as simple and complex transactions, frontline services, fixers, action and irrelevant requirements. It provides for clear administrative guidelines and procedures in accessing frontline services.

name: HBN-03777
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING CYBERCRIME, PROVIDING FOR PREVENTION, SUPPRESSION AND IMPOSITION OF PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Cybercrime Prevention Act of 2005.\" The bill seeks to define cybercrime, identify punishable acts involving computers, provide penalties, determine legal procedures for the investigation and prosecution of cybercrimes, clarify jurisdiction and provide for a clause on mutual assistance and cooperation. It provides for the creation of the Cyber-Crime Investigation and Coordination Center.

name: HBN-03778
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL GOVERNMENT CORPORATIONS TO PREPARE THEIR RESPECTIVE ASSET AND LIABILITY MANAGEMENT GUIDELINES THAT WILL DEFINE THE PARAMETERS AND/OR LIMITS OF THEIR FINANCIAL AND OPERATIONAL CAPABILITIES FOR CENTRAL CONTROL AND MONITORING BY THE DEPARTMENT OF FINANCE
congress_website_abstract: The bill directs all government corporations to prepare their respective assets and liability management guideline, to wit: a) financial guidelines to limit borrowing, lending and guaranteeing of any form of financial transaction, and b) operation guidelines to inhibit the corporation from engaging in activities outside their defined capabilities.

name: HBN-03779
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING ANY ADVERTISING AGENCY, TELEVISION OR RADIO STATION AND PUBLICATION WHICH EXPLOIT WOMEN AND GLORIFY SEXUAL VIOLENCE IN ITS ADVERTISEMENTS
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes on advertising agencies, television or radio stations and publications, which exploit women and glorify sexual violence, a fine of: a) for the 1st offense: P50,000 - P100,000; b) for the 2nd offense: )101,000 - P300,000; and c) for the 3rd offense: P301,000 - P500,000 plus cancellation of license or permit.

name: HBN-03780
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING STIFFER PENALTIES AGAINST POLICE OFFICERS, WHO, MALICIOUSLY REFRAIN FROM INSTITUTING PROSECUTION FOR THE PUNISHMENT OF VIOLATORS OF THE LAW OR FOR FAILURE TO TESTIFY IN COURT RESULTING TO THE DISMISSAL OF CASES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLE 208 OF ACT NO. 3815, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The measure imposes the penalty of prision correccional in its maximum period and perpetual or temporal special disqualification on police officers who maliciously or negligently fail to testify in court resulting to the dismissal of a case.

name: HBN-03781
congress_website_title: AN ACT GOVERNING THE REMITTANCES TO THE PHILIPPINES OF FOREIGN EXCHANGE EARNINGS OF FILIPINO WORKERS ABROAD TO ENSURE THAT THE FOREIGN EXCHANGE EARNINGS OF THESE WORKERS ARE REMITTED THROUGH AUTHORIZED FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS OF THE PHILIPPINE GOVERNMENT OR THEIR AUTHORIZED AGENTS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the remittance of the foreign exchange earnings of overseas Filipino workers to their families, dependents and/or beneficiaries through official financial institutions of the government.

name: HBN-03782
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING HARBOR PILOTAGE SERVICES AND THE CONDUCT OF HARBOR PILOTS IN ALL PORTS IN THE PHILIPPINES AND RELATED PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Pilotage Services Act of 2005.\" The bill seeks to institutionalize the prevailing practices in pilotage services, to rationalize pilotage fees and other charges related to pilotage services, and to define the legal relationship between harbor pilots and pilotage organizations.

name: HBN-03783
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING NOVEMBER TWENTY-FIVE OF EVERY YEAR AS 'NATIONAL CONSCIOUSNESS DAY FOR THE ELIMINATION OF VIOLENCE AGAINST WOMEN
congress_website_abstract: In recognition of the need to establish a comprehensive and structured campaign for national consciousness on anti-violence against women. The bill declares November 25 of every year as the \"National Consciousness Day for the Elimination of Violence Against Women\".

name: HBN-03785
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A POSITION OF RURAL DENTIST IN EVERY RURAL HEALTH UNIT UNDER THE DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREF0RE
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to provide a rural dentist in every rural health unit.

name: HBN-03786
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR BOARD, LODGING AND HOUSING BENEFITS TO EMPLOYEES AND PERSONNEL IN ECOZONE ENTERPRISES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 37 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE ACT OF 1995\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Ecozone Housing Act.\" The measure seeks to grant board, lodging and/or housing benefits to the employees and personnel of offices located inside economic zones.

name: HBN-03787
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THREE (3) SMALL FARMERS' REPRESENTATIVES IN THE NATIONAL IRRIGATION ADMINISTRATION (NIA) BOARD BY AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-SIX HUNDRED AND ONE, AS AMENDED, \"AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL IRRIGATION ADMINISTRATION\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the inclusion in the Board of Directors of the National Irrigation Administration of 3 representatives from small farmers representing Luzon, Visayas and Mindanao.

name: HBN-03788
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE LOCAL EMPLOYMENT AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The measure seeks to establish a local employment authority that shall be responsible for planning and managing the promotion, facilitation, generation and enhancement of employment of local employees.

name: HBN-03789
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE JURISDICTION OF LABOR CASES BETWEEN THE NATIONAL LABOR RELATION COMMISSION AND THE REGIONAL OFFICES OF THE DEPARTMENT OF LABOR AND EMPLOYMENT, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE, ARTICLES 129 AND 217 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE FOUR HUNDRED FORTY-TWO (PD 442) AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to grant the Regional Director of the Department of Labor and Employment jurisdiction over labor-related claims \"regardless of the amount of the claim\".

name: HBN-03790
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING WORK ARRANGEMENTS BASED ON SECURITY OF TENURE
congress_website_abstract: \"The Security of Tenure Law of 2005\". The bill seeks to institutionalize the parameters for: a) contracts of employment for an indefinite period, and b) contracts of employment for a definite period. It prescribes the security of tenure, when such contracts are allowed, the form and contents of such contracts and the rights and privileges of employees under contract.

name: HBN-03744
congress_website_title: AN ACT ELIMINATING DISCRIMINATION, ENSURING WELFARE SERVICES AND EMPOWERING WOMEN IN VULNERABLE SITUATIONS, AND PRESCRIBING PENALTIES IN VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: \"Empowerment of Women in Vulnerable Situations Act of 2005.\" The measure defines the disadvantaged situation of women in settings where they need care, sets down standards for gender-responsive care and proposes legislative remedies to eliminate or prevent discrimination.

name: HBN-03724
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REPAIR AND REHABILITATION OF THE PARASANON TIMBER BRIDGE IN BARANGAY PARASANON, MUNICIPALITY OF PINABACDAO, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03725
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE USE OF ALL MEANS 0F COMMUNICATIONS TO DEVELOP THE FILIPINOS' APPRECIATION FOR CULTURE AND THE ARTS
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to tap all means of communication to instill in our citizens an appreciation of Philippine culture and the arts.

name: HBN-03726
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A 25-METER EXTENSION OF THE ROCK CAUSEWAY WITH CONCRETE SHED IN BARANGAY TALIB, MUNICIPALITY OF ZUMARRAGA, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03727
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A CONCRETE FOOTBRIDGE IN BARANGAY CANLAPWAS, MUNICIPALITY OF CATBALOGAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03728
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE COCONUT LEVY FUNDS AND ASSETS ACQUIRED AND ESTABLISHED THEREFROM AS PUBLIC FUNDS IN THE NATURE 0F GENUINE SMALL COCONUT FARMERS' FUND AND CREATING THE COCONUT INDUSTRY DEVELOPMENT COUNCIL FOR PURPOSES OF ADMINISTRATION AND MANAGEMENT THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: \"Genuine Small Coconut Farmers' Funds Act of 2005.\" The bill provides a mechanism so that the rights and interests of small farmers to the coconut levy funds can be protected. It establishes the Coconut Industry Rehabilitation and Development Council and provides for its composition, terms of office, powers and functions.

name: HBN-03729
congress_website_title: AN ACT FOR CONSERVING AND REHABILITATING THE FOREST OF THE COUNTRY THROUGH THE POLICY OF TOTAL LOG BAN FOR A PERIOD OF THIRTY YEARS, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE A NATIONAL FOREST WATCH AND PROTECTION TASK FORCE AND COMMUNITY-BASED COUNCILS

It also grants the following privileges to a foster child: a) health care privileges, b) free access to public education, c) civil service eligibility, and d) emergency fund for medical/hospitalization needs.

It proposes to increase the presumptive input tax from 1 1/2% to 3 1/2% of the gross value in money of their purchases of primary agricultural products used as inputs to production.

congress_website_abstract: \"2001 Omnibus Bill on the Rights of the Accused and Persons Under Investigation for the Commission of Crime.\" The bill provides for a comprehensive set of safeguards for the protection of every person accused, arrested or under investigation for the commission of a crime pursuant to the Bill of Rights, the pronouncements of the Supreme Court and the rules of procedures and other applicable laws.

name: HBN-03582
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE PUBLIC DISPLAY OF PERSONS ARRESTED, ACCUSED OR UNDER CUSTODIAL INVESTIGATION IN A DEGRADING MANNER AND AMENDING FOR SUCH PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7438, ENTITLED \"AN ACT DEFINING CERTAIN RIGHTS OF PERSONS ARRESTED, DETAINED OR UNDER CUSTODIAL INVESTIGATION AS WELL AS THE DUTIES OF THE ARRESTING, DETAINING, AND INVESTIGATING OFFICERS, AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits the public display of persons arrested, detained or under custodial investigation, in hand cuffs, with name tags or other tags or in any manner tending to cause degradation, humiliation, dishonor, discredit, ridicule or contempt.

name: HBN-03583
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A COMPREHENSIVE JUVENILE JUSTICE SYSTEM AND DELINQUENCY PREVENTION PROGRAM, CREATING THE OFFICE OF THE JUVENILE JUSTICE AND DELINQUENCY PREVENTION UNDER THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Prevention Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for a just and more humane system of treating children in conflict with the law. It sets the minimum age of criminal responsibility at 12 years and establishes the Office of Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Prevention.

name: HBN-03562
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE AIR FORCE ACADEMY (PAFA) AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill establishes within the Philippine Air Force (PAF) the Philippine Air Force Academy which shall be tasked to teach and prepare aviation cadets for military service in the PAF.

title: RESTRUCTURING THE VALUE-ADDED TAX

congress_website_abstract: The bill increases the rate of the value-added tax from 10% to 12%.

name: HBN-03509
congress_website_title: AN ACT ENABLING RETIREES WHO HAVE NOT RECEIVED PENSIONS EITHER BY CHOICE OR OPERATION OF LAW TO RECEIVE PENSIONS AT AGE SEVENTY YEARS OR OVER, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Special Retirement Act of 2005.\" The bill grants all retirees who have not received old age pension or annuity either by choice or by operation of law, an old-age pension equivalent to 50% of their average monthly compensation upon reaching the age of 70 years.

congress_website_abstract: \"Government Railways Real Property Tax Exemption Act.\" The bill directs all provinces, cities and municipalities to exempt from the payment of real property tax all government railways operating within their jurisdictions. The exemption shall be deemed ipso facto revoked in the event the railways are privatized.

name: HBN-03534

congress_website_abstract: \"Fire Protection Modernization Act of 2004.\" The bill proposes the Fire Protection Modernization Program that shall consist of: a) the establishment of fire protection services in all local government units; b) the upgrading of existing fire protection equipment and services; c) the establishment of specialized protection and related services; and d) the establishment of training facilities.

name: HBN-03532
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO DEFINE ENFORCEABLE JURIDICAL RELATIONS ON OCCUPANCY ON OR POSSESSION OF PRIVATE LANDS IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill defines the framework of enforceable juridical relations between an occupant of a private land and the owner of said land. Outside of this framework, the occupant is a deemed to be occupying the land by the mere tolerance or magnanimity of the owner.

congress_website_abstract: \"The Drug Abuse Prevention Program in Educational Institution Act of 2004.\" The bill requires all universities, colleges and schools to maintain a program of education that will emphasize on the following: a) the legal consequences of involvement with drugs; b) the medical implications of the use of illegal drugs; and c) the incompatibility of the use/sale of illegal drugs with the goals of educational institutions.

congress_website_abstract: \"Stronger/Special Protection to Children in Conflict with the Law Act.\" The bill provides a just and humane system of dealing with youth offenders through a comprehensive and integrated justice system. It emphasizes and advances efforts toward rehabilitating and reintegrating juvenile offenders into the mainstream of society as productive citizens.

congress_website_abstract: The penalties proposed under the bill range from prision mayor in its minimum and medium periods to reclusion temporal in its medium and maximum periods.

congress_website_abstract: \"Internal Displacement Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to protect citizens from being arbitrarily displaced from his/her home. It establishes a mechanism of support to victims of internal displacement so that damage and injury can be minimized in cases when they cannot be prevented.

name: HBN-03335
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE ESTABLISHMENT OF POLITICAL DYNASTIES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Anti-Political Dynasty Act of 2004.\" The bill disallows the spouse or any relative within the 2nd degree of consanguinity or affinity, whether legitimate or illegitimate, full or half blood, of an incumbent elective official seeking re-election to hold or run for an elective office in the same province in the same election.

name: HBN-03316
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE MEDICAL SCHOLARSHIP AND SERVICE PROGRAM AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Medical Scholarship and Service Act.\" The bill provides for an annual selection of 'medical scholars' from among qualified graduating students. It creates the Medical Scholarship and Service Board which shall administer the Phillipine Medical Scholarship and Service Program.

name: HBN-03317
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROHIBIT THE ASSIGNMENT OR CONTINUANCE IN AN ASSIGNMENT OF CERTAIN OFFICIALS OF THE COMMISSION ON ELECTIONS IN JURISDICTIONS WHERE THEY ARE RELATED BY CONSAGUINITY OR AFFINITY, WITHIN THE FOURTH CIVIL DEGREE, TO ANY INCUMBENT ELECTIVE PUBLIC OFFICIAL OR ANY CANDIDATE FOR A PUBLIC OFFICE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: To forestall the commission of anomalies, the generation of doubt as to the integrity of the election process and to relieve local elections officers of clan pressure, the bill bars the assignment or continuance in assignment of an election officer in areas where the incumbent elective official is a relative by consanguinity or affinity within the fourth civil degree.

name: HBN-03318
congress_website_title: AN ACT ABOLISHING THE DEATH PENALTY, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7659
congress_website_abstract: The bill advocates the abolition of the death penalty and the substitution of the same with the penalty of reclusion perpetua or life imprisonment.

congress_website_abstract: \"Real Estate Profession Act of the Philippines.\" The bill aims to professionalize and upgrade the real estate practice in the country to make it globally competitive. It provides for the creation of the Professional Regulatory Board which shall be tasked to supervise and monitor all real estate transactions, stabilize the prices of land and construction materials, and ensure the collection of the correct amount of taxes.

congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates all branches of the government to include the study of human rights as part of the education and training of all their officials and employees.

name: HBN-03279
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A COMPREHENSIVE JUVENILE JUSTICE SYSTEM AND DELINQUENCY PREVENTION PROGRAM, CREATING THE OFFICE OF THE JUVENILE JUSTICE AND DELINQUENCY PREVENTION UNDER THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Prevention Act of 2004.\" The bill establishes a comprehensive juvenile justice system that focuses on the accountability of the offender, the impact of the crime on the victim and the community, and the ways in which offenders can repair the harm they have done. It increases the age of criminal responsibility from 9 to 12 years old. It exempts minors from the penalties of crimes such as prostitution, mendicancy, vagrancy and curfew, among others.

congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE MUNICIPALITY OF PARANAS, PROVINCE OF SAMAR AS A TOURIST SPOT, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes a uniform 15% income tax rate on the gross income of corporations derived from all sources within and without the Philippines.

name: HBN-03257
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING R.A. 9257 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE EXPANDED SENIOR CITIZENS ACT 0F 2003
congress_website_abstract: \"Revised Senior Citizen Act of 2004.\" The bill grants senior citizens a 20% discount for purchases made from all other food serving/selling establishments in addition to restaurants. It also entitles senior citizens to a 20% discount for the purchase of all kinds of medicines, whether prescribed or over-the-counter. It limits the extension of the discount privilege to senior citizens with an annual income not exceeding P100,000.

name: HBN-03258
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TUBOD EXTENSION OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUBOD, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE, INTO A DISTRICT OFFICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03259
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROTECT THE FILIPINO CONSUMER FROM UNCONTROLLED, UNJUSTIFIED AND ARBITRARY INCREASES IN THE PRICES OF GASOLINE, DIESEL, LIQUIFIED PETROLEUM GAS AND OTHER PETROLEUM PRODUCTS BEING IMPOSED BY THE MEMBERS OF THE DOWNSTREAM OIL INDUSTRY, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE, SECTION 43 OF R.A. 9136, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ELECTRIC POWER INDUSTRY REFORM ACT 0F 2001
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to strengthen the oversight functions of the Energy Regulatory Commission (ERC). It allows the ERC to, moto propio or upon petition, compel any entity in the downstream oil industry to submit documents and records pertinent to the determination of the prices of domestic petroleum and crude oil products.

name: HBN-03260

name: HBN-03262

name: HBN-03263
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE CARIGARA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - JUGABAN ANNEX IN BARANGAY JUGABAN, MUNICIPALITY OF CARIGARA, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, FROM THE CARIGARA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY PONONG, CONVERTING THE SAME INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE JUGABAN NATONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03264

name: HBN-03265
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 8(f) AND 22(a) OF THE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8282 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE SOCIAL SECURITY ACT OF 1997
congress_website_abstract: The bill excludes the mandated cost of living allowances and the cash value of other remunerations in the determination of the contributions to the SSS. It also proposes to reduce the rate of penalty for delays in remittances from 3% to 1% per month.

name: HBN-03266
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING AND FURTHER DEVELOPING \"117\" AS THE UNIVERSAL EMERGENCY ASSISTANCE NUMBER FOR PUBLIC SAFETY AND SECURITY AND F0R OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Hotline '117' Act.\" The bill designates the telephone number '117' as the universal emergency assistance number in the whole country.

name: HBN-03267
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE PRODUCTION, DISTRIBUTION, SALE, COPYING, LEASE, SHOWING OR EXHIBITION, IMPORTATION AND EXPORTATION OF VIOLENT MOVIES AND THOSE GLORIFYING CRIMES OR CRIMINALS AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits and penalizes movies that cater to violence and glorify criminals. Penalties shall range from imprisonment of not less than 3 years and a fine of not less than P100,000 to imprisonment of not more than 7 years and a fine of not more than P500,000.

name: HBN-03268
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 3 AND 5 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9287
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to further increase the penalty for illegal numbers game by imposing fines as an additional penalty.

name: HBN-03269
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE MOVIE AND TELEVISION CONTROL COMMISSION, ABOLISHING THE MOVIE AND TELEVISION REVIEW AND CLASSIFICATION BOARD, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: The bill prescribes the powers and functions of the Commission; and the composition, qualifications and compensation of the members of the Commission.

name: HBN-03239
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE MUNICIPALITY OF BASEY, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AS A TOURIST SPOT AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03240
congress_website_title: AN ACT EFFECTIVELY REPEALING THE AUTOMATIC APPROPRIATION FOR DEBT SERVICE AND INSTITUTIONALIZING THE AUTOMATIC APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS REQUIRED TO COVER THE YEARLY BUDGETARY REQUIREMENTS OF THE PUBLIC EDUCATION SECTOR BY AMENDING SECTION 31 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1177 AND SECTION 26, CHAPTER 4, BOOK VI OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 292, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"ADMINISTRATIVE CODE OF 1987\" WHICH REITERATES IN TOTO SECTION 31 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1177
congress_website_abstract: The bill repeals the automatic appropriation for debt service provision in Section 31 of PD 1177.

name: HBN-03241
congress_website_title: AN ACT RE-ESTABLISHING THE NATIONAL INVENTORS COMMISSION BY CONSOLIDATING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7459, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE INVENTORS AND INVENTION INCENTIVES ACT OF THE PHILIPPINES WITH REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3850, AS AMENDED, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Filipino Inventors and Inventions Incentives Act of 2004.\" The bill re-establishes the National Inventors Commission, defines it powers, duties and responsibilities and provides for support mechansims and incentives for Filipino inventors.

name: HBN-03242
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PRE-NEED PLAN CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"Pre-Need Plan Code of the Philippines.\" The bill provides the regulatory framework to ensure the profitability and stability of the pre-need industry while providing enough safeguards for the Filipino family. It transfers the regulation of pre-need companies to the Insurance Commission.

name: HBN-03243
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH AN OYSTER AND MUSSEL FARM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CALABANGA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03244
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH A CRAB, PRAWN AND SHRIMP HATCHERY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CALABANGA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03245
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING AND DIRECTING THE CAMARINES SUR STATE AGRICULTURAL COLLEGE IN COOPERATION WITH THE PROVINCIAL GOVERNMENT OF CAMARINES SUR TO ESTABLISH, MANAGE AND OPERATE AN EXPERIMENTAL PILI NUT PLANTATION IN SUCH SUITABLE SITE THAT MAY BE SELECTED FOR THE PURPOSE

name: HBN-03246
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES TO PROVIDE SCHOLARSHIP GRANTS TO AT LEAST FIVE PERCENT (5%) OF THEIR STUDENT POPULATION WHO ARE POOR BUT DESERVING STUDENTS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Scholarship for the Poor Act of 2004.\" The measure extends scholarship grants in the form of free tuition fee to at least 5% of the student population who are poor but deserving students.

name: HBN-03247
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR ADDITIONAL BENEFITS AND PRIVILEGES TO PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4670, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE MAGNA CARTA FOR PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS\", AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks the full implementation of the Magna Carta for Public School Teachers. It seeks to grant additional benefits and privileges in the form of more liberal study leaves, educational grants to the children of teachers and more comprehensive special hardship allowances.

name: HBN-03248
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE KIBUNGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - TACADANG EXTENSION SITUATED AT BARANGAY TACADANG, KIBUNGAN, BENGUET FROM THE KIBUNGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL MAIN AT POBLACION, KIBUNGAN, BENGUET PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS THE TACADANG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03249
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH A SOCIALIZED AND LOW-COST HOUSING LOAN RESTRUCTURING PROGRAM, PROVIDING THE MECHANISM THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Socialized and Low-Cost Housing Loan Restructuring Act of 2003.\" The bill seeks to help owners of socialized housing a chance to restructure their loans and help them get back on their feet by providing them some \"breathing space\" in their payment scheme for a specific period.

name: HBN-03250
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1185, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"FIRE CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES\", PROVIDING FOR EFFECTIVE IMPLEMENTATION THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides administrative sanctions and criminal penalties for acts or omissions of a public officer when the same, either through negligence or malice, resulted to or failed to prevent the loss or damage of property due to fire. It provides stringent measures against the owner, administrator, occupant or person who violates the Code.

name: HBN-03251
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FREE MEDICINE ASSISTANCE PROGRAM FOR THE POOR AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Free Medicine Assistance Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to establish the program to address the health care problem of the country. The beneficiaries of the program shall be identified by the Department of Health through the government hospital in coordination with the Department of Social Welfare.

name: HBN-03252
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE MONTHLY ALLOWANCES OF BARANGAY DAY CARE WORKERS FROM FIVE HUNDRED PESOS (Php500.00) TO ONE THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED PESOS (Php1,500.00) AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTY-NINE HUNDRED AND SEVENTY-TWO
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants barangay day care workers in accredited day care centers a monthly allowance of not less than P1,500.

name: HBN-03253
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STREAMLINE THE ENVIRONMENTAL IMPACT ASSESSMENT (EIA) SYSTEM, AMENDING P.D. 1586, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Environmental Impact Assessment Act of 2004.\" The bill reinforces the objectives of the Environmental Impact Statement System and proposes measures to make the process more responsive and, in so doing, provide a major venue for multi-sector participation.

name: HBN-03227
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING THE NATIONAL SERVICE TRAINING PROGRAM (NSTP) ACT OF 2001 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9163\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to equally divide the Reserved Officers' Training Corps hours of tertiary level students between military training and participation in different education-related activities such as tutorials, classroom rehabilitation and the like.

name: HBN-03228
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE BIKOL HERITAGE MUSEUM AND LIBRARY, DEFINING ITS PURPOSES AND OBJECTIVES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03230
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE BIKOL CUTLTURAL CENTER, DEFINING ITS OBJECTIVES AND FUNCTIONS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03231
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REQUIRE ALL LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS TO ADOPT A SCOUTING RECOGNITION DAY IN ORDER TO HIGHLIGHT AND GIVE RECOGNITION TO THE PRINCIPLES OF PATRIOTISM, SERVICE AND CAMARADERIE THAT SCOUTING EXEMPLIFIES
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates all local government units to adopt a Scouting Recognition Day within the month of August of every calendar year.

name: HBN-03232
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROVIDE THE REVIVAL OF ARBOR DAY BY VESTING IN PROVINCIAL, CITY AND MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENTS THE RESPONSIBILITIES FOR CELEBRATING THE DAY FOR TREE PLANTING AS AN ANNUAL EVENT
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates all municipalities and cities to celebrate an Arbor Day at a fixed date every calendar year as may be deemed suitable according to the proper time and season of planting trees.

congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH A LITTLE LEAGUE BASEBALL PARK WHICH SHALL SERVE AS THE VENUE FOR THE TRAINING AND HOLDING OF COMPETITIONS FOR YOUNG BASEBALL PLAYERS IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
subjects: ['Baseball Park (Camarines Sur)', 'Little League Baseball Park (Camarines Sur)']

name: HBN-03236
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INCREASE THE PENALTY FOR THEFT OR ROBBERY COMMITTED WITHIN THE PREMISES OF CHURCHES, TEMPLES AND MUSEUMS
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes that the imposable penalty for crimes involving theft or robbery of religious and cultural objects from any church, temple or public museum be set higher by two degrees than that imposable penalty for such offenses under existing law.

name: HBN-03237
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE IMPORTATION, DOMESTIC SALE OR USE OF GOODS, THE MANUFACTURE, SALE OR USE OF WHICH IS BANNED IN THE COUNTRY OF ORIGIN
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits any person, corporation or entity to import, sell or use goods which are prohibited from being manufactured, sold or used in the country of origin of such goods.

congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 2 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 183 ENTITLED \"AN ACT CREATING RIZAL CITY' AND FURTHER AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 437 ENTITLED \"AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF RIZAL CITY TO PASAY CITY\"

name: HBN-03225

name: HBN-03226
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CREATION OF AN ADDITIONAL BRANCH OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURT IN THE PROVINCE OF BATANGAS TO BE STATIONED AT TANAUAN CITY

name: HBN-03219
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INCLUDE LIQUIFIED PETROLEUM GAS (LPG) AND KEROSENE IN THE LIST OF BASIC NECESSITIES IN SECTION THREE (3), DEFINITION OF TERMS OF REPUBLIC ACT 7581, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"PRICE ACT\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill includes LPG and kerosene in the list of basic commodities so that their prices can be automatically controlled during calamities and other emergency situations.

name: HBN-03220
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE VISION AND POLICIES OF GOVERNMENT IN THE HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT SECTOR, CREATING THE DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT, DEFINING ITS MANDATE, POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Department of Housing and Urban Development Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the powers and functions of the Department proper, the Plans, Policies and Monitoring Office, the Urban Development and Housing Operations Office, the regional offices and Housing and Urban Development Adjudication Commission and prescribes their jurisdiction and composition.

name: HBN-03221
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A NATIONAL LAND USE POLICY, PROVIDING THE IMPLEMENTING MECHANISMS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Land Use Act of the Philippines.\" The bill seeks to arrest the deterioration of our finite land resources and provide a rational framework for sustainable land use planning which shall govern the use, allocation and management of land resources.

name: HBN-03222
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING A TAX ON MOBILE CARRIERS FOR EVERY TEXT ENTRIES ON ALL TEXT GAMES, SPECIFICALLY ON TEXT POLLS, SURVEYS, BRIGADES AND OTHER GAMES OF CHANCE THROUGH TEXT MESSAGES USING CELLULAR PHONES OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE TEXT GAMBLING TAX OF 2004\"
congress_website_abstract: The Text Gambling Tax of 2004. The bill imposes on mobile carrier/cellular companies a tax on all text entries to text games. The tax, however, shall not be imposed on regular text messages.

name: HBN-03223
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN PEDRO, CITY OF SAN JOSE DEL MONTE, BULACAN, TO BE KNOWN AS THE SAN PEDRO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03224
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 235 AND SECTION 272 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, FOR THE PURPOSE OF AUGMENTING, EXPANDING AND DIVERSIFYING THE USES OF THE SPECIAL EDUCATION FUND AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to levy and collect in provinces, cities and municipalities within the Metro Manila area an additional 1% annual tax on the assessed value of real property and in all municipalities outside of Metro Manila, 1/2%. The proceeds of the additional levy shall accrue to the special education fund of the local government unit concerned.

name: HBN-03082
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE RATES OF EXCISE TAX ON ALCOHOL AND TOBACCO PRODUCTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 141, 142, 143, 144 AND 145 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to restructure the specific tax rates for distilled spirits and wines and to revise the excise tax system for fermented liquor, cigars and cigarettes by adopting the ad valorem tax scheme.

name: HBN-03206
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SPECIAL TOURISM ZONE IN THE PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE, CREATING FOR THIS PURPOSE THE DAPITAN CITY SPECIAL TOURISM ZONE AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03207
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4368 ENTITLED \"AN ACT TO ESTABLISH A NATIONAL HISTORICAL COMMISSION, TO DEFINE ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATIONS OF FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to return to the local government of Dapitan City the control, supervision and management of the Rizal Shrine Park, Rizal Relief Map of Mindanao and other similar parks in Dapitan City.

name: HBN-03208
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF THE INDETERMINATE SENTENCE LAW, AS AMENDED, BY PROVIDING FOR THE MANDATORY PAROLE OF PRISONERS WHO SHALL HAVE SERVED AT LEAST FIVE (5) YEARS OF HIS/HER SENTENCE WITH GOOD BEHAVIOR
congress_website_abstract: To decongest our penal institutions, the bill provides for the mandatory parole of prisoners who have served at least five years of his/her sentence with good behavior.

name: HBN-03209
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FRUIT TREE AND VEGETABLE NURSERY IN EACH OF THE SIXTEEN (16) MUNICIPALITIES OF THE SECOND DISTRICT, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03210
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE MUNICIPALITY OF CALBIGA, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AS A TOURIST SPOT AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03211
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SILANGA, MUNICIPALITY OF CATBALOGAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, TO BE KNOWN AS THE SILANGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03212
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE EXPROPRIATION OF A PARCEL OF LAND IN TUMANA, CONCEPCION UNO, MARIKINA CITY, TO BE SUBDIVIDED AND DISTRIBUTED TO THE ACTUAL AND PRESENT OCCUPANTS THEREIN AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03213
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROFESSIONALIZING THE PRACTICE OF CIVIL ENGINEERING IN THE PHILIPPINES, REPEALING FOR THIS PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FIVE HUNDRED AND FORTY-FOUR (R.A. 544), AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to attain the following, among others: a) enable civil engineers (CEs) to cope with the challenges brought about by globalization and cross-border practice; b) upgrade the level of competence of CEs; and c) define the practice of civil engineering in the country by foreign nationals.

name: HBN-03214
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE \"NO-BIDDING\" SALE OF GOVERNMENT-OWNED PROPERTIES TO ITS OCCUPANTS FOR SOCIALIZED HOUSING, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7279, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE URBAN DEVELOPMENT AND HOUSING ACT OF 1992, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill allows occupants of a government-owned property to directly negotiate the purchase of such property for socialized housing purposes without need for a public bidding.

name: HBN-03215
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE MALAMIG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-MALUBAY EXTENSION IN BARANGAY MALUBAY, MUNICIPALITY OF GLORIA, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, FROM THE MALAMIG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MALAMIG, CONVERTING THE SAME INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS MANUEL ADRIANO MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL (MAMNHS) AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03216
congress_website_title: AN ACT CRIMINALIZING DISCRIMINATION AGAINST MUSLIMS/MORO PEOPLE AND INDIGENOUS PEOPLES IN MINDANAO AND ELSEWHERE IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Anti-Discrimination Act of 2004.\" The bill imposes a penalty of imprisonment for 30 days but not more than 6 months and/or a fine of not less than P10,000 nor more than P100,000 for discriminating against Muslims/Moro and/or indigenous peoples in Mindanao and elsewhere in the country.

name: HBN-03217

congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the Board of Liquidators to undertake the disposal of the assets of the PAGCOR, the termination of its personnel, the liquidation of its obligations and all other related issues.

congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to increase the excise tax on distilled spirits, wines, fermented liquor, tobacco products, cigars and cigarettes by 20%, to be adjusted by 3% on the 2nd and 3rd years from the date of the effectivity of the Act.
subjects: ['R.A.No. 9334', 'Taxes/Taxation (Sin Tax)', 'Alcohol/Liquors/Wine (Tax Increase)', 'National Internal Revenue Code', 'Tobacco Products Tax Increase']

congress_website_abstract: The bill requires all branches of the government to include the study of human rights in the education and training of their officers and employees. It also directs all government-owned or financed training institutions to include in their curricula a regular course on human rights.

congress_website_abstract: \"Commission on Human Rights Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for an expanded structural and functional organization to enable the Commission to meet the demands of human rights cases here and abroad. It grants the Commission prosecutorial powers over delineated forms of human rights violations for an effective and speedy resolution of human rights cases.

congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING PRE-SCHOOLS AS AN INTEGRAL PART OF BASIC EDUCATION
congress_website_abstract: \"National Preparatory Education Act.\" The bill proposes a two-level compulsory preparatory public education, namely: a) Kindergarten One for children 3 to 4 years old, and b) Kindergarten Two for children 5 years old.

name: HBN-03202
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING REQUIRED MINIMUM KNOWLEDGE AND COMPETENCIES (RMKC) FOR EVERY CURRICULAR SUBJECT IN EVERY GRADE AND YEAR LEVEL IN BASIC EDUCATION IN ALL PUBLIC ELEMENTARY AND SECONDARY SCHOOLS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Required Minimum Knowledge and Competencies in Basic Education or 'RMKC' Act.\" The bill mandates the administration nationwide of a standardized test to determine and assess the competency of students.

name: HBN-03203
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING ENGLISH AS THE MEDIUM OF INSTRUCTION IN ALL CURRICULAR SUBJECTS, EXCEPT IN FILIPINO LANGUAGE SUBJECTS IN ALL PUBLIC ELEMENTARY AND SECONDARY SCHOOLS
congress_website_abstract: \"English as the Medium of Instruction Act.\" The bill mandates all public elementary and secondary schools to use English as the medium of instruction in all subjects except in Pilipino and other language subjects.

name: HBN-03204
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING FISCAL AUTONOMY TO THE ENERGY REGULATORY COMMISSION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE ELECTRIC POWER INDUSTRY REFORM ACT OF 2001
congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes the Energy Regulatory Commission (ERC) to draw its operational expenses from a special regulatory fee which shall be collected from electric transmission and distribution utilities and industries directly connected with the National Power Corporation. The special regulatory fee shall be equivalent to one centavo per kilowatt-hour sold.

congress_website_abstract: \"Fuel Ethanol Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the use of ethanol as an alternative fuel through the Fuel Ethanol Program. The Program shall launch the production of unconventional and replenishable sources of energy and fuel.

name: HBN-03160
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE PRESENTATION TO THE PRESS OR PUBLIC OF SUSPECTS IN CRIMINAL INVESTIGATIONS BEFORE CASES ARE FORMALLY FILED AGAINST THE SUSPECTS
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to hold any person criminally, civilly and administratively liable for presenting a suspect, who is being investigated, publicly or in a press conference. It also proposes certain guideliness on what the police can do to keep the public informed as to the status of pending high-profile cases.

name: HBN-03161
congress_website_title: AN ACT LIMITING THE HOURS OF CASINO OPERATIONS FROM TEN (10) A.M. TO TWO (2) A.M., AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 14 SUBPARAGRAPH 2 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1869
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for casino operations to start from 10:00 a.m. up to 2:00 a.m. In places where curfew hours are imposed, all players and personnel of the casinos must leave the casino premises before the curfew hours start.

name: HBN-03162
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING REGION XIV TO BE KNOWN AS THE SOUTHWESTERN TAGALOG REGION

name: HBN-03163
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ACCORD ADDITIONAL INSURANCE BENEFITS TO ALL PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS, PROVIDING FUNDS FOR THE PAYMENT OF THE PREMIUMS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Additional Teachers' Insurance Act of 2004.\" The bill grants public school teachers the following term insurance coverage: a) P100,000 death benefits; b) P50,000 burial expenses; and c) P100,000 reimbursement of actual medical expenses.

name: HBN-03164
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY DRUGSTORES TO BE KNOWN AS \"BOTICA SA BARANGAY\", AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Botica sa Barangay Act.\" The bill enjoins the Department of Health to put up drugstores in every barangay making drugs for common illnesses readily available.

name: HBN-03165
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A SYSTEMATIC AND PERIODIC REVIEW OF THE ECONOMY, EFFICIENCY AND VIABILITY OF GOVERNMENT-OWNED OR -CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Sunset Act of 2004.\" The bill provides a mechanism for the systematic review and evaluation of government-owned and controlled corporations (GOCCs). It empowers the committees of the Senate and the House of Representatives having legislative jurisdiction over GOCCs to regularly conduct sunset reviews on these GOCCs.

name: HBN-03166
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANNER OF APPOINTMENT OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS, EXCEPT THE SECRETARY AND TREASURER, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the punong barangay to be appointed by the Governor from a list of 3 nominees submitted by the Representative of the district where the barangay belongs and for the barangay kagawads to be appointed by the Mayor from a list of 2 nominees for each kagawad position submitted by the minority and majority members of the sangguniang panglungsod.

name: HBN-03167
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING FOUR (4) ADDITIONAL METROPOLITAN TRIAL COURT BRANCHES IN THE CITY OF MANDALUYONG, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREOF, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 27 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03168
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PRESERVE AND REHABILITATE THE FOREST BY BANNING ALL LOGGING OPERATIONS IN PRIMARY AND SECONDARY GROWTH FORESTS AND RAINFORESTS, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE A TASK FORCE FOR THE PRESERVATION AND REHABILITATION OF FORESTS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Forest Preservation and Rehabilitation Act of 2004.\" The bill proposes a total log ban on primary and secondary forests and rainforests for a period of 35 years. It provides for the establishment of the Task Force for the Preservation and Rehabilitation of Forests, its functions and composition.

congress_website_abstract: \"University of the Philippines Charter of 2004.\" The bill stipulates the purpose of the university, the composition and powers of the Board of Regents, the powers of the University Council and the tax exemption privileges of the university.

congress_website_abstract: \"Local Housing and Shelter Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the qualifications, powers and duties of the housing and shelter officer named in every local government unit.

congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING THE EFFECTIVE DATES OF BENEFITS FOR MILITARY VETERANS AND THEIR DEPENDENTS PRESCRIBED IN REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6948 AND REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7696
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the benefits prescribed in RA 6948 and RA 7696 to take effect on 09 April 1990 and on 09 April 1994, respectively.

congress_website_abstract: The bill extends the Agri-Competitiveness Enhancement Fund for 6 more years for a total duration of 15 years from the original start-up date of the fund. It also extends the authority granted to the President to impose tariffs up to the year 2010.

congress_website_abstract: The bill sub-categorizes small scale mining into a regular small-scale mining and artisanal mining. It allows small scale miners to organize themselves into partnerships, corporations and cooperatives.

congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR SYNCHRONIZED ELECTIONS IN 2007, EXTENDING THE TERM OF OFFICE OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
