name: HBN-03131
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE DOLOGON-KISANDAY-KIHARONG-PANALSALAN-DAGUMBAAN-BAGONG SILANG-LA ROXAS-PANGANTUCAN ROAD TRAVERSING THE MUNICIPALITIES OF MARAMAG AND PANGANTUCAN, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON INTO A NATIONAL SECONDARY ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03132
title: QUEZON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL (BUKIDNON)
long_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF QUEZON, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON TO BE KNOWN AS THE QUEZON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF QUEZON, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON TO BE KNOWN AS THE QUEZON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03133
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2640, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT TO CREATE A PUBLIC CORPORATION TO BE KNOWN AS THE VETERANS FEDERATION OF THE PHILIPPINES, DEFINING ITS POWERS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill relieves the Secretary of National Defense of the responsibility of micro-managing the Veterans Federation of the Philippines, a purely civilian organization composed of voluntary members.

name: HBN-03134
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED FORTY-FIVE (P.D. 1445), OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE GOVERNMENT AUDITING CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: To reduce corruption in the Bureau of Internal Revenue, the measure empowers the Commission on Audit to audit assessments made by the Bureau.

name: HBN-03135
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING NON-SETTLEMENT OF UNLIQUIDATED CASH ADVANCE OF GOVERNMENT AGENCIES AND ALLOWING LIMITED WRITE-OFF THEREOF, INCLUDING DORMANT AND UNCOLLECTIBLE ACCOUNTS
congress_website_abstract: The bill criminalizes the non-settlement and non-payment of unliquidated cash advances. It provides for a limited write-off of unliquidated cash advances and outstanding/dormant/uncollectible accounts receivable.

name: HBN-03136
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A TIMBANGAN NG BAYAN CENTER IN ALL PUBLIC MARKETS NATIONWIDE, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CHAPTER II OF THE CONSUMER ACT OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The measure directs all local government units to establish a Timbangan ng Bayan Center in all public markets nationwide to make weighing scales readily accessible to buyers.

name: HBN-03137
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING A TEN PERCENT (10%) AD VALOREM TAX ON FLAVORED OR COLOURED SYRUPS EXCLUSIVELY USED IN THE MANUFACTURE OF SOFTDRINKS BY INSERTING A NEW SECTION, THEREBY AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CHAPTER VI, TITLE VI OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes a 10% ad valorem tax on flavored or coloured syrups exclusively used in manufacturing softdrinks. The tax shall be based on the manufacturer's selling price, or the total value of importation.

name: HBN-03138
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING SECTION 145 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997
congress_website_abstract: The bill adopts a uniform tax rate on machine-packed cigarettes. It also proposes to adopt a mechanism that will provide automatic adjustments in tax rates relative to inflation every two years starting CY 2013.

name: HBN-03139
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING MONOPOLIES, ATTEMPT TO MONOPOLIZE AN INDUSTRY OR LINE OF COMMERCE, MANIPULATION OF PRICES OF COMMODITIES, ASSET ACQUISITION AND INTERLOCKING MEMBERSHIPS IN THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS OF COMPETING CORPORATE BODIES AND PRICE DISCRIMINATION AMONG CUSTOMERS, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Anti-Trust Act.\" The bill penalizes combinations or conspiracies in restraint of trade and all forms of artificial machinations that will injure, destroy or prevent full market competition.

name: HBN-03115
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE TACDOGAN REEF IN THE MIDDLE OF TICAO PASS, LOCATED IN THE WATERS BETWEEN THE PROVINCES OF SORSOGON AND MASBATE, A MARINE RESERVE TO BE KNOWN AS THE TACDOGAN REEF NATIONAL MARINE PARK

name: HBN-03116
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF BACOOR INTO AN INDEPENDENT COMPONENT CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CITY OF BACOOR

name: HBN-03117
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE BOARD OF AGROFORESTRY UNDER THE PROFESSIONAL REGULATIONS COMMISSION, PROVIDING FOR MECHANISMS OF IMPLEMENTATION, APPROPRIATING FUNDS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Board of Agroforestry Act of 2003.\" The bill defines the scope of the practice of agroforestry and prescribes the powers, functions and composition of the Board of Agroforestry. The Board shall, among others, conduct a national board examination to all graduates of a four-year degree program on agroforestry

name: HBN-03118
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE MINIMUM WAGE OF HOUSEHELPERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill increases the monthly minimum wage of househelpers from P800 to P3,000 in highly urbanized cities; from P650 to P1,000 in other chartered cities and 1st class municipalities; and from P550 to P800 in other municipalities.

name: HBN-03119
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE MANDATORY COVERAGE OF ALL HOUSEHELPERS IN THE NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE PROGRAM (NHIP) UNDER THE PHILIPPINE HEALTH INSURANCE CORPORATION (PHILHEALTH)
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks the compulsory coverage of all househelpers in the National Health Insurance Program regardless of the wages they receive.

name: HBN-03120
congress_website_title: AN ACT ALLOWING CONTRACTORS WITH RECEIVABLES FROM THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT TO USE THE CERTIFICATE OF INDEBTEDNESS AS COLLATERAL FOR LOANS AND OTHER CREDIT ACCOMMODATIONS IN ANY GOVERNMENT FINANCIAL INSTITUTION
congress_website_abstract: The bill directs all government financial institutions to accept as collateral for loans and other credit accommodations any duly executed certificate of indebtedness issued by any government agency to an eligible contractor.

name: HBN-03121
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ABUYOG COMMUNITY COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ABUYOG, PROVINCE OF LEYTE INTO A STATE COLLEGE TO BE KNOWN AS THE ABUYOG STATE COLLEGE, EXPANDING ITS CURRICULAR OFFERINGS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03122
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING LOI 745 ON THE CREATION OF THE PHILIPPINE COMMISSION ON THE PROMOTION AND DEVELOPMENT OF SCUBA SPORTS & TECHNICAL DIVING AND PRESCRIBING THE PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"An Act Amending LOI 745 and Prescribing the Penalties Therefor.\" The bill provides standard basic dive rules to all levels/kinds of divers, regulate the sport and expand the powers of existing governmental agencies in order to further promote the sport and protect the safety of its enthusiasts.

name: HBN-03123
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO UPGRADE THE SALARY GRADE LEVEL OF PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS FROM SALARY GRADE 10 TO SALARY GRADE 20, AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6758, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: To improve the economic plight of teachers, the bill seeks to upgrade the salary grade (SG) of public school teachers from SG 10 to SG 20.

name: HBN-03124
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO LEGALIZE CHURCH DECLARATION OF NULLITY OR NON-EXISTENCE, ANNULMENT OR DISSOLUTION OF CERTAIN MARRIAGES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides that when a marriage, legally solemnized by a priest, minister, imam, rabbi or presiding elder of an established church, is subsequently declared null or non-existent, annulled or dissolved in a final judgment or decree by said church or religion in accordance with the cannons of the latter, duly entered in the corresponding civil registry, the said declaration shall be recognized and given full force and effect in the Philippines.

name: HBN-03125
congress_website_title: AN ACT REDUCING BUREAUCRATIC RED TAPE BY PROVIDING A MAXIMUM OF TEN WORKING DAYS PERIOD FOR EVERY GOVERNMENT TRANSACTION AND PROVIDING PENALTIES IN VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Red Tape Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to reduce, if not totally eliminate, red tape by limiting the action the government may take in any official transaction to a total of 10 working days.

name: HBN-03099
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 111, PARAGRAPHS 16 AND 17, SUBPARAGRAPHS (a) TO (g), (n) TO (o) OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE 1529, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PROPERTY REGISTRATION DECREE
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposses to adopt the current fair market value or the zonal value, whichever is higher, as the basis in the collection of fees upon registration of property.

name: HBN-03100
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING THAT PROCEEDS OF THE TRAVEL TAX AND PERCENTAGE TAX ON HOTELS EARMARKED FOR OR ADMINISTERED BY THE PHILIPPINE TOURISM AUTHORITY, AND NET PROFITS DERIVED FROM MERCHANDISING OPERATIONS OF DUTY AND TAX-FREE SHOPS SHALL ACCRUE ENTIRELY TO THE UNAPPROPRIATED GENERAL FUND OF THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks the preservation and/or accrual to the general fund of the proceeds of the travel tax and the percentage tax on hotels earmarked for or administered by the Philippine Tourism Authority and of the net profits from the merchandising operations of the duty and tax-free shops accruing to the Department of Tourism.

name: HBN-03101
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE UPGRADING OF THE TRAINING PROGRAM FOR AGRICULTURAL EXTENSION WORKERS IN THE PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03102
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A COMPREHENSIVE JUVENILE JUSTICE SYSTEM AND DELINQUENCY PREVENTION PROGRAM, CREATING THE OFFICES OF JUVENILE JUSTICE AND DELINQUENCY PREVENTION, CHILDREN'S OMBUDSMAN, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Comprehensive Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Prevention Act.\" The bill raises the age of criminal responsibility from 9 to 12 years old. It seeks to restore the harm done to victims and, at the same time, give youth offenders the chance to be rehabilitated and be integrated into society. It establishes the Office of Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Protection and the Children's Ombudsman.

name: HBN-03103
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING TERRORISM AS HEINOUS CRIME, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE REVISED PENAL CODE, AS AMENDED, PROVIDING FOR THE PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Terrorism Act.\" The bill declares the act of terrorism as a heinous crime punishable by death.

name: HBN-03104
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING THE TAX AND DUTY EXEMPTIONS AND PREFERENTIAL TREATMENT GRANTED TO GOVERNMENT AND PRIVATE ENTITIES UNDER SPECIAL LAWS, WITH CERTAIN EXCEPTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill revokes all tax and duty incentives granted to private and government entities under 20 republic acts and 3 presidential decrees. The proposal is expected to generate P5 billion in revenues to the government.

name: HBN-03105
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 109 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to repeal the value-added tax exemption on the following: a) sale/importation of coal, natural gas and petroleum products; b) sale/importation of raw materials used in the manufacture of petroleum products by the importer himself; c) importation of passenger and cargo vessels; d) sales and importations by cooperatives; e) sale, importation, printing and publication of books; and f) medical and legal professional services rendered.

name: HBN-03106
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 10 OF REPUBLIC ACT 6728 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS GOVERNMENT ASSISTANCE TO STUDENTS AND TEACHERS IN PRIVATE EDUCATION (GASTPE)
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for a mechanism whereby the different sectors in our educational system can exercise their right to express their positions in any proposed increase in tuition and other school fees.

name: HBN-03107
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE KATIPUNAN NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KATIPUNAN AND ITS EXTENSION CAMPUS IN SANAO, KATIPUNAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE, INTO A STATE COLLEGE, TO BE KNOWN AS THE ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE STATE COLLEGE OF AGRICULTURE AND TECHNOLOGY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03108
congress_website_title: AN ACT RENAMING THE NATIONAL HISTORICAL INSTITUTE (NHI) TO NATIONAL HISTORICAL COMMISSION (NHC), INSTITUTIONALIZING REORGANIZATION THEREOF, PROVIDING FOR THE IMPROVEMENT AND STRENGTHENING OF ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"National Historical Commission Act of 2004.\" The bill prescribes the general mandate of the Commission, the composition and functions of the Board of Commissioners, and the organizational structure of the national secretarial of the National Historical Commission.

name: HBN-03109
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE KATIPUNAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-SINUYAK ANNEX LOCATED IN BARANGAY SINUYAK IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KATIPUNAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE, INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE SINUYAK NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03110
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE CREATION OF TWO (2) ADDITIONAL BRANCHES (BRANCH 3 & 4) OF THE MUNICIPAL TRIAL COURT IN THE CITY (MTCC) IN DIPOLOG CITY, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE

name: HBN-03111
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE KATIPUNAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX SITUATED IN BARANGAY MATAM, MUNICIPALITY OF KATIPUNAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE, INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE GONZALO B. REINANTE MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

name: HBN-03112
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO CONVERT THE DIPOLOG SCHOOL OF FISHERIES INTO ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE SCHOOL FOR ADVANCED AQUATIC SCIENCES AND TECHNOLOGY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03113
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR MONTHLY ALLOWANCES FOR THE MEMBERS OF LUPONG TAGAPAMAYAPA AND THE PANGKAT NG TAGAPAGKASUNDO, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants a P500 monthly allowance to the members of the lupong tagapamayapa and the pangkat ng tagapagkasundo.

name: HBN-03114
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX IN BARANGAY BARRA, DIPOLOG CITY, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE, INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARRA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

name: HBN-03097
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SOCIALIZED AND LOW-COST HOUSING LOAN RESTRUCTURING PROGRAM, PROVIDING GUIDELINES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Socialized and Low-Cost Housing Loan Restructuring Act of 2004.\" The measure grants qualified borrower-applicants of the Socialized and Low-Cost Housing Loan Restructuring Program the option to restructure their current housing loan accounts should they incur at least 6 months of unpaid monthly amortizations.

name: HBN-03098
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXTENDING THE EFFECTIVITY OF THE RENT CONTROL LAW FOR CERTAIN RESIDENTIAL UNITS FOR ANOTHER FIVE YEARS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE \"RENTAL REFORM ACT OF 2002\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to extend the effectivity of RA 9161 (Rental Reform Act of 2002) for five years from January 1, 2005 to December 31, 2009.

name: HBN-03095
congress_website_title: AN ACT DISESTABLISHING PORTIONS OF PUBLIC LAND IN BARANGAY MALAUBANG, OZAMIZ CITY, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL, IDENTIFIED AS LOT NO. 4828, CAD 240, MISAMIS CADASTRE CONTAINING AN AREA OF EIGHT HUNDRED TWENTY SEVEN THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED FIFTY-FOUR SQUARE METERS (827,754 SQ. M.) PARTICULARLY THE IDENTIFIED ONE HUNDRED SEVENTY SIX THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED FIFTY EIGHT SQUARE METERS (176,458 SQ. M.) MARKED AS \"PHASE ONE\" PROJECT, AND OTHER SUITABLE PORTIONS THEREIN, FROM A PUBLIC FOREST CATEGORY TO A RESETTLEMENT AND SOCIALIZED HOUSING AREA AND DECLARING THE SAME OPEN TO DISPOSITION AND DEVELOPMENT UNDER REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7279 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT ACT OF 1992, AND THE PUBLIC LAND ACT AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03096
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING COMPREHENSIVE RENTAL CONTROL ON COMMERCIAL BUILDINGS AND SPACES, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF AND F0R OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Comprehensive Commercial Units Rental Act of 2004.\" The bill provides that beginning January 1, 2005 until December 31, 2008, the monthly rentals of all commercial units in the National Capital Region and other urban areas shall not be increased by more than the annual average of devaluation of the Philippine peso nor more than 10% cumulative in every year.

name: HBN-03084
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE PELAWAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY PELAWAY, MUNICIPALITY OF ALFONSO CASTANEDA, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA, FROM THE ALFONSO CASTANEDA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE SAME MUNICIPALITY AND PROVINCE AND CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS CASECNAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03085
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REHABILITATION AND RENOVATION OF THE SAMAR PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATBALOGAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03086
congress_website_title: AN ACT BANNING THE MANUFACTURE OF PLASTIC BAGS, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits the manufacture of plastic bags for use as storing material or receptacle for goods purchased from department stores, supermarkets, private or public markets, sari-sari stores and other similar business establishments.

name: HBN-03087
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING FOUR (4) ADDITIONAL REGIONAL TRIAL COURTS IN THE PROVINCE OF CAVITE WITH SEATS AT DASMARINAS, IMUS AND TRECE MARTIRES CITY AS WELL AS THREE (3) ADDITIONAL MUNICIPAL TRIAL COURTS IN DASMARINAS AND IMUS, CAVITE, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PARAGRAPH (e), SECTION 14 AS WELL AS SECTION 29 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980\" AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03088
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BALETE, MUNICIPALITY OF KAYAPA, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA, TO BE KNOWN AS NAPO-TUYAK NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03089
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AT BARANGAY BINALIAN, MUNICIPALITY OF KAYAPA, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA, TO BE KNOWN AS THE BINALIAN INTEGRATED NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03090
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE KAYAPA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-ANNEX IN BARANGAY BOLO, ALANG SALACSAC, MUNICIPALITY OF KAYAPA, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA, FROM THE KAYAPA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE SAME MUNICIPALITY AND PROVINCE AND CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE MARTINEZ CUYUNGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03091
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE EQUAL REPRESENTATION OF THE NFA, RICE MILLERS AND FARMERS IN THE IMPORTATION OF RICE AND PRODUCTION OF LOCAL CROPS AND PROVIDING FOR A TREASURY CROP CERTIFICATE SYSTEM IN THE PROCUREMENT OF GRAINS BY THE NATIONAL FOOD AUTHORITY GUARANTEED BY THE DEPARTMENT OF FINANCE, FOR THE REALIZATION OF A HARMONIOUS RELATIONSHIP AMONG THE THREE SECTORS
congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes rice millers to import and distribute imported rice and to buy the palay produce of farmers at ceiling prices set by the National Food Authority (NFA). It directs the NFA to issue Treasury Crop Certificates which are negotiable instruments that can be sold, bartered, purchased and/or issued as collateral for any loan or debt incurred.

name: HBN-03092
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE TWENTY-SEVENTH DAY OF JULY 0F EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NATIONAL HOLIDAY IN OBSERVANCE OF THE FOUNDING ANNIVERSARY OF THE IGLESIA NI CRISTO (INC) AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03093
congress_website_title: AN ACT SUSPENDING THE PERMIT OF THE METROPOLITAN WATERWORKS AND SEWERAGE SYSTEM TO UTILIZE THE WATER IN ANGAT DAM/RESERVOIR UNTIL SUCH TIME THAT IT HAS FULLY REMITTED TO THE PROVINCIAL GOVERNMENT OF BULACAN ITS ONE PERCENT (1%) SHARE FROM THE GROSS SALES OF WATER AS PROVIDED IN SECTION 291 OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE

name: HBN-03094
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABADBARAN INTO A COMPONENT CITY OF THE PROVINCE OF AGUSAN DEL NORTE TO BE KNOWN AS THE CITY OF CABADBARAN

name: HBN-03079
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION SIXTY THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTY-NINE SEVENTY FIVE OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"DEPARTMENT OF THE INTERIOR AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT ACT OF 1990\" BY INSERTING THERETO A PARAGRAPH PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN INTEGRATED JAIL FACILITY IN METROPOLITAN MANILA AND OTHER HIGHLY URBANIZED CENTERS IN THE COUNTRY, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-03080
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SUMULONG-GUINAYANGAN PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF CALAUAG AND GUINAYANGAN, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS F0R THE IMPROVEMENT AND MAINTENANCE THEREOF

name: HBN-03081
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TAGKAWAYAN MUNICIPAL HIGH SCHOOL, LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TAGKAWAYAN, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03083
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO RATIONALIZE THE PAY FOR THE GOVERNMENT SERVICE INSURANCE SYSTEM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE GOVERNMENT SERVICE INSURANCE SYSTEM ACT OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to set a P100,000 cap on the aggregate monthly salary and allowances of the officers and employees of the Government Service Insurance System.

name: HBN-03073
congress_website_title: AN ACT FIXING THE COMPULSORY RETIREMENT AGE OF OFFICERS OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill sets the compulsory retirement of an officer of the Armed Forces of the PHilippines at 35 years from the date of commission or upon reaching the age of 58 years old, whichever comes first.

name: HBN-03074
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FISHERY AND RESEARCH CENTER IN EACH OF THE MUNICIPALITIES OF BASEY, CALBIGA, CATBALOGAN, DARAM, JIABONG, MARABUT, MOTIONG, PARANAS, PINABACDAO, SAN SEBASTIAN, STA. RITA, TALALORA VILLAREAL AND ZUMARRAGA, ALL IN THE PROVINCE OF SAMAR AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03075
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MULTIPURPOSE FISH BREEDING STATION AND CRAB, PRAWN AND SHRIMP HATCHERY IN EACH OF THE MUNICIPALITIES OF BASEY, CALBIGA, CATBALOGAN, DARAM, JIABONG, MARABUT, MOTIONG, PARANAS, PINABACDAO, SAN SEBASTIAN, STA. RITA, TALALORA VILLAREAL AND ZUMARRAGA, ALL IN THE PROVINCE OF SAMAR AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03076
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A DRAINAGE SYSTEM (CLOSE CANAL) ALONG BARANGAY PATAG, MUNICIPALITY OF CATBALOGAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03077
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CEMENTING OF ROADS AND PATHWAYS IN BARANGAY GUINDAPUNAN, MUNICIPALITY OF CATBALOGAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03078
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF THE SAWA-BUENAVISTA ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BASEY, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-03072
congress_website_title: AN ACT RECLASSIFYING THE 15.6587 HECTARES OF LAND WITHIN LOT NO. 734E OF CAD 115, BAIS CADASTRE FROM TIMBERLAND FOR FISHPOND DEVELOPMENT INTO ALIENABLE AND DISPOSABLE LAND FOR SOCIALIZED HOUSING PROJECT

name: HBN-03065
congress_website_title: AN ACT FIXING THE RATE OF SUBSIDIARY IMPRISONMENT IN CASE OF INSOLVENCY OF THE CONVICT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLE 39 OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: In cases where the convict in unable to pay the fine imposed on him, the bill proposes to set the rate of the subsidiary penalty to one day for each THREE HUNDRED fine.

name: HBN-03066
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE MAXIMUM AMOUNT FOR THE CONSTITUTION OF A FAMILY HOME UNDER THE FAMILY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLE 157 THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill increases the maximum amount for the constitution of a family home from P300,00 to P2.0 million in urban areas, and from P200,00 to P1.5 million in rural areas in order to, at least, approximate the cost of building a decent house under prevailing market prices.

name: HBN-03067
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING BREASTFEEDING BY ESTABLISHING AND MAINTAINING LACTATION STATIONS IN WORKPLACES FOR WORKING MOTHERS PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR ITS VIOLATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Breastfeeding Promotion Act of 2004.\" The bill mandates the establishment of lactation stations in workplaces for nursing female employees. The lactation station must include a lavatory for hand washing, adequate refrigeration equipment for storing milk and comfortable chairs.

name: HBN-03068

It also requires cigarette manufacturers and importers to report the volume of removals instead of the volume of sales to plug the leakages arising from the underdeclaration of removals.

congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to change the present four-tier classification of cigarettes to two tiers and to remove all reference to brands.

name: HBN-03028
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING JANUARY TWENTY-TWO OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY TO BE KNOWN AS NATIONAL FARMER'S DAY
congress_website_abstract: To honor the heroism of the peasants who died in the \"Mendiola massacre\" while fighting for genuine land reform, the bill declares January 22nd of the every year as a special working holiday.

name: HBN-02959
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING AN ELECTIVE PUBLIC OFFICIAL FROM RESIGNING HIS ELECTIVE OFFICE TO ACCEPT AN APPOINTMENT TO ANY GOVERNMENT OFFICE AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill disqualifies an elective official who resigns his elective office from being appointed to any government position during the unexpired term of the office he resigned from.

name: HBN-02960
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 53, AS AMENDED, BY INCLUDING WITHIN ITS COVERAGE JOURNALISTS FROM BROADCAST, NEWS AGENCIES AND INTERNENT PUBLICATIONS
congress_website_abstract: The bill includes within the coverage of RA 53 (Sotto Law) journalists from broadcast stations, news agencies and internet publication. With their inclusion in the ambit of RA 53, journalists can not be compelled to reveal the source of a confidential news report or information except when a court or or committee of Congress finds that the revelation is demanded for the security of the State.

name: HBN-02961
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING TAXES ON IDLE AGRICULTURAL, RESIDENTIAL AND INDUSTRIAL LANDS, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Idle Lands Tax of 2004.\" The bill proposes the imposition of a 5% tax on idle agricultural, residential and industrial lands based on the fair market value or zonal value, whichever is higher. The proposed tax shall be over and above the real estate taxes imposed by the local government.

name: HBN-02962
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING COMPENSATION TO VICTIMS OF HUMAN RIGHTS VIOLATIONS DURING THE ENTIRE PERIOD OF MARTIAL LAW FROM SEPTEMBER 21, 1972 TO FEBRUARY 25, 1986 AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Martial Law Victims Compensation Act of 2004.\" The measure sets aside part of the recovered Marcos ill-gotten wealth for the victims of martial law. It provides for the compensation and manner of allocation of the compensation to the human rights violation victim. It creates the Commission for the Compensation and Recognition of Martial Law Victims and provides for the Commission's powers and functions.

name: HBN-02963
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING SEPTEMBER 21 OF EVERY YEAR AS A \"NATIONAL DAY OF REMEMBRANCE\" IN MEMORY OF THE STRUGGLES AND SACRIFICES OF THE HEROES AND MARTYRS OF THE MARTIAL LAW ERA
congress_website_abstract: \"National Day of Remembrance Act.\" In recognition of the struggles and sacrifices of the heroes and martyrs of the martial law era, the bill declares September 21 of every year as a special working holiday to be known as the \"National Day of Remembrance.\"

name: HBN-02964
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ACCELERATE THE DEVELOPMENT OF ALL BARANGAYS BY PROVIDING FUNDS FOR MICRO ENTERPRISES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Fund for Progress Act of 2004.\" The bill creates an P80 billion Philippine Fund for Progress and allocates P2.0 million to each of the 40,000 barangays in the country for lending to deserving micro enterprises.

congress_website_abstract: \"New DepEd Retirement Age Act.\" The bill sets the compulsory retirement age for all Department of Education teachers and non-teaching personnel at the age of 60 years.

congress_website_abstract: \"Department of Education Special Land Registration Act.\" The measure directs the Land Registration Authority, in coordination with the DepEd, to register all lands occupied by the latter. Lands being used as public schools sites by mere tolerance of landowners must be covered with a written manifestation of the landowner of his intention to donate or sell his property to the DepEd.

congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A NATIONAL LAND USE POLICY, PROVIDING THE IMPLEMENTING MECHANISMS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Land Use Act of the Philippines.\" The bill provides guidelines and criteria for land use based on an assessment of the development needs of various sectors. It provides for the establishment of crucial priorities for land use, especially areas to be protected for ecological purposes and areas to be developed and protected from conversion to ensure food security.

congress_website_abstract: The bill requires prospective members of police and military organizations to go through a course on human rights as part of recruitment and admission procedures.

congress_website_abstract: \"Tax Exemption Act for Those Earning Not More Than the Prescribed Cost-of-Living.\" The bill exempts all workers whose total annual compensation does not exceed P219,000 from the payment of income taxes and filing of income tax returns.

congress_website_title: ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY GANAO, MUNICIPALITY OF DUPAX DEL SUR, PROVINCE OF NUEVA VIZCAYA TO BE KNOWN AS THE GANAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02940
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING THE USE OF HIGH SCHOOL CAMPUS GROUNDS BY ALLOWING ACCESS FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF STATE UNIVERSITY OR COLLEGE (SUC) WITHIN THE SAME CAMPUS GROUNDS MAXIMIZING ITS USE FOR THE STUDENTS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

congress_website_abstract: The bill sets the interest rate limit which may be imposed by credit card companies at not more than 1% per month or 12% per annum, without compounding. It likewise limits the surcharges or penalties to a ceiling of 1% per month, without compounding.

congress_website_abstract: \"Fiscal and Budget Management Reform Act of 2004.\" The bill proposes a structural and functional overhaul of the Department of Finance and the Department of Budget and Management by merging the two to be known as the Department of Budget and Finance.

congress_website_abstract: The bill grants barangay health workers a monthly honoraria of P1,500 and an insurance coverage of not less than P10,000.

name: HBN-02955
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE LAND MANAGEMENT BUREAU TO CONDUCT THE CADASTRAL SURVEY OF THE ENTIRE COUNTRY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Cadastral Survey Act of 2004.\" The bill authorizes the conduct of a cadastral survey of the entire country to identify bona fide landowners or claimants to eradicate the proliferation of fake or spurious titles.

congress_website_abstract: The measure aims to provide ready funds for the repair, maintenance and procurement of equipment in the laboratory and research facilities of the Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) and for its subsoil exploration activities.

name: HBN-02928

congress_website_abstract: The bill defines alcohol intoxication as \"when the quantity of alcohol the person consumes exceeds the individual's tolerance for alcohol and produces and impairment of mental and physical abilities, as to blur his reason and deprive him of a certain degree of control.\"

congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING ARTICLE 81 OF ACT NUMBERED THIRTY EIGHT HUNDRED AND FIFTEEN (ACT NO. 3815) OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides that in cases wherein the death sentence is not carried out within the prescribed period, the failure to carry out the death penalty shall not result to a prescription of the death sentence.

congress_website_title: AN ACT ABOLISHING THE DEATH PENALTY REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7659 ENTITLED, \"AN ACT TO IMPOSE THE DEATH PENALTY ON CERTAIN HEINOUS CRIMES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE REVISED PENAL CODE, AS AMENDED, OTHER SPECIAL PENAL LAWS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to abolish the death penalty.

name: HBN-02933
title: TAX AMNESTY ON ALL UNPAID NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE TAXES

congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes and grants a tax amnesty covering all national internal revenue tax liabilities for the taxable year 2003 and prior years. Persons who wish to avail of the tax amnesty shall be required to file a Statement of Assets, Liabilities and Networth as of December 31, 2003 together with the Tax Amnesty Return form.

name: HBN-02899
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING A TAX ON THE MANUFACTURE OF BOTTLED WATER
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes a 10% excise tax on the owners, proprietors and operators of water refilling stations and producers of bottled water.

congress_website_abstract: \"Seafarers' Welfare Fund of 2004.\" The bill creates the Welfare Fund to provide welfare services to Filipino seafarers working abroad. It seeks to grant seafarers working abroad life and personal accident insurance amounting to P1.0 million and P300,000, respectively.

name: HBN-02901
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A LIVESTOCK PRODUCTION CENTER IN EACH OF THE SIXTEEN (16) MUNICIPALITIES OF THE SECOND DISTRICT, PROVINCE OF SAMAR AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02904
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING AND REGULATING TUITION AND OTHER SCHOOL FEES IN ALL HIGHER TECHNICAL-VOCATIONAL AND BASIC EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE A NATIONAL TUITION FEE RATIONALIZATION COUNCIL
congress_website_abstract: \"Tuition Fee Rationalization Act of 2004.\" The bill creates the National Tuition Fee Rationalization Council which shall serve as the highest policy-making body on matters pertaining to tuition fees and other increases in school fees.

name: HBN-02905
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING NOISE AND ITS SOURCES AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR ITS VIOLATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Noise Pollution Act of 2004.\" The bill prohibits any person from willfully making any loud, unnecessary and unusual noise which disturbs the peace or quiet in the neighborhood.

name: HBN-02909
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A PRE-TRIAL RELEASE FOR THE ACCUSED, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE THE PRE-TRIAL RELEASE OFFICE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Pre-Trial Release Act of 2002.\" The bill provides for the pre-trial release (PTR) program wherein an accused under detention may be released without bail. The measure provides the conditions of release under the PTR program.

congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE BALIANGAO PROTECTED LANDSCAPE AND SEASCAPE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALIANGAO, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL, AS PART OF THE \"NATIONAL INTEGRATED PROTECTED AREAS SYSTEM (NIPAS)\"

name: HBN-02911
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE CLARIN-DECOLOC PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PLARIDEL, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02912
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 857, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED CHARTER OF THE PHILIPPINE PORTS AUTHORITY (PPA), AS AMENDED, TO STRENGTHEN AND STREAMLINE THE AUTHORITY, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to: a) enhance competition and efficiency in port infrastructure development and services; b) promote private sector participation in the development of seaports; c) encourage decentralization of local port management offices; and d) decouple the Philippine Port Authority's regulatory and commercial functions.

name: HBN-02913
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE THE USE OF ETHYL ALCOHOL OR ETHANOL AS ALTERNATIVE TRANSPORT FUEL, ESTABLISHING FOR THE PURPOSE OF THE NATIONAL FUEL ETHANOL PROGRAM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Fuel Ethanol Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to encourage and promote the use of ethyl alcohol or ethanol as an alternative transport fuel through the Fuel Ethanol Program.

name: HBN-02914
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A NATIONAL TRANSPORTATION SAFETY BOARD, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Transport Safety Act of 2001.\" The bill prescribes the organizational structure, duties and functions, and powers of the National Transport Safety Board.

name: HBN-02915
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING ALL PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS TO ORGANIZE A CREDIT COOPERATIVE IN THEIR RESPECTIVE SCHOOLS
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the organization of cooperatives in every public school with at least 15 teachers as cooperators.

name: HBN-02916
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE BANGKO SENTRAL NG PILIPINAS (BSP) TO REQUIRE ALL IMPORTERS AND OTHERS WHO NEED TO BUY DOLLARS TO POST IN ADVANCE A PESO DEPOSIT EQUIVALENT TO THEIR DOLLAR APPLICATION OR PESO ADVANCE IN DOLLAR REQUIREMENT (PAID R) AND THAT ALL DOLLAR REMITTANCES OF OVERSEAS FILIPINO WORKERS AND EXPORTERS MUST BE CHANNELED THROUGH GOVERNMENT BANKS
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires importers and others who buy dollars to post a peso deposit equivalent money to buy dollars. Furthermore, the bill requires exporters and overseas Filipino workers to channel their dollar remittances through government banks to control the circulation of dollars.

name: HBN-02917
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONDONING THE PENALTIES OF CAMARINES NORTE ELECTRIC COOPERATIVE, INC. (CANORECO) ON OVERDUE ACCOUNTS CHARGED BY THE NATIONAL POWER CORPORATION IN THE AMOUNT OF SEVEN MILLION SEVEN HUNDRED THIRTY-NINE THOUSAND EIGHT HUNDRED FORTY-FIVE PESOS AND SEVENTY-NINE CENTAVOS (P7,739,845.79) COVERING THE PERIOD OCTOBER 1995 TO AUGUST 1997

name: HBN-02918
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING A STRATEGY FOR RURAL DEVELOPMENT, STRENGTHENING VOLUNTEERISM AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Volunteer Act of 2004.\" The bill prescribes the role and modalities of volunteerism in the private sector and by foreign volunteer organizations. It provides for the functions of the Philippine National Volunteerism Service Coordinating Agency (PNVSCA) and the Mutli-Sectoral Advisory Body of the PNVSCA.

name: HBN-02919
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE TOTAL INDEMNITY CLAIM FOR DEATH OR SERIOUS PHYSICAL INJURY TO ANY PASSENGER OR THIRD PARTY WITHOUT THE NECESSITY OF PROVING FAULT OR NEGLIGENCE, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 378 OF THE INSURANCE CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill increases from P5,000 to P50,000 the total indemnity claim for death or serious physical injury to any passenger or 3rd party without the necessity of proving fault or negligence.

name: HBN-02920
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN ADDITIONAL BRANCH OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURT BRANCH IN THE PROVINCE OF SOUTH COTABATO, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE BATAS PAMBANSA BILANG 129, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1981 AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02881
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ENCOURAGE SAVINGS MOBILIZATION BY GRANTING TAX PRIVILEGES TO SMALL DEPOSITORS
congress_website_abstract: The bill entitles depositors whose aggregate savings account do no exceed P500,000 per year, to apply the 20% final withholding tax paid on their interest income as a tax credit for their income tax liability or to file for a refund thereof in case there are no other tax liabilities.

name: HBN-02882

RITA, TALALORA VILLAREAL AND ZUMARRAGA, ALL IN THE PROVINCE OF SAMAR AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02885
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE MANSASA HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX, LOCATED IN MANSASA, TAGBILARAN CITY, PROVINCE OF BOHOL (ANNEX OF MANGA HIGH SCHOOL) AND CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE MANSASA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02886
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING RADIO, TELEVISION, NEWSPAPER, MOVIE HOUSE, POSTER AND BILLBOARD ADVETISEMENT ON CIGARETTE AND ALCOHOLIC DRINKS
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Cigarettes and Alcoholic Drinks Advertisement Act.\" The bill prohibits and penalizes the showing, airing or printing of advertisement of cigarettes and alcoholic drinks in radio or television programs, movie houses, newspapers, billboards, posters or flyers.

name: HBN-02887
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING AND PENALIZING THE PRODUCTION, PRINTING, PUBLICATION, IMPORTATION, SALE, DISTRIBUTION AND EXHIBITION OF OBSCENE AND PORNOGRAPHIC MOVIES AND MATERIALS, AND THE EXHIBITION OF LIVE SEXUAL ACTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ART. 201 OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Obscenity and Pornography Act of 2004.\" The bill penalizes the following acts: a) the production, importation, distribution, showing and sale of obscene or pornographic movies; b) the printing, publication, importation, sale or distribution of any magazine or comic book containing obscene or pornographic materials; c) the writing of obscene or pornographic articles; and d) the performance of live sex acts for public viewing.

name: HBN-02888
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING ALL BARANGAY OFFICIALS AND BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS A DISCOUNT IN TRANSPORTATION FARES
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants all barangay officials and health workers 30% discount in transportation fares.

name: HBN-02889
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE FULL IMPLEMENTATION OF THE COMPULSORY COVERAGE OF THE NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE PROGRAM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7875 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE ACT OF 1995\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the compulsory coverage of all citizens of the Philippines in the National Health Program.

name: HBN-02890
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE MARAHAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - MARILOG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX IN BARANGAY MARAHAN, MARILOG DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY, FROM THE MARILOG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE MARAHAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE J.V. FERRIOLS HIGH SCHOOL - DONA CARMEN DENIA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY LIZADA, TORIL DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY, FROM THE DONA CARMEN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE J.V. FERRIOLS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02892
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CAMANSI, TORIL DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CAMANSI NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02893
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR TAX AND OTHER FINANCIAL INCENTIVES TO OWNERS OF AND INVESTORS IN BUSINESSES ENGAGED IN THE EXPLORATION, DEVELOPMENT AND OPERATIONS OF WIND ENERGY
congress_website_abstract: \"Wind Energy Investors' Incentives Act of 2004.\" The bill grants the owners, developers, investors and operators of wind energy business the following tax incentives: a) exemption from the payment of customs duties on imported equipment, machinery; vehicles and spare part; b) income tax exemption for the first five years of operations; and c) accelerated depreciation of the assets of the business.

name: HBN-02894
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ADOPTION OF A NEW BILINGUAL PROGRAM IN PHILIPPINE SCHOOLS AND THE USE OF ENGLISH AS MEDIUM OF INSTRUCTION
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the use of English as the medium of instruction in all subjects in the elementary and secondary levels, except in Pilipino taught as a subject.

name: HBN-02895
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING TAXPAYERS THE ANNUAL FILING OF STATEMENT OF ASSETS, LIABILITIES AND NETWORTH, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes the mandatory annual submission to the Bureau of Internal Revenue of a Statement of Assets, Liabilities and Networth by all natural and juridical persons earning more than P200,000 or owning a real and/or personal properties valued at P500,000.

name: HBN-02896
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE MEMBERS OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES, PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE, BUREAU OF JAIL MANAGEMENT AND PENOLOGY, AND BUREAU OF FIRE PROTECTION A TWENTY PERCENT (20%) DISCOUNT ON PURCHASES OF FOOD, TRANSPORTATION AND MEDICINE, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR A VIOLATION THEREOF AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill extends a 20% discount to all members of the uniformed services for purchases of food and medicines and for transportation provided they are members in good standing.

name: HBN-02897
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE BUREAU OF ALTERNATIVE LEARNING SYSTEM (BALS)
congress_website_abstract: \"Alternative Learning System Act.\" The bill renames the Bureau of Nonformal Education to the Bureau of Alternative Learning System (BALS). It mandates the transfer to the BALS of the administration of all distance education programs.

name: HBN-02898
congress_website_title: AN ACT DISENGAGING PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS FROM COMPULSORY ELECTION DUTIES AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 13 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6646, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ELECTORAL REFORMS LAW OF 1987
congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes the Commission on Elections to tap the participation, through accreditation, of volunteer groups and individuals to sit in the Board of Election Inspectors thus freeing teachers from this mandatory duty.

name: HBN-02867
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING THAT THE ACADEMIC CURRICULA FOR ALL SCHOOLS, COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES SHALL BE ESTABLISHED BY LAW
congress_website_abstract: Under the present system, the academic curricula of schools, colleges and universities are established by the Department of Education. Thus, the curricula is more often than not influenced by the thinking of the Secretary of Education. For a more meaningful direction, the bill provides for the academic curricula to be established by law.

name: HBN-02868

name: HBN-02871
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 145 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to increase the tax rates of all tobacco products by P2.00 per pack for cigarettes packed by machine. It also provides for automatic tax increases at the end of every two years based on weighed average tax rates.

name: HBN-02872
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE IMMEDIATE ADJUSTMENT OF INTERNAL REVENUE ALLOTMENT (IRA) OF RECIPIENT LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS (LGUs) OF RELOCATED AND RESETTLED INFORMAL SETTLERS IN THE PRECEDING FISCAL YEAR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE URBAN DEVELOPMENT AND HOUSING ACT OF 1992
congress_website_abstract: To enable local government units (LGUs) to provide livelihood programs and basic services and facilities in resettlement or relocation areas, the bill seeks to increase the internal revenue allotment of LGUs that provide resettlement or relocation sites for informal settlers.

name: HBN-02873
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING JUNE 19TH AS SPECIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDATION ANNIVERSARY

long_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY GALUTAN, MUNICIPALITY OF CATARMAN, NORTHERN SAMAR TO BE KNOWN AS THE GALUTAN NATIONAL SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

subjects: ['Schools, Establishment (Northern Samar)', 'Galutan National Science and Technology High School (Northern Samar)']

congress_website_abstract: \"Department of Interior and Local Government (DILG) Uniformed Personnel Retirement and Separation Benefits System of 2001.\" The bill grants the uniformed officers and non-officers of the Philippine National Police, the Bureau of Fire Protection and the Bureau of Jail Management and Penology a uniform retirement and separation benefits scheme.

name: HBN-02876
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING A STIFFER PENALTY FOR THE CRIME OF ILLEGAL USE OF UNIFORMS OR INSIGNIA AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLE 179 OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes the penalty of prision correctional in its minimum period for the unauthorized use of the uniform or insignia of uniformed personnel.

name: HBN-02877
congress_website_title: AN ACT REMOVING FROM THE OPERATION OF THE BAGUIO TOWNSITE RESERVATION A PARCEL OF LAND IN THE RESIDENCE SECTION J, MARCOS HIGHWAY, BAGUIO CITY

name: HBN-02878
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A PROGRAM FOR THE ACQUISITION OF SCHOOL SITES AND THE CONSTRUCTION, MAINTENANCE, REHABILITATION, AND REPAIR OF SCHOOL BUILDINGS IN PUBLIC ELEMENTARY AND SECONDARY SCHOOLS NATIONWIDE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"School Building Program Act.\" The bill creates a comprehensive program that will address the problem of classroom shortage. It authorizes the Department of Education to enter into build-operate and transfer, build and transfer, build-lease and transfer, rehabilitate-operate and transfer and other contractual arrangement schemes with pre-qualified private contractors.

name: HBN-02879
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING PREPARATORY EDUCATION IN THE BASIC EDUCATION SYSTEM
congress_website_abstract: \"Preparatory Education Act.\" The bill provides all 5-6 year old children free preparatory education in public elementary schools and in community and learning centers.

name: HBN-02880
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE PUNONG-SAN ISIDRO-BOTILAO ROAD AND THE DINAHUNAN ROAD CONNECTING THE MUNICIPALITIES OF STA. CRUZ AND MOGPOG INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02847
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE POSITION OF THE SECRETARIES OF THE SANGGUNIAN, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to elevate the position of the secretaries of the sanggunian to that of a HEAD OF A DEPARTMENT OR OFFICE.

name: HBN-02848
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING MANUFACTURING ESTABLISHMENTS OWNING NOT MORE THAN ONE (1) INDUSTRIAL MACHINE OR EQUIPMENT ACTUALLY USED IN PRODUCTION PROCESSES AND EMPLOYING NOT MORE THAN TWO (2) TECHNICAL PERSONNEL EXEMPTION FROM INCOME TAXES FOR THE FIRST TWO YEARS OF OPERATION
congress_website_abstract: To encourage and assist small-scale entrepreneurs, the bill grants excise tax exemption to manufacturers owning not more than one production machine and employing not more than two technical personnel.

name: HBN-02849
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE INSTALLATION OF A 5,000-LITER AERIAL WATER TANK FOR THE BURGOS ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BASEY, PROVINCE OF SAMAR AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02853
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE THE USE OF ETHYL ALCOHOL OR ETHANOL AS ALTERNATIVE TRANSPORT FUEL, ESTABLISHING FOR THE PURPOSE THE NATIONAL FUEL ETHANOL PROGRAM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Fuel Ethanol Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to encourage and promote the use of ethyl alcohol or ethanol as an alternative transport fuel through a Fuel Ethanol Program.

name: HBN-02854
title: HUMAN RIGHTS RESOURCE CENTER ACT OF 2006
long_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN PHILIPPINE COMMITMENT TO HUMAN RIGHTS PROMOTION AND PROTECTION BY ESTABLISHING HUMAN RIGHTS RESOURCE CENTERS THROUGHOUT THE COUNTRY AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN PHILIPPINE COMMITMENT TO HUMAN RIGHTS PROMOTION AND PROTECTION BY ESTABLISHING HUMAN RIGHTS RESOURCE CENTERS THROUGHOUT THE COUNTRY AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Human Rights Resource Center Act of 2004.\" The bill establishes the Human Rights Resource Center to integrate the promotion and protection of human rights in the implementation of the criminal justice system in the conduct of local governance and law enforcement.

name: HBN-02855
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO AMEND REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7900 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'HIGH VALUE CROPS DEVELOPMENT ACT OF 1995' AND FOR OTHER PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to include in the coverage of RA 7900 (High Value Crops Development Act of 1995) various-sized farm owners, not just small landholders, upland dwellers, lowland tenants, indigenous peoples, CARP beneficiaries, farmers organizations and cooperatives, among others.

name: HBN-02856
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCLUDING BOTTLED WATER AS A BASIC NECESSITY AND STABILIZING ITS PRICE, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE 'PRICE ACT'
congress_website_abstract: The bill classifies bottled water as a basic commodity in order to regulate its pricing.

name: HBN-02857
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING AND PENALIZING PROSTITUTION AND SEXUAL RELATION WITH AND SOLICITATION OR PROCUREMENT OF, PROSTITUTES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLE 202 OF ACT NO. 3815 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'THE REVISED PENAL CODE'
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Prostitution Act of 2004.\" The bill imposes penalties not only on prostitutes but also on pimps, procurers, panders and users of prostitutes.

name: HBN-02858
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BENEFITS OF AND PROVIDING INCENTIVES TO BARANGAY OFFICIALS AND EMPLOYEES INCLUDING BARANGAY TANODS, AND MEMBERS OF THE LUPONG TAGAPAMAYAPA AND PANGKAT NG TAPAPAGKASUNDO, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 393 AND 406 OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: \"Barangay Officials and Employees Incentives Act of 2004.\" The bill grants the following benefits to barangay officials: a) honoraria and allowances - P2,000 per month for the punong barangay; P1,000 per month for sanggunian barangay members, treasurer and secretary; and P300 per month for barangay tanods; b) Christmas bonus - P1,000; and c) hazard pay - P150 per tour of duty for every barangay tanod.

name: HBN-02859
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR STIFFER PENALTIES FOR ILLEGAL TRADING OF PETROLEUM PRODUCTS AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 33 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes a penalty of prision correccional and/or a fine of not less than P50,000 nor more than P200,000 for the illegal trading of petroleum products.

name: HBN-02860
congress_website_title: AN ACT FOR THE CREATION AND ESTABLISHMENT OF A BAMBOO NURSERY AND DISTRIBUTION CENTER IN THE CITY OF SAN CARLOS PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02862
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PROVINCE OF QUEZON DEL SUR FROM THE PROVINCE OF QUEZON AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-02863
congress_website_title: AN ACT EQUALIZING THE LONGEVITY PAY OF PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS AND GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES WITH THOSE PAID UNIFORMED PERSONNEL OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES AND THE INTEGRATED NATIONAL POLICE AND, FOR THIS PURPOSE, AMENDING SECTION 16 OF REPUBLIC ACT 4670 AND SECTION 13 (c) OF REPUBLIC ACT 6758, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for public school teachers and all government employees to receive a longevity pay computed at 10% of their basic pay for every five years of continuous satisfactory service.

name: HBN-02864
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO HELP IMPROVE THE QUALITY OF EDUCATION IN THE COUNTRY BY ALLOWING PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS TO CONCENTRATE ON THEIR TEACHING DUTIES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 13 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6646, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'THE ELECTION REFORM ACT OF 1987', AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill designates citizens, preferably those coming from civic, youth, professional, educational, business and labor sectors, to sit on the Board of Election Inspectors.

name: HBN-02865
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SENIOR CITIZENS TECHNOLOGY AND LIVELIHOOD CENTER IN EVERY BARANGAY IN THE SECOND DISTRICT OF ZAMBALES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02866
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SENIOR CITIZENS HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF IBA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBALES, TO BE KNOWN AS THE ZAMBALES SENIOR CITIZENS HOSPITAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02804
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE POSSESSION OF LICENSED FIREARMS AND THE CARRYING THEREOF OUTSIDE OF RESIDENCE AND FOR OTHER PUPROSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill identifies the persons allowed to carry firearms outside their homes and prescribes the standards for the issuance of a permit to possess and to carry licensed firearms.

congress_website_abstract: To ensure that persons with disabilities enjoy the services provided under RA 7277, the bill mandates the establishment of a Persons with Disabilities Affairs Office in every province, city and municipality.

name: HBN-02811
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING ADDITIONAL INCENTIVES TO SELLERS OF REAL ESTATE PROPERTIES, THE SUBJECT MATTER OF THE COMMUNITY MORTGAGE PROGRAM OF THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: The bill exempts from the payment of documentary stamp tax and trasfer tax all real estate properties acquired under the Community Mortgage Program by any of the government housing agencies or local government units.

name: HBN-02812
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 18, CREATING THE SUGAR REGULATORY ADMINISTRATION
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to empower the Sugar Regulatory Administration to declare any excess importation of sugar over consumer needs as 'reserve' in order to balance local production with consumer demand and keep the prices of sugar constant.

name: HBN-02813
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MASS HOUSING PROGRAM IN THE CITY OF BACOLOD, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_abstract: \"Student Loan Program Act.\" The bill establishes a Student Loan Program to provide financial assistance to qualified applicants. It prescribes the requirements, procedures and terms and conditions for the availment of the student loan.

name: HBN-02815
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DISPOSITION OF SMUGGLED AGRICULTURAL GOODS, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the mechanics in the disposition of smuggled agricultural products, to wit: a) 10% to the exporter; b) 25% to the apprehending government agency; c) 25% to the competitive enhancement fund; and d) 40% to the national government.

name: HBN-02827
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING SMUGGLING AS HEINOUS CRIME, PROVIDING THE DEATH PENALTY FOR THE CRIME OF SMUGGLING, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill declares smuggling as an act of economic sabotage and a heinous crime. It imposes the penalty of death and a fine of twice the value of the smuggled goods or Php20 million whichever is higher.

name: HBN-02828
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVENTY-NINE HUNDRED TWENTY-FOUR, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CHARTER OF THE METRO MANILA DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY

name: HBN-02829
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE INCLUSION OF THE SUBJECT ON DRUG AWARENESS AND PREVENTION IN THE SCHOOL CURRICULA OF ALL ELEMENTARY AND SECONDARY SCHOOLS
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to include in the curricula of public and private elementary and high schools students the subject of drug awareness. Knowledge of the harmful effects of dangerous drugs will discourage experimentation in and continued drug use.

name: HBN-02830
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING MEASURES TO ENHANCE THE ACCEPTABILITY OF AGRICULTURAL LANDS AS SECURITY FOR LOANS FROM BANKS AND OTHER FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS THEREBY PROMOTING ACCESS TO RURAL CREDIT AND PROVIDING MECHANISMS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Enhanced Collateral Value of Farm Lands Act of 2004.\" The bill directs all lender banks and other financial institutions to accept agricultural lands as collateral for loans. It also limits the use of the loan proceeds exclusively for agricultural activity such as agricultural production, land development and post harvest facilities.

name: HBN-02831
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT 8424 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to subject to excise taxation not only non-essential goods but also non-essential services. It further expands the list of non-essential goods to include those with qualities such as antique, handmade by artisan, rare, etc., that make them luxurious items.

name: HBN-02832
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING SANGAY HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX TO SANGAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

name: HBN-02833
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE IMPOSITION OF THE PENALTY OF RECLUSION PERPETUA INSTEAD OF DEATH PENALTY IN CASES WHERE THE LAW PRESCRIBES THE DEATH PENALTY, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes the penalty of life imprisonment without entitlement to any allowance for good conduct, special time allowance for loyalty or parole, in cases where the law prescribes the imposition of the death penalty.

name: HBN-02834
congress_website_title: AN ACT ACCELERATING THE DEVELOPMENT OF A NATIONAL RAILWAY SYSTEM, CREATING FOR ITS PURPOSE THE NATIONAL RAILWAY AUTHORITY, PRESCRIBING ITS POWERS, FUNCTIONS AND DUTIES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Railway Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the consolidation of our national rail systems to encourage the use of railways. It prescribes the powers, functions and organizational structure of the National Railway Authority.

name: HBN-02835
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9161, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE RENTAL REFORM ACT OF 2002
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits any increase in the rental rates of residential units with monthly rentals not exceeding PhP7,500 in Metro Manila and PhP4,000 in other areas until December 31, 2007.

name: HBN-02836
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INCLUDE THE STUDY OF THE FAMILY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES (E.O. 209, AS AMENDED) IN THE CURRICULUM OF TERTIARY OR COLLEGIATE LEVEL OF ALL PRIVATE AND PUBLIC EDUCATIONAL INSITUTIONS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure provides for the inclusion of the study of the Family Code in the college level curriculum of private and public colleges and universities.

name: HBN-02837
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING PUBLIC OFFICERS FROM CLAIMING CREDIT THROUGH SIGNAGE ANNOUNCING A PUBLIC WORKS PROJECT
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Signage of Public Works Act.\" The bill prohibits the affixing of the name or image of any public official to a signage announcing a proposed or on-going public works project.

name: HBN-02838
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CREATION OF LOCAL PRINT MEDIA MONITORING BOARD IN ALL MUNICIPALITIES AND CITIES, TO PREVENT THE PROLIFERATION OF OBSCENE PUBLICATIONS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Local Anti-Smut Campaign Act of 2004.\" The bill prescribes the composition and functions of the local Print Media Monitoring Board.

name: HBN-02839
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE THE STUDY OF FOREIGN LANGUAGES IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"Foreign Languages Act of 2004.\" The bill requires all private and public schools to offer Spanish, Arabic and other foreign languages as an elective subject in all levels, beginning with the primary level.

name: HBN-02840
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE IMPLEMENTATION OF THE PROVISIONS OF THE 1992 INTERNATIONAL CONVENTION ON CIVIL LIABILITY FOR OIL POLLUTION DAMAGE AND THE 1992 INTERNATIONAL CONVENTION ON THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN INTERNATIONAL FUND FOR COMPENSATION FOR OIL POLLUTION DAMAGE, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Oil Pollution Compensation Act.\" The bill holds the owner of a ship liable for any pollution damage caused by his ship as a result of an incident. When an incident involves two or more ships, the owners of all the ships concerned shall be jointly and severally liable for all damages.

name: HBN-02841
congress_website_title: AN ACT REDUCING THE INCOME TAX RATES OF INDIVIDUAL TAXPAYERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CHAPTER III, SECTION 24 (A) (1) (c) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to reduce the income tax rates of individual taxpayers to a minimum of 2.5% on income below PhP10,000 and a maximum of 32% of income above PhP12 million.

name: HBN-02842
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING THE SALE OR IMPORTATION OF COMPUTER HARDWARE AND SOFTWARE FROM THE PAYMENT OF VALUE ADDED TAX AND DONATIONS THEREOF FROM DONOR'S TAX, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN SECTIONS OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: In order to lower the price of computer hardware and software, the bill proposes to exempt their sale or importation from the ambit of value-added tax. The measure also exempts computer donations from the payment of donor's tax.

name: HBN-02843
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE ALLOWABLE PERSONAL AND ADDITIONAL EXEMPTIONS OF INDIVIDUAL TAXPAYERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 35(A) AND (B) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to increase the allowable personal exemptions as follows: a) for single individuals -P48,000; b) for the head of a family - P54,000; and c) for each married individual - P64,000. It further increase the additional exemption for dependents to P16,000 per dependent not to exceed four dependents.

congress_website_abstract: The bill defines the emergency and extraordinary cases where immediate response by infrastructure agencies are warranted. It sets the guidelines and procedures for a fast-track reaction by concerned agencies, especially in engineering design, procurement and implementation, and funding for the required infrastructure project.

congress_website_abstract: \"Civil Engineering Law of 2004.\" The bill seeks to achieve the following, among others: a) strengthen the profession and enable civil engineers to cope with the challenges brought about by globalization and cross-border practice, b) define the practice of civil engineering in the country by foreign nationals.

name: HBN-02768
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING PHILIPPINE DISASTER MANAGEMENT AND CREATING THE NATIONAL DISASTER MANAGEMENT COMMISSION AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Disaster Management Act.\" The bill provides for the formulation of a National Disaster Management Program covering all aspects of disaster management from prevention/preparedness, response, rehabilitation, mitigation, rehabilitation to reconstruction.

name: HBN-02769
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 1 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164 ENTITLED: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR SYNCHRONIZED BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS, AMENDING R.A. NO. 7160, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991', AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the holding of a synchronized barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections on the first Monday of November 2007 and every three years thereafter.

name: HBN-02770
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING THE MECHANISM FOR THE COLLECTION, REMITTANCE AND UTILIZATION OF CITIZENS' DONATIONS TO AUGMENT THE FINANCIAL RESOURCES OF THE GOVERNMENT
congress_website_abstract: \"Citizens' Donation Act of 2004.\" The bill encourages the private sector and government officials to voluntarily donate to the Bayanihan fund to augment the financial resources of the government. All donations shall be treated as public funds and property and shall be remitted to the Bureau of Treasury which shall create a special fund for said donations.

name: HBN-02771
congress_website_title: AN ACT ALLOCATING TWENTY-FIVE PERCENT (25%) OF TRAVEL TAX COLLECTIONS IN THE COUNTRY TO THE DEVELOPMENT AND PROMOTION OF TOURISM INDUSTRY IN THE TWENTY (20) DEPRESSED PROVINCES
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates that 25% of the travel tax collected be earmarked for the development and promotion of tourism in the twenty depressed provinces.

congress_website_abstract: \"Journalists' Protection Act of 2004.\" To protect the welfare of journalists, the bill seeks to grant journalists a comprehensive benefits and compensation package. It also provides for their working conditions.

congress_website_abstract: \"Maritime Transport Safety Act of 2004.\" The bill prescribes the powers, functions and organizational structure of the Council and penalizes negligent and abusive government officials and employees and owners and unseaworthy passenger ships and transport vessels.

congress_website_abstract: To prevent the ballooning of our foreign debts, the bill authorizes the earmarking of 30% of the tax payments to pay our foreign debts.

name: HBN-02728
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE NEW LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE 442, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"New Labor Code of the Philippines.\" The bill seeks to cover within the ambit of the Code not only workers from the formal sector but also those from the informal and public sectors, the kasambahay or household helpers, persons with disability, and overseas Filipino workers or migrant workers. It also seeks to ensure that the Code is child-friendly and gender sensitive.

name: HBN-02729
congress_website_title: AN ACT REMOVING RESTRICTIONS ON THE TRANSFER AND OTHER CONVEYANCES OF TITLES ACQUIRED THROUGH FREE PATENT, AMENDING COMMONWEALTH ACT NO. 141, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PUBLIC LAND ACT, AND OTHER PERTINENT LAWS, AND OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to update the obsolete provisions of the Public Land Act and facilitate the mass titling of public alienable and disposable lands in the Philippines. Among others, it provides for a) the reduction of the period of cultivation and occupation from 30 years to 10 years; b) the issuance of free patents without payment of oustanding taxes; c) extends free patents to residential, commercial and industrial lands.

name: HBN-02730
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL FACILITY FOR IRRADIATION TECHNOLOGY AT THE PHILIPPINE NUCLEAR RESEARCH INSTITUTE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Irradiation Technology Act of 2004.\" The bill defines irradiation as a physical method of treating food and medical products by exposing them to gamma rays or electrons from radioisotopes and electron machine. The proposed facility shall be tasked to provide proper irradiation facility for commercial and large scale practical applications.

name: HBN-02731
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SENIOR CITIZENS TECHNOLOGY AND LIVELIHOOD CENTER IN EVERY BARANGAY IN THE FOURTH DISTRICT OF ILOILO AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits the use of handheld cellular phone or any similar telecommunication device by any motorist while driving a public utility vehicle, including public utility buses and public utility jeepneys.

congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes local treasurers to collect national internal revenue taxes for remittance to the National Treasury. As an incentive, it allows local government units to retain 50% of the collection target excess.

congress_website_title: AN ACT POSTPONING THE BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS FROM OCTOBER 2005 TO THE SECOND MONDAY OF MAY 2007, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill postpones the barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections to the 2nd Monday of May 2007 and every three years thereafter.

name: HBN-02671
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING HAZARD PAY TO ALL DULY APPOINTED MEMBERS OF BARANGAY TANOD BRIGADES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to grant a hazard pay of P250.00 per month to all duly appointed members of the barangay tanod brigades.

name: HBN-02672
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE RIGHT OF REPLY AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: The bill guarantees the right of all persons to reply to all accusations and criticism aired or printed through the mass media.

name: HBN-02673
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING CAREER SERVICE PROFESSIONAL OR SUBPROFESSIONAL ELIGIBILITY TO THE PUNONG BARANGAY, THE SANGGUNIANG BARANGAY MEMBERS, THE BARANGAY TREASURER AND SECRETARY, THE SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN CHAIRMAN AND THE SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN MEMBERS
congress_website_abstract: The bill extends career service professional and sub-professional eligibility to all punong barangay, sangguniang barangay members, barangay treasurers and secretaries, and to sangguniang kabataan chairmen and members who have served for at least three years.

name: HBN-02674
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING APPROPRIATE CIVIL SERVICE ELIGIBILITY TO ELECTED LOCAL GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for a mechanism that will allow public servants from the Provincial Governor to the regular members of the Sangguniang Bayan to join the regular work force after the completion of their term of office by granting them appropriate civil service eligibility.

name: HBN-02675
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A TOTAL BAN ON ANTI-PERSONNEL LANDMINES, FOR OTHER PROHIBITIONS OR RESTRICTIONS ON THE USE OF LANDMINES, BOOBY-TRAPS AND OTHER DEVICES, FOR CREATION OF A PHILIPPINE COORDINATING COMMITTEE ON LANDMINES, AND FOR RELATED PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Comprehensive Law on Landmines.\" The bill calls for a total ban on anti-personnel mines, and imposes restrictions on the use of mines, booby traps and other devices.

name: HBN-02676
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9280, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CUSTOMS BROKERS ACT OF 2004, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill defines the customs broker profession as involving services consisting of preparation of requisite customs documents for imports and exports, declaration of customs duties and taxes, preparation, signing, filing, lodging and processing of import and export entries, and other professional services in matters relating to the above.

name: HBN-02677
congress_website_title: AN ACT RENAMING THE COMMISSION ON HIGHER EDUCATION AS THE DEPARTMENT OF HIGHER EDUCATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to rationalize and strengthen the Commission on Higher Education (CHEd) to enable it to discharge properly and effectively its mandate and to rename the CHEd as the Department of Higher Education to be headed by a Secretary who shall have a cabinet rank.

name: HBN-02678
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO AFFORD INTELLECTUAL COMPETENCE FOR THE MEN IN UNIFORM BY GIVING ACCESS TO ALL QUALIFIED SOLDIERS AND POLICEMEN THE PRIVILEGE TO ENROLL IN THE OPEN UNIVERSITY FOR INDEPENDENT STUDIES OF THE UNIVERSITY OF THE PHILIPPINES ASSISTING THEM IN THEIR INTELLECTUAL QUEST AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides an opportunity for qualified soldiers and policemen to secure a degree by allowing them to enroll in the Open University for Independent Studies of the University of the Philippines. It directs the Department of National Defense and the Department of the Interior and Local Government to prioritize the approval of the leaves of these soldiers/policemen.

congress_website_abstract: The measure prohibits the owners of shopping malls, hotels and other similar establishments from imposing, exacting, collecting and changing any and all fees for the use of parking spaces within their establishments.

congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes the release of an accused who has undergone preventive suspension for a period equal to or more than the possible MINIMUM imprisonment of the offense to which he may be sentenced.

congress_website_abstract: \"Mandatory Two-Year Domestic Service for All Filipino Registered Nurses Act.\" The bill requires Filipino registered nurses who wish to apply for foreign employment to secure an eligibility status with the Professional Regulatory Commission and a clearance from the Secretary of Labor and Employment.

congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE CALATRAVA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - LAGA-AN EXTENSION IN BARANGAY LAGA-AN, CALATRAVA, NEGROS OCCIDENTAL FROM CALATRAVA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE LAGA-AN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
