name: HBN-02703
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE INSTALLATION AND MAINTENANCE OF CHECKPOINTS
congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes the maintenance of checkpoints only under exceptional circumstances such as when there is a clear and present danger to national security, public safety or public health or when the survival of the organized government is in the balance or when the lives and safety of the people are in grave peril.

name: HBN-02704
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 7227, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'BASES CONVERSION AND DEVELOPMENT ACT OF 1992' AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 7917, ADJUSTING THE ALLOCATION OF REVENUES FROM THE SALE, LEASE, JOINT-VENTURE AGREEMENTS AND OTHER TRANSACTIONS INVOLVING MILITARY BASES RESERVATIONS, ALLOCATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for a) the inclusion of the proceeds of the sale, lease, joint-venture agreements involving military bases and reservations as part of the capitalization of the Conversion Authority; b) rationalization of the funding scheme of the Conversion Authority; c) equitable redistribution of the proceeds from transactions involving military bases, among others.

name: HBN-02705
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE TEACHING-LEARNING OF THE MAJOR CORDILLERA LANGUAGES, NAMELY, BAGUIO ILOKANO, IFUGAO, INIBALOI, KANKANAI, KALINGA, ISNAG, TINGUIAN, AND IFONTOK, AS OPTIONAL SUBJECTS WITH ACCREDITED UNITS IN THE TERTIARY LEVEL OF COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES IN THE CORDILLERA ADMINISTRATIVE REGION

name: HBN-02706
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH A HIGHER STANDARD OF PROMOTION AND PROTECTION OF THE RIGHTS AND WELFARE OF FILIPINO OVERSEAS SEAFARERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Overseas Seafarers Act.\" For the protection of seafarers, the bill prescribes the recruitment and placement policies of the government, the duties of recruitment and placement services, the penalties for illegal recruitment, the conditions of employment and social welfare benefits, disciplinary and dispute settlement procedures and post employment and repatriation policies.

name: HBN-02707
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR MAXIMUM PERFORMANCE IN REVENUE COLLECTION THROUGH THE GRANTING OF SPECIAL INCENTIVES AND REWARDS FOR EXEMPLARY SERVICE AND THROUGH LATERAL ATTRITION IN REVENUE-GENERATING AGENCIES OF GOVERNMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure aims to grant incentives and rewards to collection officials/officers/employees who render outstanding service while upholding the highest ethical standards. It allows expeditious action against non-performing officials/officers/empoloyees by removing them from their positions if they do not meet set standards.

name: HBN-02708
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL RAILWAY AUTHORITY TO ACCELERATE THE DEVELOPMENT OF A NATIONAL RAILWAY SYSTEM, PRESCRIBING ITS POWERS, FUNCTIONS AND DUTIES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Railways Act of 2004.\" The National Railways Authority (NRA) shall formulate and adopt a comprehensive national railways development plan and implement the same. The NRA shall control, develop, construct, operate and maintain the railway facilities.

name: HBN-02709
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 4 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8550, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'PHILIPPINE FISHERIES CODE OF 1998'
congress_website_abstract: The bill allows subsistence fishermen to use bigger vessels to encourage them to embark on bigger undertakings and, ultimately, improve their standard of living.

name: HBN-02710
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BENEFITS OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 393 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, CREATING A NATIONAL AUGMENTATION FUND, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill increases the monthly honoraria granted to barangay officials from P1,000 to P2,000 for the punong barangay, P1,800 for the sangguniang barangay members and P1,500 for the barangay treasurer, secretary and tanods.

name: HBN-02711
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ANNUAL AUTOMATIC INCREASE IN THE AMOUNT OF PENSION PAID TO ALL RETIRED GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure grants retired government employees an automatic yearly increase in their pension based on the annual rate of increase of the national cost of living index.

name: HBN-02712
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164 TO EXTEND THE TERMS OF OFFICE OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS AND RESET THE DATE OF BARANGAY ELECTIONS
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to hold a synchronized barangay and sangguniang kabataan (SK) elections on the 2nd Monday of May 2007 simultaneous with the local and national elections. Subsequent synchronized barangay and SK elections shall be held every three years thereafter.

name: HBN-02638
congress_website_title: AN ACT ABOLISHING THE DEATH PENALTY IN THE PHILIPPINES, REPEALING, FOR THIS PURPOSE, REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERS 7659 AND 8177 AND AMENDING ARTICLES 25,40, 63, 70, 71, 74 AND OTHER ARTICLES IN BOOK II OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE, PERTINENT PROVISIONS OF OTHER SPECIAL LAWS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes the abolition of the death penalty.

name: HBN-02639
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING TERRORISM, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Terrorism Act of 2003.\" The bill aims to define the crime of terrorism and impose the corresponding penalty. It seeks to bring the crime of terrorism within the coverage of the Anti-Wire Tapping Law and the Anti-Money Laundering Law. It provides for the creation of an Anti-Terrorist Action Council to coordinate, supervise and monitor the counter-terrorism efforts of the government.

name: HBN-02640
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF BORONGAN INTO A COMPONENT CITY OF THE PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR TO BE KNOWN AS THE CITY OF BORONGAN

congress_website_abstract: To discourage the indiscriminate filing of cases for violation of the Bouncing Law (BP 22) to force payment from debtors, the bill authorizes the Secretary of Justice to fix, impose and collect filing fees for every complaint filed for violation of the law.

congress_website_abstract: \"National Student Loan Program for the Poor Act of 2004.\" The bill defines the powers, functions and organizational structure of the National Student Loan Board which shall implement the Program.

name: HBN-02643
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A PROGRAM FOR THE ACQUISITION OF SCHOOL SITES AND THE CONSTRUCTION, MAINTENANCE, REHABILITATION, AND REPAIR OF SCHOOL BUILDINGS IN THE PUBLIC ELEMENTARY AND SECONDARY SCHOOLS NATIONWIDE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"School Building Program Act of 2004\". The bill seeks to address the classroom shortage problem by authorizing the Department of Education to enter into build-operate-transfer, build-lease-transfer, build-transfer and rehabilitate-operate-transfer schemes to finance the construction of school buildings.

congress_website_abstract: \"The Tax Amnesty Act of 2005.\" The measure proposes to grant a tax amnesty to delinquent taxpayers to enable them to settle their delinquent accounts on a voluntary basis. The proposed tax amnesty shall cover all revenue taxes.

name: HBN-02653
congress_website_title: AN ACT RESTRUCTURING THE EXCISE TAX ON CIGARS AND CIGARETTES AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 145, AND RELATED SECTIONS OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to raise additional revenues for the government by shifting the excise taxation scheme of tobacco products from specific to ad valorem tax.

congress_website_abstract: \"Cellular Phone Subscriber Protection Act of 2004.\" The bill authorizes the National Telecommunications Commission to implement measures for the protection of all pre-paid and plan subscribers of cellular mobile telephone services such as the extension of the expiry date of pre-paid cards from two months to one year from the date of initial use, the grant of credit for drop calls and the registration of pre-paid subscribers, among other.

name: HBN-02655
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A POLICY FRAMEWORK FOR MINDANAO PEACE AND DEVELOPMENT, CREATING A MINDANAO PEACE AND DEVELOPMENT COMMISSION AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR RELATED PURPOSES

congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to establish the Philippine Coast Guard as a distinct, armed, uniformed and commissioned service attached to the Department of Transportation and Communications.

name: HBN-02657
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO MAXIMIZE THE COLLECTION OF REVENUES BY REQUIRING THE FILING OF STATEMENT OF ASSETS, LIABILITIES AND NETWORTH AS OF DECEMBER 31, 2003 AND BY GRANTING TAX AMNESTY ON ALL UNPAID INTERNAL REVENUE TAXES IMPOSED BY THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT FOR TAXABLE YEAR 2003 AND PRIOR YEARS
congress_website_abstract: To raise revenues for the government, the bill proposes the implementation of a tax amnesty program covering all unpaid internal revenue taxes for taxable year 2003 and prior years.

congress_website_abstract: \"The Philippine Coffee and Tropical Fruits Development Authority Act of 1996.\" The bill defines the powers, functions and organizational structure of the Authority.

name: HBN-02632
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO MAHMOUD A.M. ASFOUR

name: HBN-02633
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AND PROVIDING FOR A FREE PUBLIC KINDERGARTEN EDUCATION AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Free Public Kindergarten Education Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to provide for free public kindergarten education for children throughout the country.

name: HBN-02634
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANNER AND DATE OF ELECTION OF SECTORAL REPRESENTATIVES TO THE LOCAL SANGGUNIANS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Local Sectoral Representation Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for 3 selected sectoral representatives each in the sangguniang panlalawigan, sangguniang bayan and the sangguniang panlungsod - 1 from the women sector, 1 from the workers and 1 from either of the following sectors: indigenous people and cultural communities; differently-abled persons, senior citizens, urban poor and any other sector as may be determined by the sangguniang concerned.

name: HBN-02635
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING 'CLANDESTINE LABORATORY' AND PENALIZING THE OWNERSHIP, ESTABLISHMENT, MAINTENANCE AND OPERATION THEREOF, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9165, THE 'COMPREHENSIVE DANGEROUS DRUGS ACT OF 2002', AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill clarifies that a \"clandestine laboratory\" refers to any facility used for the illegal manufacture of any dangerous drug situated not only on land or real property but also those in a boat, ship, airplane, van or on any location possible. It imposes the death penalty on the person who owns, establishes, maintains and operates a clandestine laboratory.

name: HBN-02636
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION THREE, PARAGRAPH (a), SUBPARAGRAPH 3 OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETY ONE HUNDRED AND SIXTY (R.A. NO. 9160) OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'ANTI-MONEY LAUNDERING ACT OF 2001', AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill includes casinos and other gaming establishments among the establishments covered by RA 9160.

name: HBN-02637
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE THE MANUFACTURE, IMPORTATION, SALE, DISTRIBUTION, USE AND DEVELOPMENT OF HYBRID AND ALTERNATIVE FUEL VEHICLES BY GRANTING TAX EXEMPTIONS AND PROVIDING INCENTIVES THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Alternative Fuel Vehicles Act of 2004.\" The bill grants tax (duty, excise, value-added and income taxes) and non-tax exemptions and incentives for the manufacture, importation, sale, distribution, use of hybrid or alternative fuel vehicles.

name: HBN-02629
congress_website_title: AN ACT SETTING THE DATE OF THE ELECTION OF BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN OFFICIALS THEREBY AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 1 AND 2 OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 9164
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for a synchronized barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections to be held on the last Monday of October 2008 and every six years thereafter.

name: HBN-02630
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING APRIL 3 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUISIANA, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA TO CELEBRATE THE ARAW NG LUBUSANG KALAYAAN BILANG BAYAN NG LUISIANA, LAGUNA AND PANDANAN FESTIVAL

name: HBN-02559
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE REGISTRATION OF PRE-PAID SIM CARD USERS AND MOBILE PHONE UNITS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires public telecommunication entities to establish a foolproof system of identifying users and/or purchasers of pre-paid SIM (subscription identification module) cards in order to contain the theft of mobile telephone units.

name: HBN-02560
congress_website_title: AN ACT REFEDINING THE TERM 'VETERAN' THEREBY AMENDING FURTHER REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6948 AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill defines a war veteran as \"any person who rendered military service in the land, sea or air forces of the Philippines when the Philippines was at war and foreign nationals who served in the Philippine forces. A veteran of a military campaign is any person who became part of the Philippine expeditionary forces sent abroad or who participated in a military campaign so designated by the President of the Philippines.\"

name: HBN-02561
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A SYSTEM OF PAYING THE ARREARS OF PENSION TO VETERANS, PENALIZING ANY FRAUD COMMITTED IN RELATION TO THIS ACT
congress_website_abstract: The bill entitles all veterans, whose disability is rated from 91% to 100%, to receive a Certificate of Indebtedness amounting to P30,000. The Certificate shall be issued in lieu of the monthly pension of P1,700 plus P500 for the spouse and each unmarried minor child.

name: HBN-02562
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADES IN PAGADIAN CITY, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR, INTO A STATE COLLEGE TO BE KNOWN AS THE ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02563
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BALONG, MUNICIPALITY OF TABUK, PROVINCE OF KALINGA TO BE KNOWN AS THE NORTHERN TABUK NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02564
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE MANDATORY PRE-AUDIT OF GOVERNMENT DISBURSEMENTS AND USES OF FUNDS
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the Commission on Audit to conduct a pre-audit examination of all expenditures and uses of public funds pertaining to infrastructure projects and the procurement of goods and consulting services.

name: HBN-02565
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE JOAQUIN SMITH HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX IN BARANGAY ASIN ROAD, BAGUIO CITY, FROM THE PINES CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE JOAQUIN SMITH NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02566
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUBUAGAN, PROVINCE OF KALINGA TO BE KNOWN AS THE LUBUAGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02567
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE NATIONAL LAND USE POLICY AND PLANNING FRAME WORK AND THE IMPLEMENTING MECHANISM THEREFOR, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE NATIONAL LAND USE ACT OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Land Use Act of the Philippines.\" The bill seeks to address issues relative to the allocation and utilization of all lands, whether private or government-owned, including minerals and water therein. It proposes to adopt the following land use categories: a) protection land use; b) production land use; c) settlements development; and d) infrastructure development.

name: HBN-02568
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR SUSTAINABLE MANAGEMENT OF FOREST RESOURCES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Sustainable Management of Forest Resources Act of 1998.\" The bill provides for the limits and classification of forestlands; administration and management of these areas; forest protection; disposition and utilization of forest resources; forest charges, fees and rentals; and criminal offenses and penalties.

name: HBN-02569
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A COMPREHENSIVE WATER RESOURCES MANAGEMENT TO ADDRESS THE NATIONAL WATER CRISIS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Water Resources Management Act of 1998.\" The bill provides for the creation of the Water Resources Authority of the Philippines which shall be responsible for the formulation of a national framework for water resources management based on a decentralized, community-based and participatory approach. It defines the powers and functions and organizational structure of the Authority.

name: HBN-02570
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE SEAWEED INSTITUTE AT THE ILOILO STATE COLLEGE OF FISHERIES

name: HBN-02571
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING CALAYAN RAIL LOCALLY KNOWN AS 'PIDING' AS A PROTECTED BIRD IN THE PHILIPPINES, PROVIDING FOR THE PRESERVATION OF THE SAME AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATIONS OF FUNDS FOR THE PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: \"Calayan Rail Act.\" The bill seeks to declare the Calayan rail or \"piding\" as an endangered specie to save it from extinction.

name: HBN-02572
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING RETIREMENT, DEATH, DISABILITY AND OTHER BENEFITS FOR THE PROSECUTORS AND THE LEGAL STAFF OF THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to upgrade the retirement, gratuity, death, disability, survivorship and other benefits granted to public prosecutors and the legal staff of the Department of Justice.

name: HBN-02573
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING ADDITIONAL RETIREMENT BENEFITS TO MEMBERS OF THE JUDICIARY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 910, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to upgrade the retirement benefits granted to the members of the Judiciary. It also seeks to redefine the retirement condition on the length of service to the government.

name: HBN-02574
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REHABILITATION AND EXPANSION OF WATERWORKS SYSTEM IN THE CITY OF CALAPAN, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02575
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REHABILITATION AND EXPANSION OF WATERWORKS SYSTEM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BACO, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02576
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY FORTUNA, MUNICIPALITY OF SOCORRO, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO TO BE KNOWN AS THE FORTUNA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02577
congress_website_title: AN ACT REORGANIZING AND RENAMING THE PHILIPPINE RETIREMENT PARK SYSTEM, ENLARGING ITS POWERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Retirement Authority.\" The bill seeks to rename the Philippine Retirement Park System to Philippine Retirement Authority. Likewise, the measure provides for the powers and functions, organizational structure, incentives and benefits, and capitalization of the Authority.

name: HBN-02578
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A STRONGER AND ACCOUNTABLE INVOLVEMENT OF SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN IN LOCAL AFFAIRS AND NATION-BUILDING, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The measure aims to give the sangguniang kabataan (SK) fiscal autonomy and independence in its operations as to disbursements and encashment of their income and expenses. It redefines and rationalizes the duties and responsibilities of SK members vis-a-vis their own constituents in the youth sector.

name: HBN-02579
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE CATANDUANES NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX IN BARANGAY TIBANG, CALATAGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF VIRAC, PROVINCE OF CATANDUANES FROM THE CATANDUANES NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, THEREBY CONVERTING THE SAME INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE CALATAGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02580
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A YOUTH CENTER IN VIRAC, PROVINCE OF CATANDUANES TO BE KNOWN AS THE CATANDUANES CENTER FOR YOUTH AFFAIRS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02581
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE AND REGULATE THE CABLE TELEVISION SERVICES IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Cable TV Act of 2001.\" The bill seeks to lay down the legal basis for the entry of capital, acquisition of state-of-the-art CATV technology, transmission, programming and production. It rationalizes the regulation of the cable television industry by clearly delineating the powers of the regulating body and the rights of the cable television operators.

name: HBN-02582
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXTENDING THE TERM OF BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN OFFICIALS AND SETTING THE DATE OF ITS ELECTION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT 9164
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes the holding of the synchronized barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections on the 2nd Monday of May 2007 to coincide with the national and local officials and every three years thereafter. It also extends the terms of those elected on July 15 2002 to June 30, 2007.

name: HBN-02583
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE THE USE OF ETHYL ALCOHOL OR ETHANOL AS ALTERNATIVE TRANSPORT FUEL, ESTABLISHING FOR THE PURPOSE THE NATIONAL FUEL ETHANOL PROGRAM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Fuel Ethanol Act of 2004.\" The bill encourages and promotes the use of ethyl alcohol or ethanol as an alternative transport fuel through the Fuel Ethanol Program. The Program shall introduce the production of ethanol from sugarcane, corn, or cassava.

name: HBN-02584
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING THE REFUSAL OF HOSPITALS, MEDICAL INSTITUTIONS AND OTHER MEDICAL CLINICS TO RELEASE PATIENTS AND CORPSE OF PATIENTS DUE TO INABILITY TO PAY HOSPITAL EXPENSES AS SERIOUS ILLEGAL DETENTION AMENDING ART. 267 OF ACT NO. 3815 AS AMENDED OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes the penalty of reclusion perpetua to death to owners of hospitals, medical institutions/clinics that detain or refuse to release patients confined due to non-payment of hospital expenses.

name: HBN-02585
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE COMMISSION ON PRE-SCHOOL EDUCATION, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"The Commission on Pre-School Education Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to create the Commission on Preparatory School Education, define its powers and functions and appropriate the necessary funding for its establishment and operation.

name: HBN-02586
congress_website_title: AN ACT FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE FOR THE CITY OF SAN CARLOS, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN AND APPROPRIATE OF THE FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02587
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROVIDE INCENTIVES TO ALL BARANGAY OFFICIALS, INCLUDING BARANGAY TANODS AND MEMBERS OF THE LUPON NG TAGAPAMAYAPA, AND EMPLOYEES OF THE BARANGAY AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Barangay Incentives Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to grant barangay officials, including barangay tanods and members of the lupong tagapamayapa, the following incentive: a) exemption from income, capital gains and transfer taxes; b) GSIS coverage; c) health benefits; and d) legal representation.

name: HBN-02588
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING GOVERNMENT HOSPITALS TO RETAIN AND UTILIZE THEIR INCOME FOR MAINTENANCE AND OTHER OPERATING EXPENSES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes all government hospitals, including medical centers and specialty hospitals, to retain and use their income for maintenance and other operating expenses, including capital outlay.

name: HBN-02589
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REGULATE THE DRINKING WATER BUSINESS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Drinking Water Business Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to regulate the business of producing and selling mineral, pure and distilled water to protect the health of consumers.

name: HBN-02590
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION TO INCLUDE VEHICLE TRAFFIC EDUCATION AS PART OF THE EDUCATIONAL CURRICULUM IN THE ELEMENTARY AND SECONDARY LEVEL, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes the Department of Education to include in the curriculum of elementary and high schools the teaching of basic vehicle traffic rules as part of the values education subject.

name: HBN-02591
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE SECURITY OF TENURE OF FARMERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Farmers Security of Tenure Act.\" The bill requires the preliminary determination of cases involving disputes or controversies between farmers and landlords by the Department of Agrarian Reform before a regular court can take cognizance of such cases.

name: HBN-02592
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A SECONDARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY ENCLARO, BINALBAGAN, NEGROS OCCIDENTAL AS AN EXTENSION OF THE EXISTING PAGLAUM NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, PAGLAUM, BINALBAGAN, NEGROS OCCIDENTAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02593
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY MACAGAHAY, MUNICIPALITY OF MOISES PADILLA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02594
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY MANSABLAY, MUNICIPALITY OF ISABELA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02595
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY SEBUCAUAN, MUNICIPALITY OF ISABELA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02596
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY MAYTUBIG, MUNICIPALITY OF ISABELA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02597
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY SAG-ANG, MUNICIPALITY OF LA CASTELLANA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02598
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY MANSALANAO, MUNICIPALITY OF LA CASTELLANA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02599
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY MASULOG, MUNICIPALITY OF LA CASTELLANA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02600
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY PUSO, MUNICIPALITY OF LA CASTELLANA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02601
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY NATO, MUNICIPALITY OF LA CASTELLANA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02602
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY BIAK-NA-BATO, MUNICIPALITY OF LA CASTELLANA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02603
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY CABAGNAAN, MUNICIPALITY OF LA CASTELLANA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02604
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY TALAPTAP, MUNICIPALITY OF LA CASTELLANA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02605
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY SAN TEODORO, MUNICIPALITY OF BINALBAGAN, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02606
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY PAGLAUM, MUNICIPALITY OF BINALBAGAN, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02607
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY MAKILIGNIT, MUNICIPALITY OF ISABELA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02608
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BARANGAY HEALTH CENTER IN BARANGAY MONTILLA, MUNICIPALITY OF MOISES PADILLA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02609
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE PROVINCIAL ROAD CONNECTING THE MUNICIPALITIES OF DATU PAGLAS IN MAGUINDANAO, COLUMBIO AND LUTAYAN IN THE PROVINCE OF SULTAN KUDARAT INTO A NATIONAL ROAD, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02610
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAM IN THE CITY OF TACURONG, PROVINCE OF SULTAN KUDARAT

name: HBN-02611
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PRESIDENT QUIRINO, PROVINCE OF SULTAN KUDARAT

name: HBN-02612
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SEN. NINOY AQUINO, PROVINCE OF SULTAN KUDARAT

name: HBN-02613
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING CRIMINAL SANCTIONS AGAINST UNSCRUPULOUS CONTRACTORS AND AWARDEES OF GOVERNMENT CONTRACTS THEREBY AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT 9184 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Unscrupulous Contracts Act.\" The bill imposes the penalty of imprisonment ranging from six years and one day to twelve years on a winning contractor who delivered faulty, defective and substandard goods and services to the government.

name: HBN-02614
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING SEPTEMBER 8 OF EVERY YEAR AN OFFICIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY IN DIGOS CITY, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL SUR

name: HBN-02615
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO DETER AND PUNISH TERRORIST ACTS, TO ENHANCE LAW ENFORCEMENT, TO AUTHORIZE PEN REGISTERS AND TRAP AND TRACE UNDER CERTAIN CONDITIONS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Peace Act of 2004.\" The bill defines the offense of terrorism and provides penalties therefore. It allows court authorized wiretaps in terrorism investigations and wiretaps without court authorization in cases of concensual monitoring.

name: HBN-02616
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7903, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'ZAMBOANGA CITY SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE ACT OF 1995'

name: HBN-02617
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN ADDITIONAL MUNICIPAL TRIAL COURT BRANCH IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN PEDRO, LAGUNA, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 30 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BILANG 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980'

name: HBN-02618
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN ANTONIO, SAN PEDRO, LAGUNA, TO BE KNOWN AS THE SAN ANTONIO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02619
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN ADDITIONAL MUNICIPAL TRIAL COURT BRANCH IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BINAN, LAGUNA, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 30 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BILANG 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980'

name: HBN-02620
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL IDENTIFICATION SYSTEM (NIDS) IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"National ID Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for a tamper-proof National ID (NID) Card which may be used to transact with any government instrumentality without need of further proof as to his/her identity.

name: HBN-02621
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING TERRORISM, ESTABLISHING INSTITUTIONAL MECHANISM TO PREVENT AND SUPPRESS ITS COMMISSION, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR ITS VIOLATIONS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Terrorism Act of 2004.\" The bill defines the crime of terrorism and establishes a mechanism for its suppression and the prevention of its commission. It provides for the creation of an Anti-Terrorism Council which shall serve as the central policy-making coordinating and monitoring body on all matters relating to domestic and international terrorism.

name: HBN-02622
congress_website_title: THE EQUAL EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITY ACT OF 2004
congress_website_abstract: The bill declares it unlawful for an employer, employment agency and labor organization to discriminate against any person on account of his/her sex, race, creed, age, appearance, sexual orientation, regional or ethnic origin, disability, weight or height.

name: HBN-02623
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A DRUG REHABILITATION CENTER IN THE MANGATAREM DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MANGATAREM, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02624
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXCLUDING A PARCEL OF LAND FROM THE FORBES PARK NO. 1 RESERVATION, CITY OF BAGUIO, TO BE GRANTED TO THE BOY SCOUTS AND GIRLS SCOUTS OF THE PHILIPPINES FOR THEIR EXCLUSIVE USE AND POSSESSION, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5786 ENTITLED 'AN ACT EXCLUDING A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND FROM THE FORBES PARK NO. 1 RESERVATION, CITY OF BAGUIO, TO BE LEASED TO THE BOY SCOUTS AND GIRL SCOUTS OF THE PHILIPPINES'

name: HBN-02625
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING A NATIONAL POLICY ON TOURISM AS THE PRIMARY ENGINE OF INVESTMENT, EMPLOYMENT, GROWTH AND NATIONAL DEVELOPMENT AND STRENGTHENING THE DEPARTMENT OF TOURISM
congress_website_abstract: \"Tourism Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the adoption of a national tourism policy to a) guide the course and pace of tourism development; b) coordinate the functions and resources of government agencies in tourism programs; and c) improve the quality of life of the people by promoting ecotourism.

name: HBN-02626
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE BEGINNING OF HUMAN LIFE, RECOGNIZING RIGHTS THEREUNDER, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Human Life Act.\" The bill defines the beginning of human as \"from the moment of the combination, fusion and integration of the ovum and the sperm cell resulting from the formation of the human nucleus or fertilization thereof\". It provides that the rights accorded to human persons shall be recognized in the unborn from the moment of the formation of the nucleus or fertilization.

name: HBN-02627
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXTENDING THE PERIOD WITHIN WHICH THE AGRICULTURAL COMPETITIVENESS ENHANCEMENT FUND SHALL BE UTILIZED, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE SECTION 8 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8178, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill extends the utilization of the Agricultural Competitiveness Enhancement Fund for another ten years, after which the balance shall be transferred to the general fund.

name: HBN-02628
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING A PRE-SCHOOL PROGRAM IN THE PUBLIC EDUCATION SYSTEM AND INTEGRATING VALUES FORMATION INTO THE CURRICULUM OF PUBLIC PRE-SCHOOL, ELEMENTARY AND HIGH SCHOOL EDUCATION
congress_website_abstract: The bill directs the Department of Education to design a pre-school program that shall be made part of the curriculum of public schools and shall be considered as a requisite to elementary education. It also directs the integration of values formation in the curriculum of all public preparatory, elementary and high schools.

name: HBN-02533
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR VACATION AND SICK LEAVE BENEFITS TO PRIVATE SECTOR EMPLOYEES, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE 442 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: For clarity, the bill seeks to abolish the service incentive leave granted under Section 95 of the Labor Code and, in lieu thereof, provide for both vacation and sick leave benefits to private sector employees and make said benefits mandatory.

name: HBN-02534
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN ADDITIONAL MUNICIPAL TRIAL COURT BRANCH IN THE CITY OF STA. ROSA, LAGUNA, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 30 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BILANG 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980'

name: HBN-02535
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A STATE COLLEGE IN QUEZON CITY, METRO MANILA TO BE KNOWN AS 'QUEZON CITY STATE COLLEGE', APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-02536
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING THE PROBATIONARY PERIOD OF EMPLOYMENT OF ACADEMIC PERSONNEL IN PRIVATE SCHOOLS, THEREBY AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442 (AS AMENDED), OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill sets the probationary employment period of academic personnel as follows: a) one (1) calendar year of very satisfactory service for those in the elementary and secondary levels; b) two consecutive regular semesters of very satisfactory service for those in the tertiary levels; and c) three consecutive trimester of very satisfactory service for those in the tertiary level with a trimester program.

name: HBN-02537
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING A NEGLIGENT LESSOR OF A BUILDING, WAREHOUSE, OR ANY EDIFICE FOUND TO BE USED IN THE MANUFACTURE OR STORAGE OF DANGEROUS DRUGS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9165, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE COMPREHENSIVE DANGEROUS DRUGS ACT OF 2002
congress_website_abstract: This bill seeks to impose a penalty of imprisonment from 12 years and 1 day to 20 years and a fine ranging from P100,000 to P500,000 on the owner of a building, warehouse or any edifice whose property is used for the manufacture or storage of dangerous drugs.

name: HBN-02538
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING ONE (1) ADDITIONAL BRANCH OF THE MUNICIPAL TRIAL COURT IN THE CITY OF DIGOS, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL SUR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980', AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF

name: HBN-02539
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 97 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8550 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FISHERIES CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES OF 1998
congress_website_abstract: The bill defines the term \"endangered species\" as \"any of the rare marine life which is declining in number and is in danger of extinction and is listed in the CITIES (Convention on the International Trade in Endangered Species of Wild Fauna and Flora) but does not include species which are replenished or grown by man with the aid of research and technology and where actual propagation is in place.\"

name: HBN-02540
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PILAR DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PILAR, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02541
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NATONIN COMMUNITY HOSPITAL AT NATONIN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE INTO AN ANNEX OF THE LUIS HORA MEMORIAL REGIONAL HOSPITAL IN BAUKO, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02542
congress_website_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE VICENTE SOTTO MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER, CEBU CITY, REINSTATING ITS FORMER NAME 'SOUTHERN ISLANDS MEDICAL CENTER'

name: HBN-02543
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE ESTABLISHMENT OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES OFFICERS TRAINING PROGRAM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the establishment of a training program for future officers of the major branches of the Armed Forces of the Philippines: the Army, Air Force and the Navy.

name: HBN-02544
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR PUBLIC LIABILITY INSURANCE FOR THE PURPOSE OF PROVIDING IMMEDIATE RELIEF TO PERSONS AFFECTED BY ACCIDENT ARISING FROM THE OPERATIONS OR INCIDENTAL TO THE OPERATIONS OF ESTABLISHMENTS, ENTERPRISES, PUBLIC UTILITIES AND VEHICLES, BUILDINGS, MACHINERY AND THEIR ACCESORIES
congress_website_abstract: \"Public Liability Insurance Act of 2001.\" The bill requires all owners and operators of business establishments, public utilities and services, buildings, machinery and their accessories to have public liability insurance to pay for injuries and damages arising from the operation of the above.

name: HBN-02545
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A POST SECONDARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CORDOVA, ISLAND OF MACTAN, PROVINCE OF CEBU, TO BE KNOWN AS THE MACTAN ISLAND INSTITUTE OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-02546

congress_website_title: AN ACT TO UPGRADE THE SALARY GRADE LEVEL OF TEACHER I POSITION FROM SALARY GRADE 10 TO SALARY GRADE 18, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6758, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE SALARY STANDARDIZATION LAW AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Teachers are the most overworked yet underpaid public servants in the country. This measure seeks to upgrade the salary grade (SG) of Teacher I position from SG 10 to SG 18.

name: HBN-02528
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING PROTECTION AGAINST COMPUTER FRAUD, ABUSES AND OTHER CYBER-RELATED FRAUDULENT ACTIVITIES, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Computer Fraud and Abuses Act of 2004.\" The bill defines computer fraud and offenses covered by the term \"computer-related fraudulent activities.\" It provides penalties for violations of the proposed act and authorizes the National Security Council to investigate computer-related crimes vis-a-vis their effects on national security.

name: HBN-02529
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE PERIOD FROM MAY 1 TO 7 OF EVERY YEAR AS THE NATIONAL OLDER WORKERS WEEK
congress_website_abstract: In recognition of the contributions of workers aged 50 years and above, the bill seeks to declare May 1-7 of every year as the \"National Older Workers Week\".

name: HBN-02530
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 9136, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ELECTRIC INDUSTRY REFORM ACT OF 2001
congress_website_abstract: Three years after the passage of the Electric Power Industry Reform Act (PERA), consumers remain at the mercy of the local electric monopolies and their independent power producers (IPPs) and foreign IPPs. Obviously, the EPIRA institutionalizes private monopoly control, perpetrates foreign domination and the exploitation of the national economy and resources at the expenses of consumers. In view of its detrimental effects on consumers and on the economy, the bill proposes the repeal of the EPIRA.

name: HBN-02531
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING AND GUARANTEEING PUBLIC SECTOR UNIONISM IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Public Sector Unionism Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the protection of the rights of ALL workers and employees in the public sector to: a) self-organization; b) collective bargaining and negotiations; c) peaceful concerted activities; and d) strike. It establishes the Public Sector Labor Relations Board which shall have original and exclusive jurisdiction to hear and decide on all cases arising from the proposed act.

name: HBN-02532
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE RIGHTS OF FARMERS TO LAND AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Farmers' Land Rights Act.\" The bill imposes the direct right of farmers to the land they till to ensure their security of tenure and therefor be more productive.

name: HBN-02458
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXTENDING THE TERM OF OFFICE OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS AND RESETTING THE DATE OF BARANGAY ELECTIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the extension of the term of office of barangay and sangguniang kabataan officials from three years to five years and for the holding of the synchronized barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections on the 2nd Monday of November 2007 and every five years thereafter.

name: HBN-02459
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING THE COMPREHENSIVE CRIME PREVENTION AND CRIMINAL JUSTICE ACT OF 2004, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Comprehensive Crime Prevention and Criminal Justice Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for an integrated system of planning, implementation and enforcement of crime prevention and criminal justice policies, programs and projects based on United Nations Standards and Norms in Crime Prevention and Criminal Justice. It provides for the creation of the Crime Prevention and Criminal Justice Synergism Board and the National Action Center.

name: HBN-02460
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO EXPAND THE POWERS, DUTIES AND FUNCTIONS OF A PUNONG BARANGAY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 389, CHAPTER 3 OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants the punong barangay additional powers, duties and functions, to wit: a) to enforce laws and regulations relating to the prevention, use and sale of illegal drugs; b) to perform minor repairs and maintenance of municipal and barangay roads ; and c) to conduct annually a census of the population of the barangay.

congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to include in the Science subjectthe study of environmental protection in the curricula of all levels in public and private schools.

congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the holding of the synchronized barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections on the last Monday of October 2006 and every three years thereafter.

congress_website_abstract: \"Science and Mathematics Education Development Fund Act.\" The bill seeks the establishment of the Fund which shall be used for research, curriculum development and teacher training in science and mathematics education.

congress_website_title: AN ACT EFFECTIVELY REPEALING THE AUTOMATIC APPROPRIATION FOR DEBT SERVICE BY AMENDING SECTION 31 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1177 AND SECTION 26, CHAPTER 4, BOOK VI OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 292, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'ADMINISTRATIVE CODE OF 1987' WHICH REITERATES IN TOTO SECTION 31 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1177
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks the repeal of the automatic appropriation for debt service provisions in PD 1177 and in EO 292.

name: HBN-02497
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR ADDITIONAL BENEFITS AND PRIVILEGES TO PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4670, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'MAGNA CARTA FOR PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS', AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to grant public school teachers additional benefits and privileges in the form of more liberal study leaves, educational grants to children of teachers and more comprehensive special hardship allowances.

name: HBN-02498
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE AGNO RIVER BASIN DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS, FUNCTIONS AND RESPONSIBILITIES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-02499
congress_website_title: AN ACT MAINTAINING THE PRESENT PROVISION ON PROBATIONARY EMPLOYMENT INCREASING AT THE SAME TIME THE GOVERNMENTS PROTECTION TO PROBATIONARY EMPLOYEES, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE ART 281 OF THE LABOR CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the regularization of a probationary employee who is allowed to work after his probationary period, whether broken or not.

name: HBN-02500
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 58(A), SECTION 77(A), AND SECTION 81 OF REPUBLIC ACT 8424, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'TAX REFORM ACT OF 1997', AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires all corporations to file their income tax returns and pay their taxes in the host city/municipality and province where the corporation or its branch operates its business. In the case of taxes withheld at source, it requires the withholding agent to file the return and to remit the taxes withheld to the host city/municipality where the withholding agent operates his/its business.

name: HBN-02501
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING THE COOPERATIVE CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES TO BE KNOWN AS THE 'PHILIPPINE COOPERATIVE CODE OF 2002'
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Cooperative Code of 2004.\" The measure seeks to amend the Cooperative Code to make the organization of cooperatives more attractive and to provide a fertile social and economic environment for cooperatives to succeed in their endeavors.

name: HBN-02502
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING WOMEN'S PARTICIPATION IN ELECTIVE AND APPOINTIVE POSITIONS IN GOVERNMENT AS WELL AS IN GOVERNMENT INSTITUTIONS UNDER THE EXECUTIVE DEPARTMENT
congress_website_abstract: \"Gender Balance in Political Participation and Representation Act.\" The bill proposes to implement a gender quota system to ensure that women are granted the following: a) access to appointive positions in the national and local government; and b) full participation in the electoral and political process.

name: HBN-02437
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEVOLVING THE HEALTH CARE PROGRAMS OF THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT, INCLUDING FUNDS AND RESOURCES, TO THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the devolution of the national government's health care program, including funds and resources, to provinces, cities, municipalities and barangays. Each local government unit shall be made responsible for a minimum set of services and facilities.

name: HBN-02438
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE MANDATORY APPOINTMENT OF MUNICIPAL SOCIAL WELFARE AND DEVELOPMENT OFFICERS IN ALL MUNICIPALITIES NATIONWIDE, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 483, ARTICLE XIII OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the mandatory appointment of Social Welfare and Development Officers in the municipal levels to handle programs and projects on the welfare of child and youth, family and community, and the elderly and the disabled.

name: HBN-02439
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MAINTENANCE AND ADMINISTRATION OF THE PHILIPPINE MARINE CORPS AS A SEPARATE MAJOR UNIT OF THE PHILIPPINE NAVY, PRESCRIBING ITS MISSION AND FUNCTIONS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Marine Corps Act.\" The bill provides for the Philippine Marine Corps to be administered and maintained as a separate unit of the Philippine Navy. The Corps shall provide combat armed units in amphibious and other operations.

name: HBN-02440
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MEMBERSHIP OF SCHOOL PRINCIPALS IN MUNICIPAL SCHOOL BOARDS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 98 (b)(3) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to designate the school principal to sit in the School Board in lieu of the district supervisor who now simply performs staff functions as mandated under RA 9155.

name: HBN-02441
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING HONORARIA AND OTHER BENEFITS TO ALL ACCREDITED BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7883, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS INCENTIVES AND BENEFITS ACT'
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to grant accredited barangay health workers a monthly honorarium of P2,000 and insurance coverage of not less than P10,000 by the Government Service Insurance System or any accredited company.

name: HBN-02442
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE BOARD OF AGROFORESTRY UNDER THE PROFESSIONAL REGULATIONS COMMISSION, PROVIDING FOR MECHANISMS OF IMPLEMENTATION, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Board of Agroforestry Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the powers, functions and responsibilities; and the composition, organization and terms of office of the Board.

name: HBN-02443
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE ILOILO RIVER AND MUELLE LONEY DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, PROVIDING APPROPRIATIONS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-02444
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 24, PARAGRAPH 2 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6770, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to amend Section 24 of RA 6770 on the power of the Ombudsman to preventively suspend any officer/employee under his authority pending an investigation. It authorizes the Ombudsman to impose up to a maximum of 90 days preventive suspension.

name: HBN-02445
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING NOVEMBER TWENTY OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY TO BE KNOWN AS THE NATIONAL CHILDREN'S DAY
congress_website_abstract: \"National Children's Day Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to declare November 20th of every year as National Children's Day and a special non-working holiday to commemorate the United Nation's General Assembly ratification of the Convention on the Rights of the Child.

name: HBN-02446
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A NATIONAL SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAM FOR COLLEGE STUDENTS IN SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY COURSES IN EVERY MUNICIPALITY OF EVERY PROVINCE OF THE COUNTRY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to grant annually scholarships in science and technology course to poor but deserving students. The fund assistance shall cover tuition and registration fees, book allowance, board and lodging fees or transportation allowance, and a monthly stipend for living expenses.

name: HBN-02447
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE LINGAYEN GULF COASTAL AREA DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, PRESCRIBING ITS POWERS, FUNCTIONS AND DUTIES, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-02448

congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates manufacturers and distributors of processed foods and beverages to determine the nutritional value of their products and to print the nutritional facts on the label of their packaging.

congress_website_abstract: \"College Education Trust Fund Act.\" The bill seeks to establish in the Government Service Insurance Corporation and the Social Services System a special trust fund to ensure the college education of the children (legitimate, legitimated, legally adopted, illegitimate or grandchild) of the members of both systems.

congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7941, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'PARTY LIST SYSTEM ACT'
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to remedy certain imperfections of RA 7941 and to settle once and for all the gray areas of interpretation in the law such as the mathematical formula in the allocation of seats for pary list groups.

name: HBN-02452
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING TELECOMMUNICATIONS COMPANIES PROVIDING MOBILE TELEPHONE SERVICES TO CHARGE MOBILE TELEPHONE USERS FOR EVERY SIX SECOND PULSE OF USAGE AND TO REQUIRE SUCH SERVICE OPERATORS TO GIVE A DETAILED BILLING FOR PREPAID SUBSCRIBERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Truth in Mobile Telephone Billing Act.\" The bill requires mobile telephone service providers to bill subscribers for actual air time usage, i.e., every 6-second pulse of usage which translates to one-tenth (1/10) of a minute. It also directs the service providers to furnish pre-paid subscribers with a detailed billing upon presentation of the consumed pre-paid card at designated business centers of the providers.

name: HBN-02453
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXTENDING THE TERM OF BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN OFFICIALS AND SETTING THE DATE OF ITS ELECTION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to postpone the synchronized election for barangay and sangguniang kabataan officials to the 2nd Monday of May 2007 to coincide with the national and local elections and to correspondingly extend their term of office to June 30, 2007.

name: HBN-02454

congress_website_abstract: The bill compels corporations, partnerships associations or individuals engaged in the development and exploitation of natural resources to give employment preference to residents of the province or city where such activities are conducted.

congress_website_title: AN ACT TO RECAPTURE THE POWER OVER TARIFFS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 401 OF THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to limit the President's exercise of the power over tariffs to periods when Congress is in compulsory recess, i.e., when Congress adjourns sine die between two regular sessions. Moreover, the bill provides that the change in the rate of import duty or in the classification of dutiable articles effected by the President's exercise of the power over tariffs shall be in force and effect for a period of one year only.

congress_website_abstract: \"PAG-ASA Modernization Act.\" The bill proposes the adoption of a four-pronged approach for the modernization of the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration, to wit: a) modernization of physical resources and operational techniques; b) intensification of human resource development; c) upgrading of research and development capability; and d) establishment of social weather service centers in strategic cities.

congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Prostitution Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to shift the accountability for prostitution from the persons exploited in prostitution to those who really gain from the system of prostitution, i.e., the business establishments (sauna, bath and massage parlors; motels, hotels and lodging houses; bars, etc.) and the buyers who are predominantly men.

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE ARTISTS CAREER SERVICE, RECOGNIZING THE SPECIAL QUALIFICATIONS OF ARTISTS IN GOVERNMENT, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to encourage artists to pursue civil service careers by: a) setting the criteria for appointment and advancement based on talent, education and productivity, and artistic standing; and b) the creation of the Artists Career Service.

name: HBN-02337
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A COLLEGE EDUCATION TRUST FUND FOR CHILDREN OF GOVERNMENT SERVICE INSURANCE SYSTEM (GSIS) AND SOCIAL SECURITY SYSTEM (SSS) MEMBERS
congress_website_abstract: \"College Education Trust Fund Act.\" The bill seeks to establish within the Government Service Insurance System and the Social Service System a special trust fund called the \"College Education Trust Fund\" to cover the college education of the children of members of both systems.

name: HBN-02338
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING THE ADMINISTRATIVE CODE OF 1987 BY PROHIBITING A PERSON FROM BEING APPOINTED AS THE SECRETARY OF THE DEPARTMENT OF NATIONAL DEFENSE WITHIN THREE (3) YEARS AFTER RELIEF FROM ACTIVE DUTY AS A COMMISSIONED OFFICER OF A REGULAR COMPONENT OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES (AFP)
congress_website_abstract: To uphold civilian supremacy over the military, the bill seeks to prohibit former military officers from being appointed as Secretary of National Defense within three years after relief from active duty as a commissioned officer the Armed Forces of the Philippines.

name: HBN-02339
congress_website_title: AN ACT REDEFINING THE TERM \"VETERAN\" THEREBY AMENDING FURTHER REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6948, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to redefine the term \"veteran\" by restricting its application to those who rendered military service in the Armed Forces of the Philippines and have been honorably discharged or separated after a total of at least 20 years cumulative service, instead of the original requirement of only six years.

name: HBN-02340
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE PAYMENT THROUGH VETERANS BONDS OF ARREARS IN THE VETERANS PENSIONS MANDATED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7696, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes the Treasurer of the Philippines to issue to veterans Certificates of Indebtedness in payment of arrearages in their pensions. The certificates may be used as payment for goods and services such as rice from National Food Authority, real estate taxes, tuition fees, amortization of housing loans, utility bills, among others.

name: HBN-02341
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ANY PERSON RUNNING FOR AN ELECTIVE NATIONAL OR LOCAL POSITION TO UNDERGO A NEURO-PSYCHIATRIC EXAMINATION PRIOR TO FILING A CERTIFICATE OF CANDIDACY
congress_website_abstract: \"Improved Qualifications Act of 2004.\" The bill aims to require all persons seeking to run for an elective public office to undergo a neuro-psychiatric examination and to attach the result of thereof to his certificate of candidacy.

name: HBN-02342
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A NATIONAL LAND USE POLICY, PROVIDING THE IMPLEMENTING MECHANISMS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Land Use Act of the Philippines.\" The bill proposes to give top priority to the use of land for food security and environmental sustainability. It provides for the setting aside of a minimum area for agricultural and other uses in each province and municipality.

name: HBN-02343
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR TRAVEL TAX COLLECTION REFORMS AND THE EQUITABLE DISTRIBUTION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: \"Travel Tax Reform Act of 2004.\" The bill proposes to gradually reduce the annual share of the Higher Education Development Fund (HEDF) from the travel tax collection from 40% to 20% at an annual reduction rate of 10%. The reduced share of the HEDF shall be reallocated to the Philippine Tourism Authority to be used for tourism infrastructure development and promotions.

name: HBN-02344
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE LOCAL DEVELOPMENT COUNCIL, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to compel local chief executives to convene and organize their respective local development councils within thirty days from assumption to office.

name: HBN-02400
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE TOLL REGULATORY BOARD TO CONDUCT PUBLIC HEARING PRIOR TO THE APPROVAL OF TOLL RATES OR ANY INCREASE THEREIN, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBERED EIGHTEEN HUNDRED NINETY-FOUR
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the Toll Regulatory Board to conduct public hearings prior to the approval of intial toll rates at any infrastructure still to be constructed or any proposal to increase the toll rates of existing ones.

congress_website_abstract: Same as HB2198

congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING THE GROSS INCOME TAXATION SYSTEM FOR CORPORATIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to impose a 15% tax on the gross income of corporations and a 10% tax on the gross income of proprietary educational institutions and hospitals.

name: HBN-02375
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING THAT ALL CITIZENS OF THE PHILIPPINES SHALL AUTOMATICALLY BE ENROLLED IN THE NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE PROGRAM AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE ACT OF 1995
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes the automatic enrollment of all citizens in the National Health Insurance Program. It provides additional funding to the Program by allocating 5% of the annual earnings of the Philippine Gaming Corporation and the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office.

name: HBN-02376
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING MT. ARAYAT, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ARAYAT, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, AN ECOTOURISM DESTINATION

name: HBN-02377
congress_website_title: AN ACT LIFTING UNREGISTERED IMPORTED DRUG PRODUCT FROM THE CLASSIFICATION OF COUNTERFEIT DRUGS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE SPECIAL LAW ON COUNTERFEIT DRUGS
congress_website_abstract: RA 8203 classifies imported medicines that are not registered with the Bureau of Foods and Drugs as counterfeit drugs and consequently bans their entry into the country. The bill seeks to lift unregistered imported medicines from the classification of counterfeit drugs to allow the entry of cheaper imported medicines.

name: HBN-02378
congress_website_title: AN ACT LIFTING THE TERM LIMITS OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS AN ACT PROVIDING FOR SYNCHRONIZED BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to reset the barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections to the 2nd Monday of May 2005 and every three years therafter. It further lifts the term limits of barangay officials.

congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Terrorism Act of 2004.\" The bill defines terrorism, terrorist acts and provides penalties therefor.

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FREE MEDICINE ASSISTANCE PROGRAM FOR THE POOR AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Free Medicines Assistance Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to establish a free medicine assistance program for eligible beneficiaries to be identified by the Department of Health.

congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING INCENTIVES AND BENEFITS TO BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Barangay Health Workers Benefits and Incentives Act of 2004.\" The bill grants barangay health workers the following additional incentives and benefits: a) hazard allowance; b) subsistence allowance; c) scholarships in the form of tuition fees in state universities/colleges; and d) free legal representation and consultation services.

congress_website_abstract: \"The Philippine Informants Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to grant qualified informants the following: a) cash rewards; b) immunity from retaliatory actions and suits; c) share in the proceeds of the offense recovered; and d) enrollment in the Witness Protection Program.

congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for an alternative mode of payment for matriculation and other fees to proprietary educational institutions that accommodate scholars of the Philippine Veterans Affairs Office.

name: HBN-02356
congress_website_title: AN ACT CLARIFYING THE COVERAGE OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7837, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT GRANTING PERMANENT RESIDENT STATUS, OTHER RIGHTS AND PRIVILEGES TO FILIPINO VETERANS OF WORLD WAR II WHO ACQUIRED AMERICAN CITIZENSHIP UNDER THE UNITED STATES IMMIGRATION ACT OF 1990 AND ANY OTHER PRIOR ACTS FOR THESE PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to insert the phrase \"AND ANY OTHER PRIOR ACTS\" in Sections 5, 6 and 7 in RA 7837 to allay the fears of Filipino veterans, who acquired American citizenship before 1990, that they may not be included among the benefiticaries of RA 7837.

name: HBN-02357
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL MEMORIAL CEMETERY IN EVERY REGION OR MAJOR ISLAND IN THE PHILIPPINES AND PROVIDING FOR THEIR ADMINSITRATION AND MAINTENANCE
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to establish in each region and major island at least one national cemetery which shall serve as a memorial and final resting place for veterans, military personnel and others who rendered distinguished service to the country.

congress_website_title: AN ACT REVERTING THE TERM OF OFFICE OF BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN OFFICIALS TO FIVE (5) YEARS, AND RESETTING THE DATE OF ELECTION OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to revert the terms of office of barangay and sangguniang kabataan official to five years, as previously envisioned under RA 8524.

It provides for the eligibility criteria for beneficiaries of the program and a graduated amortization payment scheme.

congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE REGULATORY FUNCTIONS OF THE PHILIPPINE OVERSEAS EMPLOYMENT ADMINISTRATION (POEA), AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8042, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'MIGRANT WORKERS AND OVERSEAS FILIPINOS ACT OF 1995'

congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE PHILIPPINE COAST GUARD AND VESTING IN IT THE PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITY OF ENFORCING MARITIME SAFETY RULES AND REGULATIONS AS WELL AS ANY OTHER MATTER RELATED TO THE PERFORMANCE OF SAFETY OF LIFE AND PROPERTY FUNCTION WITHIN PHILIPPINE TERRITORIAL WATERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill makes the Philippine Coast Guard primarily responsbile for the enforcement and implementation of maritime safety rules and regulations promulgated by the Maritime Industry Authority. The PCG shall be responsible for overssing the safety of life and property of all seafarers at sea.

name: HBN-02267
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING EXCISE TAX ON CARBONATED DRINKS, FRUIT JUICE DRINKS AND POWDERED JUICE DRINKS AND ON A CERTAIN NON-ESSENTIAL ARTICLES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 150 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED, AND INSERTING A NEW SECTION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: This bill imposes, in addition to the 10% value-added tax, a 20% excise tax on selected goods and appliances such as high-priced carpets made of wool or fine animal hair and whirpool bath tubs purchased mostly by those who can well afford to own such goods and appliances. It also imposes a 10% excise tax on carbonated drinks, fruit juice drinks, including those from liquid concentrates and powdered juice drinks.

name: HBN-02268
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING AND REGULATING TUITION AND OTHER SCHOOL FEES IN ALL HIGHER AND BASIC EDUCATION INSTITUTIONS, CREATING A TUITION FEE RATIONALIZING COUNCIL AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Tuition Fee Rationalization Act of 2004.\" This bill establishes a tuition fee rationalization council to be headed by a multi-sectoral body that will serve as the highest policy-making body on matters pertaining to tuition fee rates and other increases or adjustments in school fees.

name: HBN-02269
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING A MECHANISM FOR GENERATING QUALITY GRADUATES OF HIGHER EDUCATION INSTITUTIONS BASED ON PERFORMANCE IN PROFESSIONAL LICENSURE EXAMINATIONS
congress_website_abstract: \"Professional Examination Zero-Performance Policy Act.\" This bill seeks to permanently revoke government recognition and/or permit to operate pertinent and related professional courses by any higher education institution, whether public or private, whose graduates have registered zero-performance in any professional board or bar examination in three (3) out of five (5) consecutive times they participated in.

name: HBN-02273
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE AUTOMATIC RELEASE OF THE TEN PERCENT (10%) ALLOCATION TO THE SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN FROM THE GENERAL FUND OF THE BARANGAY AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 329 AND 331 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: This bill seeks to free the Sangguniang Kabataan from having to beg to the Barangay Captains for the release of the ten percent (10%) allocation due them.

name: HBN-02274
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING RETIREMENT BENEFITS TO ALL BARANGAY OFFICIALS AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 393 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: This bill entitles the barangay officials to retirement benefits from the GSIS after having served for at least nine (9) years of cumulative service, thus giving them due recognition for their dedication and invaluable service.

name: HBN-02275
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING INSURANCE BENEFITS TO BARANGAY TANODS AND INCREASING THE AMOUNT OF THE COVERAGE OF INSURANCE BENEFITS OF LOCAL GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6942 AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: This bill increases by at least fifty percent (50%) but not more than one hundred percent (100%), the insurance benefits accorded to all local officials who do not receive fixed salaries during their incumbency as per R.A. 6942.

name: HBN-02276
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE OPEN LEARNING SYSTEM IN THE PHILIPPINES APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Open Learning System Act of 2004.\" This bill seeks to utilize the distance teaching/learning system where students shall not be required to regularly attend conventional classrooms, thus allowing these students to study while working in offices, factories, farms or other preoccupations.

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MUSEUM IN THE PROVINCE OF DAVAO ORIENTAL TO BE KNOWN AS THE DAVAO ORIENTAL MUSEUM AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE USE OF THE CONTRACTOR'S CERTIFICATE AS A LEGAL PAPER THAT CAN BE USED AS COLLATERAL AND REDISCOUNTING IN ANY WINDOW OF A PUBLIC OR PRIVATE BANK
congress_website_abstract: To protect the credit standing of the contractor and the agency, the bill proposes the acceptance of the contractor's certificate as a collateral to secure loans and be rediscounted at any bank.

name: HBN-02284
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE ISSUANCE OF LEGAL INSTRUMENT TO COVER THE FUNDS FOR THE CHARATER LOANS TO THE GOVERNMENT AND PRIVATE WORKERS
congress_website_abstract: This bill authorizes the Government Service Insurance System (GSIS) and the Social Security System to grant loans in the amount of One Hundred Thousand Pesos (P100,000.00) to government and private employees who have rendered fifteen (15) to twenty (20) years of continuous service.

name: HBN-02285
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE SALARIES OF THE DAY CARE TEACHERS/WORKERS WITH CORRESPONDING BENEFITS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: This bill provides for the inclusion in the regular General Appropriations Act an amount intended for the salaries and benefits of the Day Care Teachers and the Day Care Workers nationwide. The sum necessary for implementation of this Act shall be charged against the annual budget of the Department of Social Welfare and Development.

name: HBN-02286
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A FIVE (5) YEAR MORATORIUM IN THE IMPOSITION OF NEW TAXES IN ALL PRODUCTS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill hopes to relieve poor consumers from paying and buying highly taxed products for at least five (5) years.

name: HBN-02287
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE IMMEDIATE CONSTRUCTION, OPERATION AND MAINTENANCE OF A FARMERS' TRADING CENTER OF LOCAL PRODUCTS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BALIUAG, PROVINCE OF BULACAN AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
