name: HBN-02290
congress_website_title: AN ACT ABOLISHING THE DEATH PENALTY AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill states that the death penalty law symbolizes the retributive justice that is adopted by the penal system and violates the Constitutional provision of cruel and excessive punishment. It further states that there is no clear indication, so far, that its imposition has deterred the continued commission of heinous crimes.

name: HBN-02291
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING ONE STEP SALARY GRADE INCREASE TO GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES ONE YEAR BEFORE COMPULSORY RETIREMENT AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: This bill hopes that government employees will be assured of an increase in their lump sum retirement benefits and monthly pensions to enable them to be better-off economically, and be able to respond to their needs and their family's as well.

name: HBN-02292
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE MINIMUM SALARY GRADE LEVEL OF PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS IN ELEMENTARY AND SECONDARY LEVELS FROM GRADE 10 TO GRADE 17 AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: This bill aims to entice competent and highly qualified educators to join the public teaching force and recognizes the critical social responsibility that they shoulder by upgrading their minimum salary levels from Grade 10 to Grade 17.

name: HBN-02293
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1949 ENTITLED 'ESTABLISHING A JUDICIARY DEVELOPMENT FUND' AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill democratizes the use of the Judiciary Development Fund by providing that at least ninety percent (90%) of the Fund shall be used for cost of living allowances, and not more than ten percent (10%) shall be used for office equipment and facilities in the Courts where the legal fees are collected.

name: HBN-02294
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING ALL FORMS OF SMUGGLING AS ECONOMIC SABOTAGE AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: This bill declares it a State policy to control all forms of actual and technical smuggling that impinge upon the genuine attainment of economic growth and development.

name: HBN-02295
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE RATIONALIZATION OF SALARIES, ALLOWANCES AND BENEFITS OF OFFICIALS AND EMPLOYEES OF GOVERNMENT OWNED OR CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS AND GOVERNMENT FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS EXEMPTED FROM THE COMPENSATION AND POSITION CLASSIFICATION SYSTEM
congress_website_abstract: This bill proposes the exemption of all officials and employees of government owned or controlled corporations and government financial institutions from the Compensation and Position Classification System provided that their compensation shall be no more than twice the salaries of equivalent ranks and positions in other government agencies.

name: HBN-02296
congress_website_title: AN ACT POSTPONING THE 2005 BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS AND HOLDING THE SAME IN MAY 2007 TO COINCIDE WITH THE LOCAL ELECTIONS
congress_website_abstract: This bill seeks to synchronized the barangay elections with the local elections on May 2007 in order to save the government from additional expenses and effort.

name: HBN-02297
congress_website_title: AN ACT REDEFINING THE COMPOSITION OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS AND INCREASING THE BENEFITS OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 387 AND 393 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: This bill provides for the appointment of a barangay social worker and a barangay health worker in every municipality. It increases the honoraria allowances and other emoluments of the barangay officials, including barangay social workers, barangay health workers and barangay tanods.

name: HBN-02298
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO EXTEND THE UTILIZATION PERIOD OF THE AGRICULTURAL COMPETITIVENESS ENHANCEMENT FUND, AMENDING SECTION 8 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8178, ENTITLED 'AN ACT REPLACING QUANTITATIVE IMPORT RESTRICTION ON AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTS, EXCEPT RICE, WITH TARIFFS, CREATING THE AGRICULTURAL COMPETITIVENESS ENHANCEMENT FUND, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill extends the utilization period of the Agricultural Competitiveness Ehancement Fund (ACEF) by 10 years to enable the governent to provide the farming sector the opportunity to use said funds to strengthen their development activities and enhance their competitiveness.

congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING NATIONAL HEALTH RESEARCH INSTITUTES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Health Research Institutes Act of 2004.\" This bill creates the National Health Research Institutes (NHRI) that will harness the health potentials of indigenous products and materials, practices and other sources through basic and clinical biomedical research.

It limits voluntary contributions from individuals to P100,00 and from juridical entities to P1.0 million. It imposes penalties for political turncoatism.

congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING TERRORISM, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Terrorism Act of 2004.\" This bill defines and punishes the act of terrorism. It states that terrorism is committed by any person or group of persons, who, with the intent of creating a common danger, terror, panic, or chaos to the public, commits any of the following: 1) murder, homicide, serious physical injuries, less serious physical injuries, kidnapping and serious illegal detention, grave threats, and grave coercions; 2) arson; 3) threatening to inflict substantial damage or actually inflicting damage to infrastructures or property used as a public utility; 4) manufacture, possession, acquisition, transport, supply, use or sale of explosives, biological agent, chemical agent, nuclear weapon, materials or equipment and instruments; 5) attacking or threatening to attack, or committing any other unlawful acts against networks, servers, computers, and other information and communications systems; and 6) willful destruction of natural resources.

name: HBN-02237
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE PHILIPPINE CENTER ON TRANSNATIONAL CRIME, STRENGTHENING AND REDEFINING ITS ORGANIZATION AND OPERATIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Center on Transnational Crime Act of 2004.\" This bill mandates the Center to formulate and implement a concerted program of action for the prevention of and control of, but not limited to, the following transnational crimes: trafficking of persons, money laundering, cyber crimes, fraud and counterfeiting currency, terrorism, smuggling, piracy, illicit trafficking of narcotic drugs and psychotropic substances, and other crimes that have political, economic and socio-cultural impact on the security and stability of the country.

name: HBN-02238
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING AND PENALIZING MARITAL INFIDELITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 333 AND 334 OF ACT NO. 3815, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Marital Infidelity Act of 2004.\" This bill seeks to rectify the errors of the existing legal framework on \"marital infidelity\" by providing for its definition and providing penalty for the commission thereof. It also seeks to correct the seeming disparity in the treatment of husbands and wives thereby actualizing the constitutional mandate of equality of men and women before the law.

name: HBN-02251
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE THE EFFICIENT AND EFFECTIVE DELIVERY OF CONVERGING COMMUNICATIONS SERVICES
congress_website_abstract: \"Convergence Policy Act of the Philippines of 2004.\" This bill defines \"convergence\" as the progressive integration of segments of the information and content industries, including telecommunications, broadcasting, electronic commerce and data processing, into a single economic market based on distributed digital technology. It provides for the management of an orderly transition from the existing arrangements of traditional communications industry structures to a more globalised convergence environment; the development of a national framework that responds to global opportunities and challenges of convergence, and the establishment of transparent and stable regulatory and administrative processes that encourage competition; the delegation of respective powers and functions of the DOTC and the NTC; and the Government's powers to develop specific implementation arrangements as the need arises.

name: HBN-02252
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO BE KNOWN AS 'THE MARITIME LIENS AND SHIP MORTGAGE ACT OF 2004'
congress_website_abstract: \"The Maritime Liens and Ship Mortgage Act of 2004.\" This bill enumerates and defines the preference of maritime liens to enable ship financiers to assess favorably ship mortgages in the Philippines to insure repayment of the loan. Moreover, this bill deals with maritime liens separately from ship mortgages and limits the number of claims secured by maritime liens to a minimum.

name: HBN-02256
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING RELIEFS FROM AN EXECUTION OF FINAL DECISIONS AND AWARDS OF THE NATIONAL LABOR RELATIONS COMMISSION AND THE LABOR ARBITERS, THEREBY AMENDING FOR THAT PURPOSE ARTICLES 223 AND 224 OF THE LABOR CODE
congress_website_abstract: This bill aims to eliminate one layer of appellate body, the Court of Appeals, with regard to decisions of the National Labor Relations Commission. The mandate of providing speedy labor justice is negated particularly for workers who can not afford a protracted, costly and frustrating litigation in another level of appeal.

name: HBN-02257
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL TOURISM POLICY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"National Tourism Policy Act of 2004.\" This bill states that the national policy for tourism must: 1) guide the course and pace of tourism development and ensure continuity of programs; 2) coordinate the functions and resources of government agencies in tourism programs and enlist the participation of the private sector, local communities and indigenous peoples towards the attainment of such policies; and 3) improve the quality of life of the people by promoting ecotourism as a strategy for low-impact, environmentally sound and community participatory tourism programs that promote a balance between economic development and environment and natural resource protection.

name: HBN-02258
congress_website_title: AN ACT SETTING THE DATE OF THE REGULAR ELECTIONS OF THE REGIONAL GOVERNOR, REGIONAL VICE-GOVERNOR AND MEMBERS OF THE REGIONAL LEGISLATIVE ASSEMBLY OF THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-02259
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING HEADS AND CHIEFS OF HOSPITALS TO APPROVE PURCHASE OF MEDICINES AND OTHER MEDICAL SUPPLIES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 344 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\", AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill mandates that in the procurement of medicines and other medical supplies necessary for the delivery of basic health services, the heads of departments and chiefs of hospitals, duly authorized by concerned local chief executives, may approve such disbursements.

name: HBN-02260
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 106 AND 114 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill strengthens the Local Development Councils (LDCs) by providing for the mandatory inclusion of duly approved local development plans in the plans of higher LDCs and programs and plans of national government agencies for specific local governments.

name: HBN-02261
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE ROLE OF LOCAL HEALTH OFFICERS IN AREA-BASED HEALTH PLANNING, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 478 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OHTERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\", AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill mandates the local health officers to coordinate with the Department of Health (DOH) and other local government units (LGUs) to ensure an integrated approach in the delivery of health care services through area-based health planning. It also requires the local health officers to complement health services being provided by the DOH and the other LGUs through comprehensive health care agreements and other instruments.

name: HBN-02262
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE LOCAL SCHOOL BOARDS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 98, 99 AND 100 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill strengthens the Local School Boards by increasing its membership to include a representative from an accredited nongovernment or people's organization involved in non-formal education and training programs. It further directs the Boards to formulate the school building program, subject to the approval of the concerned sanggunian, and undertake the selection of the site of the schools. It furthermore integrates non-formal education and training programs in the priorities of the annual school board budget.

name: HBN-02263
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CRITERIA IN THE ACCREDITATION OF NONGOVERNMENTAL ORGANIZATIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 108 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\", AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill provides for specific criteria for the accreditation of nongovernmental and people's organizations (NGOs/POs) by requiring them to register with the concerned government agency and have a strong organizational capability as shown by their track record in project development and implementation. It also provides that in the case of pre-qualifications, bids and awards committee, the NGO or PO or any of its officers must have no conflict of interest in the awarding of infrastructure projects and that no local government official or public officer should interfere in the selection process.

name: HBN-02264
congress_website_title: AN ACT RESTORING THE TAX AND DUTY EXEMPTION PRIVILEGES OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES COMMISSARY AND EXCHANGE SERVICE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill restores the tax and duty exemptions granted to the Armed Forces of the Philippines Commissary and Exchange Services (AFPCES) to better realize its objective of augmenting the wages of Filipino soldiers and ease the economic burden of their widows and orphans, as well as that of the veterans.

name: HBN-02265
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A RECYCLING CENTER IN EVERY BARANGAY NATIONWIDE, APPOPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill establishes a recycling center in every barangay, aimed at: a) promoting and providing for a healthful environment; b) reducing waste generated at sources; c) enhancing the capability of the barangay in environment and solid waste management; and d) providing for income from garbage as a revenue source for barangays.

name: HBN-02211

name: HBN-02156
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 79 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 337, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE GENERAL BANKING ACT, AS AMENDED\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates banks to allow the initial amortization for loans used for purposes that do not immediately produce revenues to be deferred until such time when said revenues are sufficient, but in no case shall the initial amortization be later that five years from the date the loan is granted.

name: HBN-02157
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A PRODUCT STANDARDS BOARD, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to establish the Product Standards Board, which will be tasked to monitor and evaluate the manufacture and processing of consumer products. It also prescribes the composition, powers and functions of the Board.

name: HBN-02158
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE LESSOR TO DEPOSIT IN BANK THE CASH DEPOSIT OF A LESSEE IN A LEASE AGREEMENT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION THREE OF BATAS PAMBANSA BILANG WALONG DAAN PITUMPOT PITO ENTITLED \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE STABILIZATION AND REGULATION OF RENTALS OF CERTAIN RESIDENTIAL UNITS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\", AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires the lessor to deposit in any bank the cash deposit tendered by the lessee. It directs the lessor to turn over to the lessee any and all interest earned from the deposit at the expiration of the lease contract.

name: HBN-02159
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO AUTHORIZE THE PHILIPPINE CHARITY SWEEPSTAKES OFFICE AND THE PHILIPPPINE AMUSEMENT AND GAMING CORPORATION TO CREATE A MECHANISM AND PROVIDE FUNDS FOR THE IMMEDIATE RESETTLEMENT OF MIGRANT URBAN POOR IN METROPOLITAN CITIES TO THE COUNTRYSIDE OF THEIR ORIGIN
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office and the Philippine Gaming Corporation, with the assistance of the concerned government agencies and the local government units, to establish a mechanism and provide funds for the resettlement of the urban poor to their barangay of origin.

name: HBN-02197
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A DEPARTMENT OF MARITIME AFFAIRS, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Department of Maritime Affairs Act of 2002.\" The bill provides for the creation of a separate and distinct Department of Maritime Affairs that will absorb the existing bureaus, offices and agencies involved in the management and development of the country's shipping, shipbuilding and seafaring industries, and the exploration, exploitation and protection of our marine resources.

name: HBN-02198
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING REFORMS IN LAND ADMINISTRATION
congress_website_abstract: \"Land Administration Reform Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the creation of the Land Administration Authority that will be responsible for land administration and public land management. It also establishes the Land Adjudication Board that shall have jurisdiction to adjudicate land administration and public land management matters.

name: HBN-02199
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MODERNIZATION OF THE NATIONAL MAPPING AND RESOURCE INFORMATION AUTHORITY (NAMRIA)
congress_website_abstract: \"NAMRIA Modernization Act.\" The bill seeks to improve the capabilities of the NAMRIA in the following areas: a) mapping; b) information technology; c) data acquisition; and d) research and development.

name: HBN-02200
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING INCENTIVES FOR THE DEVELOPMENT OF MACHINES AND TECHNOLOGY THAT WILL IMPROVE THE PRODUCTIVITY OF RURAL WOMEN WORKERS
congress_website_abstract: To encourage the development of machines and technology that would enhance the productivity of women in rural areas, the bill proposes the grant of the following incentives: a) financial grant for the fabrication of models of the machines; b) exemption from all taxes, duties and fees; and c) collateral-free loans from government banks.

name: HBN-02201
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPLEMENTING THE PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7876 BY AUTHORIZING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A SENIOR CITIZENS DEVELOPMENT CENTER IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DINAGAT, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE

name: HBN-02202
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE NASIPIT NATIONAL VOCATIONAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NASIPIT, AGUSAN DEL NORTE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02203
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABADBARAN, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN DEL NORTE TO BE KNOWN AS THE CABADBARAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02204
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE RECOVERY AND LIQUIDATION OF FINANCIALLY DISTRESSED JURIDICAL ENTITIES
congress_website_abstract: \"Corporate Recovery and Liquidation Act.\" This bill substantiates the policy of the State to encourage a juridical debtor and its creditors to collectively and realistically resolve and adjust competing claims and property rights under the supervision and approval of a court when the debtor can no longer pay its debts as they come due or when the debtor has become insolvent.

name: HBN-02205
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING REFORMS IN LAND ADMINISTRATION
congress_website_abstract: \"Land Administration Reform Act of 2004.\" This bill envisions to optimize and rationalize the contribution of an institutionalized land administration reform to the goals national development, the eradication of poverty and the attainment of social, economic and cultural justice.

name: HBN-02206
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE CEBU STATE COLLEGE OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY SYSTEM IN THE CITY OF CEBU, AND ITS SATELLITE COLLEGES NAMELY: THE COLLEGE OF FISHERIES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MOALBOAL, THE AGRO-INDUSTRIAL AND FORESTRY COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ARGAO, THE POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUBURAN, THE COLLEGE OF FISHERIES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DAANBANTAYAN, THE FISHERY AND INDUSTRIAL COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAMOTES, THE COLLEGE OF INDUSTRIAL TECHNOLOGY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DANAO, THE COLLEGE OF FISHERIES TECHNOLOGY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CARMEN, THE ABELLANA COLLEGE OF ARTS AND TRADES IN THE CITY OF MANDAUE, THE COLLEGE OF AGRICULTURE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAHUG, AND THE AGRICULTURAL EXPERIMENTAL STATION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SIBONGA, ALL LOCATED IN THE PROVINCE OF CEBU INTO A UNIVERSITY, TO BE KNOWN AS THE CEBU TECHNOLOGICAL UNIVERSITY (CTU), AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02207
title: BALANGA CITY SPORTS CENTER (BATAAN)
long_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A MULTIPURPOSE SPORTS CENTER IN THE CITY OF BALANGA, PROVINCE OF BATAAN TO BE KNOWN AS THE BALANGA CITY SPORTS CENTER AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A MULTI-PURPOSE SPORTS CENTER IN THE CITY OF BALANGA, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, TO BE KNOWN AS 'BALANGA CITY SPORTS CENTER' AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02208
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TARLAC COLLEGE OF AGRICULTURE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAMILING, PROVINCE OF TARLAC INTO A STATE UNIVERSITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CENTRAL LUZON AGRICULTURAL UNIVERSITY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02209
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANNER AND DATE OF ELECTION OF SECTORAL REPRESENTATIVES TO THE LOCAL SANGGUNIANS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Local Sectoral Representation Act of 2004.\" This bill provides for three (3) sectoral representatives each in the Sangguniang Panlalawigan, Sangguniang Bayan and Sangguniang Panlungsod who shall be elected pursuant to this Act: one (1) from the women sector; one (1) from the workers; and one (1) from any of the following sectors: the urban poor, indigenous peoples and cultural communities, differently-abled persons, senior citizen victims of calamities and disasters, children, and urban poor or any other sector as may be determined by the sanggunian concerned.

name: HBN-02210
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROHIBIT AND PENALIZE THE USE OF CERTAIN PORTABLE ELECTRONIC DEVICES ON BOARD PHILIPPINE AIR CARRIERS WHETHER COMMERCIALLY OR PRIVATELY OWNED AND/OR OPERATED FLYING OVER PHILIPPINE AIRSPACE
congress_website_abstract: This bill declares it unlawful for any person to operate any portable electronic devices like amateur radio transceivers, citizens band radios, pagers, cellular phones, text messaging devices, remote control devices and all other types of portable radio transceivers, whose operation may endanger the safety of the flight of an aircraft.

name: HBN-02079
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY KITUBOD, LIBUNGAN, PROVINCE OF COTABATO TO BE KNOWN AS THE KITUBOD BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02080
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY DAGUPAN, KABACAN, PROVINCE OF COTABATO TO BE KNOWN AS THE DAGUPAN BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02081
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE KABACAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - ANNEX IN KATIDTUAN, KABACAN, COTABATO INTO A SEPARATE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE KATIDTUAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02082
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE KABACAN HIGH SCHOOL LUMAYONG ANNEX IN LUMAYONG, BARANGAY KAYAGA, KABACAN, PROVINCE OF COTABATO INTO A SEPARATE HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE LUMAYONG HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02083
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ALEOSAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - ANNEX IN BARANGAY PAGANGAN, ALEOSAN, PROVINCE OF COTABATO INTO A SEPARATE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE PAGANGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02084
congress_website_title: AN ACT RECLASSIFYING A PARCEL OF PUBLIC LAND IDENTIFIED AS FORESTRY PROJECT NUMBERED 5-A SPANNING 49, 115, 814 SQUARE METERS ACROSS BARANGAYS PUNOL, KATILACAN, BALONG, BULOL, PAIDU PULANGI, BAGO-INGUED, BULIOK, BARONGIS, KABASALAN, MAKABUAL AND MAÑAULANAN, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PIKIT, PROVINCE OF COTABATO AS ALIENABLE AND DISPOSABLE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-02085
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE MANDATORY LABELING AND SEGREGATION OF CONSUMER PRODUCTS AND FOOD CONTAINING GENETICALLY ENGINEERED INGREDIENTS AND FOOD PRODUCED BY MEANS OF GNETIC ENGINEERING TECHNOLOGIES, AMENDING FOR THAT PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVEN THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED NINETY FOUR, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CONSUMERS' ACT OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Genetically Engineered Food Mandatory Labeling and Segregation Act.\" The bill requires the mandatory labeling and segregation of consumer products and food containing genetically modified organisms or genetically engineered ingredients and food produced by means of genetic engineering technologies.

name: HBN-02086
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 59, CHAPTER 7, SUBTITLE A, BOOK V OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 292, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'ADMINISTRATIVE CODE OF 1987'
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to clarify that the exemption to the rule on nepotism refers only to persons being appointed as teachers, physicians or those in confidential positions.

name: HBN-02087
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING CIRCUIT CRIMINAL COURTS TO TRY AND DECIDE CASES OF HEINOUS CRIMES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: To unclog the court dockets, the bill provides for the creation of a circuit criminal court in each of the judicial district of the Regional Trial Courts (RTCs). The circuit criminal court shall have concurrent jurisdiction with the RTC to try and decide on heinous crime cases.

name: HBN-02088
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATBALOGAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR INTO A COMPONENT CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CITY OF CATBALOGAN

name: HBN-02089
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING SULTAN KUDARAT POLYTECHNIC STATE COLLEGE IN THE CITY OF TACURONG AND ITS DULY DESIGNATED CAMPUSES NAMELY: SKPSC-LUTAYAN CAMPUS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUTAYAN, SKPSC-KALAMANSIG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KALAMANSIG AND SKPSC-PALIMBANG CAMPUS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PALIMBANG, ALL IN THE PROVINCE OF SULTAN KUDARAT, INTO A STATE UNIVERSITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE SULTAN KUDARAT STATE UNVIERSITY

name: HBN-02090
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE MONTHLY HONORARIA AND ALLOWANCES OF THE PUNONG BARANGAY, SANGGUNIANG BARANGAY MEMBERS, BARANGAY TREASURER, BARANGAY SECRETARY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN CHAIRMAN AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE SECTION 393 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160 AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to increase the monthly honoraria and allowances to P5,000 for the punong barangay and to P3,000 for the sangguniang barangay members, treasurer, secretary and the sangguniang kabataan chairman. It also grants a Christmas bonus of P3,000 each to the above officials.

name: HBN-02091
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING TWO THOUSAND PESOS MONTHLY ALLOWANCE TO ALL BARANGAY TANODS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to grant a P2,000 monthly allowance to barangay tanods but not to exceed 20 barangay tanods in every barangay.

name: HBN-02092
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING CERTAIN TOURISM-ORIENTED ESTABLISHMENTS AND TOURIST WORKERS TO SECURE ACCREDITATION FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF TOURISM AS A PREREQUISITE TO THE ISSUANCE OF LICENSE OR PERMIT TO OPERATE BY LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires tourism-oriented establishments and tourism workers to be accredited by the Department of Tourism prior to the issuance of a license, permit to operate or conduct a tourism-related business by the local government unit.

name: HBN-02093
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING CYBERCRIME, PROVIDING FOR PREVENTION, SUPPRESSION AND IMPOSITION OF PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Cybercrime Prevention Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to impose penalties for the following cybercrimes: a) illegal access to the whole or any part of a computer system or network; b) illegal interception; c) data interference; d) system interference; e) misuse of devices; f) computer forgery; g) computer fraud; and h) unsolicited commercial communication.

name: HBN-02094
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REORGANIZATION OF THE NATIONAL POLICE COMMISSION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Police Commission Act of 2004.\" Some of the salient features of the bill include: a) it places the National Police Commission (NAPOLCOM) under the Office of the President; b) it provides for the creation of NAPOLCOM District Offices corresponding to the congressional districts; c) it places the PNP Internal Affairs Service under the NAPOLCOM's Internal Affairs Bureau; and d) it authorizes the Mayor and the Governor, as NAPOLCOM deputies, to command the Chief of Police and the PNP Provincial Director, respectively, to ensure the peace and order in their locality.

name: HBN-02095
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A CHARTER OF THE PHILIPPINE PUBLIC SAFETY COLLEGE TO GOVERN ITS ORGANIZATION, ADMINISTRATION AND OPERATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Public Safety College Charter of 2004.\" The bill provides for the composition, powers and functions of the Board of Trustees and the operations officers of the College.

name: HBN-02096
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING THE WELFARE OF THE PHILIPPINE COAST GUARD BY INCREASING, INTEGRATING AND RATIONALIZING THE BASE PAY AND OTHER BENEFITS OF ITS OFFICERS AND ENLISTED PERSONNEL, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta of the Philippine Coast Guard.\" The bill provides the personnel of the Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) the following: a) rights, duties and responsibilities; b) hours of work, remuneration, welfare, health care and injuries benefits; and c) separation, retirement and death benefits.

name: HBN-02097
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INSTITUTIONALIZE SKILLS DEVELOPMENT PLANNING AT THE LOCAL LEVEL, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Institutionalization of Local Skills Development Planning Act of 2004.\" The bill mandates the local government units to prepare a skills development plan to address the skill development activities in their respective localities.

name: HBN-02098
congress_website_title: AN ACT REORGANIZING THE NATIONAL FOOD AUTHORITY INTO THE NATIONAL FOOD CORPORATION REDEFINING ITS POWERS, AND CREATING THE FOOD DEVELOPMENT AND REGULATORY ADMINISTRATION, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Food Authority Reorganization Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to reorganize the National Food Authority (NFA) into: a) the National Food Corporation, attached to the Office of the President, responsible for buffer stocking for food security purposes, and b) the Food Development and Regulatory Administration, attached the Department of Agriculture, to discharge the regulatory functions of the NFA.

name: HBN-02099
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING AN ACROSS THE BOARD SALARY GRADE INCREASE OF PUBLIC LEARNING FACILITATORS, INCLUDING NON-TEACHING POSITIONS IN THE NATIONAL, REGIONAL, DIVISION, SCHOOLS DISTRICT, AND SCHOOL LEVEL, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to upgrade by two salary grades the present salary grade levels of all public learning facilitators, including non-teaching positions, in the national, regional, district and school levels.

name: HBN-02100
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING LOCAL ELECTIVE EXECUTIVE OFFICIALS FROM MAKING APPOINTMENTS AND INCURRING OBLIGATIONS ON BEHALF OF THEIR RESPECTIVE LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS NINETY (90) DAYS BEFORE THE NEXT REGULAR ELECTIONS UNTIL THE END OF THEIR TERM
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Midnight Appointments and Transactions Act of 2004.\" The measure prohibits the rampant practice of issuing appointment papers and/or incurring loans and other obligations by outgoing elective officials in anticipation of the expiration of their term of office.

name: HBN-02101
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO AMEND SECTION 2 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1405, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"SECRECY OF BANK DEPOSITS LAW,\" EXEMPTING GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS AND EMPLOYEES FROM THE PROHIBITION AGAINST DISCLOSURE OF OR INQUIRY INTO DEPOSITS WITH ANY BANKING INSTITUTION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to exempt government officials and employees, whether elected or appointed, from the coverage of the Bank Secrecy Law in order to equip law enforcement authorities with the tools needed to go after crooks in government.

name: HBN-02102
congress_website_title: AN ACT ALLOWING LATE REGISTRANTS TO REGISTER THEIR BIRTH IN THE OFFICE OF THE LOCAL CIVIL REGISTRAR OF EITHER THE PLACE OF THEIR RESIDENCE OR THE PLACE OF THEIR BIRTH
congress_website_abstract: The bill allows late registrants to register their birth at the Office of the Local Civil Registrar in either the place of their birth or their present residence. The later registrant must submit the following documents: a) a declaration by either parent, relative or any person who has knowledge of the birth of the late registrant; and b) an affidavit explaining the delayed registration.

name: HBN-02103
congress_website_title: AN ACT ALLOCATING THE AMOUNT OF ONE BILLION PESOS FROM THE AGGREGATE EARNINGS OF THE PHILIPPINE AMUSEMENT AND GAMING CORPORATION
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for an additional funding of P1.0 billion for the maintenance and operation of the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency.

name: HBN-02104
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE METRO CEBU TRAFFIC AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02105
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE ST. ANTHONY MOTHER AND CHILD HOSPITAL IN BARANGAY BASAK-SAN NICOLAS, CITY OF CEBU, FROM 25 TO 50 BEDS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02106
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE POSSESSION OR USE OF MOBILE OR CELLULAR TELEPHONE BY CONVICTED PRISONERS AND INDIVIDUALS WHILE INCARCERATED AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill bans the possession or use of cellular telephones by convicted prisoners and individuals while they are incarcerated in detention centers; in provincial, city or municipal jails; or in national penal institutions.

name: HBN-02107
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING SALARIES TO BARANGAY TANODS, MEMBERS OF THE LUPONG TAGAPAMAYAPA, AND BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE, THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants a P500 monthly compensation to barangay tanods, members of the lupong tagapamayapa and barangay health workers.

name: HBN-02108
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING THAT ONLY PROOF OF OWNERSHIP SHALL BE REQUIRED IN SHIPPING ANY MOTOR VEHICLE, MOTOR VEHICLE ENGINE, ENGINE BLOCK, CHASSIS, OR BODY FROM ONE ISLAND TO ANOTHER, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTY-FIVE HUNDRED AND THIRTY-NINE, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"ANTI-CARNAPPING ACT OF 1972\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to eliminate the Philippine National Police clearance requirement for transporting a motor vehicle, motor engine, engine block, chassis or body from one island to another.

name: HBN-02109
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING STIFFER PENALTIES TO DRUG STORES WHICH REFUSE TO HONOR SENIOR CITIZEN CARDS ISSUED BY THE GOVERNMENT FOR AVAILMENT OF BENEFITS AND PRIVILEGES GRANTED TO SENIOR CITIZENS
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to penalize drug stores, which refuse to honor the senior citizen's card, with a fine ranging from P1,000 to P5,000 or imprisonment from one month to six months.

name: HBN-02110
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN THE UNIVERSITY OF THE PHILIPPINES AS THE NATIONAL UNIVERSITY
congress_website_abstract: \"University of the Philippines Charter of 2004.\" The bill prescribes the composition and powers of the Board of Regents and the University Council.

name: HBN-02111
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE FORESTRY PROFESSION, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6239, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FORESTRY PROFESSION LAW, AND FOR OHTER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Forestry Profession Act of 2004.\" The bill shall govern the examination for registration and licensing of professional foresters, the professional practice of forestry in the country, and the standardization of various forestry practices.

name: HBN-02112
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 8291 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'THE GOVERNMENT SERVICE INSURANCE SYSTEM ACT OF 1997'
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for an automatic increase in GSIS benefits every five years to realistically reflect the value of the buying power of the peso.

name: HBN-02113
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SCHOOL OF AGRICULTURE AND FISHERIES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SUMISIP, PROVINCE OF BASILAN, TO BE KNOWN AS 'BASILAN SCHOOL OF AGRICULTURE AND FISHERIES' AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-02114
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AND STRENGTHENING THE SHARI'A DISTRICT COURT SYSTEM IN THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO AND IN THE AREAS OUTSIDE THE SAID AUTONOMOUS REGION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1083 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE MUSLIM CODE OF PERSONAL LAWS OF THE PHILIPPINES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-02115
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MACULAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF VINCENZO SAGUN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR, TO BE KNOWN AS MACULAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02116
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TIGUHA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LAPUYAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR, TO BE KNOWN AS TIGUHA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02117
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BALINTAWAK IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARGOSATUBIG, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR, TO BE KNOWN AS BALINTAWAK NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02118
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING ALL PROVINCIAL, CITY AND MUNICIPAL ROADS IN THE SECOND DISTRICT OF PALAWAN, LEADING TO PORTS AND/OR PIERS, INTO A NATIONAL SECONDARY ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02119
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4566, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CONTRACTORS' LICENSE LAW
congress_website_abstract: The bill allows any two or more licensees, each with a license to engage separately in the capacity of a contractor, to jointly submit a bid or act in the capacity of a joint venture as long as a license to engage or act as a joint venture is secured before the bidding.

name: HBN-02120
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING REFORMS IN LAND ADMINISTRATION
congress_website_abstract: \"The Land Administration Reform Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the creation of the Land Administration Authority that shall be responsible for land administration and public land management. It also establishes the Land Adjudcation Board that will adjudicate land administration and public land management matters.

name: HBN-02121
congress_website_title: AN ACT ENHANCING THE ADMINISTRATION OF JUVENILE JUSTICE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER RELATED PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Juvenile Justice Act of 2001.\" The bill provides a just and more humane system of treating juvenile offenders with the aim in view of rehabilitating and reintegrating them into the mainstream of society. Creates the Office of the Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Prevention to oversee the implementation of the act, and the Office of the Child Ombudsman to check and monitor its implementation.

name: HBN-02122
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING MAY 7 OF EVERY YEAR AS 'HEALTH WORKERS' DAY'
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to declare May 7th of every year as the \"Health Workers Day\" to give due recognition to the important role and contributions of health workers.

name: HBN-02123
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ENSURE PUBLIC ACCESS TO OFFICIAL RECORDS, DOCUMENTS AND ANY OTHER INFORMATION OF PUBLIC CONCERN
congress_website_abstract: \"Freedom of Information Act.\" The bill provides for absolute and mandatory access to matters of official information, public concern and public interest. It mandates all government bodies to provide the requested information within five days from receipt of a written request.

name: HBN-02124
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE ENTRY, SALE, PROCESSING, FIELD TESTING AND RELEASE OF CROPS AND FOOD PRODUCTS CONTAINING GENETICALLY MODIFIED ORGANISMS (GMO) INTO AND WITHIN THE COUNTRY AND IMPOSING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: \"GMO-Free Food and Agriculture Act of 2004.\" The bill aims to keep the country's food free from genetically modified organisms at this time when there are still unresolved questions as to their effects on human health and on the environment.

name: HBN-02125
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY NAMBUCAYAN, MUNICIPALITY OF TABUK, PROVINCE OF KALINGA, TO BE KNOWN AS THE NAMBUCAYAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02126
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE COMPOSTELA COLLEGES (EXTENSION CAMPUS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF SOUTHEASTERN PHILIPPINES) IN COMPOSTELA, COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE INTO AN INDEPENDENT STATE COLLEGE TO BE KNOWN AS THE COMPOSTELA VALLEY STATE COLLEGE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02127
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE DETENTION OF PATIENTS OR THE REMAINS OF PATIENTS IN HOSPITALS AND MEDICAL CLINICS ON GROUNDS OF NONPAYMENT OF HOSPITAL BILLS OR MEDICAL EXPENSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill declares as unlawful for any hospital or medical clinic to detain the following patients because of non-payment, in full or in part, of medical and hospital bills: a) patients who have fully or partially recovered and have been medically cleared for discharge; and b) the remains of patients.

name: HBN-02128
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY NANENG, MUNICIPALITY OF TABUK, PROVINCE OF KALINGA TO BE KNOWN AS THE NANENG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-02129
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164 TO EXTEND THE TERM OF OFFICE OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS AND RESET THE DATE OF BARANGAY ELECTIONS
congress_website_abstract: The measure provides for the holding of barangay elections every five years and to extend the term of office of barangay officials from three years to five years.

name: HBN-02130
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXTENDING TAX EXEMPTION, PRIVILEGES AND ASSISTANCE TO RURAL ELECTRIC COOPERATIVES AS A MATTER OF STATE POLICY TO AID THE PROGRAM IMPLEMENTATION ON TOTAL ELECTRIFICATION
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides that for a period of 50 years from the date of cooperative organization as a non-stock entity operating as a public entity, rural electric cooperatives (RECs) shall be exempt from the payment of: a) all national and local taxes and fees including but not limited to franchise, realty and business taxes; and b) all duties or imposts on foreign materials, equipment and goods acquired for the operation of the RECs.

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL PROGRAM FOR FILIPINO GIFTED CHILDREN, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Gifted Children Act of 2004.\" The bill aims to establish a national program for gifted Filipino children in the arts, humanities and the sciences. It establishes a Center for Gifted Children and Science Oriented Youth to implement the national program for gifted children.

name: HBN-02133
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVENTY EIGHT THIRTY TWO, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'ANTI-ELECTRICITY AND ELECTRIC TRANSMISSION LINES/MATERIALS PILFERAGE ACT OF 1994'
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants a monetary reward ranging from P5,000 to P50,000 to any person who reports to the proper authorities theft of electric power transmission lines/materials. It also increases the penalty for violations of Section 3 of RA 7882 to an amount ranging from P150,000 to P500,000.

congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INCREASE THE RATES OF EXCISE TAX ON ALCOHOL AND TOBACCO PRODUCTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 141, 142, 143, 144 AND 145 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill increases the excise tax rates imposed on alcohol and tobacco products by 18% over and above the mandated 12% increase provided under RA 8240. It provides for another 15% adjustment in the excise tax rates three years after the effectivity of the law.

congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Obscenity and Pornography Act of 2004.\" The measure prohibits the following acts: a) the publication, sale, distribution and importation of obscene and pornographic materials; b) the portrayal, depiction, performance and exhibition of any indecent act in public; and c) the coercion of another person to listen, read or view obscene and pornographic materials in public places.

congress_website_abstract: \"Corporate Recovery Act.\" The bill offers distraught enterprises debt-relief measures that will secure their survival and, at the same time, protect the rights of creditors with duly registered liens against the assets of these enterprises.

name: HBN-02074
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING DECEMBER 10 OF EVERY YEAR AS 'HUMAN RIGHTS DAY'
congress_website_abstract: \"Human Rights Day Act.\" To instill awareness and foster promotion and respect for basic rights and individual freedom, the bill seeks to declare December 10 of every year as a special working holiday.

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BANGAD, MUNICIPALITY OF TINGLAYAN, PROVINCE OF KALINGA TO BE KNOWN AS THE BANGAD VOCATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE RETIREMENT BENEFITS OF JUSTICES AND ALL JUDGES IN THE JUDICIARY, FURTHER AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TEN, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill entitles a justice or a judge, who has rendered 15 years of service in the judiciary and who retired at the compulsory age of 70 years, to a basic monthly pension for life starting at the end of the 5-year guarantee period.

name: HBN-02077
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 26, CHAPTER 4, BOOK VI OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NUMBERED 292, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"ADMINISTRATIVE CODE OF 1987\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to amend Section 26, Chapter 4, Book VI of E.O 292 thereby repealing the automatic appropriations provision for debt service.

name: HBN-02078
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A PROGRAM FOR THE CONTINUING EDUCATION FOR COLLEGE TEACHERS, AMENDING FOR SUCH PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7784, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT TO STRENGTHENING TEACHER EDUCATION IN THE PHILIPPINES BY ESTABLISHING CENTERS OF EXCELLENCE, CREATING A TEACHER EDUCATION COUNCIL FOR THE PURPOSE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires all primary, secondary and college teachers to undergo training in professional education, general education and teaching methods at least once every five years.

congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for a synchronized barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections to be held on the last Monday of October 2007 and every five years thereafter.

congress_website_abstract: \"Taiwan Economic and Cultural Relations Act.\" The bill seeks the creation of the Philippine Economic and Cultural Center to promote and protect the interest of Filipinos in Taiwan, providing for its powers and functions. It also aims to foster a closer relationships between the people of the Philippines and Taiwan.

name: HBN-01972
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE TRANSFER OF SENTENCED PERSONS TO OR FROM FOREIGN COUNTRIES
congress_website_abstract: \"Transfer of Sentenced Persons Act of 2001.\" The bill aims to allow convicted persons to serve his sentence in his home country where his rehabilitation may be properly monitored and within the reach of his family and relatives.

name: HBN-01973
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE ARCHIPELAGIC BASELINES OF THE PHILIPPINE ARCHIPELAGO TO INCLUDE THE KALAYAAN ISLAND GROUP AND TO CONFORM WITH THE PROVISIONS OF THE UNITED NATIONS CONVENTION ON THE LAW OF THE SEA, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3046, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5446
congress_website_abstract: \"Archipelagic Baselines Law of the Philippines.\" The bill prescribes and defines the list of geographical coordinates with the location base points of the archipelagic baselines of the Philippines in conformity with the 1982 United Nations Convention of the Law of the Sea.

name: HBN-01974
congress_website_title: AN ACT REVISING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7157, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FOREIGN SERVICE ACT OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: \"The Revised Foreign Service Act of the Philippines.\" The bill defines the mission of the Department of Foreign Affairs, and the role of the Secretary and the Department regional offices. It establishes the offices of the Inspector General, the Policy Advisory Board, Family Liason Unit and a Grievance Mechanism. Institutionalizes the one-country team approach in the implementation of the country's foreign relations at the bilateral, regional and multi-lateral levels.

congress_website_abstract: The bill declares it unlawful and imposes a fine of P10,000 or three months imprisonment to an employer who discriminates against any member of the third sex.

congress_website_abstract: The bill defines a tribal peace pact holder (TPPH) as \"a revered member of the tribal community chosen by their tribe to represent them in the forging of a peace treaty with another tribe to end war and maintain peaceful relationships\". It also seeks to accord the TPPH official status and legal recognition.

congress_website_abstract: the measure prohibits \"entry-point discrimination\" which is defined as the hiring of young applicants and graduates from renowned school. It imposes a fine of P10,000 or imprisonment of three months to three years to guilty employers.

name: HBN-01930

congress_website_abstract: \"The Land Administration Reform Act of 2004.\" The bill creates the Land Administration Authority under the Office of the President to administer and manage public lands and the Land Adjudication Board to settle land disputes. It provides for the powers and functions of the Authority such as geodetic survey, land classification, mapping, aerial photography, remote sensing, etc.

name: HBN-01931
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH A HIGHER STANDARD OF PROMOTION AND PROTECTION OF THE RIGHTS AND WELFARE OF FILIPINO OVERSEAS SEAFARERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Overseas Seafarers Act.\" The bill defines overseas seafarers as \"the crew or complement of a ship navigating foreign seas. Provides for the conditions of employment, illegal recruitment, social security, disability benefits, disciplinary and dispute settlement procedures and post employment and repatriation.

name: HBN-01932
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING THE IMPORTATION OF RICE, PROHIBITING THE RE-MILLING, REPACKING AND MIXING OF IMPORTED AND LOCAL RICE VARIETIES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides for the \"legal boundaries in the entry, storage, sale and distribution of imported rice in the country.\" Prohibits the importation of rice milled two months before purchase and requires only legitimate millers to possess rice polishers.

name: HBN-01934
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING POOR LITIGANTS FROM POSTING BAIL WHEN CHARGED WITH NON-CAPITAL OFFENSES FOR THE FIRST TIME AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Poor Litigants Equalization Act of 2004.\" Aims to help poor litigants with bailable offense from being jailed by exempting them from the payment of bail.

congress_website_abstract: Provides for the legal basis for the mandatory appropriation for health programs and services by LGUs to enable them to provide free medical care to paupers.

congress_website_abstract: Provides that appointments made by local chief executives shall be valid only for six months to prevent them from extending it indefinitely in violation of the career service rule.
