congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY EUREKA, GINGOOG CITY, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL TO BE KNOWN AS THE EUREKA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01951
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING DIRECT CONTROL AND SUPERVISION OF THE INTRAMUROS ADMINISTRATION TO THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT OF THE CITY OF MANILA AND DESIGNATING THE MAYOR OF MANILA AS CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD OF ADMINISTRATORS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND SIXTEEN CREATING THE INTRAMUROS ADMINSITRATION

name: HBN-01952
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 261 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 881, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE OMNIBUS ELECTION CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Declares it unlawful for any person or group to ask for money from political parties or candidates in the guise of issuing permits to campaign.

name: HBN-01953
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE AGUSAN MARSH IN THE PROVINCE OF AGUSAN DEL SUR AS A PROTECTED AREA AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01954
congress_website_title: AN ACT ENHANCING SAVINGS AND CREDIT OR FINANCIAL SERVICE COOPERATIVES, AMENDING THEREFOR REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 6938, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE COOPERATIVE CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AND REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 6939, CREATING THE COOPERATIVE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY
congress_website_abstract: \"Financial Service Cooperative Act.\" Provides for the FSCs' organization, registration, federation, articles of cooperation, purpose, share capital, membership, affiliation, management, administration, audit, ethics, officers, deposits, funds, credit, security, net surplus, assets, investments, merger, consolidation, dissolution, functions and powers of federations, inspections and investigations and government supervision and regulation.

name: HBN-01955
congress_website_title: AN ACT FIXING THE DATE OF THE REGULAR ELECTION FOR ELECTIVE OFFICIALS OF THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9054, ENTITLED \"AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN AND EXPAND THE ORGANIC ACT FOR THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO 6734, ENTITLED \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR AN ORGANIC ACT FOR THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO\", AS AMENDED

name: HBN-01956
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROCLAIMING CRISANTO EVANGELISTA, THE FATHER OF PHILIPPINE MILITANT LABOR MOVEMENT, AS A NATIONAL HERO OF THE PHILIPPINES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01957
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A NEW COMMITTEE ON OVERSEAS WORKERS AFFAIRS, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"An Act Creating a New Standing Committee on Overseas Workers Affairs\". To advance the interests, rights and welfare of overseas Filipino workers and their families, the bill seeks the creation of a separate standing committee on overseas workers affairs. The committee shall have 25 members and 2 chairpersons.

name: HBN-01958
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING SECTION 109 (m) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: Exempts from value added tax educational services by private schools accredited by the Technical Education and Skills Development Authority (TESDA).

name: HBN-01959
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE RATE OF COMBAT DUTY PAY OF OFFICERS AND ENLISTED PERSONNEL OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill increases the combat duty pay of AFP pesonnel by 25% of the base pay of a private in the Army or its equivalent in the PAF or PN.

name: HBN-01960
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 4 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8186 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT PRESCRIBING OFFICER GRADE DISTRIBUTION IN THE ACTIVE FORCE OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES AND LIMITING THE TENURE OF OFFICERS IN THE GRADES OF COLONEL/CAPTAIN (PN) AND GENERAL/FLAG OFFICERS IN THE AFP\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides an additional two years of tenure to \"key officers with the rank of Lieutenant General or Admiral and officers designated to grade 0-9 positions.\"

name: HBN-01961
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEEKING TO IMPROVE CHILD PROTECTION AGAINST ABUSE, EXPLOITATION AND DISCRIMINATION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7610, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7658, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"SPECIAL PROTECTION AND DISCRIMINATION ACT\", APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill bans and penalizes the employment of children in all forms of hazardous occupations and aims for \"greater participation of local social workers and law enforcers.\" Imposes penalties for child pornography through the internet. Mandates the creation of a central data bank to monitor abuses made by foreigners against children and prevent their reentry.

name: HBN-01962
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING SMALL BUSINESS LOCATION AND INCUBATOR PROGRAM
congress_website_abstract: \"Small Business Location and Incubator Act of 2004.\" Defines a business incubator as \"an organization set up to nurture young enterprises by providing them with a common office and service facilities such as technology transfer, training, marketing, etc. Aims to promote the survival of new enterprises during their early years by giving them technical and managerial support.

name: HBN-01963
congress_website_title: AN ACT CURTAILING THE ILLEGAL ACTIVITIES OF RACKETEERS AND POWERFUL SYNDICATES IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"Racketeer Influenced and Corrupt Organization (RICO) Act.\" The bill imposes stiff penalties against criminal syndicates such as drug traffickers, money launderers, smugglers, kidnappers, etc., depriving them of their operational fund and denying them the money obtained from their illegal acts by forfeiting it in favor of the government.

name: HBN-01964
congress_website_title: AN ACT DIRECTING ALL GOVERNMENT AGENCIES, ENTITIES, INSTRUMENTALITIES, AND SUBDIVISIONS, INCLUDING GOVERNMENT OWNED OR CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS TO TAKE APPROPRIATE ACTION WITHIN THE PRESCRIBED PERIOD HEREIN PROVIDED, ON ALL KINDS OF APPLICATION FOR PERMITS, LICENSES, CERTIFICATIONS, CLEARANCES, AND OTHER SIMILAR ISSUANCES RELATING TO AND NECESSARY FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT AND OPERATIONS OF BUSINESSES AND INVESTMENTS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Red Tape Act of 2004.\" The bill prescribes the following waiting period for the issuance of business permits: a) barangay-one day to 30 days; b) city or municipality-one day to 45 days; c) province-15 days to 60 days ; and d) national agencies-15 days to 120 days.

name: HBN-01965
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING ARTICLES 223 AND 224 OF CHAPTER FIVE TITLE SEVEN OF ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-EIGHT HUNDRED AND FIFTEEN, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill penalizes with prision mayor in its maximum period without pardon and parole and disqualification to hold office any public officer guilty of conniving or consenting with a prisoner to escape or through his negligence.

name: HBN-01966
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING ESCAPE FROM DETENTION OR CUSTODY BY DETAINEES AND CONVICTS BY AMENDING ARTICLES 157 AND 158 AND ADDING NEW ARTICLES IN TITLE THREE CHAPTER SIX, OF ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-EIGHT HUNDRED AND FIFTEEN, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill penalizes with prision mayor any convict who escapes detention and is caught.

name: HBN-01967
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CREATION AND ESTABLISHMENT OF SMALL CLAIMS COURTS IN THE PHILIPPINES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Small Claims Court (SCC) Act.\" The bill provides that the SCC shall have jurisdiction over civil cases where the value of personal property or amount of the demand is not over P100,000.

name: HBN-01870
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A YOUTH CENTER IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABUYAO IN THE PROVINCE OF LAGUNA TO BE KNOWN AS THE CABUYAO CENTER FOR YOUTH AFFAIRS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01871
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A YOUTH CENTER IN THE CITY OF CALAMBA IN THE PROVINCE OF LAGUNA TO BE KNOWN AS THE CALAMBA CITY CENTER FOR YOUTH AFFAIRS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01872
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE POSITION OF TOURISM OFFICER IN ALL PROVINCES, FIRST CLASS MUNICIPALITIES AND CITIES, OR MUNICIPALITITES AND CITIES WHERE TOURISM IS CONSIDERED A MAJOR LOCAL INDUSTRY, AND DEFINING ITS QUALIFICATIONS, POWERS AND DUTIES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE
congress_website_abstract: This bill addresses the issues of accessibility to basic tourism information and services and the lack of a comprehensive approach to tourism development resulting in low tourism arrivals in the country, by creating the position of tourism officer in all provinces, municipalities and cities where tourism is considered a major local industry.

name: HBN-01873
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A CITY SCHOOLS DIVISION IN TAGBILARAN CITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE, SECTION 95 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4660, ENTITLED 'AN ACT CREATING THE CITY OF TAGBILARAN'

name: HBN-01874
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING A FAIR COMPETITION LAW, ITS ENFORCEMENT, THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A FAIR TRADE COMMISSION, DELINEATING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Fair Competition Law of the Philippines.\" This bill aims to level the business playing field by strengthening the legal and institutional framework that would combat unfair trade practices. Among the key features of the measure include: a) the creation of a Fair Trade Commission that shall investigate, gather evidence and initiate prosecution of those engaged in unfair trade practices; b) the description of monopoly power or market abuse; and c) the imposition of defined sanctions to key officials of companies that violate fair competition.

name: HBN-01875
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING AFFORDABLE HEALTH CARE SERVICES, THROUGH THE HEALTH MAINTENANCE ORGANIZATIONS, REGULATING THEIR OPERATIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Health Maintenance Organizations (HMOs) Code of 2004.\" This bill provides for the qualifications and licensure requirements of the Health Maintenance Organizations (HMOs) and grants health care incentives for health care providers which include reduced customs duties for importation of medical equipment used in health care services, and exemption from percentage tax, documentary stamp tax and value-added tax on all health care agreements.

name: HBN-01876
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE UNIVERSITY OF QUEZON CITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01877
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE IN THE PROVINCE OF DAVAO ORIENTAL, CREATING FOR THIS PURPOSE THE DAVAO ORIENTAL SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01878
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING GOVERNMENT AGENCIES TO RETAIN INCOME GENERATED BEYOND THE SPECIFIED TARGETS REFLECTED IN THE BUDGET OF EXPENDITURES AND SOURCES OF FINANCING, AND ALLOWING ITS DISBURSEMENTS AS PROVIDED BY LAW
congress_website_abstract: \"The Government Agencies' Income Rationalization Act.\" This bill grants the different government agencies: a) the authority to retain a percentage of their agency income generated beyond the specified targets set in the Budget of Expenditures and Sources of Financing of the government; and b) a scheme to allocate a percentage of their excess agency income to the country's health and education programs.

name: HBN-01879
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MAGNA CARTA FOR PUBLIC SOCIAL WELFARE AND DEVELOPMENT WORKERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for Public Social Welfare and Development Workers.\" This bill declares is a State policy to: 1) promote and improve the social and economic well-being of public social welfare and development workers, their living conditions and terms of employment; 2) develop their skills and capabilities to make them more responsive and better equipped in delivering social services and programs, and 3) encourage those with proper qualifications and excellent abilities to join and remain in government service.

name: HBN-01880
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONVERSION OF THE PINAMUNGAJAN-GUIMBAWIAN-SAN FERNANDO PROVINCIAL ROAD, PROVINCE OF CEBU INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01881
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONVERSION OF THE ALOGUINSAN-OLANGO-VALENCIA PROVINCIAL ROAD, PROVINCE OF CEBU INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01882
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NAGA-ULING ROAD CONNECTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF NAGA AND THE CITY OF TOLEDO IN THE PROVINCE OF CEBU INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01883
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE CAPABILITY OF THE BUREAU OF FOOD AND DRUGS (BFAD) BY ESTABLISHING ADEQUATE TESTING LABORATORIES AND FIELD OFFICES IN ALL REGIONS, UPGRADING ITS EQUIPMENT, CREATING A DRUG ENFORECEMENT UNIT (DEU) UNDER ITS OPERATIONAL AND ADMINSTRATIVE CONTROL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"BFAD Empowerment Act of 2004.\" This bill strengthens the Bureau of Food and Drugs (BFAD) by upgrading its equipment, creating a drug enfocement unit (DEU) under its operational and administrative control and by establishing adequate testing laboratories and field offices in all provinces and cities throughout the country.

name: HBN-01884
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE OPERATION OF TAXI AND MEGA TAXI UNITS
congress_website_abstract: \"Taxi Regulation Act of 2004.\" This bill is designed to put together relevant regulations and combine them with new and responsive ones for the smooth operation of taxi and mega taxi units. It enumerates the schedule of fines and penalties for violators of this Act.

name: HBN-01885
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL ELEMENTARY AND HIGH SCHOOLS NATIONWIDE TO INTEGRATE IN THEIR SUBJECTS AND LESSONS LECTURES ON SOLID WASTE MANAGEMENT PRACTICES AND PROCESSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill requires all elementary and high schools nationwide to integrate lectures on solid waste management in existing subjects such as Science, Sibika at Kultura or Araling Panlipunan, and the like.

name: HBN-01886
congress_website_title: STUDENT HOUSING ACT OF 2004
congress_website_abstract: This bill seeks to encourage the private sector to invest in the estalishment of student dormitories or housing projects by providing them incentives. It mandates the National Housing Authority and the Commission on Higher Education to take the lead in ensuring accessibility and afforadability of living quarters to students.

name: HBN-01887
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE SALARY GRADE OF EDUCATION SUPERVISORS I & II, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE \"COMPENSATION AND POSITION CLASSIFICATION ACT OF 1989\"
congress_website_abstract: Rationale: Education Supervisors perform several major functions such as training, monitoring and consulting pertaining to the specific instruction program they are handling. Apart from rendering their expert and technical services to several school districts and hundred of teachers and school administrators, they are also doing administrative and other works delegated to them by their Superintendents and Assistant Superintendents, thus the necessity of upgrading their salary grades.

name: HBN-01888
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CHAPTER 2, TITLE V OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 209, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FAMILY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: This bill exempts the family home from the payment of real property taxes in order to unburden them from the difficulty of maintaining a shelter for their families. This bill is expected to alleviate the plight of many Filipinos who have found it almost impossible to build a home of their own.

name: HBN-01889
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING RESOURCE DEVELOPMENT AND CRISIS ASSISTANCE CENTERS FOR WOMEN AND CHILDREN IN EVERY PROVINCE AND CITY OF THE PHILIPPINES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Women's and Children's Resources Development and Assistance Act.\" This bill declares it a State policy to provide women and children with utmost support and assistance which shall include, among others, legal services, livelihood and skills development, psychological counselling and all other assistance necessary to protect them against all forms of neglect, abuse, cruelty, exploitation and other acts prejudicial to their welfare and development.

name: HBN-01890
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING PRIVATE EMPLOYERS TO ESTABLISH AND PROVIDE SLEEPING QUARTERS AND/OR FACILITIES FOR THEIR FEMALE EMPLOYEES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill intends to provide support for women, especially those who are working at night and residing at distant places.

name: HBN-01891
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING ANY ADVERTISING AGENCY, TELEVISION OR RADIO STATION AND PUBLICATION WHICH EXPLOIT WOMEN AND GLORIFY SEXUAL VIOLENCE IN ITS ADVERTISEMENTS
congress_website_abstract: \"Advertisement Regulation Act of 2004.\" Rationale: Realising the need to protect the morals of society in view of the pervasive effects of advertisements on the values of children and the public in general, it is hereby declared the policy of the State to regulate advertisements in print, radio, television, outdoor advertisements including posters and billboards, in movie theaters and in other media.

name: HBN-01892
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A NODAL CONCRETE ROAD PAVEMENT CONNECTING THE SEVEN (7) MUNICIPALITIES OF DINAGAT ISLAND, IN THE PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01893
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE DAMORA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL EXTENSION IN BARANGAY ADAOAY, MUNICIPALITY OF KABAYAN, PROVINCE OF BENGUET, TO BE KNOWN AS ADAOAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01894
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE LEPANTO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - BALILI EXTENSION IN BARANGAY BALILI MUNICIPALITY OF MANKAYAN, PROVINCE OF BENGUET, FROM THE LEPANTO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE BALILI NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01895
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MANKAYAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-BULALACAO ANNEX, IN BARANGAY BULALACAO, MUNICIPALITY OF MANKAYAN, PROVINCE OF BENGUET, TO BE KNOWN AS BULALACAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01896
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BUGUIAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL EXTENSION IN SITIO BOT-OAN, BARANGAY CATLUBONG, MUNICIPALITY OF BUGUIAS, PROVINCE OF BENGUET, TO BE KNOWN AS CATLUBONG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01897
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE KAMORA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-TAWANGAN EXTENSION IN BARANGAYS TAWANGAN, LUSOD, MUNCIPALITY OF KABAYAN, PROVINCE OF BENGUET, TO BE KNOWN AS TAWANGAN-LUSOD NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01898
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN FRANCISCO INTO A COMPONENT CITY OF THE PROVINCE OF AGUSAN DEL SUR TO BE KNOWN AS THE CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO

name: HBN-01899
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYUGAN INTO A COMPONENT CITY OF THE PROVINCE OF AGUSAN DEL SUR TO BE KNONW AS THE CITY OF BAYUGAN

name: HBN-01900
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BINAKALAN, GINGOOG CITY, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL TO BE KNOWN AS THE BINAKALAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01901
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE KINOGUITAN NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL HIGH SCHOOL (KNAHS) IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KINOGUITAN, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS ORIENTAL INTO AN INSTITUTE OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY TO BE KNONW AS THE KINOGUITAN INSTITUTE OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01902
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A STATE COLLEGE IN THE CITY OF GINGOOG TO BE KNOWN AS EASTERN MISAMIS ORIENTAL STATE COLLEGE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01903
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO AMEND REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8239, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PHILIPPINE PASSPORT ACT OF 1996
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the requirements in the issuance of passports and the grounds for amendments, suspension or revocation. Enumerates the individuals qualified to file applications in behalf of the applicants. Increases the penalties to persons faking passports.

name: HBN-01904
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR MONTHLY HONORARIUM FOR BARANGAY OFFICIALS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants a monthly honorarium to the following barangay officials: chairman - P2,500; councilor - P1,500; lupon tagapamayapa - P1,000 and tanod - P800.

name: HBN-01905
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE QUARTERS ALLOWANCE OF OFFICERS AND ENLISTED PERSONNEL OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants an additional P100 to P500 quarter allowance to soldiers to meet the increases in house rentals.

name: HBN-01906
congress_website_title: MAGNA CARTA OF PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta of the Philippine National Police.\" The bill provides for the rights, duties and responsibilities of PNP personnel, their hours of work, salary, welfare, health, injuries, retirement and death benefits.

name: HBN-01907
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THAT AT LEAST TWENTY PER CENTUM (20%) OF THE GOVERNMENT-OWNED LAND TO BE SOLD, ALIENATED OR OTHERWISE ENCUMBERED FOR DEVELOPMENT PURPOSES, BE SEGREGATED FOR SOCIALIZED HOUSING PROJECTS
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to help the under privileged and homeless by setting for aside for socialized housing 20% of government lands intended for development.

name: HBN-01908
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONSERVING, PROMOTING AND POPULARIZING THE NATION'S HISTORICAL AND CULTURAL HERITAGE AND RESOURCES, AS WELL AS ARTISTIC CREATIONS BY EXACTING A PERFORMANCE FEE FROM FOREIGN PERFORMERS AND ALLOCATING THE PROCEEDS THEREOF TO THE NATIONAL COMMISSION ON CULTURE AND ARTS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Singers Equity Act.\" To protect local entertainers, the bill seeks to charge a foreign performer an equity fee equivalent to 15% of his total talent fee which shall be remitted to the National Commission on Culture and Arts.

name: HBN-01909
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 9 OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY HUNDRED AND NINETEEN, AS AMENDED, ENTITLED \"ANTI-GRAFT AND CORRUPT PRACTICES ACT\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides that person who benefitted from the unlawful act of a public officer shall be punished with imprisonment of six months to five years and forfeiture in favor of the government of all proceeds derived from such act.

name: HBN-01910
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A WEEKLY PAYMENT OF SALARIES FOR GOVERNMENT AND PRIVATE EMPLOYEES
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to uniformly pay the salaries of both government and private employees by doing it weekly.

name: HBN-01911
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS TO SET ASIDE NOT LESS THAN FIVE PERCENT (5%) OF THE TOTAL REVENUE FROM REGULAR SOURCES OF THE PRECEEDING YEAR AS LUMP SUM APPROPRIATION TO FINANCE REFORESTATION PROGRAMS AND PROJECT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 324 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Aims to rehabilitate the country's forests by requiring LGUs to allocate 2.5% of their income for reforestation.

name: HBN-01912
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SUB-PARAGRAPH (C) OF SECTION 140 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill exempts from tax \"locally produced operas, concerts, dramas, recitals, painting and art exhibits, flower shows, musicals, literary and oratorical programs and pop rock featuring local talents\".

name: HBN-01913
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR PUBLIC SALE OF SHARES IN THE DISPOSITION OF GOVERNMENT CORPORATIONS UNDER THE PRIVATIZATION PROGRAM
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to avoid the concentration of economic power into the hands of a few investors by privatizing government corporations through the public offering of 60% of its shares of stock.

name: HBN-01914
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING ARTICLE 81 OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE, AS AMENDED BY SECTION 24 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7659 BY LIMITING THE WAITING PERIOD IN CARRYING OUT CAPITAL PUNISHMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill limits the waiting period to carry out the death sentence from six months to one year instead of the present period of one year to 18 months.

name: HBN-01915
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE MADRASAH EDUCATION SYSTEM AND PROVIDING GOVERNMENT ASSISTANCE TO MADRASAH EDUCATION THROUGH THE ESTABLISHMENT OF THE FUND FOR ASSISTANCE TO MADRASAH EDUCATION, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Fund Assistance for Madrasah Education Act of 2004.\" The bill aims to promote Islamic philosophy or Madrasah by establishing a trust fund to support its operations.

name: HBN-01916
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BASILAN STATE COLLEGE IN THE CITY OF ISABELA, PROVINCE OF BASILAN, INTO A STATE UNIVERSITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE BASILAN STATE UNIVERSITY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01917
congress_website_title: AN ACT RESTORING THE JOINT LEGISLATIVE-EXECUTIVE TAX COMMISSION,
congress_website_abstract: The bill creates the Commission to examine the tax system, formulate policies and recommend reforms.

name: HBN-01918
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREE PORT IN THE ENTIRE PROVINCE OF BASILAN, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01919
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MUSEUM IN THE CITY OF SURIGAO TO BE KNOWN AS THE MUSEO NAN SURIGAO AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01920
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE RECOVERY AND LIQUIDATION OF FINANCIALLY DISTRESSED JURIDICAL ENTITIES
congress_website_abstract: \"Business Entities Recovery and Insolvency Act.\" The bill provides for a bankruptcy legislation including initiation proceedings, administration of proceedings and determination of claims, rehabilitation receiver, management and creditors committee, termination of proceedings, remedies (court-supervised and pre-negotiated rehabilitation), dissolution and liquidation.

name: HBN-01921
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PENALTIES FOR JUETENG AND OTHER ILLEGAL NUMBERS GAMES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE 1602, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes any of the following penalties to persons involved in jueteng: prision correctional/mayor, reclusion temporal, and a fine from P100,000 to P5 million.

name: HBN-01922
congress_website_title: AN ACT DESIGNATING FIRING SQUAD AS MEANS FOR CARRYING OUT VIOLATIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT 9165 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE COMPREHENSIVE DANGEROUS DRUGS ACT OF 2002 AMENDING FOR THAT PURPOSE SECTION 81 OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 8177
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates that drug traffickers, manufacturers and pushers be executed by firing squad.

name: HBN-01923
congress_website_title: STUDENT HOUSING ACT OF 2004
congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes the National Housing Authority to finance student housing or dormitories, establish them where schools are located and regulate their operations.

name: HBN-01924
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE INTERNAL REVENUE COMMISSION, IN ORDER TO REVITALIZE TAX ADMINISTRATION, PROVIDING THE MECHANICS FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION, ALLOCATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"IRC Act of 2003.\" The bill creates the Commission under the Department of Finance to administer taxes and implement internal revenue laws. Provides for the power and functions of the Commission, qualifications of the commissioners, composition of the Board and qualifications of its members.

name: HBN-01925
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PREVENT AND PENALIZE ACTS OF TERRORISM AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-terrorism Act of 2002.\" The bill defines terrorism as a \"cause, attempt or threat of destruction of properties or death by showing terror to the public, disturbing peace and order internationally or domestically due to ideological, political, religious, ethnic, or cultist belief.\"

name: HBN-01926
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING EXEMPTION TO THE PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS FROM THE COVERAGE OF REPUBLIC ACT 6758, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE SALARY STANDARDIZATION LAW AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to upgrade the salary of teachers to enable them to cope with the rising cost of living by exempting them from the Salary Standardization Law and revising it like those received by employees in government corporations.

name: HBN-01927
congress_website_title: AN ACT RESTRICTING THE USE OF GOVERNMENT VEHICLES TO OFFICIAL USE, PROVIDING CERTAIN EXCEPTIONS AND PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Government Vehicle Utilization Act of 2004.\" The bill prohibits the use of government cars as security back up or for personal use and requires it to be marked 'For Government Use Only' in bold letters five inches in height and 1/2 inch thick.

name: HBN-01928
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A PROVIDENT PERSONAL SAVINGS PLAN KNOWN AS THE PERSONAL EQUITY AND RETIREMENT ACCOUNT (PERA)
congress_website_abstract: \"Personal Equity and Retirement Account (PERA).\" The bill defines PERA as a \"voluntary account by and for the contributor, a long-term savings for his retirement.\" Aims to provide retirement plans to nonmembers of GSIS, SSS and Pag-Ibig to boost the capital, equity and bonds markets.

name: HBN-01929
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE MINDANAO RAILWAYS CORPORATION PRESCRIBING ITS POWERS, FUNCTIONS AND DUTIES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR FOR ITS OPERATION

name: HBN-01933
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING ANY PERSON WHO SELLS ANY REAL PROPERTY TO THE GOVERNMENT OR ANY OF ITS POLITICAL SUBDIVISIONS OR INSTRUMENTALITIES FROM THE PAYMENT OF CAPITAL GAINS TAX AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Aims to encourage private owners to sell their real properties to the government by exempting them from capital gains tax.

name: HBN-01795
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THREE (3) BRANCHES OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABUYAO, LAGUNA AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE OF SECTION FOURTEEN OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980, AS AMENDED, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01796
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE BARANGAY INTEGRATED DEVELOPMENT APPROACH FOR NUTRITION IMPROVEMENT (BIDANI) OF THE RURAL POOR AS A NETWORK PROGRAM OF PARTICIPATING STATE COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITITES, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"BIDANI Act of 2004.\" BIDANI refers to nutrition-in-development action research program which aims to assist the government in improving the nutrition and general well-being of the rural poor through participating state colleges and universities.

name: HBN-01797
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING PRIVILEGES FOR SENIOR CITIZENS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION FOUR OF REPUBLIC ACT 7432 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT TO MAXIMIZE THE CONTRIBUTION OF SENIOR CITIZENS TO NATION BUILDING, GRANT BENEFITS AND SPECIAL PRIVILEGES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to increase the 20% discount being enjoyed by senior citizens to 40%.

name: HBN-01798
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR ONE (1) BRANCH OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LOS BANOS, LAGUNA AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE OF SECTION FOURTEEN OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980, AS AMENDED, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01799
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING HARBOR PILOT AGE SERVICES AND THE CONDUCT OF HARBOR PILOTS IN ALL PORTS IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR RELATED PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Pilotage Service Act of 2004.\" The bill authorizes the Philippine Sports Authority to establish pilotage districts throughout the country and to determine pilotage rates.

name: HBN-01800
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-EIGHT HUNDRED THIRTY-FIVE, ENTITLED \"AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE WOMEN'S AUXILIARY CORPS IN THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES TO PROVIDE FOR THE PROCUREMENT OF ITS OFFICERS AND ENLISTED PERSONNEL AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to allow the members of the Philippine Auxiliary Corps to perform COMBAT DUTY.

name: HBN-01801
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 25 (d) OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTY-EIGHT, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE AFP MILITARY AND SEPARATION DECREE OF 1979 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill reverts back to the provision of RA 340 whereby the years of service an AFP retiree who has served a fraction of at least six (6) months or more should be counted as a year of service in relation to the computation of the number of years in the service.

name: HBN-01802
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6981 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"WITNESS PROTECTION, SECURITY AND BENEFIT ACT\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill entitles witnesses admitted into the program: a) hospitalization benefits while in the safehouse; 2) minor or dependent children free public education, from primary to college. It also seeks to explicitly provide for the perpetuation of testimonies of witnesses in consonance with Rules 134 of the Revised Rules of Court.

name: HBN-01803
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 1 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1519 PROVIDING FOR THE TECHNOLOGICAL UNIVERSITY OF THE PHILIPPINES IN PARANAQUE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01804
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL SEAFARERS ADMINISTRATION, PRESCRIBING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"National Seafarers Administration Act of 2004.\" This bill creates the Administration to be composed of full-time officials, not just an advisory group. The Administration will be charged with formulating policies and programs for the protection and promotion of the rights and welfare of seamen assigned aboard foreign vessels.

name: HBN-01805
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING JANUARY 23 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE COUNTRY
congress_website_abstract: The bill declares January 23 of every year a special non-working holiday in the country to commemorate the Declaration of the First Philippine Republic on January 23, 1899 held at Barasoain Church in the City of Malolos, Province of Bulacan.

name: HBN-01806
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8996, ENTITLED \"AN ACT GRANTING THE END TIME MISSION BROADCASTING SERVICE, INC. A FRANCHISE TO CONSTRUCT, INSTALL, ESTABLISH, OPERATE AND MAINTAIN FOR RELIGIOUS, EDUCATIONAL AND NONCOMMERCIAL PURPOSES RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING STATIONS ANYWHERE IN LUZON

name: HBN-01807
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE FORTUNATO F. HALILI NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA MARIA, PROVINCE OF BULACAN INTO A POLYTECHNIC STATE COLLEGE TO BE KNOWN AS THE SANTA MARIA POLYTECHNIC STATE COLLEGE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01808
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN INTEGRATED POPULATION AND DEVELOPMENT POLICY, STRENGTHENING ITS IMPLEMENTING MECHANISM AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Integrated Population and Development Act of 2004.\" This bill declares that the State shall promote a just and dynamic social order that shall ensure the prosperity of the country and free the people from poverty through policies that provide adequate social services, promote full employment, a higher standard of living and improved quality of life for all and protect and advance the right of the people to a balanced and healthful ecology.

name: HBN-01809
congress_website_title: AN ACT ALLOWING AN INTERNATIONAL CARGO VESSEL TO SHIFT CONTAINERS OF ANY FOREIGN LINES AND THE TRANSSHIPMENT OF CARGO HEADED TO AND FROM ANY PHILIPPINE OUTPORT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE \"THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES\"
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Export and Import Freight Shipping Assistance Act of 2004.\" This bill defines certain nautical terms to clarify meanings in the context of the Philippine setting. It further amends the Tariff and Customs Code of the Philippines, viz: Section 905. Vessel Eligible for Coastwise Trade. - THE RIGHT TO ENGAGE IN THE PHILIPPINE COASTWISE TRADE IS LIMITED TO VESSELS CARRYING A CERTIFICATE OF PHILIPPINE REGISTRY. COASTWISE TRADE SHALL NOT EMBRACE OR COVER THE GOODS, ARTICLES, COMMODITIES OR MERCHANDISE CLASSIFIED OR DESIGNATED AS FOREIGN CARGOES AS THEREIN DEFINED. It also amends Section 1009 of the same Code by providing clearance to FOREIGN TRADE TO LOAD OR UNLOAD FOREIGN CARGOES TO AND FROM PRINCIPAL PORTS OF ENTRY/SUB-PORTS IN THE COUNTRY through THE FOLLOWING INSTANCES: 1) ALLOWING AN INTERNATIONAL CARGO VESSEL TO SHIFT EMPTY CONTAINERS OF ANY FOREIGN LINES IF SAID VESSEL REGULARLY CALLS AT MANILA AND PROCEEDS TO PHILIPPINE OUTPORTS; and 2) ALLOWING TRANSSHIPMENT BY ANY INTERNATIONAL VESSEL OF CARGO COMING FROM OR HEADED FOR A FOREIGN PORT AND FROM ANY PHILIPPINE OUTPORT.

name: HBN-01810
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE STO. ROSARIO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX IN BARANGAY POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN JUAN, PROVINCE OF LA UNION, FROM THE STO. ROSARIO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE SAN JUAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE ECLEO-MOLETA ANNEX HIGH SCHOOL-DINAGAT SCHOOL OF FISHERIES ANNEX IN BARANGAY CAB-ILAN, MUNICIPALITY OF DINAGAT, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, FROM THE DINAGAT SCHOOL OF FISHERIES AND CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE CAB-ILAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL\", AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE PAMOSAINGAN ANNEX HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY PAMOSAINGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF SOCORRO, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, INTO AN INDEPENDENT HIGH SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE PAMOSAINGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORAPPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01815
congress_website_title: THE MAGNA CARTA FOR PRIVATE SCHOOL TEACHERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for Private School Teachers.\" This bill seeks to give security of tenure to private school teachers, right against discrimination, academic freedom, benefits related to health, study leave and the right to self-organization.

name: HBN-01819
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A CLASS \"D\" DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GUIMBAL, PROVINCE OF ILOILO AND APPROPRIATING THE AMOUNT OF TWO MILLION PESOS FOR THE PURPOSE

name: HBN-01820
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FARM MACHINERIES MANUFACTURING PROGRAMS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Farm Machineries Manufacturing Program (FMMP) Act of 2004.\" This bill provides for the establishment of a comprehensive program that shall introduce mechanized farming to boast production. It encourages local manufacturers to enter into a joint venture with foreign companies that shall assist and train them with the end in view of enabling them to maximize the utilization of local materials in their products.

name: HBN-01821
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE AND DEVELOP THE SEED INDUSTRIES OF THE PHILIPPINES, AND TO INSURE THE AVAILABILITY OF HIGH QUALITY SEEDS OF SUPERIOR CROP VARIETIES FOR NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Seed Act.\" This bill seeks to develop the seeds industry in the country in order to produce, through intensive research and study, high quality varieties of seeds and, most importantly, to make them available in sufficient quantity to all farmers throughout the country.

name: HBN-01822
congress_website_title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING THE AMOUNT OF TWO MILLION PESOS FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A COOPERATIVE CENTER IN EVERY CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT OF THE COUNTRY
congress_website_abstract: This bill seeks to appropriate the amount of Two Million Pesos (P2,000,000.00) for the construction of a cooperative center in every congressional district of the country. By way of assistance, the construction of a cooperative center will give entrepreneurs a place to conduct their cooperatives business. This center will entice small businessmen to form cooperatives.

name: HBN-01823
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A NEW QUEDAN SYSTEM IN THE MARKETING OF PALAY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: This bill mandates the National Food Authority (NFA) to determine the floor price for palay to assure the farmers or producers a fair return on their investment and to procure and buy from farmers their palay crops subject to the following payment terms: (a)seventy-five percent in cash, and (b) a quedan for the remaining balance which shall be paid within sixty days from the time the palay is delivered to its warehouses or within such time as may be agreed upon by the NFA and the farmers/producers.

name: HBN-01824
congress_website_title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING THE AMOUNT OF EIGHT MILLION PESOS FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A TWO-STOREY SCHOOL BUILDING FOR THE GUIMBAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GUIMBAL, PR0VINCE OF ILOILO

name: HBN-01825
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING THE INCOME AND RECEIPTS FROM LOANS USED TO FINANCE AGRICULTURAL BASED, RELATED AND/OR LOCATED ACTIVITIES AND BUSINESSES FROM TAXES
congress_website_abstract: This bill exempts all income and receipts from loans used to finance agricultural based, related and.or located activities and businesses from all taxes, including gross receipts and income tax. Given this incentive, the farmers will be able to use the savings from the exemption to uplift their production.

name: HBN-01826
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE SOLAR ENERGY DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: This bill establishes the Solar Energy Development Authority which shall undertake researches, and promote the development and utilization of the solar energy. Being a tropical country, the Philippines is blessed with abundant sunlight which can be tapped as an inexhaustible, cheap and environmentally safe source of energy. As compared to other conventional fuel, solar energy merely harnesses the heat of the sun hence, it does not pollute the air nor the sea.

name: HBN-01827

congress_website_abstract: \"LPG Cylinder Act of 2004.\" This bill seeks to ensure that appropriate standards will be developed and formulated for the Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) industry in order to protect the interests of consumers. It mandates the Department of Trade and Industry, as the lead agency in the implementation of the proposed law, to establish an LPG cylinder development program and undertake research, standardization, promotion, market monitoring, certification, testing, accreditation and enforcement activites.

name: HBN-01842
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CODIFICATION OF CRIMINAL LAWS IN THE PHILIPPINES, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to establish a Criminal Code Commission that will be charged to review, revise and update all existing penal laws to make them more coherent and responsive to the times and compile them in a single code.

name: HBN-01843
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING APRIL NINETEEN OF EACH YEAR AS TARLAC CITY DAY A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF TARLAC

name: HBN-01844
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 20 AND 31, TITLE IV OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 957 REGULATING THE SALE OF SUBDIVISION LOTS, CONDOMINIUMS, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Among others, this bill: 1) prohibits the disposition of any subdivision or condominium project until all the necessary improvements and infrastructure have been completed; 2) declares ipso facto as local government property abandoned roads in subdivisions that have been in existence for not less than ten (10) years.

name: HBN-01845
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 1801 OF THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: This bill requires all shipping lines, shipping companies, freight forwarders, consolidators, break bulk agents and their agents and sub-agents, and arrastre contractors to state in bold, prominent and comprehensible characters the words \"CUSTOMS LAW REQUIRES FILING OF ENTRY WITHIN THIRTY (30) DAYS FROM DATE OF DISCHARGE OF LAST PACKAGE FROM THE VESSEL OR CARGO IS DEEMED FORFEITED IN FAVOR OF THE GOVERNMENT AND SHALL BE DISPOSED OF IN ACCORDANCE WITH LAW\" in each and every Notice of Arrival to the owners, importers, consignees or other interested parties.

name: HBN-01846
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 41 PARAGRAPH 4 OF RA 4850 AS AMENDED BY SECTION 2 PARAGRAPH 2 OF EXECUTIVE ORDER 927
congress_website_abstract: This bill amends the Laguna Lake Development Authority Law, as amended, and restores to the local government of San Pablo City the jurisdiction over the Seven Lakes. The condition of the seven lakes in San Pablo City deteriorated due to the failure of the LLDA to closely manage and develop it.

name: HBN-01847
congress_website_title: \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MAGNA CARTA FOR BARANGAY TANODS\"
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta of Barangay Tanods.\" This bill grants barangay tanods similar privileges and benefits received by other appointive barangay officials to improve their economic welfare and to enhance their skills and capabilities to make them better equipped in the maintenance of peace and order in the barangay.

name: HBN-01848
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A FISHERIES SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CARAPDAPAN, MUNICIPALITY OF ARTECHE, PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR, TO BE KNOWN AS THE CARAPDAPAN SCHOOL OF FISHERIES, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01849
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NICASIO ALVAREZ MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN EDUARDO, MUNICIPALITY OF ORAS, PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR, INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE NICASIO ALVAREZ NATIONAL MEMORIAL SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01850
congress_website_title: THE PHILIPPINE IMMIGRATION AND NATURALIZATION ACT OF 2004
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Immigration and Naturalization Act of 2004.\" This bill reorganizes the Bureau of Immigration and instituting it into a Commission to be known as the Commission on Immigration and Naturalization. A more responsive immigration law is imperative to ensure the security, protect the health, morals, safety and maintain the dignity of our people. With this proposed legislation, the antiquated systems and procedures on immigrarion being adopted in our country will be strengthened and streamlined to conform with the modern trends.

name: HBN-01851
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ABANON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN SAN CARLOS CITY, INTO A SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE SAN CARLOS CITY SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_abstract: This bill mandates that any person who has been declared by competent authority to be insane or incompetent, or has been sentenced by final judgment for subversion, insurrection, rebellion or for any offense for which he has been sentenced to a penalty of more than eighteen months or for a crime involving moral turpitude, shall be disqualified to be a candidate and to hold any office, unless he has been given plenary pardon or granted amnesty.

name: HBN-01857
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING DEPARTMENT STORES, SHOPPING MALLS AND OTHER COMMERCIAL ESTABLISHMENTS TO PROVIDE THEIR CUSTOMERS FREE PARKING SPACE
congress_website_abstract: This bill directs that the space specified in this Act must be sufficient enough to allow easy transfer from carpark to ingress and egress levels and complies with the requirements set forth in the National Building Code.

name: HBN-01858
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE ESTABLISHMENT OF VIDEO ARCADES, INTERNET GAMING STATIONS, BILLIARD HALLS AND OTHER SIMILAR ESTABLISHMENTS NEAR EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS
congress_website_abstract: This bill declares it unlawful for any individual to establish video arcades, internet gaming stations, billiard halls and other similar establishments near educational institutions and provides penalty for violation thereof.

name: HBN-01859
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXTENDING THE MANDATED FUNDING SUPPORT FOR AGRICULTURAL AND FISHERIES MODERNIZATION AND PROVIDING SPECIFIC FUNDING ALLOCATION FOR STRATEGIC AGRICULTURAL AND FISHERIES DEVELOPMENT ZONES (SAFDZ), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8435, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE AGRICULTURAL AND FISHERIES MODERNIZATION ACT (AFMA)
congress_website_abstract: This bill: 1) provides specific funding allocation for the development of Strategic Agricultural and Fisheries Development Zones (SAFDZ), and 2) mandates the Department of Budget and Management (DBM) to include annually in the next nine (9) years, in the President's program for expenditures for submission to Congress an amount not less than Seventeen Billion Pesos (Php17,000,000,000.00) for the implementation of this Act.

name: HBN-01860
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF DRUG REHABILITATION CENTER IN DAVAO DEL SUR AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01861
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE IMPOUNDING OF MOTOR VEHICLES INVOLVED IN A VEHICULAR INCIDENT THAT RESULTED IN THE DEATH OR SERIOUS PHYSICAL INJURY OF A PEDESTRIAN, COMMUTER OR BY-STANDER, UNLESS A CASH BOND IS POSTED
congress_website_abstract: This bill mandates that any motor vehicle which directly figured in a vehicular incident that resulted in the death or serious physical injury of a pedestrian, commuter, or by-stander who is not a passenger of such vehicle, shall be held in custodia legis, pending the outcome of any criminal or civil proceeding as a result of the same incident, unless the driver, owner or operator of the vehicle shall post a cash bond in the amount of at least Five Hundred Thousand Pesos (PhP500,000.00) as security for the satisfaction of any judgment that may be rendered by the court.

name: HBN-01862
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE STANDARDIZATION OF THE RATES OF COMPENSATION OF THE DOCTORS, NURSES AND OTHER HEALTH WORKERS IN THE GOVERNMENT SERVICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Public Health Workers Compensation Structure of 2004.\" This bill declares it a State policy to establish a highly motivated salary structure for public health workers to prevent the imminent and inevitable collapse of the Health System in the country. Provides for the upgrading of the basic salary of health workers with Salary Grade 22 and below by 2 salary grades.

name: HBN-01863
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PENALTIES AGAINST UNLAWFUL IMPORTATION AND OTHER VIOLATIONS TO THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: This bill declares any person who fraudulently imports or brings into the country, or assists in so doing, any article, contrary to law, or receives, conceals, buys, sells, or in any manner, facilitates the transportation, concealment, or sale of such article after importation, knowing the same to have been imported contrary to law, guilty of smuggling and be penalized accordingly.

name: HBN-01864
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE POSITION OF MUNICIPAL PROSECUTOR IN EVERY MUNICIPALITY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01865

name: HBN-01866
title: CONGRESSIONAL MEDAL OF HONOR
long_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A CONGRESSIONAL MEDAL OF HONOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A CONGRESSIONAL MEDAL OF HONOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill establishes a Congressional Medal of Honor to recognize members of the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) and the Philippine National Police (PNP) who, whether in times of peace or of war have, through their heroic and selfless deeds, distinguished themselves above and beyond the call of duty. Aside from a Medal, this recognition will also involve the promotion of the soldier or police officer to the next higher rank, and shall include the grant of P100,000.00 to the awardee or to his or her next-of-kin.

name: HBN-01867
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING A NATIONAL POLICY ON PEACE ZONES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Peace Zones Policy Act of 2004.\" This bill establishes the basic and specific policies that shall govern Peace Zones. Because of the intermittent armed conflict in Mindanao, people-initiated, community-based responses in the form of Peace Zones, also known as \"Sanctuaries of Peace\" and \"Spaces for Peace\" have mushroomed in the area. A peace zone is a geographical area which the residents themselves declare to be off-limits to armed conflicts to protect the civilians, livelihood and property from the raging war. It comprises a major grassroots constituency in the pursuit of peace processes in the national level.

name: HBN-01868

name: HBN-01869

congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Transportation Security Authority Act of 2004.\" This bill mandates the Authority, as the central security agency of all transport systems in the country, to encourage, promote, formulate, implement and ensure the installation of standard security and safety measures and policies that are internationally acceptable for the prevention of transportation disasters and for the protection, security, and safety of passengers, transportation facilities and properties.

name: HBN-01649

congress_website_abstract: In recognition of the vital role they play in the delivery of health services, the bill proposes to grant accredited barangay health workers a monthly honoraria of P3,000.00 and an insurance coverage of not less than P10,000.00.

congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the Department of Agrarian Reform, in coordination with the Philippine Tourism Authority, to determine the areas within tourist zones that are suitable for agricultural purposes and to segregate the same for eventual distribution to qualified beneficiaries under the Comprehensive Agrarian Reform Law.

congress_website_abstract: The bill synchronizes the barangay and sanggunian kabataan elections with the national elections which shall be held on the 2nd Monday of May 2007. Thereafter, the barangay and sanggunian kabataan elections shall be held every five years.

name: HBN-01671

congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to grant Career Executive Service Eligibility (CESO) to graduates who have been conferred a doctorate degree to qualify them for appointment to executive positions in the civil service. It requires the registrars of accredited colleges/universities to regularly furnish the Civil Service Commission with a list of graduates conferred with a doctorate degree.

congress_website_abstract: The bill grants graduates, who have been conferred of a masteral degree, with a professional eligibility in the civil service for purposes of appointment to positions requiring professional eligibility.

congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3134, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'AN ACT CREATING THE CITY OF LAPU-LAPU', LIKEWISE KNOWN AS THE 'CITY CHARTER OF LAPU-LAPU'

congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BREAST CARE CENTERS IN EVERY REGION NATIONWIDE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill calls for the establishment of a breast cancer center in existing regional hospitals in every region to spearhead the government's fight against breast cancer. In regions where there is no regional hospital, the Center shall be attached to the district hospital most accessible to the most number of constituents.

congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 447 AND 458 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill defines \"filcab\" as a four-wheel vehicle with a seating capacity of 7-14 persons. The bill proposes that filcabs be regulated by the local government units (LGUs) instead of the Land Transportation Franchising Regulatory Board and the Land Transportation Office since the LGUs are in a better position to determine the transportation needs in their locality.

congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes that a decree of legal separation or a declaration of nullity of marriage be given retroactive effect to the time when the spouses actually severed their marital relations and ceased to render mutual support.

congress_website_abstract: To discourage criminals from preying on foreigners, the bill seeks to declare the foreign nationality of the victim as an aggravating circumstance in crimes against persons, property and liberty in crimes committed against foreign nationals. Conversely, the foreign nationality of an offender shall be appreciated as an aggravating circumstance in crimes committed against Filipinos in our own country.

congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE PADADA-KIBLAWAN-TAGAYTAY-MALUNGON ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF PADADA, KIBLAWAN AND MALUNGON, PROVINCES OF DAVAO DEL SUR AND SARANGANI INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01701
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE JUNCTION (MALALAG - MALITA ROAD) TO MALALAG WHARF ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALALAG, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL SUR INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01702
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NUING - SAN ISIDRO - QUIAPO - MOLMOL - MALAPATAN ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF JOSE ABAD SANTOS AND MALAPATAN, PROVINCES OF DAVAO DEL SUR AND SARANGANI INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01703
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE POBLACION - PONGPONG - DATU INTAN - MALUNGON ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF STA. MARIA AND MALUNGON, PROVINCES OF DAVAO DEL SUR AND SARANGANI INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01704
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE JUNCTION (DIGOS - MAKAR ROAD) - TAGANSULE - LUBOG - LIDA - BULACAN (MALALAG - MALITA ROAD) ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALALAG, PROVINCES OF DAVAO DEL SUR INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01705
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE WATERFALL - OSMENA - BALASIAO - MALUNGON ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF SULOP, KIBLAWAN AND MALUNGON, PROVINCES OF DAVAO DEL SUR AND SARANGANI INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01706
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE POBLACION - PONGPONG - SAN ANTONIO - SAN PEDRO - PINALPALAN - ALABEL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF STA. MARIA, MALITA AND ALABEL, PROVINCES OF DAVAO DEL SUR AND SARANGANI INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01707
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SANGAY - MACOL - PANGALEON - DATU DANWATA - ALABEL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF MALITA AND ALABEL, PROVINCES OF DAVAO DEL SUR AND SARANGANI INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01708
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING THE PROVISIONS ON VAGRANCY AND AMENDING THE LAW ON PROSTITUTION AS DEFINED AND PENALIZED IN ARTICLE 202 OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to decriminalize vagrancy, to redefine prostitution to include men, and to change the penalty for prostitution from arresto menor to destierro or banishment to enable prostitutes to start a new life. However, it proposes to impose stricter penalties for recidivist prostitutes.

name: HBN-01709
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING FURTHER THE INSURANCE BENEFITS OF LOCAL GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6942, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to increase the following insurance benefits of local government officials: a) death and burial; b) total and permanent incapacity or disability; and c) injuries resulting from an accident.

name: HBN-01710
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9103, GRANTING LAOAG INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES, INC. A FRANCHISE TO ESTABLISH, OPERATE AND MAINTAIN DOMESTIC AND INTERNATIONAL AIR TRANSPORT SERVICES

name: HBN-01711
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING PARAGRAPH (J) OF SECTION FOURTEEN OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1981, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01712
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE RIZAL TOWN COASTAL LOOP STRING FROM THE RIZAL SHRINE IN DAPITAN CITY UP TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF RIZAL, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01713
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE PINAN-MUTIA PROVINCIAL ROAD CONNECTING THE MUNICIPALITITES OF PIÑAN AND MUTIA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01714
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE POTUNGAN-SIBUTAD-LIBAY ROAD CONNECTING THE CITY OF DAPITAN AND THE MUNICIPALITY OF SIBUTAD OF THE PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01715
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING PREPARATORY EDUCATION AS COMPULSORY PART OF BASIC PRIMARY EDUCATION IN PUBLIC SCHOOLS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Preparatory Education Act.\" The bill seeks to make preparatory education (one year schooling before Grade I) mandatory for all five-year old children as part of the formal elementary education. The pre-school program shall be made available for free.

name: HBN-01716
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE DAHICAN-LAWIGAN ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF DAVAO ORIENTAL FROM A PROVINCIAL ROAD TO A NATIONAL SECONDARY ROAD

name: HBN-01717
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MARAYAG, LUPON, PROVINCE OF DAVAO ORIENTAL TO BE KNOWN AS THE MARAYAG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01718
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN FAMILY BONDING BY PROVIDING MORE TIME AND OPPORTUNITY FOR TOGETHERNESS
congress_website_abstract: \"Family Bonding Act.\" To enable families to enjoy long week-ends, the bill provides for non-working holidays falling on Tuesdays and Wednesdays to be observed on Mondays and for non-working holidays falling on Thursdays to be observed on Fridays. However, the observance of Holy Thursday, Good Friday, Christmas Day and New Year's Day shall be exempt from the proposal.

name: HBN-01719
congress_website_title: AN ACT MODIFYING THE DEFINITION OF A CONDOMINIUM UNIT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4726, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CONDOMINIUM LAW, TO APPLY TO INDUSTRIAL ESTATES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: In keeping with the mandate under the Constitution, the bill redefines the interest subject of ownership in a condominium project, especially as regards those in industrial estates, without granting ownership to foreign investors.

name: HBN-01720
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES (SME) BUSINESS CENTERS (SMEBC) IN ALL REGIONAL AND PROVINCIAL CENTERS IN THE COUNTRY
congress_website_abstract: \"SME Business Center (SMEBC) Act of 2004.\" The proposed SMEBC shall house all the government agencies involved in setting up a business from registration up to the last requirement. It shall also provide enterprenuers with all the basic information in establishing and running a business.

name: HBN-01721
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A CEILING ON ALL PUBLIC DEBTS OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Public Debt Ceiling Act.\" The bill proposes to set a ceiling on the total public debt of the country at US$1.2 trillion which may not be exceeded except with the concurrence of two-thirds of all members of Congress voting separately.

name: HBN-01722
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE KORONADAL-TAMPAKAN-COLUMBIO PROVINCIAL ROAD INTO A NATIONAL ROAD, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01723
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SIBALOM, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO BE KNOWN AS THE SIBALOM NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01724
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TIBIAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO BE KNOWN AS THE TARIO LIM NATIONAL MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01725
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TUBUDAN, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN REMIGIO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO BE KNOWN AS THE GOVERNOR EVELIO B. JAVIER MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01726
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MARIA, MUNICIPALITY OF LAUA-AN, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO BE KNOWN AS THE EASTERN LAUA-AN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01727
title: NATIONAL APICULTURE RESEARCH, TRAINING AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE
long_title: AN ACT PROVIDING APPROPRIATION FOR THE OPERATION, MAINTENANCE, TRAINING, RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT ACTIVITIES OF THE NATIONAL APICULTURE RESEARCH, TRAINING AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE, THEREBY AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 11 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9151, ENTITLED 'AN ACT TO ABOLISH THE APICULTURE TRAINING AND DEVELOPMENT CENTER AT THE DON MARIANO MARCOS MEMORIAL STATE UNIVERSITY, MUNICIPALITY OF BACNOTAN, PROVINCE OF LA UNION, AND CREATE THE NATIONAL APICULTURE RESEARCH, TRAINING AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE, AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATIONS OF FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 11 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9151 ENTITLED \"AN ACT TO ABOLISH THE APICULTURE TRAINING AND DEVLOPMENT CENTER AT THE DON MARIANO MARCOS MEMORIAL STATE UNIVERSITY, MUNICIPALITY OF BACNOTAN, PROVINCE OF LA UNION, AND CREATE THE NATIONAL APICULTURE RESEARCH, TRAINING AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE, AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATIONS OF FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01728
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REQUIRE THE MANDATORY ROADWORTHINESS INSPECTION OF VEHICLES TEN YEARS OLD AND ABOVE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to require all ten to fifteen-year old vehicles to pass a road-worthiness inspection test (RIT) every two years prior to registration by the Land Transportation office. Older vehicles shall be required to pass the RIT every year.

name: HBN-01729
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING TAX AND DUTY EXEMPTION PRIVILEGES FOR THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE THRU ITS PNP SERVICE STORE SYSTEM
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to grant direct and indirect tax and duty exemptions for all purchases from local manufacturers, suppliers, and producers made by the Philippine National Police Service Store System.

name: HBN-01730
congress_website_title: AN ACT ENCOURAGING THE CONSTRUCTION, ESTABLISHMENT AND OPERATION OF PRIVATE PORTS IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR RELATED PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to allow private and public entities to construct, establish and operate a port even without prior approval by the Philippine Ports Authority provided that the operation of the port is directly connected to and is an integral part of the principal business of said entity and is for its exclusive use.

name: HBN-01731
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE LOCAL MANAGEMENT INFORMATION SYSTEM
congress_website_abstract: \"Local Management Information System Act of 2004.\" The local management information system is envisioned to provide management information to all local government units in order to strengthen local government administration.

name: HBN-01732
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF THE PHILIPPINE MERCHANT MARINE OFFICERS LAW
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the use of naval vessels, which are not engaged in emergencies, for the training of future deck officers, engineers and crewmen apart from the traditional vessels used during apprenticeship training.

name: HBN-01733
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR BARANGAY EMPOWERMENT, AMENDING VARIOUS PROVISIONS OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Barangay Empowerment Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the creation of a Barangay Building Official in all barangays with a population of at least 3,000 inhabitants. It also proposes to increase the share in the resources tax collection of the barangay where the sand, gravel and other quarry resources are extract.

name: HBN-01734
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE PRACTICE OF OFFERING, GIVING OR ATTEMPTING TO GIVE OR OFFER, OR ACCEPTING A KICKBACK IN ANY KIND OF COMMERCIAL TRANSACTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Kickback Act.\" The bill provides a penaly of imprisonment of not less than 5 years but not more than 20 years and a fine of not less than P5,000 but not more than three times the amount of the kickback, whichever is higher on any person who provides or attempts to provide any kickback or solicit, accept or attempt to accept any kickback.

name: HBN-01735
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 20 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBERED 1638, AS AMENDED BY PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBERED 1650, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIIPPINES RETIREMENT LAW
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to grant a separation pay equivalent to one month base pay and longevity pay for every year of active service to the AFP's enlisted personnel who are honorably separated from service before rendering 20 years of active service.

name: HBN-01736
congress_website_title: AN ACT CURTAILING THE ILLEGAL ACTIVITIES OF RACKETEERS AND POWERFUL SYNDICATES IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"Racketeer-Influenced and Corrupt Organizations (RICO) Act of 2004.\" The bill aims to prevent organized crime syndicates from using money and power to subvert and corrupt legitimate businesses by facilitating the prosecution of and imposing stiffer penalties for criminal offenders.

name: HBN-01737
congress_website_title: AN ACT REDEFINING THE THIRD LEVEL POSITIONS IN THE CAREER CIVIL SERVICE
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes the following qualification requirements for third level positions: a) appropriate academic and professional background; b) career service executive eligibility; c) holds a comparable or next in rank position in government; d) meets age requirement; and e) not disqualified under any existing law.

name: HBN-01738
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FREE MEDICAL SERVICES TO FILIPINO VETERANS AND RETIRED GOVERNMENT PERSONNEL IN GOVERNMENT-OWNED AND OPERATED HOSPITALS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: As a gesture of gratitude for their past services and to reassure them of the government's support for them, the bill mandates all government-owned and operated hospitals to provide free medical services to all Filipino veterans and retired government employees.

name: HBN-01739
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A DRUG REHABILITATION CENTER IN THE PROVINCE OF BATAAN, TO BE KNOWN AS THE BATAAN DRUG REHABILITATION CENTER, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01740
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BATAAN POLYTECHNIC STATE COLLEGE FORMERLY THE MEDINA LACSON DE LEON SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADES), AND ITS DULY INTEGRATED CAMPUSES: THE BATAAN COMMUNITY COLLEGES, BOTH IN THE CITY OF BALANGA, AND THE BATAAN NATIONAL SCHOOL OF FILIPINO CRAFTSMAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ORANI, ALL LOCATED IN THE PROVINCE OF BATAAN, INTO A STATE UNIVERSITY, TO BE KNOWN AS THE STATE UNIVERSITY OF BATAAN (SUB), AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01741
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ORION, PROVINCE OF BATAAN TO BE KNOWN AS THE \"ORION NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL\", AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01742
congress_website_title: AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE OFFICE OF THE SECOND HIGHWAY ENGINEERING DISTRICT OF THE PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF CATUBIG, NORTHERN SAMAR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 1 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8478

name: HBN-01743
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PENALTY FOR THE KILLING, WOUNDING OR TAKING AWAY OF THE EAGLE AND/OR DESTROYING, DISTURBING OR TAKING AWAY OF THE BIRD'S NESTS OR EGGS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION FIVE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTY-ONE HUNDRED AND FORTY-SEVEN
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes a penalty of prision mayor or a fine of not less than P10,000 nor more than P15,000 or both for any violation of the act.

name: HBN-01744
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING ANOTHER LEGISLATIVE DISTRICT IN THE PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR TO BE KNOWN AS THE THIRD DISTRICT OF SURIGAO DEL SUR

name: HBN-01745
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE DETAIL OR ASSIGNMENT OF MILITARY PERSONNEL IN CIVILIAN OFFICES AND PUBLIC UTILITIES AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to terminate the services of military personnel in all civilian and public offices and to prohibit their detail or reassignment.

name: HBN-01746
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN LOCAL ENVIRONMENT PROTECTION BY MAKING THE APPOINTMENT OF AN ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES OFFICER MANDATORY FOR PROVINCIAL, CITY AND MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 484 (A) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\"
congress_website_abstract: Under the Local Government Code, the appointment of an environment and natural resources officer is merely optional for local government units. To prevent the degradation of our ecosystem, the bill makes the appointment of the environment and natural resources officer mandatory.

name: HBN-01747
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING SUBA CAVES IN BARANGAY TINA, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN MIGUEL, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR, AN ARCHAELOGICAL RESERVATION SITE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01748
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP IDENTIFICATION SYSTEM
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Citizenship Identification System Act of 2001.\" The bill requires all Filipino citizens, who have reached the age of majority, to secure a citizen's ID from the Bureau of Immigration, which shall have the sole responsibility of issuing the ID.

name: HBN-01749
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER STRENGTHENING VOLUNTARY ARBITRATION AS A PREFERENTIAL MODE OF LABOR DISPUTE SETTLEMENT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 260, 261, 262-A, 262-B AND 277 (F) OF PD 442, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to strengthen voluntary arbitration by amending the following: a) the selection of Voluntary Arbitrators or panel of Voluntary Arbitrators; b) redefining the jurisdiction of the Voluntary arbitrators to hear cases of termination of workers, productivity schemes or wage distortions arising from legislated wage increases; c) meting out sanctions against erring arbitrators; d) determining the fees of the arbitrators; and e) providing subsidy for unions that cannot shoulder the fees of arbitrators.

name: HBN-01750
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BENEFITS OF RETIRED GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE COMMONWEALTH ACT NUMBERED ONE HUNDRED EIGHTY-SIX, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to grant government employees who intend to retire under RA 660 or PD 1146 a 6-year annual lump sum instead of the usual 5-year annuity. The proposed monthly annuity shall be based on the highest monthly salary received prior to retirement instead of basing it on the average monthly salary received during the last 3 years of service.

name: HBN-01751
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE AMOUNT OF INSURED BANK DEPOSITS FROM ONE HUNDRED THOUSAND PESOS (P100,000) TO ONE MILLION PESOS (P1,000,000), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THREE THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED NINETY-ONE, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CHARTER OF THE PHILIPPINE DEPOSIT INSURANCE CORPORATION
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to increase the maximum amount of insured deposits to P500,000 and to establish a deposit insurance coverage plan for deposits in excess of P500,00 which a depositor, as an option, may enroll in at his cost.

name: HBN-01752
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING TRI-SERVICE ACADEMIES FOR THE MAJOR SERVICES COMMAND OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Tri-Service Academies Act.\" The bill proposes the creation of the Philippine Army Military Academy (PAMA), the Philippine Air Force Military Academy (PAFMA) and the Philippine Naval Military Academy (PNMA) to meet the requirement for officers of the Major Services Command of the Armed Forces of the Philippines.

name: HBN-01753
congress_website_title: THE OMNIBUS HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT ACT OF 2004
congress_website_abstract: \"Omnibus Housing and Development Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the consolidation of the various shelter agencies and the creation of the Department of Housing and Urban Development which shall formulate and implement all shelter policies and programs.

name: HBN-01754
congress_website_title: AN ACT REDEFINING ILLEGAL RECRUITMENT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8042 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"MIGRANT WORKERS AND OVERSEAS FILIPINOS ACT OF 1995,\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
