congress_website_abstract: \"Migrant Workers and Overseas Filipinos Act Amendment of 1998.\" The bill seeks to distinguish acts or omissions by illegal recruiters, which constitue the crime of illegal recruitment, from the prohibited acts or omissions of legitimate and licensed placement or recruitment agencies.

name: HBN-01755
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING THAT SECURITY, INTELLIGENCE AND CONFIDENTIAL FUNDS BE SUBJECTED TO STANDARD AUDITING PROCEDURES, REQUIRING THE SUBMISSION OF THE AUDIT AND LIQUIDATION REPORTS ON SAID FUNDS TO THE HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: To ensure that these funds are managed, expended and utilized in accordance with laws and regulations, the bill provides for the regular auditing by the Commission on Audit of all security, intelligence and confidential funds.

name: HBN-01756
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING A LAND CONVERSION TAX, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the imposition of a 15% land conversion tax on all agricultural lands converted for residential purposes and a 30% tax on all agricultural lands converted for commercial, industrial and other non-agricultural purposes.

name: HBN-01757
congress_website_title: AN ACT ALLOCATING FIFTY PERCENT OF VALUE-ADDED TAX COLLECTIONS TO HEALTH AND EDUCATION SERVICES, AGRICULTURAL FACILITES AND SERVICES, HOUSING, ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION, AND OTHER SOCIAL SERVICES THEREBY AMENDING THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to allocate 50% of the total value-added tax collection for the following purposes: a) education - 25%; b) health - 25%; c) agricultural facilities and services - 25%; d) housing - 15%; e) environmental protection - 5%; and f) training and capability building programs - 5%.

name: HBN-01758
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCLUDING LIQUEFIED PETROLEUM GAS (LPG) IN THE LIST OF BASIC NECESSITIES AS DEFINED UNDER SECTION 3 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7581, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PRICE ACT OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: Liquefield petroleum gas (LPG), being the most commonly used fuel in many households, is actually a basic need. The bill proposes to include LPG in the list of basic commodities so that its price can automatically be controlled or \"frozen\" during calamities, disasters and other emergency situations.

name: HBN-01759
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 6, PARAGRAPH (1) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7581, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PRICE ACT
congress_website_abstract: The bill empowers the sanggunian, in areas declared under a state of calamity, to place the prices of basic commodities under control.

name: HBN-01760
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE USE OF THE AUTOMATED TELLER MACHINE (ATM) TECHNOLOGY IN THE CONDUCT OF NATIONAL OR LOCAL ELECTORAL EXERCISES, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill calls on the Commission on Elections to customize the automated teller machines (ATM) technology for use in the elections. The system shall involve the use the voter's card containing the personal identification number and automated machine equipped with a biometric identification system to determine the identity of the voter.

name: HBN-01761
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING ALL IRRIGATED AND IRRIGABLE AGRICULTURAL LANDS AS PROTECTED AREAS FOR AGRICULTURE, PROHIBITING ITS CONVERSION FOR USES OTHER THAN AGRICULTURAL AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 20 OF REPUBLIC ACT 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: \"National Protected Areas for Agriculture (NPAA) Law.\" To stop the indiscriminate conversion of agricultural lands to residential, commercial and industrial lands, the bill declares all irrigated and irrigable agricultural lands planted with rice, crops, sugar, coconut and other crops as NPAAs and as such, not subject to conversion for other uses.

name: HBN-01762
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING TO ONE THOUSAND FIVE HUNDRED PESOS (P1,500) THE MONTHLY PERSONNEL ECONOMIC RELIEF ALLOWANCE (PERA) GRANTED TO GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to grant all government employees a P500 monthly PERA increase effective January 1, 2005. Employees receiving commutable representation and/or transportation allowance shall not be entitled to receive the increase.

name: HBN-01763
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE TAX ON IDLE LANDS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 236 OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVENTY ONE HUNDRED AND SIXTY OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to increase the tax on idle lands from 5% to 10% of the assessed value of the property in addition to the basic real property tax.

name: HBN-01764
congress_website_title: AN ACT REDEFINING THE CRIME OF PLUNDER THEREBY AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVENTY HUNDRED AND EIGHTY AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVENTY-SIX HUNDRED AND FIFTY-NINE
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to lower the minimum aggregate amount or total value involved in the crime of plunder from P50 million to P25 million.

name: HBN-01765
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FLOATING MEDICAL CENTER TO BE KNOWN AS THE PHILIPPINE FLOATING MEDICAL CENTER AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the Philippine Navy and the Department of Health to jointly maintain and operate the Philippine Floating Medical Center which shall visit the different provinces, municipalities and cities in the country.

name: HBN-01766
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING FROM INCOME TAXATION CERTAIN RENTALS ON RESIDENTIAL/APARTMENT OR OTHER DWELLING UNITS, ALLOWING THEM TO BE DEDUCTIBLE FROM TAXABLE FIXED INCOME OF THE TENANTS OR INDIVIDUALS WHO PAY SAID RENTALS
congress_website_abstract: \"Rental Tax Exemption Law.\" The bill provides that rentals or leases below P5,000 per month for residents in Metro Manila and P2,500 per month for residents outside Metro Manila shall be exempt from taxes and shall be deductible from taxable fixed income.

name: HBN-01767
congress_website_title: AN ACT BANNING THE ENTRY, SALE, PROCESSING, FIELD TESTING AND RELEASE OF PRODUCTS CONSISTING OF, CONTAINING OR DERIVED FROM GENETICALLY MODIFIED ORGANISMS (GMOS) INTO AND WITHIN THE COUNTRY AND IMPOSING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: \"GMO Prohibition Act of 2000.\" The bill prohibits the entry, sale, processing, field testing and release of products containing or derived from genetically modified organisms (GMOs) for five years. It directs the National Committee on Biosafety of the Philippines to establish a procedure for granting permits and monitoring the effects of GMOs on human health and the environment.

name: HBN-01768
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNCIPALITY OF LIANGA, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR, TO BE KNOWN AS THE LIANGA NATIONAL COMPREHENSIVE HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01769
congress_website_title: AN ACT BANNING CHAIN DISTRIBUTION PLANS OR PYRAMID SALES SCHEMES AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVENTY-THREE HUNDRED AND NINETY-FOUR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Pyramid Sales Ban Act.\" The bill proposes to increase the fine for engaging in chain distribution plans or pyramid sales schemes from not more than P10,000 to not more than P1 million.

name: HBN-01770
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 450 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to exempt the capital town of a province from the income requirement in the event of conversion into a component city. However, the capital town shall be required to comply with the land area requirement.

name: HBN-01771
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR GREATER FISCAL AUTONOMY IN FAVOR OF LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS (LGUs) IN THE CHOICE OF DEPOSITORY BANKS, AMENDING SECTION 311 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill allows local government units, with the concurrence of the sanggunian, to choose the depository bank for their current operating expenditures including personal services. However, they are enjoined to maintain their special funds and capital outlays in government-owned banks.

name: HBN-01772
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BRANCH OF SURIGAO DEL SUR INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY IN BARANGAY PARANG, MUNICIPALITY OF CANTILAN, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS PARANG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01773
title: GOVERNMENT AMBULANCE REGULATION
long_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE USE OF GOVERNMENT AMBULANCES, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE USE OF GOVERNMENT AMBULANCES, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits the use of government ambulances for: a) office service vehicle, for recreation or for personal use; b) to transport patients not in emergency situtation; and c) for private use for a fee or without.

name: HBN-01774
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 4 OF THE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7161, FURTHER AMENDING SECTION 71 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 705, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE REVISED FORESTRY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The Revised Forestry Code of the Philippines strictly prohibits the cutting of mangrove species. The bill proposes to allow the cutting of mangrove species only in cases where such would spur economic activities in the area like the construction of a seaport.

name: HBN-01775
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BURAUEN DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE INTO AN EXTENSION OF THE EASTERN VISAYAS REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER, FURTHER INCREASING ITS BED CAPACITY TO THREE HUNDRED (300) BED HOSPITAL UNDER THE CONTROL AND SUPERVISION OF THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT, TO BE KNOWN AS THE BURAUEN MEDICAL CENTER, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01776
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE CARIGARA DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE INTO AN EXTENSION OF THE EASTERN VISAYAS REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER, FURTHER INCREASING ITS BED CAPACITY TO TWO HUNDRED (200) BED HOSPITAL UNDER THE CONTROL AND SUPERVISION OF THE NATIONAL GOVERNMENT, TO BE KNOWN AS THE CARIGARA GENERAL HOSPITAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01777
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE 20TH DAY OF AUGUST OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DULAG, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO BE KNOWN AS MUNICIPAL FOUNDATION DAY

name: HBN-01778
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BRANCH OF SURIGAO DEL SUR POLYTECHNIC STATE COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYABAS, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE SOLOMON P. LOZADA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01779
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BRANCH OF SURIGAO DEL SUR INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY IN BARANGAY PANIKIAN, MUNICIPALITY OF CARRASCAL, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE PANIKIAN NATIONAL HIGH SHCOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01780
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BRANCH OF SURIGAO DEL SUR POLYTECHNIC STATE COLLEGE-TARVIA GAMUT CAMPUS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TAGO, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR, INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE GAMUT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01781
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SURIGAO DEL SUR POLYTECHNIC STATE COLLEGE (SSPSC)LIANGA CAMPUS IN BARANGAY STO. NIÑO, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN AGUSTIN, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE STO. NIÑO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01782
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CANTILAN, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR, TO BE KNOWN AS THE CANTILAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01783
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE FELISBERTO VERANO HIGH SCHOOL - TIGAO ANNEX IN BARANGAY TIGAO, MUNICIPALITY OF CORTES, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR FROM THE FELISBERTO VERANO HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING THE SAME INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE TIGAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01784
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BRANCH OF SURIGAO DEL SUR POLYTECHNIC STATE COLLEGE IN TARVIA, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN MIGUEL, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE SAN MIGUEL NATIONAL COMPREHENSIVE HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01785
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY QUEZON, MUNICIPALITY OF TANDAG, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR, TO BE KNOWN AS THE VICENTE L. PIMENTEL, SR. NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01786
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE JACINTO P. ELPA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - BOLHOON ANNEX IN BARANGAY BOLHOON, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN MIGUEL, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR FROM THE JACINTO P. ELPA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING THE SAME INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE BOLHOON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01787
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE CARMEN NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL HIGH SCHOOL - ESPERANZA ANNEX IN BARANGAY ESPERANZA, MUNICIPALITY OF CARMEN, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR, FROM THE CARMEN NATIONAL AGRICULTURAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING THE SAME INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE ESPERANZA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01788
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SURIGAO DEL SUR INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY - LANUZA CAMPUS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LANUZA, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR, INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE FLORITA HERRERA IRIZARI NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01789
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE MINIMUM SALARY GRADE LEVEL OF PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS IN ELEMENTARY AND SECONDARY LEVELS FROM SALARY GRADE 10 TO SALARY GRADE 18 AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to upgrade the salary of public elementary and high school teachers from salary grade 10 to salary grade 18 to compensate them commensurately to their qualifications and to the role they play in educating our youth.

name: HBN-01790
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE ALLOWANCES/HONORARIA OF AND GRANTING RETIREMENT BENEFITS TO ALL BARANGAY OFFICIALS AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to increase the monthly allowance/honorarium of the punong barangay from P1,000 to P6,000 and for the sangguniang barangay members, barangay treasurer and barangay secretary from P600 to P3,000. It also grants retirement benefits to barangay officials who have rendered nine years of cumulative service.

name: HBN-01791
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING THE UNLAWFUL IMPORTATION, POSSESSION AND SALE OF CHEMICALS USED AS INGREDIENTS IN THE MANUFACTURE OF EXPLOSIVES
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits the importation, sale or possession of chlorates, nitrates, and nitric acids without the appropriate permit. It requires the keeping of a permanent record of all transactions involving the above chemicals and to keep such record open for inspection by the proper authorities at all times.

name: HBN-01792
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING MEDICAL NEUTRALITY BY REPEALING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 169 AS AMENDED BY EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 212, WHICH REQUIRES ANY ATTENDING PHYSICIAN OF ANY HOSPITAL, MEDICAL CLINIC, SANITARIUM OR OTHER MEDICAL ESTABLISHMENTS OR ANY MEDICAL PRACTITIONER WHO HAS TREATED ANY PERSON FOR SERIOUS OR LESS SERIOUS PHYSICAL INJURIES TO REPORT THE FACT OF TREATMENT
congress_website_abstract: To uphold the confidentiality of the patient-doctor relationship, the bill seeks to repeal the decree that requires doctors to report their treatment for physical injuries to the nearest government health authority.

name: HBN-01793
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING HIGHER AND SIMULTANEOUS PENALTIES OF PRISON TERM AND FINE FOR VIOLATIONS OF GAMBLING LAWS WHENEVER THE OFFENDER IS THE MAINTAINER, CONDUCTOR, BANKER OR GAMBLING LORD, AND ADDITIONAL PENALTY IF THE OFFENDER IS A POLICE OR MILITARY OFFICER OR PERSONNEL OR A LOCAL GOVERNMENT OFFICIAL AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 1 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1602
congress_website_abstract: The bill increases the penalties for illegal gambling to prision mayor in its minimum term AND a fine of P100,000. If the culprit is a government official or a uniformed personnel, the penalty shall be prision mayor in its maximum term and a fine of P200,000.

name: HBN-01794
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SURIGAO DEL SUR POLYTECHNIC STATE COLLEGE (SSPSC) IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TANDAG, INCLUDING ITS DULY INTEGRATED CAMPUSES NAMELY: SSPSC-TAGBINA CAMPUS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TAGBINA, SSPSC-LIANGA CAMPUS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LIANGA, SSPSC-CAGWAIT CAMPUS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN MIGUEL AND SSPSC-CANTILAN CAMPUS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CANTILAN, ALL LOCATED IN THE PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR, INTO A STATE UNIVERSITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE SURIGAO DEL SUR STATE UNIVERSITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01605
title: GOVERNOR JOAQUIN L. ORTEGA AVENUE (SAN FERNANDO, LA UNION)
long_title: AN ACT RENAMING PENNSYLVANIA AVENUE IN THE CITY OF SAN FERNANDO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION AS GOVERNOR JOAQUIN L. ORTEGA AVENUE
congress_website_title: AN ACT RENAMING PENNSYLVANIA AVENUE IN THE CITY OF SAN FERNANDO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION, GOVERNOR JOAQUIN L. ORTEGA AVENUE
subjects: ['Roads, Renaming (Pennsylvania Avenue, La Union)', 'Governor Joaquin L. Ortega Avenue (San Fernando, La Union)']

name: HBN-01606
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING POLICIES GOVERNING THE HOUSEHOLD EMPLOYMENT INDUSTRY, ESTABLISHING A STANDARD OF PROTECTION AND PROMOTING THE WELFARE OF HOUSEHOLD HELPERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for Household Helpers\" or \"Batas Kasambahay\". To ensure the protection and well-being of both the employer and the household helper, the bill provides for the terms and conditions of employment of the kasambahay, i.e. minimum wage requirement, payment of 13 month pay, membership to the Social Security System and the Philhealth, working hours and days, and vacation leaves and other benefits.

name: HBN-01607
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SECONDARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY PADADA, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL SUR TO BE KNOWN AS PADADA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01608
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING SIBULAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF STA. CRUZ, DAVAO DEL SUR AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01609
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING ALL MOBILE AND LANDLINE TELEPHONE COMPANIES OPERATING IN THE PHILIPPINES TO REGISTER UNDER THE DEPARTMENT OF TRADE AND INDUSTRY (DTI) AND THE BUREAU OF INTERNAL REVENUE (BIR) ALL MANUFACTURED OR IMPORTED PREPAID CARDS PRIOR TO THEIR DISTRIBUTION AND/OR SALE AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: At present, the sale of prepaid cards for cellular and landline telephones are not subjected to any taxes. The bill requires all telephone companies to register with the Department of Trade and Industry and the Bureau of Internal Revenue all prepaid cards prior to sale to enable the BIR to collect the correct taxes.

name: HBN-01610
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MAGNA CARTA FOR SOCIAL WORKERS AND SOCIAL WELFARE AND DEVELOPMENT WORKERS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for Social Workers and Social Welfare and Development Workers.\" The bill provides for their compensation and benefits, the payment of overtime, defines their rights and prohibits their reassignment without justification.

name: HBN-01611
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROHIBIT ELECTED AND APPOINTED PUBLIC OFFICIALS AND EMPLOYEES, INCLUDING THOSE OFFICIALS OF GOVERNMENT-OWNED AND CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS (GOCCS) AND THEIR SPOUSES FROM ENTERING, PLAYING AND PATRONIZING CASINOS AND OTHER SIMILAR ESTABLISHMENTS, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Decency in Public Service Act of 2004.\" To foster high ethical standards and morality in the service, the bill bans all public officials and employees from entering, playing and patronizing casinos operated by the Philippine Amusement and Gaming Corporation and by private entities. The prohibition also extends to the spouses of public officials and employees since they are viewed as the alter ego or extension of public servants.

name: HBN-01612
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO RATIONALIZE THE COMPOSITION AND FUNCTIONS OF THE NATIONAL LABOR RELATIONS COMMISSION, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE ARTICLES 213, 214, 215, AND 216 OF P.D. 442, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to increase the members of the National Labor Relations Commission from fourteen to twenty three members with eight members each coming from the nominees of the workers and employers organizations. Likewise, the existing five divisions of the Commission shall be increased to eight.

name: HBN-01613
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE MANDATORY SUBMISSION OF THE ANNUAL BUDGETS OF GOVERNMENT-OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS TO THE CONGRESS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for all government-owned and controlled corporations (GOCCs) to submit their respective annual budgets to the Congress for approval within thirty days from the opening of every regular session. It further stipulates that GOCCs shall not incur any obligation or make any payment for current operating or capital expenditures without a budget approval by Congress and the President.

name: HBN-01614
congress_website_title: AN ACT FOR THE PRESERVATION OF PHILIPPINE ANTIQUITIES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Antiquities Act of 2004.\" The country's artistic and historic wealth constitute our cultural treasure. The bill seeks to protect and regulate the disposition of such cultural treasure. It grants the National Museum jurisdiction over ruins, archaeological sites, historic and prehistoric monuments and structures, and objects of antiquity.

name: HBN-01615
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROHIBIT ANY MEMBER OF THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE (PNP) FROM DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY ARRANGING, INITIATING OR INSTIGATING ANY FINANCIAL SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE VICTIM AND THE ACCUSED IN CASES INVOLVING SEXUAL ABUSES/OFFENSES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6975, ENTITLED \"AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE UNDER A REORGANIZED DEPARTMENT OF THE INTERIOR AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\", AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill defines the responsibilities and authority of the Philippine National Police in regard to the apprehension of offenders of sexual abuse or crimes. It prohibits any police personnel to directly or indirectly arrange, initiate or cause any out-of-court financial settlement between the victim and the perpetrator in cases involving sexual abuses/offenses.

name: HBN-01616
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE THE PROTECTION AND CONSERVATION OF THE NATIONAL HERITAGE, THE CREATION OF A NATIONAL HERITAGE COMMISSION, AND PROVIDING PENALTIES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Heritage Act of 2004.\" The bill proposes the creation of the National Heritage Commission which shall be charged with the following functions, among others: a) to establish policies for the identification, recording and management of heritage resources; b) to promulgate rules and regulations pertaining to conservation; and c) to administer funding of conservation projects.

name: HBN-01617
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A CEILING ON ALL PUBLIC DEBTS OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Public Debt Ceiling Act of 2004.\" In view of the ballooning public debt of the national government and in order not to hamper the delivery of basic social services, the bill proposes to impose a ceiling on the total public debt in the amount of PhP1.2 trillion.

name: HBN-01618
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO IMPOSE STIFFER PENALTIES ON GOVERNMENT PERSONNEL AND OFFICIALS STATIONED AT VARIOUS EMBASSIES AND CONSULAR OFFICES ABROAD FOR GROSS NEGLIGENCE TO ACT ON COMPLAINTS OF, OR TO GIVE ASSISTANCE OR RENDER SERVICE ESPECIALLY TO DISTRESSED MIGRANT FILIPINOS AND OFWS, THEIR FAMILIES AND DEPENDENTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8042, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"MIGRANT WORKERS AND OVERSEAS FILIPINOS ACT OF 1995\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to penalize negligent embassy and consular personnel with suspension from office for not less than ninety days without pay or dismissal from the service with forfeiture of retirement and other benefits and disqualification from public office.

name: HBN-01619
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INSTITUTIONALIZE A COMPULSORY ON-THE-JOB TRAINING (OJT) AS PART OF THE CURRICULAR PROGRAMS REQUISITE PRIOR TO GRADUATION
congress_website_abstract: \"OJT Act of 2004,\" The bill seeks to institutionalize the OJT program to supplement the academic training of our students in order to arm them with actual work experience in the industry where they intend to belong to.

name: HBN-01620
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INSTITUTE A PROGRAM FOR THE CONTINUING EDUCATION OF TERTIARY TEACHERS, AMENDING FOR SUCH PURPOSE R.A. NO. 7784, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT TO STRENGTHENING TEACHER EDUCATION IN THE PHILIPPINES BY ESTABLISHING CENTERS OF EXCELLENCE, CREATING A TEACHER EDUCATION COUNCIL FOR THE PURPOSE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to require private and public university and college teachers to under a training program in order to improve the quality of tertiary education in the country. The program shall focus on proper teaching methods and other areas of study where continuing education is necessary.

name: HBN-01621
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE STRICT LABELLING OF FOOD AND BEVERAGE PRODUCTS BY MANUFACTURING AND DISTRIBUTION COMPANIES
congress_website_abstract: \"Consumer Information and Protection Act of 2004.\" The measure requires all manufacturers and distributors of food and beverages in the country to provide the following information on the labels of their respective products: ingredient list, additives, genetic modification, minimum durability indication, net content, nutritional labeling, and information on country of origin, manufacturers, packers and local sole agent.

name: HBN-01622
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE TEACHING OF HUMAN RIGHTS AS MANDATORY IN ALL PUBLIC AND PRIVATE SCHOOLS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the Department of Education (DepEd) to include in the curricula of all private and public schools courses on human rights. The DepEd shall consult with the Commission on Human Rights on the writing, printing and publication of textbooks, manuals and other reading materials to be used in said courses.

name: HBN-01623
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE SHOWING OF TELEVISION ADVERTISEMENTS FEATURING SEX AND/OR VIOLENCE TO CHILDREN OF TENDER AGE
congress_website_abstract: \"Television Advertisement Regulation Act of 2001.\" The bill restricts the airing on television of movie advertisements or trailers depicting violence and/or sex only to such times when children of formative years are not usually watching television.

name: HBN-01624
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING AND PENALIZING CRIMES AGAINST INTERNATIONAL HUMANITARIAN LAW, ADOPTING CORRESPONDING PRINCIPLES OF CRIMINAL RESPONSIBILITY, OPERATIONALIZING UNIVERSAL JURISDICTION, DESIGNATING SPECIAL COURTS, AND FOR RELATED PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Statute on Crimes Against International Humanitarian Law.\" The country's existing criminal laws do not adopt the terms of reference of the International Humanitarian Law and International Criminal Law. The bill seeks to empower the special courts in the country to try cases involving grave crimes such as genocide, crimes against humanity, war crimes, grave breaches of specific United Nations Conventions and other crimes against international humanitarian law.

name: HBN-01625
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH CERTAIN LIMITATIONS ON ADVERTISING RELATING TO CIGARETTES AND TOBACCO PRODUCTS
congress_website_abstract: \"Tobacco Products Control Act.\" The bill seeks to impose certain restrictions in the advertisement of cigarettes and other tobacco products using billboards and periodicals in stadia and arenas, on trains, buses, train stations and terminals, in motion pictures, in video games and in family amusement centers.

name: HBN-01626
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE TRANSFER OF OFFENDERS TO OR FROM FOREIGN COUNTRIES
congress_website_abstract: \"Transfer of Prisoners Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to authorize the Secretary of Justice to receive custody of a Filipino offender or cause the transfer of an alien serving sentence in Philippine penitentiaries in accordance with prisoner transfer treaties. It provides for a procedure in securing the offender's consent to his transfer.

name: HBN-01627
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REQUIRE LIQUOR MANUFACTURER AND/OR DISTRIBUTOR TO PUT ALL LIQUOR BOTTLE A WARNING LABEL THAT ALCOHOL INTAKE DURING PREGNANCY IS HAZARDOUS TO THE LIFE AND HEALTH OF THE UNBORN CHILD
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires the printing on the label of all liquor bottles of a warning on the hazardous effect of alcohol intake on the life and health of the unborn. Penalties for violation shall range from PhP5,000.00 to PhP50,000.00.

name: HBN-01628
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR SCHOLARSHIPS AND OTHER BENEFITS FOR PUBLIC AND PRIVATE SCHOOL TEACHERS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the creation of a scholarship fund to cover the tuition and other regular school fees, including textbooks, of public and private school teachers who wish to enroll in graduate and post graduate courses within the country.

name: HBN-01629
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAM, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Public School Teachers' Scholarship Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to create a Public School Teachers Scholarship Fund to cover the tuition and other school fees, including textbooks, school supplies, transportation expenses and monthly living allowance, of public school teachers who wish to enroll in graduate and post-graduate courses.

name: HBN-01630
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING INCENTIVES TO PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS WHO ARE ASSIGNED OUTSIDE OF THEIR TOWNS AND PROVINCES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Public School Teachers Incentives Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to grant a P1,500.00 monthly incentive allowance to public school teachers assigned to a school located in another municipality other than the municipality of his residence and a P3,000.00 monthly allowance if assigned to another province other than the province of his residence.

name: HBN-01631
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO GRANT PUBLIC SHCOOL TEACHERS FREE OF CHARGE X-RAY AND OTHER FORMS OF LABORATORY EXAMINATIONS IN ANY GOVERNMENT AND PRIVATE HOSPITALS DURING THEIR REQUIRED ANNUAL PHYSICAL EXAMINATION AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Free Physical Examination for Public School Teachers Act of 2004.\" In order to relieve teachers of additional costs during the mandatory annual physical examination, the bill seeks to grant teachers free x-ray and other laboratory examinations in government and private hospitals.

name: HBN-01632
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO RESTRICT THE ACCESS OF YOUTH TO CIGARETTES AND OTHER TOBACCO PRODUCTS
congress_website_abstract: \"Control Youth Access to Tobacco Act of 2004. To protect the youth from the harmful effects of cigarette smoking, the bill limits the sale of tobacco products through vending machines to establishments where individuals below 18 years old (the proposed minimum age for the purchase of cigarettes) are not given access. It requires retail outlets selling cigarettes to prominently display a sign indicating the minimum age requirement.

name: HBN-01633
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REGULATE THE OPERATION OF ALL REVIEW CENTERS FOR BOARD AND OTHER FORMS OF LOCAL AND INTERNATIONAL PROFESSIONAL EXAMINATIONS NATIONWIDE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Review Centers Regulation Act of 2004.\" The bill mandates the Commission on Higher Education to establish a system of registration and accreditation of public and private review centers which offer review classes, seminars and programs to prepare for a professional board examination.

name: HBN-01634
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL COMMISSION ON MUSLIM FILIPINOS, DEFINING ITS POWERS, FUNCTIONS, AND RESPONSIBILITIES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"An Act Creating the National Commission on Muslim Filipinos.\" The bill prescribes the Commission's organizational structure, powers, functions and responsibilities. The Commission is envisioned to take over the functions of the Office of Muslim Affairs.

name: HBN-01635
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 26 OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 292, OHTERWISE KNOWN AS THE ADMINSTRATIVE CODE OF 1987
congress_website_abstract: To foster unity and political economic stability in the country, the bill proposes to include the Iglesia ni Kristo Foundation Day observed in July 27 of every year and the Last Day of Ramadan (movable date) among the regular non-working holidays in the country.

name: HBN-01636
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A PROVIDENT PERSONAL SAVINGS PLAN KNOWN AS THE PERSONAL EQUITY AND RETIREMENT ACCOUNT (PERA)
congress_website_abstract: same as HB00094

name: HBN-01637
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE PROMOTION OF BIO-ORGANIC FARMING IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to establish a comprehensive bio-organic farming program through the propagation of bio-organic cultivation and production methods. It also seeks the creation of a Bio-Organic Farming Commission that shall be tasked to implement the program.

name: HBN-01638
congress_website_title: THE MAGNA CARTA FOR PRIVATE SCHOOL TEACHERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for Private School Teachers.\" The bill seeks to give private school teachers the following: a) security of tenure, b) the right against discrimination, c) academic freedom, d) the right to self-organization, and e) benefits related to health and study leaves.

name: HBN-01639
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN AND REFORM THE SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN, AMENDING FOR THAT PURPOSE CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Sangguniang Kabataan Reform Law of 2004.\" The bill seeks to broaden the base of the katipunan ng kabataan by amending the maximum age of membership from 21 years old to 23 years old. It likewise proposes to amend the age requirement for sangguniang kabataan officials from \"at least fifteen (15) years but not over twenty one (21) years of age\" to \"AT LEAST EIGHTEEN (18) BUT NOT MORE THAN TWENTY THREE (23) YEARS OF AGE.\"

name: HBN-01640
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE DRINKING WATER BUSINESSES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Drinking Water Business Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to protect the health and welfare of the public by regulating the drinking water business to ensure that they comply with health standards.

name: HBN-01641
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SINAGGUYAN, MUNICIPALITY OF DON CARLOS, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON, TO BE KNOWN AS THE DON CARLOS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01642
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY KITUBO, MUNICIPALITY OF KITAOTAO, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON, TO BE KNOWN AS THE KITUBO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01643
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH A SOCIALIZED AND LOW-COST HOUSING LOAN RESTRUCTURING PROGRAM, PROVIDING THE MECHANISMS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: same as HB00241

name: HBN-01644
congress_website_title: AN ACT BANNING THE USE OF CELLULAR PHONES IN AIRPLANES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Cellular Phone Ban in Airplanes Act of 2004,\" The use of cellular phones while on board an airplane is dangerous since they emit electro-magnetic frequencies which interfere, alter or jam computer programmed precision instruments. For the safety of passengers, the bill declares as unlawful for any person to use cellular phones upon boarding an airplane within the Philippine territory and during the entire flight.

name: HBN-01645
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A CENTER FOR TEACHER'S EXCELLENCE ALL THROUGHOUT THE COUNTRY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the Department of Education, in coordination with the Commission Higher Education, to establish, operate and maintain a Center for Teachers' Excellence that shall be charged to develop and maintain a continuing program to upgrade the skills of teachers.

name: HBN-01646
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE POCTOY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TORRIJOS, PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01647
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MASAGUISI, MUNICIPALITY OF STA. CRUZ, PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE TO BE KNOWN AS THE MASAGUISI NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01648
title: CABUYO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL (MARINDUQUE)
long_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CABUYO, MUNICIPALITY OF TORRIJOS, PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE TO BE KNOWN AS THE CABUYO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CABUYO, MUNCIPALITY OF TORRIJOS, PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE TO BE KNOWN AS THE CABUYO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01588
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING FEBRUARY FOUR OF EVERY YEAR AS \"ARAW NG PAGDAKILA SA MGA PILIPINONG NAGBUWIS NG BUHAY NOONG DIGMAANG PILIPINO-AMERIKANO\", PROVIDING FOR SUPPORT PROGRAMS, AND REQUIRING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill declares February 4th of every year as a regular national holiday in commemoration of the \"Araw ng Pagdakila sa mga Pilipinong Nagbuwis ng Buhay Noong Digmaang Pilipino-Amerikano.\"

name: HBN-01589
congress_website_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CIRCUMFERENTIAL ROAD 5 (C-5) TO ISABELO DELOS REYES HIGHWAY

name: HBN-01590
congress_website_title: AN ACT SUBJECTING THE PHILIPPINE CHARITY SWEEPSTAKES OFFICE (PCSO) AND THE PHILIPPINE AMUSEMENT AND GAMING CORPORATION (PAGCOR) TO THE CORPORATE INCOME TAX, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 27(C) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OR 1997, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to eliminate the exemption of the Philippine Charity Sweesptakes Office and the Philippine Gaming Corporation from corporate income taxes.

name: HBN-01591
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE RATES OF EXCISE TAX ON ALCOHOL AND TOBACCO PRODUCTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 141, 142, 143, 144 AND 145 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to increase the excise tax rates imposed on alcohol and tobacco products by 18% over and above the mandated 12% increase provided under RA 8240. Likewise, the measure proposes another 15% increase in excise tax rates three years after the effectivity of the law.

name: HBN-01592
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THAT ALL EXPENDITURES FOR THE PAYMENT OF FOREIGN DEBTS BE INCLUDED IN THE ANNUAL GENERAL APPROPRIATIONS ACT
congress_website_abstract: The bill allows Congress to review, assess and approve all budget items proposed by the Executive branch including the payment of foreign loans. The approval of the measure will put to an end to the vicious cycle of borrowing just to pay existing/maturing debts.

name: HBN-01593
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MUSLIM FILIPINO CEMETERY IN METRO MANILA, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01594
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING RELIGIOUS OR RACIAL PROFILING AGAINST FILIPINO MINORITIES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Religious and Racial Profiling Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to penalize discriminatory acts by reason of color, creed, religion, and racial and ethnic background.

name: HBN-01595
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A TWO-LEVEL NATIONAL POLICE, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE SECTION TWENTY-FIVE (25) OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTY-NINE HUNDRED AND SEVENTY-FIVE (R.A. 6975), OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE UNDER A REORGANIZED DEPARTMENT OF THE INTERIOR AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to endow the Philippine National Police (PNP) with a dual character, i.e., it calls upon the PNP to perform nation-wide police operations and local police functions.

name: HBN-01596
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THAT AT LEAST TEN PERCENT (10%) OF GOVERNMENT-OWNED LANDS TO BE SOLD, ALIENATED OR OTHERWISE ENCUMBERED FOR DEVELOPMENT PURPOSES, BE SEGREGATED FOR SOCIALIZED HOUSING PROJECTS
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires the setting aside for socialized housing projects for the underprivileged at least 10% of the government-owned lands that are to be disposed of for purposes of developing \"growth centers.\"

name: HBN-01597
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR GOVERNMENT REGULATION AND SELF-REGULATION WITHIN THE COOPERATIVE SECTOR OF COOPERATIVES ENGAGED IN FINANCIAL SERVICES, AND DEFINING THE RESPONSIBILITIES, POWERS AND FUNCTIONS OF COOPERATIVES AND COOPERATIVE FEDERATIONS ENGAGED IN SAVINGS, CREDIT AND OTHER FINANCIAL SERVICES, AMENDING THEREFOR REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 6938, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE COOPERATIVE CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AND REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 6939, CREATING THE COOPERATIVE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY
congress_website_abstract: \"Financial Service Cooperative Act.\" The bill provides for the organization, registration, responsibilities, powers and functions of savings and credit cooperatives and financial service cooperatives and federations.

name: HBN-01598
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8436 ENTITLED \"AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE COMMISSION OF ELECTIONS TO USE AN AUTOMATED ELECTION SYSTEM IN THE MAY 11, 1998 NATIONAL OR LOCAL ELECTIONS AND IN SUBSEQUENT NATIONAL AND LOCAL ELECTORAL EXERCISES, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to delete the requirement for an optical mark reader counting machine provided under RA 8436. It also allows the storage of election data in compact disc drives and compact discs. Finally, it authorizes the Commission on Elections to acquire the necessary materials for elections by \"purchase, lease or otherwise.\"

name: HBN-01599
congress_website_title: AN ACT HARMONIZING AND RATIONALIZING THE ADMINISTRATION AND GRANT OF FISCAL AND NONFISCAL INCENTIVES, REPEALING FOR THIS PURPOSE EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 226, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE OMNIBUS INVESTMENTS CODE OF 1987
congress_website_abstract: \"The Investments and Incentives Code of the Philippines.\" The bill seeks to harmonize and simplify the grant of fiscal and non-fiscal incentives to promote foreign and domestic investments in the country. The incentives being proposed, among others, are: income tax holiday, net operating loss carry over, 5% tax based on gross income, accelerated depreciation, capital equipment incentives and deferred imposition of the minimum corporate income tax.

name: HBN-01600
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL REVENUE AUTHORITY, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Revenue Authority Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to restructure the Bureau of Internal Revenue into a semi-autonomous revenue authority with corporate-like features. It provides for capitalization, powers, functions and organizational structure of the Authority.

name: HBN-01601
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REGULATE THE PRICES OF MATRICULATION, TUITION AND OTHER SCHOOL FEES IN ALL PUBLIC AND PRIVATE SCHOOLS NATIONWIDE, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE A SCHOOL FEE BOARD IN ALL SCHOOL LEVELS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"School Fees Regulation Act of 2004.\" The bill proposes the creation of the School Fee Board in all levels in public and private schools to monitor, study, evaluate and regulate matriculation, tuition and other school fees.

name: HBN-01602
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE JOLO FISHERIES TECHNICAL COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JOLO, PROVINCE OF SULU AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01603
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE 2ND PANGASINAN ENGINEERING DISTRICT SUB-OFFICE, DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS AND HIGHWAYS LOCATED IN THE THIRD CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT OF THE PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN INTO A REGULAR ENGINEERING DISTRICT TO BE KNOWN AS THE FOURTH PANGASINAN ENGINEERING DISTRICT OFFICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01604
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE CHURCH AND THE VICINITY WHERE THE ICON OF SENOR DIVINO TESORO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CALASIAO, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, AS A TOURIST ONE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01565
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF THE OVERSEAS FILIPINO BANK AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"An Act Establishing the Overseas Filipino Bank.\" The proposed Bank shall address the banking, economic, financial and related needs of overseas Filipino workers.

name: HBN-01566
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE AUTOMATIC SUCCESSION OF THE ASSOCIATE APPELLATE JUSTICE WHO IS FIRST IN PRECEDENCE TO POSITION OF PRESIDING APPELLATE JUSTICE OF THE COURT OF APPEALS IN CASE 0F VACANCY AND THE REMOVAL BY IMPEACHMENT OF THE MEMBERS THEREOF, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT
congress_website_abstract: The bill stipulates the appointment of the next-in-rank Associate Justice to the position of the Presiding Appellate Justice of the Court of Appeals (CA) in case of vacancy. It also provides for the removal from office of the members of the CA through impeachment.

name: HBN-01567
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 31 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6770, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE OMBUDSMAN ACT OF 1989\"' AS AMENDED, ALLOWING LAWYERS TO ACT AS SPECIAL INVESTIGATOR OR PROSECUTOR ON BEHALF OF THE OMBUDSMAN
congress_website_abstract: The bill allows the Ombudsman to seek the assistance of private lawyers in handling cases against misfits in public office.

name: HBN-01568
congress_website_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ORAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ORAS, PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR, INTO FEDERICO O. MENGOTE NATIONAL MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL

name: HBN-01569
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MATARINAO SCHOOL OF FISHERIES IN BARANGAY MATARINAO, MUNICIPALITY OF SALCEDO, PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR, INTO A FISHERY AND AGRICULTURAL INSTITUTE TO BE KNOWN AS THE MATARINAO SCHOOL OF FISHERY AND AGRICULTURE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01570
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING SQUATTING SYNDICATE, PROFESSIONAL SQUATTING, AND LARGE-SCALE LAND GRABBING AS HEINOUS CRIMES AND PROVIDING THE IMPOSITION OF THE DEATH PENALTY THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to declare the following as heinous crimes: a) participation in squatting syndicates; b) professional squatting; c) large-scale land grabbing; and d) the manufacture of fake titles and other related documents.

name: HBN-01571
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE WITNESS PROTECTION, SECURITY AND BENEFIT PROGRAM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6981, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"WITNESS PROTECTION, SECURITY AND BENEFIT ACT\" AND PROVIDING ADDITIONAL FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides, among others, the following: a) the establishment of an organic security for the Witness Protection, Security and Benefits Program; b) the imposition on the witness of a separate criminal liability for violation of the Memorandum of Agreement; and c) limits the extension of rights and benefits to relatives within the first degree of consanguinity.

name: HBN-01572
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 12 AND 13 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7662 ENTITLED \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR REFORMS IN LEGAL EDUCATION, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE A LEGAL EDUCATION BOARD, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to amend the objectionable provisions in RA 7662 that have derailed the full enforcement of the law.

name: HBN-01573
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE FAKING OF FABRICATING, KNOWINGLY NEGOTIATING, TRANSACTING, CONVEYING OR MORTGAGING OF FAKE OR FABRICATED TORRENS CERTIFICATE OF TITLE A SPECIAL CRIME AND IMPOSING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the imposition of the penalty of reclusion temporal and a fine ranging from PhP100,000 to PhP150,000 on individuals found guilty of faking or fabricating Torrens Certificates of Title or of using, knowingly, fake and spurious documents.

name: HBN-01574
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PUBLIC ATTORNEY'S OFFICE (PAO) AS AN INDEPENDENT AND AUTONOMOUS OFFICE, AMENDING THE PURPOSE CERTAIN SECTIONS OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 292 ENTITLED, \"ADMINISTRATIVE CODE OF 1987\"' AND FOR OTHER PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the powers, functions and organizational structure of the Public Attorney's Office, which shall be an autonomous office attached to the Department of Justice.

name: HBN-01575
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING THE MANNER OF REMOVAL OF THE PRESIDING JUSTICE AND ASSOCIATE JUSTICES OF THE SANDIGANBAYAN, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1606, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the Presiding Justice and the Associate Justices to be removed from office in any manner provided for in Section 11 of Article VIII of the 1987 Constitution.

name: HBN-01576
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING MARCH 16 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL DAY IN THE NATIONAL CALENDAR TO COMMEMORATE THE DISCOVERY OF THE PHILIPPINE ARCHIPELAGO BY FERDINAND MAGELLAN AND A SPECIAL NONWORKING DAY IN THE EASTERN VISAYAS REGION
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to declare March 16th of every year as a special day in the national calendar and a non-working holiday in Eastern Visayas.

name: HBN-01577
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING SECTION 13 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3019, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ANTI-GRAFT AND CORRUPT PRACTICES ACT
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to rationalize the manner in which a public officer can be preventively suspended in office while a valid information is pending against him without, however, prejudicing the interest of the State and the general public.

name: HBN-01578
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREE PORT IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF GUIUAN, MERCEDES AND SALCEDO, INCLUDING THE ISLANDS OF HOMONHON, MANICANI, SULUAN AND CALICOAN, PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01579
congress_website_title: AN ACT MAKING THE APPOINTMENT OF THE ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES OFFICER MANDATORY IN THE PROVINCIAL, CITY AND MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 443, 454, 463 AND 484 OF REPUBLIC ACT 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The Environment and Natural Resources Officer shall be tasked to ensure the protection of the environment and the preservation and enhancement of our natural resources.

name: HBN-01580
congress_website_title: AN ACT RECLASSIFYING A PORTION OF TIMBERLAND LOCATED IN BARANGAYS FACTORIA, SAUGAN, DALID, BAGACAY, DAO, JAPAY, BANTAYAN, MABUHAY, BURAK, TAWAGAN (POB.), BINALAYAN, BATO, KALAW, TRINIDAD (MAYCOROT), AGSAM AND NAGA-NAGA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ORAS, PROVINCE OF EASTERN SAMAR AS AGRICULTURAL LAND OPEN TO DISPOSITION

name: HBN-01581
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE GOVERNMENT OR ANY OF ITS INSTRUMENTALITY, INCLUDING GOVERNMENT-OWNED OR CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS, FROM INTRODUCING OR CONSTRUCTING ANY KIND OF IMPROVEMENT ON PROPERTIES CONDITIONALLY COVEYED BY PRIVATE PERSONS AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill defines \"conditionally conveyed properties\" as any property, real or personal, that a private person, natural or juridical, transfers to the government or any of its instrumentalities by way of donation, trust, assignment, usufruct, and other gratuitious mode of transferring ownership that imposes any condition where violation thereof shall result to the reversion of ownership or title to the private person.

name: HBN-01582
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE PRACTICE OF MINING ENGINEERING IN THE PHILIPPINES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO.4274
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Mining Engineering Act of 2003.\" The bill seeks to amend and update the Mining Engineering Law, which was enacted in 1965, to make it more realistic, relevant and practicable to current professional practice of mine engineers. It also embodies provisions to reduce or eliminate illegal mining practices in mines and quarries.

name: HBN-01583
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO FURTHER PROMOTE THE DEVELOPMENT, UTILIZATION AND COMMERCIALIZATION OF RENEWABLE ENERGY SOURCES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Renewable Energy Act of 2003.\" The bill provides the framework for the exploration, development and utilization of the country's renewable energy sources, encourage their commercial applications and promote their efficient use.

name: HBN-01584
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING REFORMS IN LAND ADMINISTRATION
congress_website_abstract: \"The Land Administration Reform Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the creation of the Land Administration Authority to administer and manage public lands. It calls for the establishment of the Land Adjudication Board to settle land disputes.

name: HBN-01585
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DECLARATION OF THE TOLEDO-ULING-NAGA RAOD IN TOLEDO CITY, CEBU AS A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01586
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONVERSION OF THE PINAMUNGAJAN-LAMAC-BUNGA PROVINCIAL ROAD, PROVINCE OF CEBU, INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01587
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN THE UNIVERSITY OF THE PHILIPPINES AS THE NATIONAL UNIVERSITY
congress_website_abstract: \"The University of the Philippines Charter of 2004\". The bill prescribes the purpose of the University, the composition and powers of the Board of Regents, and the powers of the University Council.

name: HBN-01544
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE FIELD OF LAND TITLE INSURANCE AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 612, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE INSURANCE CODE OF 1978, AS AMENDED BY PRESIDENTIAL DECREES NOS. 1455 AND 1460 AND BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 874
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to create a land title insurance system that would protect owners of real estate against title defects, forgery, falsification, double titling and other similar acts.

name: HBN-01545
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE CEREALS RESEARCH, DEVELOPMENT AND EXTENSION INSTITUTE (PHILCEREAL), AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"The Philippine Research, Development and Extension Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to establish the Philcereal that shall develop and implement, in coordination with the University of the Philippines in Los Baños, a national research, development and extension program for rice, corn, wheat, sorghum, millet and other cereals.

name: HBN-01546
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE LIABILITIES OF INDIRECT EMPLOYERS IN JOB CONTRACTING, COVERING OTHER BENEFITS DUE THEIR EMPLOYEES, FOR THIS PURPOSE AMENDING ARTICLE 106 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE 442, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the indirect employers to ensure the payment of all benefits due employees hired through job contractors. It provides that if the employees can not get their benefits from their agencies, they can turn to the company for relief.

name: HBN-01547
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A PRIVATE-HOSPITAL DEVELOPMENT PLAN AND PROVIDING ASSISTANCE TO PRIVATE HOSPITALS BY GRANTING THEM INCENTIVES
congress_website_abstract: \"Private Hospital Assistance Act of 2004.\" The bill proposes a Private Hospital Development Plan that shall monitor the needs of private hospitals in terms of facilities, equipment and personnel. It proposes the grant of tax incentives to accredited private hospitals and the creation of a Special Hospital Fund which shall be sourced from the real property taxes paid by private hospitals.

name: HBN-01548
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE SOLICITATION OF CONTRIBUTIONS FROM, OR SALE OF TICKETS TO, ANY GOVERNMENT OFFICIAL, OR EMPLOYEE BY ANY PUBLIC OFFICIAL, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3019, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ANTI-GRAFT AND CORRUPT PRACTICES ACT
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits public officials and their relatives from soliciting contributions from or selling tickets to government employees receiving a salary of less than P15,000 a month.

name: HBN-01549
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING PENSIONS UNDER THE SOCIAL SECURITY SYSTEM AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 12 OF THE SOCIAL SECURITY ACT OF 1997
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to increase the minimum monthly pension of SSS members to P3,000 and to annually increase the same by P500 until the minimum monthly pension reaches P5,000.

name: HBN-01550
congress_website_title: AN ACT TOTALLY BANNING LOGGING OPERATIONS FOR THE NEXT TWENTY-FIVE YEARS
congress_website_abstract: To save our remaining forests, the bill seeks to impose a total log ban on forests, timber lands, forest reserves or watersheds within the next 25 years.

name: HBN-01551
title: BINALBAGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL
long_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE PAGLAUM NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY PAGLAUM, MUNICIPALITY OF BINALBAGAN, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL TO THE BINALBAGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL
congress_website_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PAGLAUM NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY PAGLAUM, MUNICIPALITY OF BINALBAGAN, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, TO THE BINALBAGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL
subjects: ['Schools, Conversion (Negros Occidental)', 'Binalbagan National High School (Negros Occidental)']

name: HBN-01552
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE LA CASTELLANA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LA CASTELLANA, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL INTO A COLLEGE TO BE KNOWN AS LA CASTELLANA AGRO-INDUSTRIAL COLLEGE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01553
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BENEFITS OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 39 OF REPUBLIC ACT 7160 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, CREATING A NATIONAL AUGMENTATION FUND, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to increase the monthly honoraria or allwances granted to barangay officials from a minimum of P1,000 to P2,000 for the punong barangay; P1,800 for sangguniang barangay members and P1,500 for the barangay treasurer, secretary and tanods.

name: HBN-01554
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING INCENTIVES AND BENEFITS TO RURAL HEALTH UNIT DOCTORS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Rural Health Unit Doctors Benefits and Incentives Act of 2004.\" In addition to incentives and benefits granted under existing laws, the bill seeks to grant rural health doctors the following: a) hazard allowance; b) subsistence allowance; c) scholarship up to the third legitimate child; d) income tax exemption; e) automatic promotion to the next higher position; f) free legal representation; and g) zero interest on policy, salary and housing loans from the GSIS.

name: HBN-01555
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE RIGHT OF THE PEOPLE TO FREE EXPRESSION, PEACEABLY ASSEMBLE AND PETITION THE GOVERNMENT FOR REDRESS OF GRIEVANCES, REPEALING BATAS PAMBANSA BILANG 880 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Freedom of Expression Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the following: a) no permit requirement for the holding of a public assembly; b) non-interference from law enforcement authorities during public assemblies; c) extension of police assistance when requested; d) no dispersal of public assembly; and e) immunity from arrest and taxation.

name: HBN-01556
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING AND PENALIZING THE CRIME OF ENFORCED OR INVOLUNTARY DISAPPEARANCE
congress_website_abstract: \"An Act Defining and Penalizing the Crime of Enforced or Involuntary Disappearance.\" The bill grants the victim of an enforced or involuntary disappearance the right to inform his family, lawyer or human rights organization of his whereabouts and condition. It also provides for penalties for the commission of enforced disappearance and for compensation and rehabilitation for the victims and their families.

name: HBN-01557
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MANDATORY NATIONWIDE CHILD NUTRITION PROGRAM IN ALL PUBLIC ELEMENTARY SCHOOLS AND BARANGAY DAY CARE CENTERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Child Nutrition Law of 2004.\" The bill mandates the feeding of children enrolled in all public elementary schools and barangay day care centers in keeping with the State's policy of promoting and protecting the welfare of children.

name: HBN-01558
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 141, 142, 143 AND 145 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to restructure the tax on cigars and on distilled spirits, wines and fermented liquor by shifting to the ad valorem tax scheme.

name: HBN-01559
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SEC. 3 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8794 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes a 100% adjustment in the motor vehicle user's charge staggered over four years.

name: HBN-01560
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REIMPOSITION OF THE FRANCHISE TAX ON TELEPHONE AND TELEGRAPH COMPANIES, AND RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING COMPANIES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 108 AND 119 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to remove telecommunications and broadcast companies from the ambit of the value-added tax system and to subject them to a franchise tax equivalent to 3.5% of the gross receipts on the first year of effectivity at this act and to 7% thereafter.

name: HBN-01561
title: AFP MILITARY PERSONNEL RETIREMENT AND SEPARATION
long_title: AN ACT TO AMEND PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1638, KNOWN AS THE AFP MILITARY PERSONNEL RETIREMENT AND SEPARATION DECREE OF 1979
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO AMEND PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1638, KNOWN AS THE AFP MILITARY PERSONNEL RETIREMENT AND SEPARATION DECREE OF 1979
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants retirement benefits to: a) a widow who married the retiree after his retirement and their children; and b) a retiree who acquires the citizenship of another country.
subjects: ['AFP Military Personnel Retirement', 'Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP)']

name: HBN-01562
title: AFP UNIFORM RETIREMENT SYSTEM
long_title: AN ACT TO AMEND REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 340, AS AMENDED, WHICH ESTABLISHED A UNIFORM RETIREMENT SYSTEM FOR THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO AMEND REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 340, AS AMENDED, WHICH ESTABLISHED A UNIFORM RETIREMENT SYSTEM FOR THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill extends retirement benefits to the unmarried widow of a veteran regardless of when the widow married the deceased veteran.

name: HBN-01563
congress_website_title: BATAS NA NAGTATAKDA NG FILIPINO BILANG OPISYAL NA WIKA NG PAGTUTURO SA MGA PAARALAN
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the use of Filipino as the medium of instruction in all schools.

name: HBN-01564
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING THE IMPOSITION OF FINES AND PENALTIES FOR CRIMES COMMITTED, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THIRTY-EIGHT HUNDRED AND FIFTEEN, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE, AS AMENDED, AND PRESIDENTIAL DECREES NUMBERED FOUR HUNDRED AND EIGHTY-THREE, AND SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND TWO, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to adjust the penalties provided under the Revised Penal Code that are grossly disproportionate to the amount or value of the subject of the offense and those that are ridiculously light considering the gravity of the offense. It also seeks the repeal of the provision penalizing vagrancy and prostitution.

name: HBN-01506
congress_website_title: AN ACT FIXING THE DATE OF THE REGULAR ELECTIONS OF REGIONAL GOVERNOR, REGIONAL VICE-GOVERNOR, AND MEMBERS OF THE REGIONAL LEGISLATIVE ASSEMBLY OF THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO (ARMM), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9140 ENTITLED \"AN ACT FIXING THE DATE OF THE PLEBISCITE FOR THE APPROVAL OF THE AMENDMENTS TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6734 AND SETTING THE DATE OF THE REGULAR ELECTIONS FOR ELECTIVE OFFICIALS OF THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO ON THE LAST MONDAY OF NOVEMBER 2001, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9054, ENTITLED 'AN ACT TO STRENGHTHEN AND EXPAND THE ORGANIC ACT FOR THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6734, ENTITLED 'AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO,' AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"

name: HBN-01507
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A STAGGERED WORKING HOUR SCHEME IN THE PRIVATE SECTOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to encourage employers in the private sector to adopt a flexible time scheme that would allow their employees to work for more than eight hours a day but not more than forty hours a week. It provides for the payment of overtime for work rendered beyond forty hours a week.

name: HBN-01508
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE MAUJAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL EXTENSION IN BARANGAY MAUJAO, MUNICIPALITY OF BULALACAO, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, FROM THE BULALACAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL (BNHS) IN BARANGAY POBLACION, CONVERTING THE SAME INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS MAUJAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01509
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL MASS MEDIA FACILITIES TO ALLOCATE A CERTAIN PORTION OF THEIR AIRTIME OR SPACE FOR PUBLIC SERVICE AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires all mass media facilities to allocate at least two hours a day of airtime for and a certain space for write-ups on public service news, educational and cultural presentations and programs.

name: HBN-01510
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE ORIENTAL MINDORO STATE UNIVERSITY SYSTEM (OMSUS) THROUGH THE INTEGRATION OF THE POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE OF CALAPAN (PCC) IN CALAPAN CITY, THE MINDORO STATE COLLEGE OF AGRICULTURE AND TECHNOLOGY (MINSCAT) IN VICTORIA, AND THE BONGABONG COLLEGE OF FISHERIES (BCF) IN BONGABONG AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01511
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A YOUTH CENTER IN CALAPAN CITY AND IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GLORIA, BOTH IN THE PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO AND TO BE KNOWN AS THE ORIENTAL MINDORO CENTER FOR YOUTH AFFAIRS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01512
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE DAYHAGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-CARMUNDO EXTENSION IN BARANGAY CARMUNDO, MUNICIPALITY OF BONGABONG, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, FROM THE DAYHAGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY DAYHAGAN, CONVERTING THE SAME INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01513
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SALCEDO, MUNICIPALITY OF BANSUD, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO BE KNOWN AS FELIMON M. SALCEDO, SR. MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL (FMSSMNHS) AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01514
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) DISTRICT OFFICE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BONGABONG, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01515
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MALAMIG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL EXTENSION CLASSES IN BARANGAY MALIGAYA, MUNICIPALITY OF GLORIA, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS PRESIDENT DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01516
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A REGISTER OF DEEDS DISTRICT OFFICE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BONGABONG, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01517
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING BARANGAY YUNOT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BULALACAO, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO

name: HBN-01518
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING THAT ELECTIVE OFFICIALS RUNNING FOR ANY OFFICE OTHER THAN THE ONE WHICH THEY ARE HOLDING SHALL BE CONSIDERED IPSO FACTO RESIGNED UPON THE FILING OF THEIR CERTIFICATE OF CANDIDACY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE OMNIBUS ELECTION CODE
congress_website_abstract: Same as HB1012

name: HBN-01519
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BONGABONG-SAGANA-ROXAS-SAN AQUILINO PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01520
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY DANGAY, MUNICIPALITY OF ROXAS, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO BE KNOWN AS DANGAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01521
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE INCLUSION OF THE DULY ELECTED PRESIDENT OF THE LEAGUE OF MUNICIPALITIES AS EX-OFFICIO MEMBER 0F THE SANGGUNIANG PANLALAWIGAN CONCERNED, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE \"LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\" AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the naming of the president of the League of Municipalities as an ex-officio member of the sangguniang panlalawigan to articulate the issues and concerns affecting the municipal government.

name: HBN-01522
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN ROQUE, MUNICIPALITY OF BULALACAO, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, TO BE KNOWN AS SAN ROQUE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01523
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE ORIENTAL MINDORO SCIENCE AND SPORTS HIGH SCHOOL AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01524
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING BARANGAY SIANGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BONGABONG, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO

name: HBN-01525
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REWARD INFORMANTS WHO HELP IDENTIFY, LOCATE AND RECOVER ANY ILL-GOTTEN WEALTH OF THE LATE PRESIDENT FERDINAND E. MARCOS, AND HIS WIDOW, IMELDA R. MARCOS AND OTHER DEFENDANTS OR RESPONDENTS IN ILL-GOTTEN WEALTH CASES WHEREVER LOCATED AND BY WHOMSOEVER HELD AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill offers the following rewards to informants who help in the recovery of any Marcos ill-gotten wealth: 1) For individuals - a) 10% of the amount recovered if less than US$100 million; b) 7% of amount recovered if US$100 million but less than US$500 million; c) 5% of amount recovered if US$500 million and more; and 2) For juridical informants, 15% of amount recovered.

name: HBN-01526
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CHAPTER 2, TITLE V OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 209 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FAMILY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to exempt the family home from the payment of real property tax.

name: HBN-01527
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE MAGNA CARTA FOR BARANGAYS
congress_website_abstract: \"The Magna Carta for Barangays.\" The bill proposes the following, among others: a) that barangay officials be considered as regular employees; b) that every barangay be provided with the basic priorities like supply of potable water, schools, etc; and c) the automatic release of their share in national taxes.

name: HBN-01528
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING PUBLIC LANDS IN BARANGAYS MANLAYAG, MAN-ILAN AND TABUAN OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUKURAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL SUR AS OPEN TO DISPOSITION

name: HBN-01529
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NEW TRIBAL BARANGAY OF BULANSING OUT OF THE EXISTING SITIO BULANSING IN BARANGAY SULO, MUNICIPALITY OF NAGA, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA SIBUGAY

name: HBN-01530
congress_website_title: AN ACT CRIMINALIZING CHEATING AND OTHER DISHONEST ACTS RELATIVE TO THE CONDUCT OF BAR EXAMINATIONS AND IMPOSING STIFF PENALTIES THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: The bill declares it unlawful for any person to possess a copy, or part of a copy of any questionnaire of the Bar examinations and for an examiner to allow any person to have access to a Bar questionnaire or part thereof or to divulge the contents of such questionnaire.

name: HBN-01531
title: NATIONAL BOOK DEVELOPMENT TRUST FUND ACT
long_title: AN ACT CREATING A NATIONAL BOOK DEVELOPMENT TRUST FUND TO SUPPORT FILIPINO AUTHORSHIP
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A NATIONAL BOOK DEVELOPMENT TRUST FUND TO SUPPORT FILIPINO AUTHORSHIP
congress_website_abstract: \"National Book Development Trust Fund Act\". The bill seeks to establish the Trust Fund to support and promote Filipino authorship especially in science and technology and in subject areas wherein locally authored books are few or non-existent.

name: HBN-01532
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REENGINEER THE GOVERNMENT BUREAUCRACY BY AUTHORIZING THE PRESIDENT TO IMPLEMENT THE RE-ENGINEERING PLAN, CREATING THE COMMISSION ON GOVERNMENT RE-ENGINEERING, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"The Re-Engineering Act of 2004\". The bill sets forth the re-engineering principles and guidelines for the planned re-engineering of the bureaucracy. It prescribes the composition, and powers and functions of the Commission. It provides for a compensation package for government personnel who will be affected by the proposed re-engineering.

name: HBN-01533
congress_website_title: AN ACT ORDAINING THE DEVELOPMENT OF THE DOWNSTREAM NATURAL GAS INDUSTRY, CONSOLIDATING FOR THE PURPOSE ALL LAWS RELATING TO THE TRANSMISSION, DISTRIBUTION AND SUPPLY OF NATURAL GAS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Downstream Natural Gas Industry Development Act of 2004\". The bill seeks to provide a clear, comprehensive and integrated regulatory framework for the development of the nascent downstream natural gas industry. It defines the responsibilities of the various government agencies and the private entities concerned.

name: HBN-01534
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BUENAVISTA, MUNCIPALITY OF SAN JORGE, PROVINCE OF SAMAR TO BE KNOWN AS THE BUENAVISTA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01535
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE NATIONAL POWER CORPORATION TO ENSURE THE OPTIMUM UTILIZATION OF POWER SUPPLY WHICH THE GOVERNMENT HAS GUARANTEED TO PURCHASE FROM INDEPENDENT POWER PRODUCERS (IPPs), PROVIDING A POWER REBATE SYSTEM IN FAVOR OF THE CONSUMERS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Power Rebate Act of 2004\". The bill mandates the Manila Electric Company (MERALCO), the electric power cooperatives and distributors to give their consumers a monthly rebate of unutilized kilowatts. The measure directs the Energy Regulatory Commission to formulate a system to determine the amount of rebate of utilized kilowatts based on the consumer's historical electric consumption.

name: HBN-01536
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING ARTICLES 13, 40, 48, 52, 54 AND 99 OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 209, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FAMILY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to recognize marriage annulment decreed by those that have their own existing Marriage Tribunal such as that of the Roman Catholic Church.

name: HBN-01537
congress_website_title: THE BUDGET IMPOUNDMENT CONTROL ACT OF 2004
congress_website_abstract: \"Impoundment\" refers to a refusal of the President, for whatever reason, to spend funds made available by Congress. The bill seeks to curtail the practice of presidential impoundments of funds by establishing a mechanism for Congress to review the deferral of releases prior to its exercise.

name: HBN-01538
congress_website_title: AN ACT RESERVING FOR PUBLIC, QUASI-PUBLIC AND RESETTLEMENT PURPOSES A CERTAIN TRACT OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN LOCATED IN BARANGAY TAMBLER, GENERAL SANTOS CITY, ISLAND OF MINDANAO UNDER THE ADMINISTRATION AND MANAGEMENT OF THE CITY OF GENERAL SANTOS

name: HBN-01539
congress_website_title: AN ACT RESERVING FOR PUBLIC, QUASI-PUBLIC AND RESETTLEMENT PURPOSES A CERTAIN TRACT OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN LOCATED IN BARANGAY CALUMPANG, GENERAL SANTOS CITY, ISLAND OF MINDANAO UNDER THE ADMINISTRATION AND MANAGEMENT OF THE CITY OF GENERAL SANTOS

name: HBN-01540
congress_website_title: AN ACT RESERVING FOR PUBLIC, QUASI-PUBLIC AND RESETTLEMENT PURPOSES A CERTAIN TRACT OF LAND CONTAINING AN AREA OF ONE MILLION EIGHTY FOUR THOUSAND (1,084,000) SQUARE METERS OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN LOCATED IN BARANGAY TAMBLER, GENERAL SANTOS CITY, ISLAND OF MINDANAO UNDER THE ADMINISTRATION AND MANAGEMENT OF THE CITY OF GENERAL SANTOS

name: HBN-01541
