congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE GENERAL SANTOS CITY SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREE PORT IN THE PROVINCE OF SOUTH COTABATO, CREATING FOR THIS PURPOSE THE GENERAL SANTOS CITY SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREE PORT AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01542
congress_website_title: AN ACT RESERVING FOR MARINE, AGRICULTURAL AND COMMERCIAL ECONOMIC ZONE SITE A CERTAIN TRACT OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN LOCATED IN BARANGAY TAMBLER, GENERAL SANTOS CITY, ISLAND OF MINDANAO UNDER THE ADMINISTRATION AND MANAGEMENT OF THE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE

name: HBN-01543
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING MARINE POLLUTION IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"Marine Pollution Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to prevent or limit the dumping into ocean waters of any material which would adversely affect human health, welfare or amenities or the marine environment or the ecological system.

name: HBN-01480
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING THE NEGATIVE PORTRAYAL OF A PERSON WITH A DISABILITY IN MOVIES, TELEVISION, STAGE AND OTHER FORMS OF MASS COMMUNICATION
congress_website_abstract: \"Media Protection for the Disabled Act of 2004.\" The bill declares it unlawful to mock, embarass, humiliate, or insult a disabled person in mass media.

name: HBN-01481
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING PUBLIC RECREATIONAL PARKS IN MAJOR URBAN AREAS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill states that there are few public parks in major urban areas where workers can enjoy and rest without spending money and cites the need for them.

name: HBN-01482
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MODERNIZATION OF THE NATIONAL MAPPING AND RESOURCE INFORMATION AUTHORITY (NAMRIA), AMENDING CERTAIN PORTIONS OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 192, SECTION 22(a) AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"NAMRIA Modernization Act of 2004.\" The bill cites the need for fresh funds to upgrade NAMRIA's facilities. Prescribes the objectives, mandate, responsibilities, powers and functions of the NAMRIA and the components for its modernization.

name: HBN-01483
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES STOCK EXCHANGE
congress_website_abstract: \"Small and Medium Enterprises Stock Exchange (SMEX) Act of 2004.\" The bill defines a small enterprise as \"any business with a capitalization of P2 million to P20 million while a medium enterprise has a capitalization of P21 million to P100 million. Aims to provide funds for the SMEX by requiring their public listing at a stock exchange.

name: HBN-01484
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE USE OF RECYCLABLE OR BIODEGRADABLE MATERIALS FOR THE PACKAGING OF CONSUMER PRODUCTS
congress_website_abstract: Grants tax incentives to manufacturers who use recyclable and biodegradable packaging for their consumer goods.

name: HBN-01485
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROTECTING THE RIGHTS OF CELLULAR PHONE SUBSCRIBERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Cellular Phone Subscribers Protection Act of 2004.\" The bill provides that phone calls shall be charged based on actual time consumed by a caller rather than by minute increment and that drop calls shall not be charged to subscribers. Creates the subscribers Protection Office to protect cell phone owners.

name: HBN-01486
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE, DEVELOP AND ASSIST MICRO AND COTTAGE INDUSTRIES BY PROVIDING AN EFFECTIVE AND RATIONAL SYSTEM TO ADDRESS THEIR PRODUCTION AND TECHNOLOGY NEEDS
congress_website_abstract: \"Micro and Cottage Industries Development Act of 2004.\" Designates the Cottage Industry Technology Center as the lead agency to help cottage industry increase their productivity and ensure their survival.

name: HBN-01487
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AND PROVIDING FOR THE RATIONALIZATION OF WAGE LEVELS ON A NATIONAL OR INDUSTRIAL BASIS
congress_website_abstract: The bill abolishes the Regional Tripartite Wages and Productivity Board and replaces it with the National Wages and Productivity Commission which shall determine and fix national minimum wage rates according to industries and issue the corresponding wage order.

name: HBN-01488
congress_website_title: AN ACT ADJUSTING PENSIONS UNDER THE GOVERNMENT SERVICE INSURANCE SYSTEM TO A MINIMUM LEVEL OF TWELVE THOUSAND PESOS (P12,000.00) UNDER AN ECONOMIC ADJUSTMENT PENSION PROGRAM
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to increase the monthly pay of GSIS pensioners from a minimum level of P1,400 to P6,000 increasing annually by P1,000 until it reaches P12,000.

name: HBN-01489
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE APPOINTMENT OF A REPRESENTATIVE FOR THE ELDERLY IN EVERY SANGGUNIANG BARANGAY, SANGGUNIANG BAYAN, SANGGUNIANG PANLUNSOD AND SANGGUNIANG PANLALAWIGAN
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to harness the talents, wisdom and experience of senior citizens by appointing an elderly as a representative in every sangguniang barangay, bayan, panglungsod and panlalawigan.

name: HBN-01490
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL FRANCHISE GRANTEES USING WIRES AND CABLES IN THE OPERATION OF THEIR BUSINESS WITHIN THE PHILIPPINES TO PLACE THEIR WIRE AND CABLE CONNECTIONS UNDER THE GROUND, AND PROVIDING FOR PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: \"Underground Wiring Act of 2004.\" The bill requires owners of telephone and electric franchises to place their wire and cables underground.

name: HBN-01491
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING AN AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY ENHANCEMENT FUND, IN EACH PROVINCE, CITY AND MUNICIPALITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the proceeds generated from the impositionn of an additional real property tax on idle lands to accrue to the Fund and provides that 50% of the 20% development fund allotted to cities, province and municipalities to be used for the construction of roads, irrigation, post harvest facilities and other agricultural infrastructure.

name: HBN-01492
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING TWO (2) SANGGUNIANG PANLALAWIGAN SEATS TO REPRESENT THE CITY OF SAN JOSE DEL MONTE TO THE SANGGUNIANG PANLALAWIGAN OF BULACAN AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NINETY TWO HUNDRED AND THIRTY

name: HBN-01493
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING TWO (2) REGIONAL TRIAL COURT BRANCHES AND TWO (2) ADDITIONAL MUNICIPAL TRIAL COURT BRANCHES FOR THE CITY OF SAN JOSE DEL MONTE, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980\" AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01494
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE SOLAR ENERGY DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY DEFINING ITS POWERS AND DUTIES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill creates the Authority with a capitalization of P5 million to develop, utilize, promote, and research on solar energy as an alternative to oil, hydroelectric and geothermal energy.

name: HBN-01495
congress_website_title: AN ACT DIRECTING THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION, CULTURE AND SPORTS TO INCLUDE IN THE CURRICULUM OF ALL SECONDARY AND COLLEGIATE SCHOOLS AND UNIVERSITIES IN THE COUNTRY THE TEACHING OF POPULATION AND ENVIRONMENTAL DEVELOPMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires the teaching of population and environment development in the secondary and college levels to help students realize the relationships between overpopulation and poverty.

name: HBN-01496
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INSTALL FAX MACHINE UNITS IN ALL CITIES AND MUNICIPALITIES IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to solve the communication barrier between the local and national governments by installing fax machines nationwide.

name: HBN-01497
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING VOLUNTARY BLOOD DONATION, PROVIDING FOR AN ADEQUATE SUPPLY OF SAFE BLOOD, REGULATING BLOOD BANKS AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: \"Blood Services Act of 1992.\" The bill aims to make blood readily available to hospitals and patients by creating the National Blood Services Program under the Department of Health, Philippine National Red Cross, and the Philippine Blood Coordinating Council which shall establish blood collection centers nationwide.

name: HBN-01498
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE TRANSFER OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY AND THE PRACTICE OF PROFESSIONS IN THE PHILIPPINES BY OVERSEAS FILIPINO PROFESSIONALS
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to allow overseas Filipino professionals to practice here in the Philippines to enable them to concretely assist in the country's development processes, notably in the areas of transfer and exchange of technology.

name: HBN-01499
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING PARENTS, ADOPTERS, GUARDIANS OR PERSONS EXERCISING SPECIAL OR SUBSTITUTE PARENTAL AUTHORITY OVER CHILDREN UNDER PARENTAL AUTHORITY FOUND TO BE ENGAGED IN BEGGING AND/OR PROSTITUTION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Parental Sanction Law for Child Begging and Prostitution.\" The bill imposes the penalty of prision correccional to parents, adopters, guardians or substitute parents who shall use, coerce, intimidate or force their children to beg or become prostitutes.

name: HBN-01500
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS AND EMPLOYEES TO HOLD TWO (2)OR MORE FULL TIME POSITIONS IN THE GOVERNMENT OR ANY SUBDIVISION, AGENCY OR INSTURMENTALITY THEREOF INCLUDING GOVERNMENT- OWNED OR CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS OR IN PRIVATE ENTITIES AND PRESCRIBING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits public servants to hold dual government positions.

name: HBN-01501
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REQUIRE THE TEACHING OF BASIC COMPUTER PROGRAMMING AS PART OF THE CURRICULUM OF ALL SECONDARY SCHOOLS IN THE COUNTRY AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the inclusion of basic computer programming courses in the curriculum of all high schools in the country to make the youth computer literate.

name: HBN-01502
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE NATIONAL RECYCLING COMMISSION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The proposed National Recycling Commission shall be tasked to formulate national recycling policies and adopt programs for the promotion of recycling in the country as a means of conserving resources.

name: HBN-01503
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH A NATIONAL JUNIOR POLICE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to establish a national junior police, composed of Filipino citizens between the ages of 15 and 20, who shall assist the local officials in the maintenance of peace and order and other related activities.

name: HBN-01504
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL PUBLIC UTILITY AGENCIES AND COMPANIES OR CORPORATIONS, BOTH PUBLIC AND PRIVATE, TO REPAIR ANY DIGGING OR DESTRUCTION MADE IN THE COURSE OF THEIR INSTALLATION OR MAINTENANCE WORK
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires all utility agencies to restore roads, streets, passageways, pathways or similar places to their prior status within 72 hours from completion of any work in the area. It further requires the punong barangay or the barangay secretary to issue a certificate that the repair work has been completed.

name: HBN-01505
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE NEW LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"New Labor Code of the Philippines.\" Some of the salient features of the bill are: a) it declares labor only-contracting as unlawful; b) it more clearly defines the right of a regular employee to security of tenure; c) it distinguishes between temporary employment and employment without a definite period; and d) it aligns the right to strike with International Labor Organization standards.

name: HBN-01476
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING GOVERNMENT-OWNED OR -CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS (GOCCs)ON THE PRIVATIZATION PROGRAM TO RESERVE AT LEAST TWENTY PERCENT (20%) OF THEIR TOTAL INITIAL PUBLIC OFFERING (IPO) OF SHARES TO OVERSEAS WORKERS, AUTHORIZING THE OVERSEAS WORKERS INVESTMENT (OWI) FUND UNDER REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7111 TO MANAGE AN INVESTMENT FUND PORTFOLIO FOR OVERSEAS WORKERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides investment opportunities and incentives to overseas workers and their families by allowing them and their beneficiaries to buy stocks from an investment fund \"that will manage their money under a trust fund.\"

name: HBN-01477
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8291, AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1146, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"REVISED GOVERNMENT SERVICE INSURANCE ACT OF 1977,\" AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides that \"all service credited for retirement, resignation or separation where corresponding benefits have been awarded shall be included in the computation of service in case of reinstatement and subsequent retirement or separation.\"

name: HBN-01478
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A NATIONAL LAND USE POLICY, PROVIDING THE IMPLEMENTING MECHANISMS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Land Use Act of the Philippines.\" The bill provides for national land use classification, planning, zoning guidelines and standards. Reconstitutes the National Land Use Committee into the Land Use Policy Administration and prescribes its powers and functions. Classifies lands into agricultural, alienable and disposable, forest, timber, watershed, coastal and mineral. Sets the criteria for the development of settlement, tourism and industrial areas and infrastructure.

name: HBN-01479
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REGULATE AND MODERNIZE THE PRACTICE OF CHEMISTRY IN THE PHILIPPINES, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 754
congress_website_abstract: \"Chemistry Law of 2004.\" The bill updates the Chemistry Law (RA 754, June 18, 1952). Defines chemistry as \"the study, analysis, modification and calculation of physicochemical and biochemical properties of matter including atomic, molecular and supra-molecular composition and structure, the changes it undergoes, energy involved and conditions it occur.\" Provides for the scope of the professional practice of chemistry, creates the Board, and prescribes its composition, powers and duties, and the qualifications of its members. Provides for the requirements for the board examination, issuance of certificated of registration and permits.

name: HBN-01445
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 290 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides that persons engaged in the exploitation of national wealth shall remit 40% of their tax payments directly to the host local government and 60% to the national government.

name: HBN-01446
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 10(1) AND SECTION 11 OF REPUBLIC ACT 7156, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"MINI-HYDROELECTRIC POWER INCENTIVE ACT\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for 60% of the special privilege tax collected from mini-hydroelectric power developers to be remitted directly to the host local government unit as its share and for the remaining 40% to be remitted to the national government.

name: HBN-01447
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE PHILIPPINE SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL IN THE CORDILLERA ADMINISTRATIVE REGION AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01448
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE PINES CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-MAGSAYSAY ANNEX, CITY OF BAGUIO, AND CONVERTING IT AS MAGSAYSAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL OF BAGUIO CITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01449
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING PINSAO HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX FROM THE PINES CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND CONVERTING THE SAME INTO THE PINSAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01450
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7898, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"AFP MODERNIZATION ACT\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill establishes a research and development program on new technology to upgrade AFP equipment and weapons. Expands funding sources by including proceeds from lease or joint venture agreements on military camps. Exempts AFP projects from all taxes.

name: HBN-01451
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REORGANIZATION OF THE NATIONAL POLICE COMMISSION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Police Commission Act of 2004.\" The bill creates the Commission to control and supervise the PNP; prescribes its composition, organizational structure, duties and authority.

name: HBN-01452
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE DEPARTMENT OF ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND SANITATION, INTEGRATING THE DIFFERENT GOVERNMENT AGENCIES RELATED TO ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND SANITATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Department of Environment Protection and Sanitation Act.\" The bill creates the Department to coordinate different government programs on waste disposal and air, water or land pollution to prevent confusion, duplication and overlapping of functions. It provides for the powers and authority of the Commission.

name: HBN-01453
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MORE RESPONSIVE AND COMPREHENSIVE REGULATION FOR THE PRACTICE, LICENSING, AND REGISTRATION OF ENVIRONMENTAL AND SANITARY ENGINEERS IN THE PHILIPPINES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1364, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"New Environmental and Sanitary Engineering Act of 2004.\" The measure creates the Board of Examiners for Environmental and Sanitary Engineers to issue certificates of registration for the practice of sanitary engineering. It provides for the powers and duties of the Board and the qualification of its members. It further provides for the requirements and qualifications of applicants to obtain a license.

name: HBN-01454
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING MEASURES T0 ENSURE PEDESTRIAN SAFETY AND CONVENIENCE
congress_website_abstract: \"Pedestrian Safety Act of 2004.\" The bill declares that all obstructions along roads and sidewalks are nuisances subject to summary abatement without need of judicial proceedings. Aims to solve road traffic, sidewalk congestion and hazards to pedestrians.

name: HBN-01455
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A COLLEGE EDUCATION TRUST FUND FOR CHILDREN OF GSIS AND SSS MEMBERS
congress_website_abstract: (Same as HB00617)

name: HBN-01456
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ENTITLE CHILDREN OF TEACHERS AND EMPLOYEES IN PUBLIC AND PRIVATE INSTITUTIONS OF HIGHER LEARNING TO FREE TUITION AND OTHER SCHOOL FEES
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants teachers' and school employees' children studying in college 100% free tuition for the first child and 50% for the succeeding children.

name: HBN-01457
congress_website_title: AN ACT SETTING ASIDE TWENTY-FIVE PERCENT (25%) OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS' CALAMITY FUNDS FOR PREPARATORY ACTIVITIES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to use the Fund for future calamities to buy medicines, develop relocation centers, construct infrastructure and disseminate information to prevent death and damage to property.

name: HBN-01458
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMULGATING THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL STANDARDS FOR DRINKING WATER, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Safe Drinking Water Act of 2004.\" The bill creates a Drinking Water Quality Committee in every province to be composed of a representative from the Department of Health and the local health board. The Board shall be tasked to monitor potable water.

name: HBN-01459
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REQUIRE INDUSTRIES, FACTORIES, COMPANIES, OR ANY INSTITUTION, FIRM OR ESTABLISHMENT USING CHEMICALS AND THEIR BY-PRODUCTS FOR PRODUCTION, TO DEVELOP AND PROMOTE A COMMUNITY ENVIRONMENT INFORMATION PROGRAM
congress_website_abstract: \"Community Environmental Information Program Act of 2004\". The bill directs all industries, corporations, business firms and establishments that derive raw materials and those that produce and discard their by-products in the community, to ensure that their activities or operations do not pollute water and land bodies.

name: HBN-01460
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE PLANTING OF TREES IN OPEN SPACES OF SUBDIVISION PROJECTS DEVELOPED FOR RESIDENTIAL, INDUSTRIAL, OR COMMERCIAL PURPOSE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Greening Act of 2004.\" The bill requires land developers to reserve at least 30% of the gross area to be developed as an open space for parks, playgrounds, recreational uses, schools, roads, churches and other similar amenities.

name: HBN-01461
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REGULATION AND DISPOSAL OF MEDICAL WASTES, DECLARING CERTAIN ACTS UNLAWFUL, PRESCRIBING PENALTIES THERETO, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Medical Waste Control Act of 2004.\" The bill mandates the Department of Health to create a program for the management, collection and disposal of hospital waste.

name: HBN-01462
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING AS UNLAWFUL THE USE OF POLYCARBON PLASTICS, STYROFOAM AND OTHER SYNTHETIC MATERIALS HARMFUL TO THE ENVIRONMENT AND ESTABLISHING A CRITERION FOR THE ENDORSEMENT OF ENVIRONMENT FRIENDLY CONSUMER PRODUCTS
congress_website_abstract: \"Environment Friendly Act of 2004.\" The bill bans products which contain the following: chlorofluorocarbons or CFCs, styrofoam, aerosol propellants, freon, polycarbon plastic, polyethylene, polythene, vinyl, polyvinyl, phenolic vinyl, urethane, polyurethane, and similar extracts.

name: HBN-01463
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE SERVICE OF WARRANTS OF ARRESTS IN CERTAIN CASES AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits the serving of warrant of arrest at night (from 6:00 p.m. to 6:00 a.m.) holidays or weekends (12:00 p.m. Friday to 6:00 a.m. Sunday), except in cases of citizen's arrest, surveillance, entrapment, subversion, dangerous criminals, escapists or fugitives.

name: HBN-01464
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSERVATION AND PROTECTION OF WILDLIFE RESOURCES AND THEIR HABITATS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Wildlife Resources Conservation and Protection Act of 2004.\" The bill sets the guidelines on wildlife collection, possession, transportation, exportation, importation, introduction, re-stocking, bio-prospecting, scientific research, breeding, propagation, and conservation.

name: HBN-01465
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THAT ALL LIQUOR PRODUCTS CARRY A WARNING LABEL THAT ALCOHOL INTAKE DURING PREGNANCY IS HAZARDOUS TO THE LIFE AND HEALTH OF THE UNBORN CHILD
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes a fine ranging from PhP10,00 to PhP200,000 on liquor manufacturers and/or distributors who fail to print on the label of their liquor products a warning that alcohol intake is dangerous to the life and health of the unborn child.

name: HBN-01466
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE PROTECTION AND CONSERVATION OF ALL OBJECTS OF UNDERWATER CULTURAL HERITAGE IN PHILIPPINE WATERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Protection of Underwater Cultural Heritage Act of 2004.\" Aims to protect and preserve underwater treasures by setting the requirement for archeology, exploration, excavation of shipwrecks and sunken vessels to those at least 100 years old.

name: HBN-01467
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 286 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the internal revenue liability of local government units (LGUs) to be automatically deducted from their respective revenue allotments to eliminate the unncessary transfer of money from the LGUs to the national treasury and back to the LGUs.

name: HBN-01468
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE RATE OF THE VALUE-ADDED TAX, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 106, 107, 108 AND 114 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: To help the government meet its revenue target, the bill proposes to increase the value added tax to be paid by the seller from 10% to 12% of the gross selling price of goods or services.

name: HBN-01469
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REIMPOSITION OF THE FRANCHISE TAX ON TELECOMMUNICATION COMPANIES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 108 AND 119 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill re-imposes a five percent franchise tax on gross receipts on telephone and telegraph services in lieu of the value added tax.

name: HBN-01470
congress_website_title: AN ACT ADOPTING THE GROSS INCOME TAXATION FOR CORPORATIONS AND INDIVIDUALS ENGAGE IN TRADE OR BUSINESS AND/OR PRACTICE OF PROFESSION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PERTINENT PROVISIONS OF TITLE II OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill defines gross compensation income as \"all payments received in an employer-employee relationship like salaries, bonuses, allowances, ect.\" Defines gross income as \"gross sales or receipts derived from business or practice of a profession less sales returns, discounts, allowances, cost of goods or services or expenses incurred to produce the merchandize.\"

name: HBN-01471
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE DISPOSAL AND/OR COMMERCIAL DEVELOPMENT OF CERTAIN MILITARY CAMPS AND RESERVATIONS, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE THE MILITARY REAL ESTATE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"MIlitary Real Estate Development Act.\" The bill creates the Authority to raise revenues for the AFP modernization by owning, holding, managing, developing, and disposing military real estate. Provides for the powers, duties and purposes of the Authority.

name: HBN-01472
congress_website_title: AN ACT REORGANIZING THE NATIONAL FOOD AUTHORITY INTO THE NATIONAL FOOD CORPORATION AND THE FOOD DEVELOPMENT AND REGULATORY ADMINISTRATION, REDEFINING THEIR POWERS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Food Authority Reorganization Act of 2003.\" The bill creates the Corporation with a P15 billion capitalization to maintain and manage the annual rice reserve or buffer stock of the government.

name: HBN-01473
congress_website_title: AN ACT INTEGRATING COMPUTER EDUCATION INTO THE ELEMENTARY AND SECONDARY LEVEL CURRICULUM AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Computer Education Act of 2004.\" The bill aims to improve the skills of students by incorporating information technoloty in the curriculum of public elementary and high schools to make them more competitive.

name: HBN-01474
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE JOSE R. REYES MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER (JRRMMC) INTO A DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH (DOH) NATIONAL CENTER FOR TRAUMA, CANCER AND DERMATOLOGY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01475
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING A RATIONALIZED STAFFING PATTERN FOR THE SUPPORT STAFF OF PROVINCIAL/CITY PROSECUTORS OFFICE
congress_website_abstract: E.O. 910 issued on September 22, 1983 rationalized the salaries of provincial or city fiscals' offices and adopted a standard staffing pattern for the support staff. The bill seeks to provide for an updated staffing pattern for each prosecutors' office since E.O. 910 has become obsolete.

name: HBN-01399
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE POLILLO-BURDEOS PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF POLILLO AND BURDEOS, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE IMPROVEMENT AND MAINTENANCE THEREOF

name: HBN-01400
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TAYABAS-PAGBILAO PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF TAYABAS AND PAGBILAO, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE IMPROVEMENT AND MAINTENANCE THEREOF

name: HBN-01401
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE POLILLO-PANUKULAN PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF POLILLO AND PANUKULAN, PROVINCE OF QUEZON INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE IMPROVEMENT AND MAINTENANCE THEREOF

name: HBN-01402
congress_website_title: AN ACT ENHANCING THE ADMINISTRATION OF JUVENILE JUSTICE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER RELATED PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Juvenile Justice Act of 2004.\" The bill emphasizes on the need to rehabilitate and reintegrate the youth offender into the mainstream of society in contrast with the traditional punitive approach to the delinquent act. Defines a child as a person below 18 years old and provides that no person below 15 years old shall be held criminally liable for committing an offense. Creates the Office of Juvenile Justice and Delinquency Prevention within the Department of Justice to implement the juvenile justice system.

name: HBN-01403
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO DEFINE AND GUARANTEE PUBLIC SECTOR UNIONISM IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Public Sector Unionism Act of 2004.\" The bill guarantees the right of government employees to self-organization, negotiation, collective bargaining, peaceful assembly and the right to strike.

name: HBN-01404
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROVIDE FOR THE MAGNA CARTA FOR OLDER PERSONS
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for Older Persons.\" The measure establishes the National Council for the Welfare of Older Persons, under the Office of the President, to direct all activities for the elderly. Provides for the rights, privileges, incentives and other benefits of older persons. Provides for social services, political and civil rights, transportation privileges, housing and tax incentives.

name: HBN-01405
congress_website_title: AN ACT LOWERING THE COSTS OF MEDICINES AND HEALTH CARE IN THE PHILIPPINES BY EXEMPTING THE SALE, IMPORTATION, PROCESSING, REPACKING OR MANUFACTURING OF: MEDICINES; PHARMACEUTICAL PRODUCTS; MEDICAL, DENTAL AND HOSPITAL EQUIPMENT; AND RAW MATERIALS TO BE USED IN THE MANUFACTURE THEREOF; FROM ALL DUTIES AND TAXES
congress_website_abstract: Amends Section 103 of PD 1994 exempting from value-added tax medicines and hospital equipment to help lower the cost of health care.

name: HBN-01406
congress_website_title: AN ACT DIRECTING ALL PUBLIC AND PRIVATE SCHOOLS OF HIGHER LEARNING TO CREDIT SUBJECTS ALREADY TAKEN BY A TRANSFERRING STUDENT, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Directs the Commission on Higher Education to prescribe the rules implementing this Act.

name: HBN-01407
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING FOR A SYSTEM OF CREDITING THE UNITS OF ACADEMIC COURSES OFFICIALLY ENROLLED AND PASSED BY A TRANSFERRING STUDENT TO THE INSTITUTION OF HIGHER LEARNING WHERE HE INTENDS TO ENROLL
congress_website_abstract: \"Borderless Course Credit Act of 2004\". The bill provides that in case a student transfers from one institute of higher learning to another, whether public or private, the admitting school, after evaluation, shall credit all subjects enrolled and passed by the transferring student.

name: HBN-01408
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6963, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'AN ACT GRANTING SPECIAL FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE AND BENEFITS TO THE FAMILY OR BENEFICIARY OF ANY POLICE OR MILITARY PERSONNEL OR FIREMAN KILLED OR PERMANENTLY INCAPACITATED WHILE IN THE PERFORMANCE OF HIS DUTY OR BY REASON OF HIS OFFICE OR POSITION AND ALSO EXTENDING SCHOLARSHIP ASSISTANCE TO THE DEPENDENTS OF THEIR ACTIVE MEMBERS' AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to include the following as beneficiaries of RA 6963: families of Philippine National Police, Armed Forces of the Philippines, Bureau of Fire Protection and the Bureau of Jail Management and Penology personnel.

name: HBN-01409
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE POLITICAL PARTY SYSTEM
congress_website_abstract: \"Political Party Act of 2004.\" The bill aims to transform political parties from being personality-oriented to issue-oriented organizations. Provides that any member of the party changing his affiliation after being elected on his party's ticket should first resign from his elective position and seek a fresh mandate.

name: HBN-01410
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING THE MAGNA CARTA FOR THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE UNIFORMED AND NON-UNIFORMED PERSONNEL AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for the Philippine National Police Uniformed and Non-uniformed Personnel.\" The bill provides for the PNP organization, structure, prerequisite to entry, salaries, leave benefits, retirement, disciplinary measures and disability and death benefits.

name: HBN-01411
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE RETIREMENT BENEFITS OF THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 75 OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTY- NINE HUNDRED AND SEVENTY-FIVE ENTITLED, 'AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE UNDER A REORGANIZED DEPARTMENT OF INTERIOR AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT,' AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"PNP Retirement Benefits Act.\" The bill provides that the retirement pay of the members of the PNP shall be equal to one month base pay and longevity pay of the grade next higher than the permanent grade last held, for every year of service, payable in one lump sum or a monthly retirement pay equal to 50% of the base pay.

name: HBN-01412
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH A PROVIDENT PERSONAL SAVINGS PLAN KNOWN AS THE 'PERSONAL EQUITY AND RETIREMENT ACCOUNT'
congress_website_abstract: \"Personal Equity and Retirement Account (PERA) Act of 2004.\" The measure provides that an individual may open a retirement account with a trustee or a bank accredited by the Central Bank with a initial deposit of P20,000.

name: HBN-01413
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING 'APPROVED, CERTIFIED AND ACCREDITED COURSES/SUBJECT' OPENED AND/OR OFFERED BY ACADEMIC INSTITUTIONS AND IMPOSING STIFFER PENALTY FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: \"Courses Accreditation Act of 2004.\" The measure mandates that before any academic course is offered by a school, approval shall be obtained from proper government authorities.

name: HBN-01414
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PREVENT THE USE OF TOBACCO PRODUCTS BY THE YOUTH
congress_website_abstract: \"Prevention of Youth Tobacco Use Act of 2004.\" The bill prohibits any person under 18 years old to possess, smoke or consume tobacco in public. Imposes a fine of not more than P5,000 for violations of the proposed act.

name: HBN-01415
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING THE EMPLOYMENT OF CHILDREN IN ANY PUBLIC OR PRIVATE UNDERTAKING OR OCCUPATION WHICH IS CONSIDERED HAZARDOUS TO HIS/HER LIFE, SAFETY, HEALTH AND MORALS, OR WHICH UNDULY INTERFERES WITH HIS/HER NORMAL DEVELOPMENT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill bans children from working in hazardous jobs that expose them to danger such as chemical radiation, fire, poison, explosives or bacteria. Prohibits children from working in hazardous jobs such as deep-sea fishing, farming, hunting, logging, mining, quarrying, machine-operation, etc.

name: HBN-01416
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR ADDITIONAL BENEFITS AND PRIVILEGES TO PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS, AMENDING FOR THESE PURPOSES REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FORTY-SIX HUNDRED SEVENTY (REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4670), OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE MAGNA CARTA FOR PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure grants hardship allowance equal to 25% of monthly salary to teachers exposed to danger due to distant locations, natural calamities or armed conflict. Allows teachers one-year study leave after three years of service to pursue graduate studies.

name: HBN-01417
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER STRENGTHENING VOLUNTARY ARBITRATION AS A PREFERENTIAL MODE OF LABOR DISPUTE SETTLEMENT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 260, 261, 262-A, 262-B AND 227 (F) OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 422, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides that in case the parties to a labor dispute fail to name and designate in advance a Voluntary Arbitrator, the Board shall, upon the request by any of the parties, designate one. It further states that failure of the Arbitrator to render an award or decision will cause the Board to remove his name from the list of accredited Arbitrators.

name: HBN-01418
title: EMPLOYEES COMPENSATION AND STATE INSURANCE FUND
long_title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE COVERAGE OF THE EMPLOYEES COMPENSATION AND STATE INSURANCE FUND TO INCLUDE RETIRED EMPLOYEES AGED SEVENTY (70) AND BELOW WHO SUBSEQUENTLY REACQUIRED EMPLOYMENT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE COVERAGE OF THE EMPLOYEES COMPENSATION AND STATE INSURANCE FUND TO INCLUDE RETIRED EMPLOYEES AGED SEVENTY (70) AND BELOW WHO SUBSEQUENTLY REACQUIRED EMPLOYMENT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: Amends Article 168 of PD 442 (Labor Code) to include 70-year old employees in the coverage of the State Insurance Fund.
subjects: ['Employees Compensation/State Insurance Fund', 'Labor Code of the Philippines (Pd 442)']

name: HBN-01419
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE YEARLY ALLOCATION FOR SCIENTIFIC AND TECHNOLOGICAL ACTIVITIES (STA)
congress_website_abstract: \"Science and Technology Funding Act of 2001.\" The bill provides for the allocation for scientific and technological activities to be gradually increased until it reaches the prescribe UNESCO norm of one percent of total GNP.

name: HBN-01420
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING ARTICLES 215 AND 216 OF THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED, BY UPGRADING THE SALARIES, ALLOWANCES AND RETIREMENT BENEFITS OF LABOR ARBITERS AND THE COMMISSIONERS OF THE NATIONAL LABOR RELATIONS COMMISSION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the Chairman and members of the Commission to receive an annual salary equivalent to the allowances, retirement and other benefits of judges of municipal trial courts.

name: HBN-01421
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A DEPARTMENT OF FISHERIES AND AQUATIC RESOURCES, PROVIDING FOR ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Department of Fisheries and Aquatic Resources Act of 2004.\" The bill creates the Department to manage, develop, protect, conserve and utilize all fisheries and aquatic resources except for municipal waters which shall be under the local government. It prescribes the jurisdiction of the Department, its powers and functions, structural organization, functions of its officials and creation of bureaus.

name: HBN-01422
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING VACATION AND SICK LEAVE BENEFITS OF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants 30 days vacation leave and 30 days sick leave annually, with pay, to all employees of the government.

name: HBN-01423
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE MONTHLY PENSION OF RETIRED PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS AND NON-TEACHING PERSONNEL OF THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: (Same as HB00349)

name: HBN-01424
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING INCENTIVES TO SUBDIVISION HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATIONS TO DEVELOP AND MAINTAIN FORESTED AREAS WITHIN THEIR SUBDIVISIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Green Parks Act of 2004.\" The measure requires homeowners' associations to set aside five percent of the total subdivision area for a green park.

name: HBN-01425
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL BRANCHES, SUBDIVISIONS, INSTRUMENTALITIES, AND AGENCIES OF THE GOVERNMENT, INCLUDING GOVERNMENT-OWNED OR -CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS OR THEIR SUBSIDIARIES TO DIVULGE THE IDENTITY OF HIRED FOREIGN CONSULTANTS, THE NATURE OF THEIR WORK AND THEIR COMPENSATION, PERKS, AND OTHER PRIVILEGES, AND PROVIDING PENALTIES IN CASE OF VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: The measure aims to inform the public how much money the government pays to its consultants by requiring all agencies to report to Congress the identity, salary and nature of work of these consultants.

name: HBN-01426
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THAT ALL EXPENDITURES FOR THE PAYMENT OF FOREIGN DEBTS BE INCLUDED IN THE ANNUAL GENERAL APPROPRIATIONS ACT
congress_website_abstract: The bill claims that the government is unable to review and assess debts which may have been incurred against public interest and requires all foreign debt payments to be included in the annual budget for approval by Congress.

name: HBN-01427
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL PROGRAM FOR FILIPINO GIFTED AND SCIENCE ORIENTED CHILDREN, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Gifted and Science-Oriented Children Act of 2004.\" The bill defines a gifted child as three to 16 years old exhibiting advance intelligence in the following areas: verbal/linguistic, logical/mathematical. body/kinesthetic, visual/spatial, musical/rhythmic and leadership. Establishes a Center for gifted children to support them, train their teachers and provide scholarships.

name: HBN-01428
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT REFORMS TO PROMOTE THE EFFICIENCY AND PRODUCTIVITY OF SCIENTIFIC AND TECHNOLOGICAL ACTIVITIES (STA)
congress_website_abstract: \"Financial Management Reform Act of Scientific and Technological Activities.\" The bill seeks to improve the system of operations in the procurement, accounting and auditing of science and technology activities. It requires the recommendation of the DOST Secretary before any fund could be released for research and development in the natural, agricultural, technological and engineering sciences to various agencies.

name: HBN-01429
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CHAPTER 2, TITLE V OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 209, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FAMILY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: Exempts the family home from real property tax.

name: HBN-01430
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING FROM INTERNAL REVENUE TAXATION THE SEPARATION PAY, RETIREMENT PAY AND ALL MONETARY BENEFITS, HOWEVER DESIGNATED, OF EMPLOYEES WHO ARE SEPARATED FROM WORK FOR ANY CAUSE
congress_website_abstract: Aims to increase the take home pay of an employee who retires, resigns or is terminated by exempting his retirement pay and separation pay from taxes.

name: HBN-01431
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE CEREALS RESEARCH, DEVELOPMENT AND EXTENSION INSTITUTE (PHILCEREAL), AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Cereals Research, Development and Extension Act of 2004.\" The measure creates the Institute \"to transform the cereals sub-sector industry from being resource-based to technology-based.\" It seeks to expand the coverage of the Philippine Rice Research Institute to include other grains.

name: HBN-01432
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH CERTAIN LIMITATIONS ON ADVERTISING RELATING TO CIGARETTES AND TOBACCO PRODUCTS
congress_website_abstract: \"Tobacco Products Control Act of 2004.\" The bill prohibits the advertisement of cigarettes on the following: billboard within 500 meters of a school, student newspapers, taxis, buses, trains and their terminals, cinema or video games.

name: HBN-01433
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING AND CONVERTING THE BASCA-AMBARACAO SUR-GUESSET ROAD IN THE SECOND DISTRICT, PROVINCE OF LA UNION INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01434
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE AGOO-DAMORTIS SEASCAPE AND LANDSCAPE AS A PROTECTED AREA, AND ITS PERIPHERY AS BUFFER ZONES, PROVIDING FOR ITS MANAGEMENT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01435
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-LOAKAN ANNEX INTO THE MIL-AN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01436
title: ROXAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL (BAGUIO CITY)
long_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL – ROXAS ANNEX IN BAGUIO CITY FROM THE BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE ROXAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-ROXAS ANNEX IN BAGUIO CITY FROM THE BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE ROXAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
subjects: ['Schools, Conversion (Baguio City)', 'Roxas National High School (Baguio City)']

name: HBN-01437
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE PINES CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-BONIFACIO ANNEX FROM ITS MOTHER UNIT, THE PINES CITY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, BAGUIO CITY AND ESTABLISHING IT AS A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE NAMED GUISAD VALLEY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL OF BAGUIO CITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01438
title: BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL
long_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL IN TAM-AWAN, BARANGAY PINSAO PROPER, BAGUIO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL IN TAM-AWAN, BARANGAY PINSAO PROPER, BAGUIO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE BAGUIO CITY NATIONAL SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
subjects: ['Schools, Establishment (Baguio City)', 'Baguio City National Science High School']

name: HBN-01439
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE ENGINEERING DISTRICT FOR THE CITY OF MALABON AND THE MUNICIPALITY OF NAVOTAS IN METRO MANILA, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01440
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A SPECIAL COMMITTEE TO REVIEW THE REVISED PENAL CODE, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill creates the Revised Penal Code Special Review Committee composed of the following: law professors from Luzon, Visayas and Mindanao; a member of the Integrated Bar of the Philippines, a retired Supreme Court Justice, and two from the private sector. It tasks the Committee to update the Penal Code by incorporating all amendatory laws.

name: HBN-01441
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING PROFESSIONAL LICENSE TO TEACHERS WHO HAVE RENDERED AT LEAST TWO (2)YEARS OF EFFICIENT SERVICE IN HIGH RISK AREAS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Special Professional License Privilege for Teachers in High Risk Areas.\" The measure defines high risk areas as \"those places where terrorism, kidnapping and insurrection are common and identified by authorities as a sanctuary of rebels or where there are military operations.\" Grants license to non-licensed teachers who have served for two years in such areas.

name: HBN-01442
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A SEPARATE COMPENSATION SCHEME FOR LAWYER POSITIONS IN THE OFFICE OF THE SECRETARY OF JUSTICE, DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE, THEREBY EXEMPTING THE SAID POSITIONS FROM REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6758, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE SALARY STANDARDIZATION LAW
congress_website_abstract: The bill exempts all lawyers in the Office of the Secretary of Justice including the Secretary, Undersecretaries, prosecutors, and the legal staff from the coverage of the Salary Standardization Law.

name: HBN-01443
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING BENEFITS PACKAGE FOR ALL BARANGAY TANODS IN THE COUNTRY AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Tanod Benefit Package Act of 2004.\" The bill provides the following benefits to barangay tanods: insurance, honorarium, medical subsidy and scholarship for their children.

name: HBN-01444
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MANDATORY AND CONTINUING HUMAN RIGHTS EDUCATION FOR ALL BARANGAY TANODS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Mandatory and Continuing Human Rights Education Act of 2004.\" The bill mandates the Commission on Human Rights to conduct regular education for barangay tanods about the Bill of Rights, Rules of Court on Arrest, and other laws on human rights.

name: HBN-01350
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE MANDATORY LABELLING OF FOOD AND FOOD PRODUCTS CONTAINING GENETICALLY-MODIFIED ORGANISMS AND FOOD PRODUCED BY GENETIC ENGINEERING TECHNOLOGIES, AMENDING FOR THAT PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED THREE THOUSAND SEVEN HUNDRED AND TWENTY, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FOOD, DRUGS AND DRUG DEVICES AND COSMETICS ACT, AND REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVEN THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED AND NINETY-FOUR, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CONSUMERS' ACT OF THE PHILIPPINES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Genetically Engineered Food Right to Know Act.\" Mandates all food and food products domestically sold, whether manufactured locally or imported, and which contain genetically modified organisms including those produced by genetic engineering technologies, to indicate such in the labels of their packaging followed by a government notice on the same.

name: HBN-01351
title: WORKER'S CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHT TO SELF-ORGANIZATION
long_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE WORKER'S CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHT TO SELF-REORGANZIATION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE WORKERS' CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHT TO SELF-ORGANIZATION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to protect the rights of workers to self-organization by preventing undue interference and expediting the process of registration and certification of labor organizations. Allows rank and file and supervisory employees to join the same federation or national union, provides that the co-mingling of rank and file and supervisory employees in the same federation is not a ground for the cancellation of registration and encourages affiliation with federations and national unions.

name: HBN-01352
title: AMANG RODRIGUEZ MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER (ARMMC)
long_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE AMANG RODRIGUEZ MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER FROM ONE HUNDRED FIFTY (150) TO THREE HUNDRED (300) BEDS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE AMANG RODRIGUEZ MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER FROM ONE HUNDRED FIFTY (150) TO THREE HUNDRED (300) AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
subjects: ['Hospital, Increasing Bed Capacity', 'Amang Rodriguez Memorial Medical Center (ARMMc)']

name: HBN-01353
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING GREATER PROTECTION TO LOCAL INDUSTRIES THROUGH THE IMPOSITION OF ANTI-DUMPING DUTY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 301, PART 2, TITLE II, BOOK 1 OF THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8752
congress_website_abstract: The bill deletes the provision in the Tariff and Customs Code of the Philippines which allows the Tariff Commission to decide whether or not to impose a definitive anti-dumping duty even when all the requirements for the imposition of said duty have been fulfilled. It further provides that 50% of the dumping duties collected from a particular dumping protest shall be returned to the petitioner.

name: HBN-01354
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANNER AND DATE OF ELECTION OF SECTORAL REPRESENTATIVES TO THE LOCAL SANGGUNIANS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Local Sectoral Representation Act of 2004.\" The bill provides for the election of three sectoral representatives each in the sangguniang panlalawigan, sangguniang bayan and sangguniang panlungsod - one from the women sector, one from the workers and one from any of the following: the urban poor, indigenous cultural communities, disabled persons, and the elderly. Provides that the first election shall be held on the second Monday of May 2007 and every three years thereafter.

name: HBN-01355
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING POLITICAL TURNCOATISM AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION SEVENTY-ONE OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. EIGHTY-EIGHT HUNDRED AND ONE, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE OMNIBUS ELECTION CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: In order to minimize the politics of patronage and develop a strong multi-party system in the country, the bill provides the following penalties for political turncoatism: a) an elective official shall not be qualified to run for any elective position in any election immediately following the expiration of his term of office; b) a candidate, other than the incumbent elective official, shall not be qualified to run for any elective office immediately following his change of political party affiliation; and c) either of the above cases shall not be qualified to hold any elective office within the term of office immediately following the elections from which he was qualified.

name: HBN-01356
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 10 AND 53 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8223, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CHARTER OF THE CITY OF MARIKINA FOR THE PURPOSE OF PROVIDING FOR TWO (2) CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICTS FOR THE CITY OF MARIKINA AND THE COMPOSITION OF THE CITY COUNCIL OF MARIKINA

name: HBN-01357
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROVIDE FOR AN OWWA CHARTER TO GOVERN THE OPERATION AND ADMINISTRATION OF THE OVERSEAS WORKERS WELFARE ADMINISTRATION, PRESCRIBE FOR PUBLIC ACCOUNTABILITY ON THE OWWA ADMINISTRATORS AND OFFICIALS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"OWWA Charter Act of 2004.\" To protect and promote the welfare of overseas Filipino workers, the bill seeks to provide for an OWWA Charter that will govern the operation and administration of the Overseas Workers Welfare Administration. It also prescribes for public accountability of the OWWA administrators and officials.

name: HBN-01358
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING THE MAGNA CARTA FOR THE FILIPINO SEAFARERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for Filipino Seafarers.\" The measure seeks to grant Filipino seafarers the following rights, among others: access to educational advancement and training; access to relevant information; humane conditions of work and to standard compensation; self-organization, collective bargaining and participation in democratic exercises; and legal representation. To expedite and simplify documentary processing, it provides for the establishment of the One-Step Center where concerned government agencies shall be represented.

name: HBN-01359
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MAGNA CARTA FOR THE WORKERS IN THE INFORMAL SECTOR, INSTITUTIONALIZING MECHANISM FOR IMPLEMENTATION THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for the Workers in the Informal Sector.\" The bill seeks to extend government assistance, incentives and grants to accredited informal sector (IS) workers, and business acitivities or enterprises. Provides for the exemption of accredited IS workers/enterprises from all taxes, licenses and building permit fees. Also provides for the creation of the Informal Sector Development Council that will primarily be responsbile for the promotion, growth and development of the IS.

name: HBN-01360
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING COUNTRYSIDE CREDIT THROUGH COOPERATIVE BANKS AND ENCOURAGING THE GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT OF COOPERATIVE BANKS BY AMENDING CHAPTER XIII OF THE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6938, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE COOPERATIVE CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to strengthen the cooperative banking system, particularly in rural and remote areas. It extends to cooperative banks a similar package of incentives presently being enjoyed by thrift banks under RA 7906 and by rural banks under RA 7353.

name: HBN-01361
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE NATIONAL HISTORICAL INSTITUTE'S (NHI) DOCUMENTATION SYSTEM ON PHILIPPINE LOCAL FOLK HISTORIES AND ORAL TRADITIONS, PROVIDING MECHANISM FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION, ALLOCATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Local Folk Histories Grant Act of 2004.\" Establishes the National Historical Research Center which shall be tasked to monitor, implement, evaluate and approve matters pertaining to historical researches. Among its other functions, the Center shall advise and assist other agencies in the conduct of historical data-gathering and studies.

name: HBN-01362
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO RATIONALIZE THE ADMINISTRATION AND ENFORCEMENT OF ALL LAWS ON OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY AND HEALTH STANDARDS AND ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Under the present set-up, there are no less than 10 agencies involved in the implementation of occupational safety and health and environment protections laws. The measure designates the Department of Labor and Employment as the principal agency in coordinating and monitoring the government agencies involved in the implementation of all laws promoting occupation safety and health; and the Department of Environment and Natural Resources as the principal agency in the implementation of all laws on environmental protection.

name: HBN-01363
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL TOURISM POLICY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"National Tourism Policy Act of 2004.\" The bill proposes the adoption of the following policies, among others: a) encourage activities and programs which promote tourism awareness; b) promote the preservation of traditional crafts; c) encourage the use of indigenous architectural designs and materials; and d) grant preferential treatment to the employment of Filipinos.

name: HBN-01364
congress_website_title: AN ACT RECOGNIZING THE POTENTIALS OF THE FILIPINO YOUTH TOWARD NATION-BUILDING, PRESCRIBING THE FREE EXERCISE OF CERTAIN RIGHTS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for the Youth.\" Proposes to grant the youth the following rights: a) access to labor and employment; b) access to education; c) academic freedom; d) access to health care and services; e) free expression and information; f) organization and free assembly; g) paricipation in policy formulation; h) freedom of thought, conscience and religion; and i) political expression.

name: HBN-01365
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO AMEND CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVEN THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED SIXTEEN, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE ACT OF 1995, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to strengthen the PEZA (Philippine Economic Zone Authority) Law by imposing stiffer requirements for those who will be nominated and appointed to manage the PEZA. The bill also ensures that appropriate and due compensation is given to persons or organizations affected and/or displaced by the establishment or expansion programs of the PEZA.

name: HBN-01366
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE DEPARTMENT OF CULTURE, ARTS AND NATIONAL HERITAGE DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Department of Culture and National Heritage Act.\" The proposed department shall be mandated to: a) encourage the continuing development of our culture; b) conserve and promote the nation's historical and cultural heritage and resources; c) promote and disseminate patronage of our national culture and heritage; and d) preserve and integrate indigenous traditional culture into the mainstream of the dynamic culture of Filipinos.

name: HBN-01367
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO UPGRADE THE POSITION TITLE AND SALARY GRADE OF STENOGRAPHIC REPORTER II (SG 6) AND STENOGRAPHIC REPORTER III (SG 11) TO STENOGRAPHIC REPORTER IV (SG 14), APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Because of the increase in the number of cases being handled by the National Labor Relations Commissions, its stenographers are compelled to perform functions beyond their prescribed duties. To grant them equitable compensation and to correct the apparent misclassification of their positions, the bill proposes to upgrade the status of Stenographers Reporters II and III to Stenographic Reporter IV.

name: HBN-01368
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO EARMARK TWENTY-FIVE (25%) PERCENT OF GOVERNMENT REVENUES ACCRUED FROM TOBACCO TAXES TO FUND TOBACCO CONTROL PROGRAMS AND ACTIVITIES OF THE GOVERNMENT
congress_website_abstract: In recent years, several countries have decided to fund tobacco control activities through higher tobacco taxes. In like fashion, the bill provides that 25% of the revenues generated from tobacco taxes be allocated to fund tobacco control activities and broader public health programs.

name: HBN-01369
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6963, ENTITLED 'AN ACT GRANTING SPECIAL FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE AND BENEFITS TO THE FAMILY OR BENEFICIARY OF ANY POLICE OR MILITARY PERSONNEL OR FIREMAN KILLED OR PERMANENTLY INCAPACITATED WHILE IN THE PERFORMANCE OF HIS DUTY OR BY REASON OF HIS OFFICE OR POSITION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure proposes the following: a) that the proceeds of the firearms license fees being collected by the Philippine Naitonal Police (PNP) Firearms and Explosives Office be allocated solely to the qualified dependents of the PNP; b) that educational benefits be extended to qualified dependents of non-uniformed personnel of the PNP; c) that the management of the educational funds for the dependents of the PNP be given to the PNP; and d) that the Chief, PNP, be authorized to use the educational funds for other purposes of the PNP.

name: HBN-01370
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE FIELD OF LAND TITLE INSURANCE, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE, PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 612 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE INSURANCE CODE OF 1978, AS AMENDED BY PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBERED 1455 AND 1460 AND BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 874
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to create a land title insurance system that would protect buyers of real estate against title defects, falsification, double titling and other similar unlawful acts.

name: HBN-01371
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN ISLAMIC STATE UNIVERSITY IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill prescribes the objectives/mission of the University, the composition of the Board of Regents, and the powers and duties of the Board and the University officials.

name: HBN-01372
congress_website_title: AN ACT FIXING THE SEAT OF GOVERNMENT OF THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO IN THE CITY OF MARAWI

name: HBN-01373
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE SPECIAL SHARIA BAR EXAMINATION AS CIVIL SERVICE EXAMINATION AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE RA 1080 ENTITLED 'AN ACT DECLARING THE BAR AND BOARD EXAMINATIONS AS CIVIL SERVICE EXAMINATIONS'
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to declare the Special Shari'a Examination given by the Supreme Court as a civil service examination and thus confer to the passers thereof the appropriate civil service eligibility.

name: HBN-01374
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 1 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6769, FOR THE PURPOSE OF RECTIFYING THE TECHNICAL DESCRIPTION OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN JOSE, IN THE PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE

name: HBN-01375
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING THE SECOND PARAGRAPH OF SECTION I OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6769, ENTITLED 'AN ACT CREATING THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN JOSE IN THE PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE'

name: HBN-01376
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A BARANGAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY RITAGLENDA, MUNICIPALITY OF BASILISA, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, TO BE KNOWN AS 'RITAGLENDA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL', AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01377
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A BARANGAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY DEL PILAR, IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CAGDIANAO, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, TO BE KNOWN AS THE DEL PILAR NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01378
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A BARANGAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY LLAMERA, MUNICIPALITY OF LIBJO, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, TO BE KNOWN AS 'LLAMERA NATIONAL HIGH', AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01379
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH THE ISLAND OF SIARGAO AND BUCAS GRANDE AS A PROTECTED AREA, PROVIDING FOR ITS MANAGEMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01380
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYBAY, PROVINCE OF LEYTE INTO A COMPONENT CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CITY OF BAYBAY

name: HBN-01381
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 61 AND SECTION 103 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 856 OR OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'CODE ON SANITATION'
congress_website_abstract: The bill requires every cubicle in massage clinics and sauna bath estblishments to be adequately ventilated with sliding translucent curtains or transparent sliding glass doors without lock. It also limits the operating hours of massage and sauna bath parlors from 12 noon to 12 midnight and prohibits the use of use of display windows for masseurs and attendants.

name: HBN-01382
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING SQUATTING SYNDICATE, PROFESSIONAL SQUATTING AND LARGE-SCALE LAND GRABBING AS HEINOUS CRIMES, AND PROVIDING THE IMPOSITION OF DEATH PENALTY THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the imposition of the death penalty on squatting syndicates, professional squatters and manufacturers of fake land titles and other land related titles, and on land scale land grabbers.

name: HBN-01383
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING THE PROVISIONS OF VAGRANCY AND AMENDING THE DEFINITION OF PROSTITUTES AS PROVIDED IN ARTICLE 202 OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill defines prostitutes as any person who, for money or profit, habitually indulges in sexual intercourse or lascivious conduct. Seeks the repeal of provisions on vagrancy under Paragraphs 1, 2, 3, and 4 of Article 202 of the Revised Penal Code.

name: HBN-01384
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONTROL AND ERADICATION OF RABIES, PRESCRIBING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Rabies Act of 2002.\" The bill mandates the establishment of a National Rabies Prevention and Control Program which shall be a multi-agency effort to control and eradicate rabies in the country. Its activities shall include, among others, mass vaccination of dogs, impounding of stray dogs, and information and education campaign on the prevention and control of rabies.

name: HBN-01385
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN AND PROPAGATE FOSTER CARE FOR ABANDONED, NEGLECTED AND OTHER CHILDREN WITH SPECIAL NEEDS, PROVIDING APPROPRIATIONS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Foster Care Act of 2001.\" The proposed act provides for a comprehensive legal farmework under which abused, neglected, surrendered, dependent and abandoned children can be provided with an alternative family. It seeks to systematize and enhance foster care in the country.

name: HBN-01386
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CIABU, MUNICIPALITY OF BAYBAY, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO BE KNOWN AS MAILHI NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01387
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) DISTRICT OFFICE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYBAY, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01388
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY LIBERTAD, MUNICIPALITY OF ABUYOG, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO BE KNOWN AS LIBERTAD NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01389
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING HAZARD PAY TO TEACHERS ASSIGNED AS MEMBERS OF THE BOARD OF ELECTION INSPECTORS AND BOARD OF CANVASSERS IN HAZARDOUS AREAS IN THE COUNTRY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVENTY-ONE HUNDRED AND SIXTY-SIX
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants a hazard pay of P1,000.00 to teachers assigned as members of the Board of Election Inspectors and Board of Canvassers in hazardous areas during elections.

name: HBN-01390
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MAILHI, MUNICIPALITY OF BAYBAY, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO BE KNOWN AS MAILHI NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01391
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING HILONGOS NATIONAL VOCATIONAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF HILONGOS, PROVINCE OF LEYTE INTO SOUTHWESTERN LEYTE STATE POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE

name: HBN-01392
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 2, 3, AND 4 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2000 ENTITLED, 'LIMITED ACCESS HIGHWAYS ACT'
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to substitute any and all reference to the \"Department of Public Works and Communications\" in RA 2000 (Limited Access Highway Act) to the \"Department of Public Works and Highways.\"

name: HBN-01393
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 32 (h) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4136 HEREBY REQUIRING THE MANDATORY COMPLIANCE BY ALL MOTORCYCLES TO AUTOMATICALLY TURN ON AND RIDE WITH THEIR HEADLIGHTS ON AT ALL HOURS OF THE DAY ON ALL ROADS
congress_website_abstract: \"Automatic Headlights On for Motorcycles Act of 2004.\" For the safety of all motorcycle drivers and passengers thereon and the commuting public, in general, all motorcycles are required to run on all roads with headlights turned on at all hours of the day. It requires motorcycle manufacturers to ensure that an automatic headlights on system is installed before sale.

name: HBN-01394
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 34 (h) OF THE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4136 OR THEREBY REQUIRING THE MANDATORY COMPLIANCE BY ALL MOTORCYCLES OPERATORS, DRIVERS, RIDERS AND/OR PASSENGERS TO WEAR SAFETY HELMET
congress_website_abstract: \"Motorcycle Helmets Use Act of 2004.\" For the safety of motorcycle drivers and passengers, the bill provides for the mandatory use by motorists (drivers and passengers) of safety helmets of an approved type. The safety helmet shall be specifically designed to cushion and protect the rider's head from the impact of a crash.

name: HBN-01395
title: DR. JOSE N. RODRIGUEZ MEMORIAL HOSPITAL
long_title: AN ACT CONVERTING TWO HUNDRED (200) BEDS OF THE 2000-BED DR. JOSE N. RODRIGUEZ MEMORIAL HOSPITAL AND SANITARIUM FOR TERTIARY GENERAL HEALTH CARE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING 200 BEDS OF THE 2000-BED DR. JOSE N. RODRIGUEZ MEMORIAL HOSPITAL AND SANITARIUM FOR TERTIARY GENERAL HEALTH CARE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
subjects: ['Hospital, Conversion (Caloocan City)', 'Dr. Jose N. Rodriguez Memorial Hospital']

name: HBN-01396
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING ADDITIONAL METROPOLITAN TRIAL COURT BRANCHES FOR CALOOCAN CITY, WITH STATIONS AT CALOOCAN CITY (NORTH) AND CALOOCAN CITY (PROPER), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 27 OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7154, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1981,' AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01397
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE BOUNDARIES BETWEEN CALOOCAN CITY AND MALABON, THEREBY AMENDING SECTION 2 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9019 KNOWN AS THE CHARTER OF THE CITY OF MALABON

name: HBN-01398
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING CITY MAYORS, MUNICIPAL MAYORS AND PROVINCIAL GOVERNORS FROM MAKING APPOINTMENTS TWO (2) MONTHS IMMEDIATELY BEFORE THE NEXT LOCAL ELECTIONS AND PENDING ASSUMPTION TO OFFICE OF THEIR SUCCESSORS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits outgoing local elective officials from making casual, contractual, temporary or permanent appointments after the local elections and pending assumption to office of their successors.

name: HBN-01344
congress_website_title: AN ACT ALLOCATING FIFTY (50%) PER CENTUM OF THE NATIONAL AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT'S SHARE IN ANY RECLAMATION PROJECTS TO PUBLIC EDUCATION
congress_website_abstract: The proposed 50% allocation from the share of the national and local government in any reclamation project shall be used for a) the acquisition of school sites; b) construction, repair, improvement and maintenance of school buildings; c) procurement of desks, tables, visual aids, books, computers; d) recruitment of teachers; and e) other essential requirements.

name: HBN-01345
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING INCENTIVES TO FILIPINOS WHO WILL TRAVEL TO DOMESTIC TOURIST DESTINATIONS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Local Travel Incentives Act\". The bill proposes the grant of incentives, such as discounts on transportation, accommodiation and meal expenses, to domestic tourists.

name: HBN-01346
congress_website_title: AN ACT RESETTING THE DATE OF THE REGULAR ELECTION FOR ELECTIVE OFFICIALS OF THE ARMM AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE, RA 9140 ENTITLED 'AN ACT FIXING SETTING THE DATE OF THE REGULAR ELECTIONS FOR ELECTIVE OFFICIALS OF THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO ON THE LAST MONDAY OF NOVEMBER 2001', AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE RA 9012 ENTITLED 'AN ACT RESETTING THE REGULAR ELECTIONS FOR THE ELECTIVE OFFICIALS OF THE ARMM TO SECOND MONDAY OF SEPTEMBER 2001' AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE RA 8953

name: HBN-01347
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE THE DEVELOPMENT, UTILIZATION AND COMMERCIALIZATION OF RENEWABLE ENERGY SYSTEMS USING INDIGENOUS RESOURCES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Renewable Energy Act of 2004.\" Promotes the production, commercialization and utilization of renewable energy systems using indigenous resources such as biomass, solar, wind, geothermal, hydro and ocean energy. The use of alternative resources of energy, which are in abundant supply in the country, will lessen our dependence on imported fuel.

name: HBN-01348
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164, BY EXTENDING THE TERM OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS INTO FIVE (5) YEARS
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the synchronization of barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections to be held on the last Monday of October 2007 and every five years thereafter. Further fixes the term of barangay and sangguniang kabataan officials to five years.

name: HBN-01349
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 99 AND 262 OR BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 881, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE OMNIBUS ELECTION CODE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: RA 7166 failed to decriminalize acts with respect to persons making contributions to candidates and political parties. The bill seeks to remedy the situation by decriminalizing violations to Sections 98 and 99 of the Omnibus Election Code. Nevertheless, it imposes on persons who violate these sections administrative fines similar to those provided in Section 14 of RA 7166 which are imposed on candidates and political parties who fail to file a report on campaign contributions and expenditures. In addition to the fines, a contributor who fails to comply with Sections 98 and 99 will not be able to claim exemption from donor's tax.

name: HBN-01318
congress_website_title: AN ACT ADOPTING THE GROSS INCOME TAXATION FOR CORPORATIONS AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PERTINENT PROVISIONS OF TITLE II OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill proposes a shift in the tax structure of corporations from net income to gross income with a 15% tax rate. The proposed scheme is expected to enhance tax collection and significantly reduce tax leakages. Gross income taxation is deemed to be fair and simple to administer.

name: HBN-01319
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING COMPENSATION TO VICTIMS OF HUMAN RIGHTS VIOLATIONS DURING THE MARCOS REGIME, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Human Rights Compensation Act of 2004\". The bill provides for compensation, free of tax, from the State to human rights violations (HRV) victims. The amount of compensation shall be proportionate to the gravity of the human rights violations inflicted on the HRV victim. It also provides for the creation of the Board of Compensation for Victims of Human Rights Violations under the Marcos Regime.

name: HBN-01320
congress_website_title: AN ACT ABOLISHING THE DEATH PENALTY IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: The bill advocates the abolition of capital punishment and the substitution of the same with the penalty of reclusion perpetua or life imprisonment, as the case may be.

name: HBN-01321
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MAGNA CARTA FOR PUBLIC SOCIAL WELFARE AND DEVELOPMENT WORKERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for Public Social Welfare and Development Workers.\" The measure aims to institutionalize social work as a distinct profession. It provides for the code of conduct, work hours, compensation and other benefits of social workers.

name: HBN-01322
title: PANTUYAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL (DAVAO ORIENTAL)
long_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE CARAGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL – ANNEX IN BARANGAY P.M. SOBRECAREY, MUNICIPALITY OF CARAGA, PROVINCE OF DAVAO ORIENTAL FROM THE CARAGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE PANTUYAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE CARAGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-ANNEX IN BARANGAY P.M.SOBRECAREY, MUNICIPALITY OF CARAGA, PROVINCE OF DAVAO ORIENTAL, FROM THE CARAGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE PANTUYAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
subjects: ['Schools, Conversion (Davao Oriental)', 'Pantuyan National High School (Davao Oriental)']

name: HBN-01323
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE EXCISE TAX RATES ON PETROLEUM PRODUCTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 148 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: Proposes to increase the excise tax being imposed on petroleum products by PhP2.00. The tax rate on liquefied petroleum gas (LPG), which is a basic household need, has been excluded from the proposed increase and remains at zero.

name: HBN-01324
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SADANGA, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS THE BELWANG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01325
