congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BONTOC, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS THE DALICAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PARACELIS, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS THE BURINGAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01327
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NATONIN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS THE BANAWEL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01328
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BESAO, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS THE BANGUITAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01329
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SABANGAN MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS THE DATA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01330
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NATONIN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS THE SALIOK NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01331
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TADIAN, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS THE DACUDAC NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01332
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 7309 ENTITLED 'AN ACT CREATING A BOARD OF CLAIMS UNDER THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE FOR VICTIMS OF UNJUST IMPRISONMENT OR DETENTION AND VICTIMS OF VIOLENT CRIMES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES'
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to transfer the Board of Claims from the Department of Justice to the Commission on Human Rights. It further proposes the following amendments to RA 7309: a) expands the categories of claimants; b) increases the compensation ceiling; c) provides for safeguards against false claims.

name: HBN-01333
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR SAFETY MEASURES ON THE PRACTICE OF DENTAL MEDICINE, ENSURING ITS QUALITY AND STANDARD, INCREASING ITS PENALTIES THEREFROM, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 4419 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'PHILIPPINE DENTAL ACT OF 1965' AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: To deter illegal dental practitioners from rendering dental services, the bill proposes certain safety measures to ensure the well being of the public. It increases penalties imposed on persons who practice dentistry without a certificate of registration from a fine of PhP3,000 to PhP5,000 and imprisonment of 1-5 years to a fine of PhP50,000 to PhP200,000 and imprisonment of 10-20 years.

name: HBN-01334
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A FISHERIES AND AQUATIC RESOURCES CENTER IN THE CITY OF ROXAS IN THE PROVINCE OF CAPIZ, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01335
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN ANIMAL BREEDING STATION AND LIVESTOCK FARM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PANITAN, PROVINCE OF CAPIZ AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01336
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A CREDIT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM FOR OVERSEAS WORKERS
congress_website_abstract: The bill extends to an overseas Filipino worker, with a valid contract certified by the POEA, a PhP50,000 loan from the OWWA to defray the living expenses of his family during the first few months of his absence and his expenses incurred during the pre-employment period.

name: HBN-01337
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO UPGRADE THE SALARY SCALE OF A RETIRING GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEE BY ONE GRADE FOR PURPOSES OF HIS/HER RETIREMENT
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to offer a decent retirement benefit package to government personnel by upgrading the salary grade of a retiring employee by one grade on the date of his retirement. The upgraded salary scale shall then be used as the basis in computing the retirement benefits of the retiring employee.

name: HBN-01338
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MAGNA CARTA FOR SOCIAL WORKERS AND SOCIAL WELFARE AND DEVELOPMENT WORKERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Magna Carta for Social Workers and Social Welfare and Development Workers\". The highlights of the bill include: a) the appointment of social workers in all social welfare and development agencies; b) payment for overtime work rendered; c) reasonable workload; d) entitlement to additional benefits; and e) promotion of their rights and privileges.

name: HBN-01339
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A COMPREHESIVE JUVENILE JUSTICE SYSTEM AND DELINQUENCY PREVENTION PROGRAM, CREATING THE OFFICES OF JUVENILE JUSTICE AND DELINQUENCY PREVENTION; CHILDREN'S OMBUDSMAN, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to reform the present justice sytem and establish a comprehensive juvenile justice system. Provides for the exemption of minors from the penalties of crimes such as prostitution, mendicancy, vagrancy and curfew, among others; raises the age of criminal responsibility from nine to twelve years old and adheres to international standards concerning juvenile justice.

name: HBN-01340
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ANNUAL INCREASE OF THE AMOUNT OF PENSION PAID TO ALL RETIRED GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES BY AT LEAST AN AMOUNT EQUIVALENT TO THE RATED ANNUAL INCREASE IN THE NATIONAL LIVING INDEX AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The rising cost of living has made it increasingly difficult for retired government employees to provide for their family's daily sustenance from their monthly pension. The bill seeks to grant retirees an automatic increase in their pension equivalent to the annual rate of increase in the cost of living index.

name: HBN-01341
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING ALL IRRIGATED AND IRRIGABLE AGRICULTURAL LANDS AS PROTECTED AREAS FOR AGRICULTURE, BANNING ITS CONVERSION FOR USES OTHER THAN AGRICULTURE, AND AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 20 OF REPUBLIC ACT 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE
congress_website_abstract: \"National Protected Areas for Agriculture (NPAA) Law.\" The bill declares as National Protected Areas for Agriculture all irrigated agricultural lands planted with, but not limited to, rice, corn, sugar, coconut and other crops, blocked and mapped according to standards of the Bureau of Soils and Water. Such lands shall be non-negotiable for conversion to other uses.

name: HBN-01342
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8794 OR 'AN ACT IMPOSING A MOTOR VEHICLE USERS' CHARGE ON OWNER OF ALL TYPES OF MOTOR VEHICLES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES'
congress_website_abstract: The Road User's Tax Law is viewed to be regressive and untimely. This bill seeks the repeal of the law considering that motorists and other fuel users are already paying excise taxes on petroleum products.

name: HBN-01343
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A SPECIAL FUND FOR THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL RED CROSS BLOOD SERVICES
congress_website_abstract: The bill creates a special fund in the amount of P50.0 million which will be used by the Philippine National Red Cross Blood Services to ensure an adequate and safe supply of blood for charity patients. The fund shall be sourced from the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office, the Philippine Amusement and Gaming Corporation and the National Treasury through the Department of Health.

name: HBN-01255
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7898 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'AFP MODERNIZATION ACT'
congress_website_abstract: This bill amends R.A. 7898 to attain the following, among others: 1) fix the annual appropriation for the AFP Modernization Act in an amount not less than 0.3% of the last officially reported gross national product; 2) establish a research and development program to upgrade existing AFP inventory of equipment and weapon systems; 3) expand the sources of funding for the AFP Modernization Act Trust Fund to include the proceeds from the lease and/or joint venture agreements and such other dispositions pertaining to military camps; 4) adopt a Defense Acquisition System which shall be separate and distinct from the procurement system applicable to other departments of government; and 5) create the office of the Undersecretary in the Department of National Defense for Resource Management and Capability Development.

name: HBN-01256
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE DISPOSAL AND/OR COMMERCIAL DEVELOPMENT OF CERTAIN MILITARY CAMPS AND RESERVATIONS, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE THE MILITARY REAL ESTATE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Military Real Estate Development Act.\" To raise funds for the AFP Modernization Program, the bill authorizes the President of the Philippines to identify military real estate or parts thereof that could be disposed of and/or commercially developed based on established criteria for disposal.

name: HBN-01257
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE ALIWAGWAG FALLS LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF BOSTON AND CATEEL, PROVINCE OF DAVAO ORIENTAL AND THE MUNICIPALITY OF COMPOSTELA, PROVINCE OF COMPOSTELA VALLEY AS A PROTECTED AREA UNDER THE CATEGORY OF PROTECTED LANDSCAPE AND ITS PERIPHERAL AREAS AS BUFFER ZONE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS

ROJAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

ROJAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF THE PHILIPPINE SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL-SORSOGON CAMPUS IN THE PROVINCE OF SORSOGON AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NINETEEN (19) KILOMETERS CASIGURAN-GUBAT PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF CASIGURAN-GUBAT, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01263
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TWELVE (12) KILOMETERS CUMADCAD-MACALAYA PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CASTILLA, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01264
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY DINAPA, MUNICIPALITY OF CASTILLA, PROVINCE OF SORSOGON, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01265
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING ARTICLE 13(a), TITLE V, BOOK III OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: This bill directs the mandatory appointment of a social welfare development officer in every provincial, city AND MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENT.

name: HBN-01266
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 263 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: This bill provides that a Collective Bargaining Agreement (CBA) may stipulate that no labor union may strike and no employer may declare a lockout: Provided, that 1) the said agreement is negotiated in the collective bargaining agreement; 2) the \"no strike-no lockout\" agreement is limited to matters which are economic in nature or one which is conducted to force wage or other concessions from the employer not granted by the law itself; 3) the \"no strike-no lockout\" agreement shall exist only for a period of time; and 4) the \"no strike clause\" shall be operative only in times of national unemployment emergency.

name: HBN-01267
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING ARTICLE 13 (a), TITLE V, BOOK III OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: This bill protects the rights of Filipino Interior Designers by setting forth conditions under which foreigners may perform professional services as interior designers or consultants in the country. Requires foreigners to secure a special temporary permit from the Professional Regulation Commission to practice their profession

name: HBN-01268
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN EMERGENCY PREPAREDNESS PLAN TO PREVENT AND SUPPRESS THE SPREAD OF EMERGENCY INFECTIOUS DISEASES AND OTHER EPIDEMICS
congress_website_abstract: \"Infectious Disease Emergency Preparedness Act of 2004.\" This bill authorizes the isolation and quarantine of those infected as measures to control infectious diseases. It establishes an emergency preparedness plan to prevent and suppress the spread of infectious diseases and other epidemics by undertaking medical examination and treatment of overseas Filipino workers while abroad, and authorizes the arrest, apprehension, detention or conditional release of individuals to prevent the introduction, transmission or spread of suspected infectious diseases.

name: HBN-01269
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR FIREARMS REGULATION AND EXEMPTING SELECTED PERSONS AND ENTITIES FROM THE GENERAL PROHIBITION AGAINST CARRYING OF FIREARMS
congress_website_abstract: This bill identifies the persons who are exempted from the general prohibition to carry firearms in public. It also provides the standards for the issuance of a firearms license and permit to carry firearms.

name: HBN-01270
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE AUTOMATIC ANNUAL INCREASE OF THE AMOUNT OF PENSION PAID TO ALL RETIRED GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES BY AT LEAST AN AMOUNT EQUIVALENT TO THE RATE OF ANNUAL INCREASE IN THE NATIONAL LIVING INDEX, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Rationale: Retired government officials, employees and workers deserve the concern of the government for their welfare and well-being, as they had devoted and dedicated the best years of their lives working under the government in the service of the people.

name: HBN-01271

name: HBN-01275
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE MABAAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, BANSA ANNEX IN BARANGAY BANSA, MUNICIPALITY OF BAUKO MOUNTAIN PROVINCE FROM THE MABAAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAUKO MOUNTAIN PROVINCE AND CONVERTING THE SAME INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE BANSA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01276
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXTENDING THE TERM OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS AND SETTING OF THE DATE OF THE ELECTION OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS, AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164
congress_website_abstract: This bill extends the term of all barangay officials from three (3) years to five (5) years so that election for these offices shall be held every five (5) years.

name: HBN-01277
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING CERTAIN ACTS OR TRANSACTIONS IN GOVERNMENT OFFICES AS 'FIXING' AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Fixing Law of 2004.\" This bill defines fixing as any arrangement and/or agreement whereby relative immunity from application of the law is obtained or that which hastens and facilitates processes in government transactions through the use of corrupt methods or employment of economic and social influence to public officials and employees, law enforcement officers and other authorities for the benefit of another person who is in legal difficulty or who seeks political or economic favor or concession.

name: HBN-01278
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE PUBLICATION, SALE OR DISTRIBUTION, PRODUCTION, IMPORTATION AND EXHIBITION OF OBSCENE AND PORNOGRAPHIC MATERIALS AND THE DEMONSTRATION, PERFORMANCE OR EXHIBITION IN PUBLIC INDECENT AND SEXUAL ACTS AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Obscenity and Pornography Act of 2004.\" This bill declares it a State policy to safeguard the morality of society, particularly the youth and women, against the eroding influence of immoral doctrines, obscene and pornographic publications and indecent shows. It seeks to prohibit the public demonstration of sexual acts, the distribution, sale and production of pornographic materials and provides penalties for violations.

name: HBN-01279
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CREATION OF THE NATIONAL INDEPENDENT COMMISSION AGAINST CORRUPTION, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Independent Commission Against Corruption Act of 2004.\" This bill creates a Commission which is mandated to implement and coordinate, at the national level, the prevention, control and elimination of graft and corrupt practices at all levels in government.

name: HBN-01280
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED TWO, PRESCRIBING STIFFER PENALTIES FOR JUETENG, AND OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Jueteng Act of 2004.\" Declares it the policy of the State to eradicate jueteng, promote local revenues through honest, legitimate, lawful and ethical means and impose heavier sanctions and penalties on local administrators and law enforcers who provide protection to jueteng operators and syndicates.

name: HBN-01281
congress_website_title: AN ACT LIBERALIZING AND ACCELERATING THE PROCESSING AND DEPLOYMENT OF OVERSEAS FILIPINO CONTRACT WORKERS, AND APPROPRIATING THE NECESSARY FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"OFW Liberation Act of 2004.\" This bill amends the Migrant Workers Act by clarifying the State's policy as regards overseas employment. By virtue of this Act, the State shall actively promote overseas employment to achieve national development. Directs the Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE) to pursue programs and policies that simplify the requirements for overseas employment.

name: HBN-01282
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MODERNIZATION OF THE PHILIPPINE COAST GUARD AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Coast Guard Modernization Act.\" This bill aims to give the Philippine Coast Guard a fighting chance at being the best it can be by providing for the modernization of its equipment and training, and the allocation of the necessary funds for this purpose.

name: HBN-01283
congress_website_title: AN ACT RENAMING THE LEYTE-BILIRAN BRIDGE AS MARCELINO R. VELOSO BRIDGE

name: HBN-01284
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE CATANDUANES STATE COLLEGES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF VIRAC, PROVINCE OF CATANDUANES, INTO A STATE UNIVERSITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CATANDUANES STATE UNIVERSITY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01285
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING PHILIPPINE EMBASSIES ANS CONSULATES TO CONDUCT CLASSES FOR CHILDREN OF FILIPINOS IN OTHER COUNTRIES, TO EDUCATE THEM ON PHILIPPINE HISTORY, CULTURE, LANGUAGES AND CIVICS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: This bill requires all Philippine embassies and consulates, particularly in countries where there are Filipino expatriates, to conduct special classes, free of charge, during Saturdays for children of Filipino parentage to educate them on Philippine history, languages, culture and civics.

name: HBN-01286
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL PROGRAM FOR FILIPINO GIFTED CHILDREN AND SCIENCE-ORIENTED YOUTH, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Gifted Children and Science-Oriented Youth Act.\" This bill enumerates the following objectives: a) identify the gifted Filipino children and science-oriented youth; b) establish a Center for the identification and nurturance of these children; c) provide scholarship grants and other forms of assistance for gifted children; d) provide funds for research and development, curriculum development, training of parents, teachers and other personnel and the necessary infrastructure; e) provide incentives to government institutions and the private sector that participate in the implementation of this Act, and f) establish and maintain linkages with national and international institutions involved in progress on giftedness.

name: HBN-01287
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING COMMERCIAL HANDLINE FISHING AND VESSEL AND PROVIDING REGULATIONS FOR UTILIZATION THEREOF, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE 'THE PHILIPPINE FISHERIES CODE OF 1998'
congress_website_abstract: This bill seeks to give weight to traditional fishing practices and small fishermen by defining handline commercial fishing as a traditional passive fishing method which utilizes a single fishing line and attached hook; and handline commercial vessel as a commercial fishing vessel which exclusively utilizes the commercial handline fishing method.

name: HBN-01288
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING ADDITIONAL SAFEGUARDS TO THE INTER-COUNTRY ADOPTION OF FILIPINO CHILDREN, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE INTER-COUNTRY ADOPTION ACT OF 1995
congress_website_abstract: This bill prohibits MEMBERS OF THE BOARD, INCLUDING THE AGENCIES, INSTITUTIONS AND ORGANIZATIONS TO WHICH ANY MEMBER IS PRESENTLY OR WAS PREVIOUSLY ASSOCIATED, FROM RECEIVING MONEY, DONATION OR OTHER BENEFITS, DIRECT OR INDIRECTLY, BY REASON OF HIS OFFICE OF THE IMPLEMENTATION OF THE INTER-COUNTRY ADOPTION LAW.

name: HBN-01289
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY PROPER, MUNICIPALITY OF POLOMOLOK, PROVINCE OF SOUTH COTABATO, TO BE KNOWN AS PABLO VALENCIA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01290
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SEPARATE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TINAGACAN, GENERAL SANTOS CITY, TO BE KNOWN AS THE TINAGACAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01291
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 4 AND 6, PARAGRAPH (c) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6972, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'BARANGAY-LEVEL TOTAL DEVELOPMENT AND PROTECTION OF CHILDREN ACT', AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill increases the allowance of day care workers to PHP2,000.00 and mandates the Sangguniang Bayan or Sangguniang Panglungsod to create one mandatory position of Barangay Day Care Worker in every barangay.

name: HBN-01292
congress_website_title: AN ACT REAPPORTIONING THE LEGISLATIVE DISTRICTS THROUGHOUT THE COUNTRY AMONG PROVINCES AND CITIES
congress_website_abstract: This bill envisions to achieve equality of representation, a basic principle of republicanism, through the reapportionment of districts which, following the constitutional requirement, shall, as far as practicable, be comprised of contiguous, compact and adjacent territories.

name: HBN-01293
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FREE TUITION AND OTHER FEES TO CHILDREN OF TEACHERS AND EMPLOYEES IN PUBLIC AND PRIVATE INSTITUTIONS OF HIGHER LEARNING
congress_website_abstract: This bill extends educational assistance to children of our mentors in the form of tuition fee exemption and discounts to enable them to obtain a college education with less financial and psychological strain on their parents. It also extends the same privileges to children of other employees of educational institutions, who, in their own capacity, facilitate the educational attainment of our children.

name: HBN-01294
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE SHOWING OF TELEVISION ADVERTISEMENTS FEATURING SEX AND/OR VIOLENCE TO CHILDREN OF TENDER AGE
congress_website_abstract: \"Television Advertisement Regulation Act of 2004.\" This bill regulates the showing of film or movie advertisements or trailers on television depicting sex and violence by restricting their viewing to hours when children of formative years are not usually watching television. Directs the Movie and Television Review and Classification Board (MTRCB) to implement the provisions of this Act and imposes a stiffer penalty for violation thereof.

name: HBN-01295
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANDATORY AUTOPSY OF ANY PERSON WHO DIED IN A VIOLENT, SUSPICIOUS, QUESTIONABLE, UNUSUAL AND/OR UNNATURAL MANNER, THE CONDITIONS FOR THE PROPER ISSUANCE OF THE DEATH CERTIFICATE OF SAID PERSON AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Autopsy Act of 2004.\" Rationale: The autopsy shall be conducted in a manner that will ensure the proper determination of the cause, manner and other surrounding circumstances of death, and must rule out every other possible and conceivable contributing cause.

name: HBN-01296
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7610 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'THE SPECIAL PROTECTION OF CHILDREN AGAINST CHILD ABUSE, EXPLOITATION AND DISCRIMINATION ACT', AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill enumerates additional remedial measures to correct the deplorable manner by which local government and law enforcement officials, as well as members of the justice sector, handle cases of child rape and sexual molestations and child prostitution involving minors below the age of twelve (12). It provides for the issuance of an automatic hold order for those accused to prevent them from fleeing abroad. Furthermore, it imposes the maximum penalty on law enforcers and members of the Judiciary Department found guilty including willfully abetting these crimes or causing or assisting in the plight of those accused.

name: HBN-01297
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING PRE-AUDIT ON ALL GOVERNMENT PROGRAMS AND PROJECTS WITH FUNDING REQUIREMENTS BEFORE IMPLEMENTATION AND PRESCRIBING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: This bill declares that any official or employee who approves or allows the implementation of a certain program or project with government funding without undergoing pre-audit shall for the first offense, suffer the penalty of suspension from office for a period of not less than fifteen (15) days nor more than sixty (60) days; for second of succeeding offenses, the penalty of imprisonment of not less than six (6) months but not more than six (6) years shall be imposed on the offender, plus perpetual disqualification to hold public office.

name: HBN-01298
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MORE RESPONSIVE AND COMPREHENSIVE REGULATION FOR THE PRACTICE OF CHEMICAL ENGINEERING IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: \"Revised Chemical Engineering Law.\" Rationale: The present advances in technology practically make all phases of engineering work fully automated. The availability of advanced, sophisticated and modern instruments has rendered Republic Act No. 318 obsolete, sometimes irrelevant and impractical. A review of the law would reveal that some provisions thereof are inapplicable and therefore prone to be violated than followed.

congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR PROTECTION TO CONSUMERS IN THEIR CREDIT CARD TRANSACTIONS
congress_website_abstract: \"Credit Card Consumer Protection Act of 2002.\" The bill provides for unauthorized use of card and billing errors and prohibits retailers from imposing surcharges on purchases made through credit cards.

congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes a fine of P100,000 and imprisonment of three to six years to violators of this Act.

BONCODIN ROAD

congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING GOVERNMENT SUBSIDY TO FARMERS' IRRIGATION FEES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3601 AS AMENDED AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to help farmers cope with low production, costly fertilizers and labor by granting them a 50% subsidy on irrigation fees.

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE REGISTRY OF DEEDS OF THE PROVINCE OF COMPOSTELA VALLEY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE OF COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01204
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE DEPARTMENT OF TRADE AND INDUSTRY PROVINCIAL OFFICE OF COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01205
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING APPROPRIATE CIVIL SERVICE ELIGIBILITY TO ELECTED LOCAL GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill grants Civil Service Professional eligibility to all rovincial Governors, Vice Governors, city and municipal Mayors who have rendered an aggregate service of at least three (3) years in the local government unit they served regardless of their educational attainment. It also grants the same eligibility to all members of the Sangguniang Panlalawigan, city and municipal Vice Mayors, members of the Sangguniang Panlungsod and Sangguniang Bayan provided that they have earned at least 72 units in college or equivalent to second year, otherwise only Career Service Sub-Professional eligibility shall be granted to them.

name: HBN-01206
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A STUDENT FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM FOR STUDENTS OF ECONOMICALLY DISADVANTAGED FAMILIES AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS FOR THE PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: This bill establishes a student financial assistance program in the collegiate level which caters to students of underprivileged families who are willing to continue and finish a degree course. Entitles the beneficiaries under this program to a monthly stipend, free tuition, book allowance and other miscellaneous fees to be determined by the administering agency.

name: HBN-01207
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A NATIONAL ECOTOURISM POLICY, ESTABLISHING A FRAMEWORK FOR ITS INSTITUTIONALIZATION, CREATING MECHANISM FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Ecotourism Policy Act of 2004.\" This bill identifies the areas comprising the ecotourism sites which include, but are not limited to, areas within the Integrated Protected Areas System as identified under RA 7586 and other areas with significant and relevant cultural heritage to be identified by the National Ecotourism Commission.

name: HBN-01208
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROTECT AND PROMOTE THE HEALTH OF THE PEOPLE THROUGH THE PREVENTION, CONTROL AND ABATEMENT OF AIR POLLUTION CAUSED BY SMOKE-BELCHING VEHICLES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1181, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill imposes an additional requirement prior to the registration or renewal a vehicle's registration. The requirement of subjecting the vehicle to a smoke belching test will certainly minimize, if not totally eradicate, air pollution caused by smoke-belching vehicles.

name: HBN-01209
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE RELEASE OF RETIREMENT, SEPARATION PAY AND BENEFITS WITH INTEREST FOR RETIRING OR RESIGNING GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS AND EMPLOYEES WITH ADMINISTRATIVE, CRIMINAL AND CIVIL CASES WHO ARE EVENTUALLY EXONERATED OR CLEARED THEREFROM
congress_website_abstract: This bill provides for retiring and resigning government officials and employees with administrative, criminal or civil cases, upon exoneration or clearance therefrom, to receive their retirement or separation pay and benefits with compounded interest computed from the period of their retirement or separation date up to date of the promulgation of the decision on their cases.

name: HBN-01210
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING THE SUBDIVISION GREEN PARK PROGRAM, GRANTING INCENTIVES TO HOMEOWNERS FOR THE DEVELOPMENT AND MAINTENANCE OF FORESTED AREAS WITHIN THEIR SUBDIVISIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Green Parks Act of 2004.\" This bill encourages the preservation of the ecological balance of nature by granting incentives for the development and maintenance of forested areas within subdivision projects.

name: HBN-01211
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE PRESERVATION, REFORESTATION, AFFORESTATION AND SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT OF MANGROVE FORESTS IN THE PHILIPPINES, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Mangrove Forest Protection and Preservation Act of 2004.\" This bill establishes and sets aside portions of land in the coastal areas solely for the preservation, protection, reforestation and sustainable management of mangrove forests. It penalizes the destruction and cutting of mangrove trees, as well as the dumping of waste products within the reservation areas and makes the offenders pay for the rehabilitation cost of the damaged mangrove areas.

name: HBN-01212
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING BUSINESS ONE-STOP SHOP (BOSS) CENTERS FOR SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES IN ALL REGIONAL AND PROVINCIAL CENTERS IN THE COUNTRY
congress_website_abstract: \"Business One-Stop-Shop (BOSS) Center Act of 2004.\" This bill mandates all government agencies involved in business start-ups to situate themselves, through a branch or satellite office, in the so-called Business One-Stop-Shop or BOSS Center to assist prospective entrepreneurs in securing documentary/business requirements/permits.

name: HBN-01213
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE NON-FORMAL EDUCATION ACCREDITATION AND EQUIVALENCY (NFE A&E) SYSTEM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Non-Formal Education (NFE) Act of 2004.\" This bill defines the main objective of the non-formal education learning center which is to serve as the specific venue for conducting non-formal education such as basic literacy education, vocational skills training, values development and other socio-cultural activities.

name: HBN-01214
title: MAGNA CARTA FOR DISABLED PERSONS
long_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7277, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE MAGNA CARTA FOR DISABLED PERSONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING OTHER PRIVILEGES AND INCENTIVES TO PERSONS WITH DISABILITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE 'MAGNA CARTA FOR DISABLED PERSONS'
congress_website_abstract: This bill states that persons with disabilities are as vulnerable as senior citizens, thus they should be given the same privileges enjoyed by senior citizens. The grant of similar privileges will surely boost the moral of persons with disabilities and make them feel that they are valued members of society and not a burden to their families and their communities.

name: HBN-01215
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ENCOURAGE THE PARTICIPATION OF PEOPLE'S AND NON-GOVERNMENTAL ORGANIZATIONS (NGOs) AND STRENGTHEN THEIR ROLE IN NATIONAL DEVELOPMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"PO-NGO Empowerment Act of 2004.\" This bill establishes mechanisms by which the government may assist people's organizations and non-government organizations to expand their operations to cover more areas in the country. Assistance to POs and NGOs may be in the form of: 1) project grants; 2) matching grants; 3) concessional loans; 4) technical, training and organizational development support; and 5) such other assistance or support as may be mutually determined to be appropriate and proper.

name: HBN-01216
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE LEGITIMATION OF CHILDREN BORN TO PARENTS BELOW MARRYING AGE, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE FAMILY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: This bill amends Article 177 of EO No 209, as follows: \"Art. 177. Only children conceived and born outside of wedlock of parents who, at the time of the cenception of the former, were not disqualified by any impediment to marry each other may be legitimated: PROVIDED, THAT THOSE CONCEIVED AND BORN TO PARENTS UNDER AGE OF MAJORITY MAY BE ELIGIBLE FOR LIGITIMATION.\"

name: HBN-01217
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE AMOUNT OF SUPPLIES WHICH MAY BE PROCURED BY LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS THROUGH PERSONAL CANVASS, THEREBY AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 367 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160
congress_website_abstract: This bill seeks to increase the amount of supplies and equipment items which may be purchased by local government units without public bidding and the approval of the Committee on Awards.

name: HBN-01218
congress_website_title: AN ACT REDEFINING THE TERM 'VETERAN' THEREBY AMENDING FURTHER REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6948 AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: This bill seeks to clarify the definition of VETERAN in order to reconcile inconsistencies in the definition as stated in RAs 6948, 7696 vis-a-vis Section 7 of the Constitution. It defines VETERAN as ANY PERSON WHO IS A WAR VETERAN OR A VETERAN OF A MILITARY CAMPAIGN OR WHO RENDERED MILITARY SERVICE IN THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES. A WAR VETERAN IS ANY PERSON WHO RENDERED MILITARY SERVICE IN THE LAND, SEA OR AIR FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINE WHEN THE PHILIPPINES WAS AT WAR AND FOREIGN NATIONALS WHOO SERVED IN THE PHILIPPINE FORCES. A VETERAN OF A MILITARY CAMPAIGN IS ANY PERSON WHO BECAME PART OF THE PHILIPPINE EXPEDITIONARY FORCES SENT ABROAD OR WHO RENDERED SERVICE IN A PHILIPPINE MILITARY UNIT WHEN SAID UNIT PARTICIPATED IN A MILITARY CAMPAIGN SO DESIGNATED BY THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES. A VETERAN WHO RENDERED MILITARY SERVICE IN THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES IS ONE WHO HAS BEEN HONORABLY DISCHARGED OR SEPARATED AFTER HAVING AVAILED THE MANDATORY OR OPTIONAL RETIREMENT PROGRAM.

name: HBN-01219
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE OPENING OF NIGHT CLASSES USING EXISTING HIGH SCHOOL AND ELEMENTARY SCHOOL FACILITIES ALL OVER THE COUNTRY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: This bill directs all public elementary and high schools to allow their school facilities to be used as a venue for the holding of night high school classes. The compensation of the teachers of the night high school shall be computed on an hourly basis, taking into account the premium compensation rates provided by law for night time service and overtime work.

name: HBN-01220
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 122-A, AS AMENDED BY EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 295, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ACT CREATING THE OFFICE ON MUSLIM AFFAIRS
congress_website_abstract: This bill seeks to address the problems encountered in the conduct of the Hajj which has been marred with irregularities and charges of mismanagement.

name: HBN-01221
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE USE OF THE WORDS 'MUSLIM' AND 'CHRISTIAN' IN PRINT AND BROADCAST MEDIA TO DESCRIBE ANY PERSON SUSPECTED OF OR CONVICTED FOR HAVING COMMITTED CRIMINAL OR UNLAWFUL ACT AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: This bill declares it unlawful for any person to use the words \"Muslim\" and \"Christian\" or any other word that would denote religious, racial, cultural or ethnic affiliation in print, television, radio or any broadcast media to describe any person suspected of or convicted for having committed criminal or unlawful acts. It seeks to give due justice to our Muslim brothers by not, subconsciously, propagating tribal or racial biases in the media.

name: HBN-01222
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE ARTISTS CAREER SERVICE, RECOGNIZING THE SPECIAL QUALIFICATIONS OF ARTISTS IN GOVERNMENT, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill creates the Artists Career Service (ACS) as one of the closed career services of the civil service. It also creates a system of recruitment, career progression, recognition and reward of artists in the public service, and a means of selecting, developing and retaining a pool of highly qualified and productive artist personnel. Grants eligibilities to members of the service, from the first, second and third levels corresponding to the regular career service.

name: HBN-01223
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO LIBERALIZE THE OPERATIONS OF RURAL BANKS AMENDING FOR THAT PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7353, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE NEW RURAL BANKS ACT OF 1992 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This amendatory bill claims to resolve the issues, plug the loopholes, decrease the financial cost of borrowers and redirect the flow of funds to the countryside.

name: HBN-01224
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING LAKELETS MANAPAO, KATUGDAY, MAYDANAO AND MAKUAO OF BUHI, CAMARINES SUR AS PROTECTED AREA AND ITS PERIPHERAL AREAS AS BUFFER ZONES, PROVIDING FOR ITS MANAGEMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01225
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ENHANCE FARM PRODUCTIVITY BY PROVIDING STRATEGIC FARM IRRIGATION SUPPORTS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Farm Productivity Act of 2004.\" This bill provides for a strategic provision of irrigation farm support with the view of increasing farm productivity. It grants incentives for the promotion of cost-effective irrigation technologies.

name: HBN-01226
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PILI DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"The Pili Development Authority Act of 2004.\" Declares it a policy of the State to foster and accelerate the growth and development of the pili industry so that the benefits of such growth shall redound to the greater sustainability of the industry and improvement in the welfare of the pili farmers and processors. Pursuant to this policy, the State shall promote the preferential use of pili products and adopt measures that will help enhance its competitiveness.

name: HBN-01227
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE COCONUT LEVY FUNDS AS PUBLIC FUNDS, CREATING THE COCONUT INDUSTRY REHABILITATION AND DEVELOPMENT FUND AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill declares as public funds all coconut levy funds, which include all incomes, interests or profits derived therefrom, as well as all assets, properties and shares of stocks procured or obtained with the use of such funds; defines the term coconut levy funds as enforced contribution levied by the State on the coconut farmers pursuant to R.A. 6260, P.Ds 276, 582, 1841 and other pertinent amendatory laws, and creates the Coconut Industry Rehabilitation and Development Fund (CIRDF).

name: HBN-01228
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING INCENTIVES TO LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS HOSTING A SANITARY LANDFILL FOR THE NATIONAL CAPITAL REGION'S WASTE MATERIALS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill encourages local government units to host landfill facilities by increasing the internal revenue allotment (IRA) share of the province, municipality of city, and barangay hosting such landfill.

name: HBN-01229
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ANAYAN, PAWILI JUNCTION-BULA-PALSONG-TOPAZ (NABUA) ROAD, IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR FROM PROVINCIAL ROAD TO NATIONAL SECONDARY ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01230
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING BENEFITS TO ANY PERSON WHO DIED OR SUSTAINED INJURY WHILE TRYING TO PREVENT THE COMMISSION OF A CRIME OR WHILE COMING TO THE AID OR RESCUE OF A VICTIM OR VICTIMS OF A CRIME AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Good Samaritan Act.\" This bill refers the term \"Good Samaritan\" to any person who, whilst not being a member of any law enforcement agency, dies or sustains injury while trying to prevent the commission of a crime or while coming to the aid or rescue of a victim or victims of a crime. This bill accords due recognition to those who risk their life and limb by providing them cash benefits and assistance.

name: HBN-01231
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BUHI-TAMBO-TUBIGAN ROAD, IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, FROM PROVINCIAL ROAD TO NATIONAL SECONDARY ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01233
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BUHI DISTRICT HOSPITAL INTO AN EXTENSION OF THE BICOL MEDICAL CENTER TO BE KNOWN AS THE BICOL MEDICAL CENTER-BUHI EXTENSION, UPGRADING ITS FACILITIES AND INCREASING ITS BED CAPACITY TO FIFTY (50) BEDS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01234

name: HBN-01235
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING TANDAAY (NABUA)-LIBON (ALBAY BOUNDARY) ROAD, IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR, FROM PROVINCIAL ROAD TO NATIONAL SECONDARY ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01236
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS BY AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to provide dynamism in the implementation of devolved functions, programs, projects and services. It seeks to further broaden the tax base of the local government units.

name: HBN-01237
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TAGUGPO, MUNICIPALITY OF PANTUKAN, COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS TAGUGPO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01238
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING KIDAWA BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL OF BARANGAY KIDAWA, MUNICIPALITY OF LAAC, COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS KIDAWA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND PROVIDING APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01239
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3019, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ANTI-GRAFT AND CORRUPT PRACTICES ACT
congress_website_abstract: This bill amends the provision that penalizes acts of omissions of public officers which constitute corrupt practices of any public officer, as follows: FAILING OR REFUSING TO REPORT TO THE APPROPRIATE AUTHORITY ANY ACT OR OMISSION COMMITTED BY ANY OTHER PUBLIC OFFICIAL PUNISHABLE UNDER THIS ACT OR PENALIZED BY EXISTING LAW OF WHICH HE HAD WITNESSED OR HAD PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE OF WITHIN 72 HOURS OF HAVING WITNESSED OR ACQUIRED SUCH KNOWLEDGE. It provides further that: THE PUBLIC OFFICER OBLIGATED TO REPORT UNDER SUBPARAGRAPH SHALL BE ALLOWED TO AVAIL OF THE BENEFITS OF REPUBLIC ACT 6981, PROVIDED THAT HIS TESTIMONY CAN BE SUBSTANTIALLY CORROBORATED IN ITS MATERIAL POINTS, AND UPON APPROVAL BY THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE.

name: HBN-01240
title: AGRICULTURAL LAND OPEN FOR DISPOSITION (BGY JORDAN, LEYTE)
long_title: AN ACT DECLARING A PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN LOCATED IN BARANGAY JORDAN, MUNICIPALITY OF VILLABA, PROVINCE OF LEYTE AS AGRICULTURAL LAND OPEN TO DISPOSITION FOR AGRICULTURAL, RESIDENTIAL, COMMERCIAL, INDUSTRIAL, OR OTHER PRODUCTIVE PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING A PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN LOCATED IN BARANGAY JORDAN, MUNICIPALITY OF VILLABA, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, AS AGRICULTURAL LAND OPEN TO DISPOSITION FOR AGRICULTURAL, RESIDENTIAL, COMMERCIAL, INDUSTRIAL, OR OTHER PRODUCTIVE PURPOSES

name: HBN-01241
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING CERTAIN ROADS IN NORTHWESTERN LEYTE INTO NATIONAL ROADS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01242
title: AGRICULTURAL LAND OPEN FOR DISPOSITION (SITIO BURABOD VELOSO
long_title: AN ACT DECLARING A PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN LOCATED IN SITIO BURABOD VELOSO, BARANGAY INANGATAN, MUNICIPALITY OF TABANGO, PROVINCE OF LEYTE AS AGRICULTURAL LAND OPEN TO DISPOSITION FOR AGRICULTURAL, RESIDENTIAL, COMMERCIAL, INDUSTRIAL OR OTHER PRODUCTIVE PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING A PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN LOCATED IN SITIO BURABOD VELOSO, BARANGAY INANGATAN, MUNICIPALITY OF TABANGO, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, AS AGRICULTURAL LAND OPEN TO DISPOSITION FOR AGRICULTURAL, RESIDENTIAL, COMMERCIAL, INDUSTRIAL, OR OTHER PRODUCTIVE PURPOSES
subjects: ['Agricultural Land (Sitio Burabod Veloso)', 'Land(Public Domain, Bgy Inangatan, Leyte']

name: HBN-01243
title: MARCELINO R. VELOSO NATIONAL HIGHWAY
long_title: AN ACT NAMING THE CIRCUMFERENTIAL ROAD CONNECTING THE MUNICIPALITIES OF VILLABA, TABANGO, SAN ISIDRO, CALUBIAN AND LEYTE-LEYTE AS MARCELINO R. VELOSO NATIONAL HIGHWAY
congress_website_title: AN ACT NAMING THE CIRCUMFERENTIAL ROAD CONNECTING THE MUNICIPALITIES OF VILLABA, TABANGO, SAN ISIDRO, CALUBIAN AND LEYTE-LEYTE AS MARCELINO R. VELOSO HIGHWAY

name: HBN-01244
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A NATIONAL IDENTIFICATION (ID) SYSTEM TO CONSOLIDATE EXISTING ID SYSTEMS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"National Identification System Act of 2004.\" This bill seeks to establish and maintain a complete, adequate and consolidated National Identification System (National ID) to attain the following objectives: 1) to streamline and economize the bureaucracy by consolidating the present ID systems with the National ID system; 2) to facilitate and expedite statistical data gathering by pertinent government institutions; and 3) to provide Filipino citizens with a simple and effective identification system to conduct transactions.

name: HBN-01245
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 209 AS AMENDED BY EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 227, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FAMILY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, THEREBY LIMITING MARRIAGE TO NATURAL BORN MALES AND NATURAL BORN FEMALES
congress_website_abstract: This bill prohibits marriages abetween two men, one of whom had a sex exchange operation and between two women, one of whom also had a sex exchange operation. With recent developments in the field of medicine, it is now possible to alter or change a person's sexual organ to make it appear as that of the opposite sex. With this, we have directly challeged the laws of God, of nature and even of man.

name: HBN-01246
congress_website_title: AN ACT PREVENTING AND PENALIZING COMPUTER FRAUD, ABUSES AND OTHER CYBER-RELATED FRAUDULENT ACTIVITIES, AND CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE THE CYBER-CRIME INVESTIGATION AND COORDINATING CENTER, PRESCRIBING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Anti-Cyber Crime Act of 2001.\" This bill seeks to protect and safeguard the integrity of computers, computer systems, computer networks, computer servers, database, and information and data stores from computer users who resort to computer fraud, abuses and other cyber-related fraudulent activities, by providing penal sanctions to the perpetrators. It creates a coordinating body, the Cyber-Crime Investigation and Coordinating Center (CICC), which shall coordinate, collate and synergize efforts of all law enforcement agencies in combating cyber crimes.

name: HBN-01247
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING ALL DISPOSABLE LANDS OF THE GOVERNMENT WHICH HAVE REMAINED IDLE AND SUITABLE FOR RESIDENTIAL PURPOSES SHALL BE DEVELOPED INTO SOCIALIZED HOUSING SITE FOR LOW-SALARIED GOVERNMENT AND PRIVATE EMPLOYEES AND SQUATTERS
congress_website_abstract: \"The Idle Disposable Public Land Conversion Act.\" Declares it a policy of the State to promote the housing needs of its inhabitants specifically the low-salaried employees in both the public and the private sectors including squatters in the urban areas. Directs the National Housing Authority, after pinpointing the idle disposable public lands, to publish the areas for socialized housing projects and thereafter allocate such lands to qualified applicants for their housing needs.

name: HBN-01248
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 70 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991 AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: This bill seeks to improve the recall mechanism as mandated in the 1991 Local Government Code. Increases the percentage number of required voters to validate a recall proportionate to the number of the population of the local government unit whose elected official is the subject of a recall process.

name: HBN-01249
congress_website_title: AN ACT ABOLISHING THE DEATH PENALTY REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7659 ENTITLED, 'AN ACT TO IMPOSE THE DEATH PENALTY ON CERTAIN HEINOUS CRIMES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE REVISED PENAL CODE, AS AMENDED, OTHER SPECIAL PENAL LAWS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill abolishes death penalty and, in lieu thereof, imposes the penalty of reclusion perpetua. Justice must likewise be tempered with mercy in order for genuine repentance and change to have a chance to prosper. Hence, emphasis must be placed on restorative justice rather than retributive justice.

name: HBN-01250
congress_website_title: OMNIBUS HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT ACT
congress_website_abstract: \"Omnibus Housing and Urban Development Act of 2004.\" Declares it a policy of the State to: 1)undertake a comprehensive and continuing program of housing and urban development which will make available at affordable cost, decent housing and basic services; 2) adopt workable policies that will guarantee the rationalization and optimum utilization of land and resources; 3) develop a sustainable and viable housing finance system that shall tap alternative, including non-traditional, sources of funds, for the government's housing program; 4) rationalize and strengthen the urban development and shelter delivery system by enhancing local autonomy and decentralization and providing local government units more power, authority, responsibility and resources; and 5) institutionalize the citizenry's involvement at all levels of the urban planning and development process.

name: HBN-01251
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE POLYTECHNIC UNIVERSITY OF THE PHILIPPINES EXTENSION CAMPUS IN THE CITY OF SAN JOSE DEL MONTE, BULACAN AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01252
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN EDUCATION TRUST FUND FOR GRANTEES OF GSIS AND SSS MEMBERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Education Trust Fund Act.\" This bill defines the fund as the accumulated money deducted from GSIS and the SSS members and paid to the system for the education of the grantees, then paid to colleges or universities for a vocational, technical or baccalaureate program as provided in the policy contract.

name: HBN-01253
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING MERCHANDISING STORES FROM CHARGING MORE THAN THE RETAIL PRICE OF GOODS PURCHASED WITH CREDIT CARDS AND PRESCRIBING PENALTIES FOR ANY VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: This bill declares it unlawful for any merchandising store to charge customers with more than the actual retail price of the goods purchased when such purchase is done with the use of a credit card. Imposes a punishment of 6 months to 1 year imprisonment or a fine of P20,000 to P100,000.

name: HBN-01254
title: PREFERENCE OF EMPLOYMENT TO VETERANS CHILD
long_title: AN ACT EXTENDING PREFERENCE OF EMPLOYMENT TO ANY ONE CHILD OF VETERANS IN THE GOVERNMENT, INCLUDING GOVERNMENT-OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXTENDING PREFERENCE OF EMPLOYMENT TO ANY ONE CHILD OF VETERANS IN THE GOVERNMENT, INCLUDING GOVERNMENT-OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill declares it a policy of the State to enhance the socio-economic security and well-being of veterans and their families, thus all government agencies, including government-owned and/or controlled corporations are directed to hire or employ any child of a veteran. In the absence or disqualification of said child, a grandchild shall be hired or employed in his stead.

name: HBN-01110
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE PROHIBITED ACTS OF DISCRIMINATION AGAINST WOMEN ON ACCOUNT OF SEX, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 135 AND 137 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: This bill aims to expand the prohibited acts of discrimination against women to include: a) giving preference to male employees over a female employee in the hiring process; and b) favoring a male employee over a female with respect to dismissal of personnel.

name: HBN-01111
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE BOOKS FOR THE BARRIOS PROGRAM AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Books for the Barrios Act of 2004.\" The bill provides books to all public schools and libraries in remote barangays.

name: HBN-01112
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING TO USE THE ENGLISH LANGUAGE AS THE MEDIUM OF COMMUNICATION IN ALL GOVERNMENT-SPONSORED EXAMINATIONS
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to help students and examinees in non-Tagalog provinces who are disadvantage by their deficiency in Tagalog or Filipino.

name: HBN-01113
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS FROM COMPELLING THEIR GRADUATES TO TAKE REVIEW CLASSES AND/OR PRE-LICENSURE EXAMINATIONS OR REFRESHER COURSES THEREIN, AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to protect graduates of courses requiring board, bar or any licensing examination from being compelled to take review classes in the same school he graduated.

name: HBN-01114
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE GOLDEN ACRES HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX IN BARANGAY TALON 1, LAS PIÑAS CITY FROM THE LAS PIÑAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE GOLDEN ACRES NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01115
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE CAA HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX IN BARANGAY BF INTERNATIONAL/CAA, LAS PIÑAS CITY FROM THE LAS PIÑAS NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE CAA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01116
congress_website_title: AN ACT RECOGNIZING SOUTHVILLE INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL AS AN EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTION OF INTERNATIONAL CHARACTER, GRANTING CERTAIN PREROGATIVES CONDUCIVE TO ITS GROWTH AS SUCH, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01117
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE COASTAL ENVIRONMENT PROGRAM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-01190
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FURTHER BENEFITS TO PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS PROVIDING THE MECHANICS FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Kaguruan Kabayanihan Act.\" Grants public school teachers a 15% discount on restaurants, supermarkets, theaters, airlines, ships, buses, taxia and medicines.

name: HBN-01068
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO FURTHER PROMOTE THE DEVELOPMENT, UTILIZATION AND COMMERCIALIZATION OF RENEWABLE ENERGY SOURCES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Renewable Energy Act of 2003.\" The country has immense indigenous energy resources that can be utilized to mitigate our dependence on imported fuel. These renewable energy resources include biomass, solar, wind, geothermal, hydro and ocean energy and other emerging energy sources. The bill aims to accelerate the exploitation, development and utilization of these renewable energy sources to enable the country to attain energy self-sufficiency, energy afforability and rural electrification.

name: HBN-01069
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9164, TO EXTEND THE TERMS OF OFFICE OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS AND RESET THE DATE OF BARANGAY ELECTIONS
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to extend the term of office of barnagay and sangguniang kabataan officials from three years to five years. Elections for these offices shall be held every five years.

name: HBN-01070
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE EDUCATION AND LICENSURE OF PHYSICIANS AND THE PRACTICE OF MEDICINE IN THE PHILIPPINES, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2382, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Revised Philippine Medical Act.\" The bill seeks to standardize, upgrade and regulate medical courses including internship training. It provides for the supervision, control and regulation of the practice of medicine, the examination for registration and licensure of physicians, the integration of the medical profession under one national organization and the promotion of a continuing professional education program.

name: HBN-01071
congress_website_title: AN ACT RENAMING THE BOY SCOUTS OF THE PHILIPPINES TO SCOUT PHILIPPINES, DEFINING ITS OBJECTIVES, POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE COMMONWEALTH ACT NO. 111, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: \"Scouts Philippines Act of 2004.\" To enhance the practice of scouting in the country, the bill proposes the inclusion of girls into the Boy Scouts of the Philippines (BSP) and rename the same to the Scouts Philippines. It proposes to grant the organization tax exemptions and to name the President as the Chief Scout of the Scouts Philippines.

name: HBN-01072
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 286 OF REPUBLIC ACT 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, PROVIDING FOR THE AUTOMATIC APPROPRIATION AND RELEASE OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE ALLOTMENT OF LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS
congress_website_abstract: Section 286 of the Local Government Code provides for the automatic release of the internal revenue allotments to local government units. However, the provision does not provide for the automatic appropriations of the same. The bill provides for the automatic appropriation and release of the same to prevent delays in releases.

name: HBN-01073
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE POLITICAL PARTY SYSTEM AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Political Party Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to provide the institutional framework which shall govern the system of political parties in the country to make them more responsive to the needs of their members and of their constituencies. It provides definitive guidelines to reengineer and re-invent our current system of traditional politics and discourage political chameleons and butterflies.

name: HBN-01074
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING THE COOPERATIVE CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES TO BE KNOWN AS THE \"PHILIPPINE COOPERATIVE CODE OF 2004\"
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Cooperative Act of 2004.\" It has been noted that the growth and development of cooperatives have remained slow despite the enactment of the Cooperatives Code. The bill seeks to strengthen the Cooperatives Code of the Philippines to attract more groups to organize themselves into cooperatives.

name: HBN-01075
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY MANUEL GUIANGA, TUGBOK DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE EMILIO J. ESTIPONA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01076
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY ALAMBRE, TORIL DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE ALAMBRE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01077
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTBALISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BANTOL, MARILOG DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE BANTOL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01078
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY STO NINO, TUGBOK DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE STO NINO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01079
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY BARACATAN, TORIL DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARACATAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01080
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SALOY, CALINAN DISTRICT, DAVAO CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE SALOY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01081
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE PRACTICE OF REAL ESTATE SERVICE IN THE PHILIPPINES, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE A PROFESSIONAL REGULATORY BOARD OF REAL ESTATE SERVICE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Real Estate Service Act of the Philippines.\" The measure aims to professionalize and upgrade the real estate practice in the country to make it globally competitive. It provides for the creation of the Professional Regulatory Board which shall be tasked to supervise and monitor all real estate transactions, stabilize the prices of land and construction materials and ensure the collection of the correct amount of taxes.

name: HBN-01082
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN AND PROPAGATE FOSTER CARE FOR ABUSED, ABANDONED, NEGLECTED AND OTHER CHILDREN WITH SPECIAL NEEDS, PROVIDING APPROPRIATIONS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Foster Care Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to institutionalize foster caring in the country. It provides for a comprehensive legal framework within which the welfare and interests of those needing foster care and those who can provide it can be harmonized.

name: HBN-01083
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NASUGBU-TERNATE ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NASUGBU, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS AND IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TERNATE, PROVINCE OF CAVITE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01084
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING CRISIS INTERVENTION CENTERS FOR WOMEN AND CHILDREN VICTIMS AND SURVIVORS OF ABUSE OR EXPLOITATION, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Women's and Children Crisis Act.\" The bill seeks to institutionalize in every city and province at least one Women's and Children's Crisis Center to provide temporary shelter to women and children victims of violence, assist victims needing medical care, provide guidance counseling, secure legal assistance and provide training and placement.

name: HBN-01085
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE PROHIBITED ACTS OF DISCRIMINATION AGAINST WOMEN ON ACCOUNT OF SEX, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 135 AND 137 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: This bill aims to expand the prohibited acts of discrimination against women to include: a) giving preference to a male employee over a female employee in the hiring process; and b) favoring a male employee over a female with respect to dismissal of personnel.

name: HBN-01086
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE SEPARATION OF THE NUEVA VALENCIA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-CALAYA EXTENSION IN BARANGAY CALAYA, MUNICIPALITY OF NUEVA VALENCIA, PROVINCE OF GUIMARAS, FROM THE NUEVA VALENCIA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS CALAYA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01087
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MUSEUM IN THE PROVINCE OF GUIMARAS TO BE KNOWN AS THE GUIMARAS NATIONAL MUSEUM AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01088
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE SEPARATION OF THE BUENAVISTA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - AGSANAYAN EXTENSION IN BARANGAY AGSANAYAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BUENAVISTA, PROVINCE OF GUIMARAS FROM THE BUENAVISTA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE AGSANAYAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01089
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE STANDARDS FOR THE TRAINING AND PRACTICE OF REHABILITATION MEDICINE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Medical Rehabilitation Standards Act of 2004.\" To ensure that rehabilitation centers function with utmost competence, the bill seeks to set standards for the practice, training and certification of rehabilitation medicine to ensure the highest quality of professional rehabilitation service to the public. It also sets standards for the technical and operational aspects of rehabilitation centers.

name: HBN-01090
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS TO CONDUCT A QUARTERLY BREAST CANCER DETECTION PROGRAM
congress_website_abstract: \"Breast Cancer Detection Act of 2004.\" Cancer ranks as the third leading cause of death in the Philippines with breast cancer as the most prevalent. The bill seeks to institutionalize a national screening program for the early detection of breast cancer by compelling local government units, in cooperation with the Department of Health, to conduct quarterly tests.

name: HBN-01091
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE TOLEDO CITY SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADES IN THE CITY OF TOLEDO, PROVINCE OF CEBU AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01092
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE OPENING OF NIGHT HIGH SCHOOL CLASSES AT THE PINAMUNGAJAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PINAMUNGAJAN, PROVINCE OF CEBU AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01093
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TOLEDO CITY SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL IN THE CITY OF TOLEDO, PROVINCE OF CEBU INTO A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE TOLEDO CITY NATIONAL SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01094
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE GUIBUANGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL EXTENSION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BARILI, PROVINCE OF CEBU FROM THE PATUPAT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE GUIBUANGAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY GUIBUANGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BARILI, PROVINCE OF CEBU AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01095
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE POBLACION BARILI NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL FROM THE PATUPAT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE BARTOLOME AND MANUELA PANARES MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF BARILI, PROVINCE OF CEBU AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01096
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE BALARA FILTERS COMPOUND IN BARANGAY PANSOL AS A NATIONAL PARK, PROVIDING FOR ITS DEVELOPMENT AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-01097
title: HEALTH FACILITIES AND SERVICES LICENSURE ACT
long_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE LICENSURE OF ALL HEALTH FACILITIES AND SERVICES IN THE PHILIPPINES, REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FORTY-TWO HUNDRED TWENTY-SIX (R.A. NO. 4226), OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'HOSPITAL LICENSURE ACT', AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE LICENSURE OF ALL HEALTH FACILITIES AND SERVICES IN THE PHILIPPINES, REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FORTY-TWO HUNDRED TWENTY-SIX (R.A. NO. 4226), OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'HOSPITAL LICENSURE ACT,' AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure seeks to strengthen the Bureau of Health Facilities and Services (BHFS) by vesting it with quasi-judicial powers, allowing it to use its revenues to improve its capabilities and by streamlining the procedures and requirements in the issuance of licenses.

name: HBN-01098
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROVIDE AND PROMOTE NUMBER PORTABILITY FOR CELLULAR MOBILE TELEPHONE SERVICE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Cellular Mobile Telephone Number Portability Act of 2004.\" Cellular mobile telephone number portability (CMTNP) is defined as the right of a consumer to retain his cellular phone number when changing to another service provider. The bill requires service providers to give consumers the option to port telephone numbers between service providers by implementing the CMTNP throughout the network of cellular phone service providers.

name: HBN-01099
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PREVENT AND CONTROL MARINE POLLUTION FROM SHIPS AND FIXED AND FLOATING DRILLING RIGS AND OTHER FLATFORMS, PROVIDE PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Ship Pollution Prevention Act of 1998.\" The measure seeks to formulate a comprehensive marine environment protection program to prevent and control pollution from Philippine ships, all ships operating within our territorial seas and all fixed and floating drilling rigs and other flatforms. It also aims to implement the provisions of the MARPOL 73/78 which is the International Convention for the Prevention of Pollution from Ships.

name: HBN-01100
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A COMPREHENSIVE HAZARDOUS AND RADIOACTIVE WASTES MANAGEMENT, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF AND FOR OTHE PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Hazardous and Radioactive Wastes Management Act of 2003.\" The bill establishes a system of waste storage, transport, treatment and disposal. Sets the criteria for identifying hazardous radioactive waste which contain carcinogens, mutagens or teratogens at levels dangerous to human life. Prohibits the entry and transit of radioactice wastes into the country.

name: HBN-01101
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS, FUNCTIONS AND RESPONSIBILITIES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Environmental Management Authority.\" The bill creates the Authority to enforce laws preventing air, water and land pollution and disposal of waste.

congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING NEW POBLACION-TACAY PROVINCIAL ROAD, PROVINCE OF GUIMARAS INTO A NATIONAL ROAD
