congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE CABLE LINK HOLDINGS CORP. A FRANCHISE TO CONSTRUCT, INSTALL, ESTABLISH, OPERATE AND MAINTAIN CABLE/COMMUNITY ANTENNAE TELEVISION SYSTEMS IN THE PHILIPPINES

name: HBN-00693
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING HARBOR PILOTAGE SERVICES AND THE CONDUCT OF HARBOR PILOTS IN PHILIPPINE PORTS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Pilotage Services Act of 2001.\" The measure defines harbor pilotage as the maneuvering of ships in and out of the port through tights channels. Provides for the functions of the Philippine Ports Authority, qualification of harbor pilots, their accreditation and disqualification.

name: HBN-00694
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE MINDANAO RAILWAY SYSTEM

name: HBN-00695
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING APPROPRIATE CIVIL SERVICE ELIGIBILITY TO ELECTED LOCAL GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants eligibility to the following local officials who have served for 5 years: governor, vice-governor, mayor, vice-mayor and members of the sanggunian.

name: HBN-00696
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE TYPOLOGY OF PUBLIC HIGHER EDUCATION INSTITUTIONS AND FOR OTHER RELATED PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Public Higher Education Typology Act of 2001.\" The bill defines typology as the classification of state colleges and universities offering post-secondary, undergraduate, or post-graduate degree programs. It draws further divisions including agricultural/fisheries, technological/polytechnic, normal/teacher education.

name: HBN-00697
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE POSITION OF TOURISM OFFICER FOR EVERY PROVINCE, CITY AND MUNICIPALITY IN THE PHILIPPINES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the qualifications, powers and duties of a tourism officer. The position shall be mandatory in all provinces, cities and municipalities identified by the Dept. of Tourism as tourist areas.

name: HBN-00698
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 217, AS AMENDED, ENTITLED, 'ESTABLISHING BASIC POLICIES FOR THE TELEPHONE INDUSTRY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE PERTINENT PROVISIONS OF COMMONWEALTH ACT', THE FRANCHISE OF THE PHILIPPINE LONG DISTANCE TELEPHONE COMPANY UNDER ACT NO. 3426, AS AMENDED, AND ALL INCONSISTENT LEGISLATIVE AND MUNICIPAL FRANCHISE INCLUDING OTHER EXISTING LAWS
congress_website_abstract: The bill repeals the Subscriber Investment Plan (SIP)establsihed under PD 217. The SIP is deemed redundant considering that the country now has have quite number of telephone service providers. With the advent of the mobile phone industry, consumers have a wide choice for their telecommunication needs.

name: HBN-00699
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING THE ROLE, DIRECT PARTICIPATION AND ACTIVE INVOLVEMENT OF THE COMMON PEOPLE THROUGH COOPERATIVES IN GOVERNMENT INFRASTRUCTURE CONTRACTS AND PROJECTS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"People's Role in Gov't Infrastructure/Contracts and Projects Act of 2004.\" The measure allows cooperatives to join bids for government infrastructure projects. Prescribes the qualifications, rights and prohibitions of cooperative-contractors.

name: HBN-00700
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING ALL FILIPINO EMPLOYEES AND WORKERS NATIONWIDE RECEIVING LESS THAN FIFTEEN THOUSAND PESOS (P15,000) MONTHLY WAGE AN EXEMPTION FROM INCOME AND WITHHOLDING TAXES
congress_website_abstract: \"Income and Withholding Tax Exemption Act of 2004.\" The bill exempts low-income earners from paying income taxes to alleviate their poverty.

name: HBN-00701
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING THE CHARTER OF THE PHILIPPINE CHARITY SWEEPSTAKES OFFICE, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to redirect a portion of the charity fund of the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) to government institutions that implement social welfare and health programs. It grants the Department of Health and the Department of Social Welfare and Development 15% and 10% share, respectively, of the charity fund of the PCSO to finance their priority programs.

name: HBN-00702
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE POBLACION-COLINE-SULONG-CRUZ, SAN MIGUEL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALIMODIAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00703
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ROAD LEADING TO THE SEVEN CITIES POB-CAGAY-CABACANAN PROPER ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALIMODIAN, IN THE PROVINCE OF ILOILO, INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00704
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING POLICIES AND MEASURES FOR THE PREVENTION, CONTROL AND TREATMENT OF SEVERE ACUTE RESPIRATORY SYNDROME (SARS), PROVIDING FUNDS THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Severe Acute Respiratory Syndrome (SARS) Prevention, Control and Treatment Act of 2004.\" The proposed bill seeks to institute policies and measures to control, prevent and treat SARS through an information and education campaign, the establishment of a SARS Isolation Center and Airport Quarantine Area and the creation of a Philippine National SARS Council. It also seeks the establishment of a comprehensive SARS monitoring program or \"Bantay SARS\".

name: HBN-00705
congress_website_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE SCHOOL OPENING AND BEGINNING OF CLASSES TO THE FIRST MONDAY OF SEPTEMBER OF EVERY SCHOOL YEAR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: At present, the school opening, which starts on the first week of June, falls within the rainy and typhoon season. The bill proposes to change the school opening and the beginning of classes to the first Monday of September each year. This will make our school opening consistent with the rest of the world and avoid the difficulties experienced by school children during the rainy season.

name: HBN-00706
congress_website_title: AN ACT BANNING THE IMPORTATION AND DUMPING OF ALL KINDS OF TOXIC WASTES AND MATERIALS INTO THE COUNTRY, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Toxic Wastes and Materials Ban Act of 2003'\" The Philippines has been tagged as the toxic wastes \"dumping capital\" of the world. The measure seeks to implement a total ban on all kinds and forms of toxic wastes and materials for recycling or for any other use and purpose from entering the country. Likewise, revokes permits issued to any individual or corporation for the importation of toxic wastes and materials.

name: HBN-00707
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE SECURITY AND PROTECTION OF VENDORS IN THE WORKPLACE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The recent drive of the Metro Manila Development Authority (MMDA) to rid major thoroughfares of street vendors and hawkers has adversely affected the livelihood and sustenance of these vendors and their families. The bill seeks to provide security and protection to vendors in their workplaces. An Inter-Agency Council on the Security and Protection of Registered Vendors shall be created to formulate and implement policies and programs for registered vendors nationwide.

name: HBN-00708
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A WORLD TRADE ORGANIZATION (WTO) AFFAIRS STRATEGY OFFICE (WTO-ASO) UNDER THE OFFICE OF THE PRESIDENT AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The World Trade Organization (WTO), the final forum for international trade disputes, has a set of detailed and complex rules and regulations. A thorough review and study of the dynamics of the game within the WTO is called for. The bill proposes the creation of a WTO Affairs Strategy Office under the Office of the President to formulate a set of policies to be adopted by the government concerning WTO matters and affairs and its rules on engagement.

name: HBN-00709
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE OVERSEAS FILIPINO WORKERS (OFW) MEDICAL CENTER DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks the establishment, operation and maintenance of a medical center for overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) and their families. The Center shall extend medical services to OFWs and their families to help prevent, relieve or alleviate their innumerable medical afflictions and maladies. The measure provides for the government to contribute the land, building, equipment and facilities for the Center.

name: HBN-00710
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE COAST GUARD AUXULIARY, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The Philippine Coast Guard Auxiliary (PCGA) is an indispensable collaborator of the Philippine Coast Guard in promoting the safety of life and property at sea, safeguarding the marine environment and resources, and enforcing maritime laws. The bill seeks to establish the role and mandate of the PCGA, to define the administrative powers of its officers over the organization and to institute mechanisms for a democratic procedure of selecting officers and commanders.

name: HBN-00711
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MANDATORY CLEARANCE FOR ALL GOVERNMENT OFFICIALS UPON THEIR RETIREMENT FROM PUBLIC OFFICE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Honorable Dismissal of Government Employees Act of 2003.\" This bill seeks to grant government officials, who shall retire from public service, retirements benefits provided he/she has no pending criminal, civil or administrative case. It also provides that all retiring government officials must be subjected to a clearance system for purposes of accountability.

name: HBN-00672
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE CITY ROAD CONNECTING THE CITY OF ILIGAN AND THE MUNICIPALITIES OF TAGOLOAN, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00673
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 286, CHAPTER 1 AND SECTION 293, CHAPTER 2, TITLE 3, BOOK II, RESPECTIVELY,OF REPUBLIC ACT 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.
congress_website_abstract: Provides that the shares of the barangays in national taxes and in impositions derived from the use of national resources shall not be subject to any lien or hold back imposed by provincial, city or municipal government.

name: HBN-00674
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BENEFITS OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 393 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, CREATING A NATIONAL BARANGAY BENEFITS AUGMENTATION FUND, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Grants the following monthly benefits: (1) to the Punong barangay - P2,000; (2) to the Sangguniang barangay, treasurer, secretary - P1,800; (3)to the Purok president - P600; (4) to Barangay tanods - P500; and P2,000 Christmas bonus to each barangay official.

name: HBN-00675
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE AUTOMATIC PROMOTION OF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES UPON THEIR COMPULSORY OR OPTIONAL RETIREMENT, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill upgrades the retirement pay by promoting retirees one rank higher upon retiring from government service. The adjusted salary grade shall be the basis for the computation of the benefits.

name: HBN-00676
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE USE OF ENGLISH AS A MEDIUM OF INSTRUCTION IN PHILIPPINE SCHOOLS
congress_website_abstract: Provides for the use of English as the medium of instruction from grade I to college.

name: HBN-00677
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INTEGRATE INFORMATION COMMUNICATION TECHNOLOGY EDUCATION INTO THE PUBLIC ELEMENTARY AND SECODARY CURRICULA AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"Information Communication Technology Education Act of 2004.\" Declares it mandatory for all public elementary and high school to include computer education in their curricula.

name: HBN-00678
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING DIRECT AND TECHNICAL SMUGGLING AS ACTS OF ECONOMIC SABOTAGE, PRESCRIBING PENALTIES THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Imposes the following penalties for smuggling goods and articles amounting to P1 million: (1) fine equal to twice the value of the article; (2) fine equal to the taxes avoided; (3) eight years up to life imprisonment, or death; and (4) confiscation of smuggled items.

name: HBN-00679
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A SYSTEM OF PAYING THE ARREARS OF PENSION TO WORLD WAR II VETERANS, PENALIZING ANY FRAUD COMMITEED IN RELATION TO THIS ACT.
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants a one-time lump sum P30,000 gratuity pay to all 70-year old World War II veterans in lieu of the monthly P1,700 total disability pension.

name: HBN-00680
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ESTABLISH AND MAINTAIN AN OFFICE OF VETERANS AFFAIRS IN THE PHILIPPINE EMBASSY IN THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA, PRESCRIBING ITS FUNCTIONS, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to institutionalize the Office of the Veterans Affairs (OVA) in the Philippine Embassy in Washington DC established on June 21, 1990 by the Department of Foreign Affairs. The OVA shall make representations, consultations and negotiations with appropriate agencies of the US government.

name: HBN-00681
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING THE TAX ON WINNINGS AND DOCUMENTARY STAMP TAX ON HORSE RACING, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 126 AND 190 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, SECTIONS 11 AND 13 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8407 AND SECTIONS 8 AND 10 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7953
congress_website_abstract: The bill imposes a four percent (4%) tax to winners of the following horse racing events: Daily double, extra double, forecast, double quinella, trifecta, daily double + 1, and pari-mutuel. Imposes a 10 centavos documentary stamp on every P1.00 horse race ticket.

name: HBN-00682
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 1 AND 2 OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 9164 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR SYNCRONIZED BARANGAY AND SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN ELECTIONS,\" AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 7160, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Sets the date of barangay and sangguniang kabataan elections on the last Monday of October 2006 and every five years thereafter.

name: HBN-00683
title: PALAWAN ECO-TOURISM ZONE
long_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE PROVINCE OF PALAWAN AS AN ECO-TOURISM ZONE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE PROVINCE OF PALAWAN AS THE ECO-TOURISM CAPITAL OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00684
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE SOUTHERN PALAWAN SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREEPORT, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE THE SOUTHERN PALAWAN SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREE PORT AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00685
congress_website_title: AN ACT CALLING FOR A CONSTITUTIONAL CONVENTION FOR CHANGING THE 1987 CONSTITUTION, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE
congress_website_abstract: \"Constitutional Convention Act.\" Stresses that the proposal may not necessarily involve a change in the political structure but on the need to make the Charter more responsive to the present economic, political and social conditions.

name: HBN-00686
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A SUBSISTENCE ALLOWANCE FOR BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 6(B) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7883, ENTITLED, AN ACT GRANTING BENEFITS AND INCENTIVES TO ACCREDITED BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants a P500 monthly subsistence allowance to accredited health workers.

name: HBN-00687
congress_website_title: OMNIBUS HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT ACT
congress_website_abstract: \"Omnibus Housing and Urban Development Act of 2004.\" Creates the Department of Housing and Urban Development to supervise urban planning, development and renewal, including land use and zoning, housing and finance. Promotes the flow of private funds into the primary and secondary mortgage markets. Deals with the 4 aspects of land and housing development: finance, production, regulation and administrative structure. Claims that 75% of 4.5 million homeless families are squatters, a backlog which could be eliminated in 20 years by building 500,000 houses annually.

name: HBN-00688
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 450 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9009 AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the conversion of the provincial capital town into a component city, exempting them from the income requirement for conversion.

name: HBN-00689
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF MATI, DAVAO ORIENTAL PROVINCE, INTO A COMPONENT CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CITY OF MATI

name: HBN-00690
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE AND REGULATE THE SUBSCRIBED TELEVISION SERVICE IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Subscribed TV Act.\" The bill allows 40% foreign equity for operators to promote the growth of cable TV. It provides television service operators the following rights: easement, lease excess capacity, and to advertise. Repeals EOs 204 and 436.

name: HBN-00691
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SEVENTY-EIGHT THIRTY-TWO, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'ANTI-ELECTRICITY AND ELECTRIC TRANSMISSION LINES/MATERIALS PILFERAGE ACT OF 1994'
congress_website_abstract: The bill increases the reward between P5,000 to P50,000 for persons reporting electrical theft, while increasing the fine for violators between P150,000 to P500,000.

name: HBN-00712
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE USE OF THE PROCEEDS FROM GROSS RECEIPTS TAX IMPOSED ON CELLULAR PHONE COMPANIES TO FINANCE THE COMPUTER LITERACY PROGRAMS OF PUBLIC SCHOOLS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: This bill proposes the creation of a special computer literacy education fund from the gross receipts tax imposed on cellular phone companies. The fund is intended to support the computer literacy program in public schools, from the elementary to the tertiary levels.

name: HBN-00713
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CREATION OF A SPECIAL EDUCATION FUND INTENDED FOR SCHOOL BUILDINGS AND FACILITIES, TO BE ALLOCATED FROM THE EXCISE TAX COLLECTION ON ALCOHOL AND TOBACCO PRODUCTS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Classroom shortage compel teachers to hold their classes in make-shift shelters. The proposed measure seeks to augment the present budget for this purpose through the creation of a Special Education Fund for School Buildings and Facilities to be sourced from the excise tax collection on alcoholic products (distilled spirits, wines and fermented liquor) and tobacco products (cigars and cigarettes).

name: HBN-00714
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ALLOCATION OF THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION-SCHOOL BUILDING PROGRAM BUDGET, ENSURING BUDGET PRIORITY FOR THE CONSTRUCTION AND MAINTENANCE OF SCHOOL BUILDINGS AND CLASSROOMS, REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7880, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FAIR AND EQUITABLE ACCESS TO EDUCATION ACT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The proposed measure provides for the allocation of the total budget for the School Building Program to each legislative district according to their classroom shortage as determined by the DepEd's Division Superitendents and District Supervisors. It further proposes that the budget allocation for the construction of school buildings and classrooms be determined based on the population of enrolled students in the elementary and secondary levels divided by forty.

name: HBN-00715
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF BATAS PAMBANSA BILANG 881 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE OMNIBUS ELECTION CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: It can not be denied that barangay elections are used by various political parties and political organizations to provide them with a political machinery. The bill proposes the deletion of Section 38 of the Omnibus Election Code which provides for a non-partisan barangay election. The proposal would finally adapt the law into the political reality prevalent in this country.

name: HBN-00716
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL COMMISSIN ON MUSLIM FILIPINOS DEFINING ITS POWERS, FUNCTIONS AND RESPONSIBILITIES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Commission on Muslim Filipino Act.\" The measure proposes the creation of the National Commission on Muslim Filipinos to replace and take over the functions of the Office of Muslim Affairs. The Commission is mandated to preserve and develop the culture, tradition, institutions and well-being of Muslim Filipinos in conformity with the country's laws and in consonance with programs to attain national unity and development.

name: HBN-00717
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING TELECOMMUNICATIONS COMPANIES, SUCH AS THOSE PROVIDING WIRELESS TELEPHONE SERVICES, FROM SELLING TO THE PUBLIC PRE-PAID AND POST-PAID SUBSCRIPTION PLANS THAT WILL RESULT TO CONSUMER USE EXCEEDING THE PEAK-LOAD CARRYING CAPACITIES OF SUCH COMPANIES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Because of the voluminous number of subscribers, consumers of the wireless communications industry have been experiencing poor interconnection, delayed messages and network clogging. The bill seeks to prohibit telecommunication companies from selling to the public pre-paid and post-paid subscription plans that will result to consumer use exceeding the peak-load carrying capacities of such companies.

name: HBN-00718
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE WESTERN VISAYAS SANITARIUM AND LEPROSARIUM IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF STA. BARBARA, PROVINCE OF ILOILO INTO THE PRESIDENT DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL HOSPITAL AND RESEARCH INSTITUTE FOR TROPICAL MEDICINE, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00719
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING FRANKING PRIVILEGE TO FILIPINO CITIZENS HERE AND ABROAD, TO ENHANCE THEIR PARTICIPATION IN THE TASK OF GOVERNANCE
congress_website_abstract: \"Filipino Citizen's Franking Privilege Act of 2004.\" To encourage the citizens of our country to communicate their views and opinions and to facilitate prompt and immediate response to a public need, the bill proposes to extend the franking privilege to Filipino citizens here and abroad when addressing their correspondence to any of the three branches of government.

name: HBN-00720
congress_website_title: AN ACT FIXING THE RETIREMENT AGE OF THE UNIFORMED PERSONNEL OF THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTY-NINE HUNDRED AND SEVENTY FIVE OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"DEPARTMENT OF THE INTERIOR AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT ACT OF 1990\"
congress_website_abstract: An early retirement age for our police officers is recommended to: a) give him longer time for his family; and b) provide the next-in-line police officers the opportunity to assume higher ranks. To attain these objectives, the bill seeks to reduce the compulsory retirement age for police officers and non-officers from 56 years old to 54 years old.

name: HBN-00721
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE FULL IMPLEMENTATION OF THE NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE PROGRAM' COMPULSORY COVERAGE FOR ALL FILIPINO RESIDENTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT 7875 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE ACT OF 1995\", AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the compulsory health insurance coverage of all citizens of the Philippines under the National Health Insurance Program effective immediately.

name: HBN-00722
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPRGRADING THE MINIMUM SALARY GRADE LEVEL OF PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS AND F0R OTHER PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: Because of their low salary, teachers are forced to deal with loan sharks in order to tide their families over until the next pay check. Some are even obliged to take part-time jobs to provide for their family's basic needs. The bill proposes to upgrade the salary grade (SG) for Teacher I from SG 10 to SG 18 to enable them to cope with the rising cost of living.

name: HBN-00723
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE OVERSEAS FILIPINO WORKERS BANK, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides for the establishment of the Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs) Bank, its powers, functions and organizational structure. It further sets the authorized capitalization for the Bank at PhP1.5 billion of which PhP500 million shall be offered to OFWs for subscription.

name: HBN-00724
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE OFFICE OF THE GOVERNMENT NEGOTIATOR UNDER THE OFFICE OF THE PRESIDENT, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure proposes to create the Office of the Government Negotiator which shall act as the sole and principal negotiating office of the government in times of crisis and conflict situations. The Office shall represent the government in the settlement of conflicts involving armed or hostile individuals or groups.

name: HBN-00725
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING \"FAKE DRUGS\" (MEDICINES) AS DANGEROUS DRUGS AND ITS IMPORTATION, MANUFACTURE, SALE, ADMINISTRATION, DISPENSATION, DELIVERY AND DISTRIBUTION BE CLASSIFIED AS HEINOUS CRIME PUNISHABLE BY DEATH, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6425, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE DANGEROUS DRUGS ACT OF 1972, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The proliferation and distribution of fake drugs in the market remains unabated. These bogus medicines are not only ineffective but, more importantly, these are life threatening. The measure seeks to classify \"fake drugs\" as dangerous drugs punishable under RA 6425 (Dangerous Drugs Act of 1972). It also seeks to classify its importation, sale, administration, dispensation, delivery and distribution as a heinous crime punishable by death.

name: HBN-00726
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR STIFF PENALTIES TO THE CRIME OF INFIDELITY OF PUBLIC OFFICERS IN THE CUSTODY OF PRISONERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSES ARTICLE 223 AND 224 OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Same sa HB0005

name: HBN-00727
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING F0R THE INCLUSION OF BASIC ECONOMIC SUBJECTS AS PART OF THE CURRICULUM OF THE MILITARY AND POLICE COURSE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Coup d' etat, as an act of destabilization, gravely affects our political and economic stability. Therefore, it is crucial for our military and police personnel to understand the relevance of economic stability for the country. This bill seeks the inclusion of basic economic subjects in the curriculum of military and police courses to provide an understanding on the effects of destabilizing acts and activities on the country's economy.

name: HBN-00728
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE FIRST WORKING DAY OF EVERY YEAR, BEGINNING ON THE YEAR 2003, A NATIONAL DAY OF PEACE AND UNITY, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: To inculcate in the minds and hearts of every Filipino a desire for lasting peace and unity, this bill seeks to declare the first working day of every year as \"National Day of Peace and Unity\" and a special non-working holiday.

name: HBN-00729
congress_website_title: AN ACT ALLOWING PILOTS TO POSSESS FIREARM IN THE AIRCRAFT COCKPIT AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6235 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"ANTI-HIJACKING LAW\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill mandates the Department of Transportation and Communications, in coordination with the Philippine Air Force Aviation Security Command, to implement a program wherein qualified pilots of passenger aircrafts would be deputized as enforcement officers and authorized to carry firearms to defend the aircraft from air piracy and hijacking.

name: HBN-00730
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE COMPLETION OF THE NICHOLS BRIDGE LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALIMODIAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00731
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PENALTIES FOR CHILD ABUSE AND EXPLOITATION, THEREBY DECLARING IT AS HEINOUS CRIME, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160 AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"SPECIAL PROTECTION OF CHILDREN AGAINST CHILD ABUSE, EXPLOITATION AND DISCRIMINATION ACT\", AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to impose the penalty of reclusion perpetua TO DEATH for the crimes of child trafficking and child prostitution.

name: HBN-00732
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE BANGSAMORO DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS, FUNCTIONS AND RESPONSIBILITIES, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure calls for the creation of the Bangsamoro Development Authority (BDA) to implement the socio-economic development plans and programs for the Bangsamoro areas and communities. The BDA shall perform planning, monitoring and coordinative functions and exercise regulatory and supervisory authority over the delivery of socio-economic services in the Mindanao region.

name: HBN-00733
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE USE OF \"ASPARTAME\" ON FOOD, BEVERAGES AND DRUGS, AND THE SALE AND DISTRIBUTION OF ARTIFICIAL SWEETENERS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Aspartame Ban Act of 2004\". Aspartame accounts for over 75% of the adverse reactions to food additives reported to the US Food and Drugs Administration. The bill seeks to ban the use of aspartame on food, beverages and drugs such as cereals, gelatin desserts, etc. It also prohibits the sale and distribution of artificial sweeteners or sugar substitutes like NutraSweet, Equal and other brands.

name: HBN-00734
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NEW LUCENA POLYTECHNIC COLLEGE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NEW LUCENA, ILOILO, INTO THE ILOILO STATE UNIVERSITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00735
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MUSLIM FILIPINO CEMETERY IN METRO MANILA, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00736
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING ALL PUBLIC AND PRIVATE HOSPITALS TO ESTABLISH AND MAINTAIN AN ISOLATION AND QUARANTINE FACILITY FOR INFECTIOUS DISEASES, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Hospital Isolation Facility Act of 2004\". To reduce, if not entirely contain, the spread of infectious diseases, the bill mandates all government and private hospitals to establish and maintain an isolation and quarantine facility for contagious diseases.

name: HBN-00737
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A LEGAL ATTACHE OFFICE IN THE MIDDLE EAST COUNTRIES AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8042 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"MIGRANT WORKERS AND OVERSEAS FILIPINOS ACT OF 1995\", AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: As of December 2001, there are 897,000 Filipino workers in Saudi Arabia and 128,604 in the United Arab Emirates. According to Migrante International, at present, there are 44 Filipino workers in various jails in Saudi Arabia facing the possibility of beheading unless the Philippine government intervenes. This measure seeks to provide a remedy to the plight of our migrant workers by establishing a Legal Attache Office in every Middle East country particularly in Saudi Arabia and in the United Arab Emirates.

name: HBN-00738
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING TUITION AND OTHER SCHOOL-RELATED FEES IN ALL HIGHER AND BASIC INSTITUTIONS OF LEARNING, CREATING A TUITION REGULATION BOARD, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Tuition Regulation Act of 2004.\" To broaden the campaign against unreasonable and unwarranted tuition fee increases every academic year, the bill seeks the creation of a Tuition Regulatory Council (TRC) that shall serve as the highest policy making body on matters concerning tuition fee rates, modification and other tuition related matters. The TRC shall study, conduct consultations and thereafter recommend adjustments in tuition and other school fees.

name: HBN-00739
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENTHENING AND REFORMING THE SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 329, 433 AND 434 OF REPUBLIC ACT 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Sangguniang Kabataan Reform Act of 2004.\" To fully tap the potentials of youth empowerment, the existing organizational structure of the Sangguniang Kabataan (SK) needs to be strengthened and reformed. The bill calls on the sangguniang barangay to appropriate the SK fund in lump sum and grants the SK fiscal autonomy on its operations as to disbursements and encashment of their income and expenses.

name: HBN-00740
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL HEALING, RECONCILIATION AND UNITY COMMISSION AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"National Healing, Reconciliation and Unity Act of 2003.\" The bill proposes the establishment of a National Healing, Reconciliation and Unity Commission which shall have the power to resolve political conflicts and to implement a national reconciliation and unity program, formulate a mechanism to recover ill-gotten wealth of certain individuals and implement a mechanism for redress of victims of political conflicts and determine who shall be entitled to a political amnesty.

name: HBN-00741
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A ROAD DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Road Development Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks to create the Road Development Authority (RDA) which shall be responsible for the construction and/or rehabilitation, maintenance and operation of selected and desirable infrastructure projects where there are no takers from the private sector. It grants the RDA the power to raise and/or borrow funds from local and international financial institutions for the purpose of financing its projects and programs.

name: HBN-00742
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING ARTICLE 26 OF THE NEW CIVIL CODE TO INCLUDE AS ACTIONABLE WRONG THE DISCLOSURE OR DISSEMINATION TO THIRD PARTIES A MAILING LIST OF PERSONAL INFORMATION OF PERSONS GIVEN IN CONFIDENCE
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to pronounce as an actionable wrong the disclosure, distribution, circulation and/or transmittal, with or without consideration, to third parties, through a mailing list used for commercial purposes, personal information presumed to have been given in confidence by another.

name: HBN-00743
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE SPECIAL GROUP TERM INSURANCE COVERAGE FOR THE MEMBERS OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES, INCLUDING THE MEMBERS OF THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE 352, AS AMENDED BY PRESIDENTIAL DECREEE 1965, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The special group term insurance coverage of Ph12,000.00 extended to members of the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) and the Philippine National Police (PNP) is grossly inadequate for the protection and security of the members and their families. The bill proposes to increase the group insurance coverage for members of the AFP and the PNP from PhP12,000 to not less than PhP50,000.00.

name: HBN-00744
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1185, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"FIRE CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES\"' PROVIDING FOR EFFECTIVE IMPLEMENTATION THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: To strengthen the accountability of public officers charged to implement the Fire Code, this bill proposes to amend the Fire Code of the Philippines by providing administrative sanctions as well as criminal penalties to acts which result in loss of life and/or damage to property.

name: HBN-00745
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING RETIRED MEMBERS OF THE GOVERNMENT SERVICE INSURANCE SYSTEM THE FULL VALUE OF THEIR CONTRIBUTIONS TO THE SYSTEM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8291, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE GOVERNMENT SERVICE INSURANCE SYSTEM ACT OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The main objective of the bill is to grant members of the Government Service Insurance System (GSIS), upon retirement from the service, the full value of the contributions of the member and the employer including the interest earnings of said contributions. It introduces the concept of \"full value of contributions\" which shall be used as the basis for the payment to the retirees of their lump sum and the basic monthly pension benefits.

name: HBN-00746
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING THE HOUSING SECTOR CREATING THEREBY THE DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT, DEFINING ITS STRUCTURE, PROVIDING FOR ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Omnibus Housing and Urban Development Act of 2004.\" The bill seeks the creation of the Department of Housing and Urban Development (DHUD) which shall be the primary agency tasked with addressing the nation's needs relating to housing, housing finance, land use and resettlement. The DHUD shall undertake a continuing program that will ensure the optimum use of urban lands and resources, and the availability of adequate, affordable and decent shelter and other basic services for the Filipino people.

name: HBN-00747
congress_website_title: AN ACT ADOPTING THE STRATEGY OF SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT OF NATURAL RESOURCES AND ENVIRONMENT FOR THE CARAGA REGION, CREATING THE ADMINISTRATIVE MACHINERY FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00748
title: HOLIDAY: GETAFE FOUNDATION DAY
long_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE TWELFTH DAY OF OCTOBER OF EVERY YEAR AS A NONWORKING SPECIAL PUBLIC HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GETAFE, PROVINCE OF BOHOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE GETAFE FOUNDATION DAY AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE TWELFTH DAY OF OCTOBER OF EVERY YEAR AS THE NONWORKING DAY SPECIAL PUBLIC HOLIDAY FOR THE MUNICIPALITY OF GETAFE, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO BE KNOWN AS \"THE GETAFE FOUNDATION DAY\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00749
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE LAND TRANSPORTATION EXTENSION OFFICE IN TALIBON, BOHOL, INTO A REGULAR TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT OFFICE TO BE LOCATED AT THE MUNICIPALITY OF TALIBON, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00750
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONVERSION OF THE PROVINCIAL ROADS OF BARANGAY FATIMA TO BIABAS THROUGH BARANGAYS KATARUNGAN, TIPOLO, UNION AND SINANDIGAN OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF UBAY, LEADING TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF MABINI, PROVINCE OF BOHOL INTO A NATIONAL ROAD, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE MAINTENANCE AND IMPROVEMENT THEREOF

name: HBN-00751
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CALITUBAN, MUNICIPALITY OF TALIBON, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE CALITUBAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00752
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY HANDUMON, MUNICIPALITY OF GETAFE, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO BE KNOWN AS HANDUMON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00753
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE CANMANO BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL, AN ANNEX OF THE SAN AGUSTIN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAGBAYAN, BOHOL, INTO THE CANMANO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00754
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN AGUSTIN, MUNICIPALITY OF TALIBON, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO BE KNOWN AS PRESIDENT CARLOS P. GARCIA MEMORIAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00755
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONALIZED HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY KINUMAN NORTE, OZAMIZ CITY, PROVINCE OF MIZAMIS OCCIDENTAL TO BE KNOWN AS THE KINUMAN NORTE NATIONALIZED HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00756
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN DIWAT, BARANGAY BUENAVISTA, MUNICIPALITY OF BONIFACIO, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE DIWAT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00757
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TABID, OZAMIZ CITY, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL TO BE KNOWN AS THE TABID NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00758
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL-MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL CAMPUS IN OZAMIZ CITY, MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00759
congress_website_title: AN ACT RESTORING THE DIVISION OF CITY SCHOOLS OF THE CITY OF TANGUB, PROVINCE OF MISAMIS OCCIDENTAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00760
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BENEFITS OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 393 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill proposes to increase the minimum honoraria, allowances and other emoluments prescribed under Section 393 of the Local Government Code from Php1,000.00 to PhP5,000.00 per month for the punong barangay and from PhP600.00 to PhP4,000.00 per month for each SB member, treasurer and secretary.

name: HBN-00761
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TEN, AS AMENDED, BY MAKING ITS PROVISIONS APPLICABLE TO PROSECUTORS OF THE NATIONAL PROSECUTION SERVICE, STATE COUNSELS OF THE OFFICE OF THE CHIEF STATE COUNSEL OF THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE, LAWYER OF THE OFFICE OF THE SPECIAL PROSECUTOR AND/OR OF THE OFFICE OF THE OMBUDSMAN, AND PUBLIC ATTORNEY'S OFFICE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The measure seeks to further amend RA 910 with the end in view of upgrading the retirement, disability and survivorship benefits of the prosecutors, state counsels, special prosecutors and graft investigators, and public attorneys and place them on equal footing with the members of the Judiciary. The enactment of the bill is expected to result in a more efficient and effective administration of justice in the country.

name: HBN-00762
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NORTHERN SAMAR TOURIST DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00763
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE POSITION OF TOURISM OFFICER IN EACH PROVINCE, CITY AND MUNICIPALITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: At present, the development and promotion of tourism is confined only to the Department of Tourism. To fully develop the tourism potentials in the country, the bill seeks to create the position of Tourism Officer in every province, city, and municipality. The Tourism Officer shall monitor and evaluate the implementation of the different tourism development programs and activities in the local government unit.

name: HBN-00764
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE RIGHT TO FRANCHISES TO DEVELOP THE RURAL AIRPORT INFRASTRUCTURE NETWORK IN THE PHILIPPINES FOR COMMERCIAL AND OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to grant a francisee the right to construct, manage, operate and maintain a rural airport in any part of the country in order to eventually make each municipality regularly accessible or within easy reach. The establishment of a private rural airport infrastructure will encourage economic activity in the hinterlands by serving not only as transportation hubs but also as industrial, commercial and service centers.

name: HBN-00765
congress_website_title: THE SOLAR CONVERSION POWER SYSTEM ACT OF 2001
congress_website_abstract: The bill aims to encourage the large-scale operation of solar energy systems by mandating the Department of Energy to design a program geared towards the development and manufacture in the Philippines of state-of-the-art-solar conversions power systems. The use of solar energy to produce electricity in the country should be promoted because we have an abundant supply of sunshine and because solar energy is more environment-friendly.

name: HBN-00766
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN AGRO-INDUSTRIAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SOMOGE, MUNICIPALITY OF CATARMAN, PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR, TO BE KNOWN AS SOMOGE AGRO-INDUSTRIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00767
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PENALTIES IMPOSED FOR ILLEGAL GAMBLING AND A HIGHER PENALTY IF THE OFFENDER IS A POLICE OR MILITARY OFFICER, OR A LOCAL GOVERNMENT OFFICIAL, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1602
congress_website_abstract: To deter gambling operations, the bill seeks to impose stiffer penalties to maintainers, financiers, employees and protectors of illegal gambling. The proposed penalties shall range from prision correccional in its maximum period to prision mayor in its maximum period and fines ranging from PhP50,00 to PhP500,000.

name: HBN-00768
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO CONSTRUCT A TWO-STOREY TEN ROOM BUILDING FOR THE MONDRAGON AGRO-INDUSTRIAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MONDRAGON, PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00769
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE APPOINTMENT OF A MUNICIPAL SOCIAL WELFARE AND DEVELOPMENT OFFICER IN EACH MUNICIPALITY MANDATORY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to make the position of municipal social welfare development officer mandatory and fix their compensation and incentives to ensure that the employees who were devolved from the Department of Social Welfare and Development to the local government units will receive definite salaries and benefits.

name: HBN-00770
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO UPGRADE THE MINIMUM SALARY GRADE OF PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS FROM SALARY GRADE TEN TO NINETEEN
congress_website_abstract: The proposed measure seeks to upgrade the salary grade (SG) level of public school teachers from SG 10 to SG 19 for a corresponding increase of almost PhP6,000 in their basic monthly salaries. With the increase in salaries, more qualified and competent educators will be attracted to teach in public schools.

name: HBN-00771
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE CRIME OF PEDOPHILIA AND IMPOSING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The Constitution mandates the State to defend the rights of children and to afford them special protection from all forms of negligence, abuse cruelty, exploitation and other conditions prejudicial to their development. Towards this end, the bill seeks to declare pedophilia a felony. It also imposes penalties for any violation of the proposed act.

name: HBN-00792
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE BARANGAY INTEGRATED DEVELOPMENT APPROACH FOR NUTRITION IMPROVEMENT (BIDANI OF THE RURAL POOR AS A NETWORK PROGRAM OF THE PARTICIPATING STATE COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: \"BIDANI Act of 2001.\" The bill seeks to institutionalize the Barangay Integrated Development Approach for Nutrition Improvement (BIDANI) network program to provide a lasting solution to the problem of malnutrition. It calls for the involvement of academic institutions and local government units in promoting the importance of nutrition. The BIDANI program shall complement traditional nutrition intervention.

name: HBN-00793
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ACCORD GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES A COMMUTABLE FIVE WORKING DAYS LEAVE OF ABSENCE, WITH PAY, IN ADDITION TO EXISTING LEAVE BENEFITS GRANTED TO THEM, IN CASE ANY MEMBER OF HIS/HER FAMILY DIES
congress_website_abstract: To give government employees adequate time to take care of the needs attendant to a death in the family, the bill grants a commutable 5-working day leave of absence, with pay in addition to existing leave benefits, in case an immediate relative such as a parent, spouse, brother, sister and child passes away.

name: HBN-00794
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A UNIFORM REWARD SYSTEM IN THE CAMPAIGN AGAINST CRIMES AND LAWLESSNESS
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants monetary incentive for individuals who voluntarily furnish information which may lead to the arrest of a fugitive or wanted criminal. It provides the government with an effective weapon to ferret, subdue and destroy racketeers and carpetbaggers. Cash benefits received by government-informers shall be exempt from taxes.

name: HBN-00795
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE PAYMENT OF REAL PROPERTY TAXES AS A CONDITION PRIOR TO THE ISSUANCE OF BUILDING PERMIT OR CERTIFICATE OF REGISTRATION OF MACHINERY
congress_website_abstract: Tax on real properties is one of the major sources of revenue for local government units. The bill requires all applicants for a permit for the construction, addition, repair or renovation of a building to pay the corresponding real property taxes due on the property where the construction would be made prior to the release of the permit.

name: HBN-00796
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE SAN JOSE TECHNICAL SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN JOSE, PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR, INTO A MERCHANT MARINE SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS SAN JOSE MERCHANT MARINE COLLEGE, CONFERRING THE DEGREES OF BACHELOR OF SCIENCE IN MARINE TRANSPORTATION, MAJOR IN NAVIGATION AND SEMANSHIP, AND BACHELOR OF SCIENCE IN MARINE TRANSPORTATION, MAJOR IN STEAM ENGINE AND ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING, PROVIDING FOR A MERCHANT MARINE COLLEGE BOARD DEFINING ITS POWERS AND DUTIES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00797
congress_website_title: AN ACT PUNISHING ANY OFFICER OR EMPLOYEE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE WHO IS RESPONSIBLE FOR REGISTERING STOLEN MOTOR VEHICLE, INSERTING FOR THE PURPOSE A NEW SECTION BETWEEN SECTIONS FIFTY-SEVEN AND FIFTY-EIGHT OF REPULIC ACT NUMBERED FORTY-ONE HUNDRED THIRTY SIX
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to punish an officer or employee of the office responsible for the registration of a stolen vehicle with a fine equivalent to the market value of the stolen vehicle or imprisonment of not less than one year. If found guilty, the employee shall be dimissed from the service and shall forfeit all benefits/privileges due him.

name: HBN-00798
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A CIVIL SERVICE CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill updates all civil service related laws to conform with the 1987 Constitution and with present day needs and realities. It addresses the problems of graft and corruption, red tape, violations of employees' rights, violations of merit and fitness principle, among others. It codifies the various laws and other issuances into one comprehensive law.

name: HBN-00799
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE \"PALUWAGAN NG BAYAN\", DEFINING ITS PURPOSES AND OBJECTIVES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Paluwagan ng Bayan Act.\" The bill makes available to the marginalized sectors of our society credit without collateral to finance livelihood projects. The funds for the paluwagan shall be channeled through accredited non-governmental organizations. The funds shall be sourced from existing funds earmarked for livelihood projects, grants and donations.

name: HBN-00800
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 337, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE GENERAL BANKING ACT, REQUIRING BANKS AND OTHER FINANCIAL INSTITUIONS TO SECURE CERTIFICATION FROM THE BUREAU OF INTERNAL REVENUE ON THE AUTHENTICITY OF DOCUMENTS REQUIRED FOR LOAN APPROVAL PRIOR TO GRANTING SUCH, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: It is the practice of many entities to maintain two sets of financial statements - one understating income for tax purposes and the other overstating income for loan purposes. To stop this practice, the bill requires banks and other financial institutions to approve loans based on audited financial statements duly certified by the Bureau of Internal Revenue as the same statement submitted to them.

name: HBN-00801
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING CERTAIN BENEFITS AND INCENTIVES TO SCIENCE AND MATHEMATICS TEACHERS
congress_website_abstract: \"Science and Mathematics Teachers Development.\" The bill provides measures that will attract bright students in mathematics and science to pursue a career in science teaching, enable them to advance in their specialization, sustain their interest in the field, and encourage them to stay on teaching science.

name: HBN-00802
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING FROM THE AMUSEMENT TAX AS PROVIDED UNDER PARAGRAPH THREE OF SECTION ONE HUNDRED TWENTY-THREE OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED, BOXING CONTESTS FOR A RECOGNIZED WORLD TITLE
congress_website_abstract: The bill exempts from amusement tax the holding of boxing contests for a recognized title.

name: HBN-00803
title: EASTERN VISAYAS REGIONAL HOSPITAL
long_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NORTHERN SAMAR PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN CATARMAN, NORTHERN SAMAR INTO EASTERN VISAYAS REGIONAL HOSPITAL UNDER THE SUPERVISION, CONTROL AND MANAGEMENT OF THE DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NORTHERN SAMAR PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN CATARMAN, NORTHERN SAMAR, INTO EASTERN VISAYAS REGIONAL HOSPITAL UNDER THE SUPERVISION, CONTROL AND MANAGEMENT OF THE DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH
subjects: ['Hospital, Conversion (Northern Samar)', 'Eastern Visayas Regional Hospital (Northern Samar)']

name: HBN-00804
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT, OPERATION AND MAINTENANCE OF A HOME FOR THE AGED AND DISABLED IN EVERY CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT OF THE PHILLIPINES, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: The bill authorizes the Home for the Aged and Disabled to provide consultative services, including diagnosis, cure and prevention of diseases of the aged and disabled; rehabilitation hall with facilities for physiotheraphy and gymnasium for physical rehabilitation; a nutrition clinic; and a research ward on the care and treatment of aged and disabled patients. The requirements for admission to the home are: a) at least 62 years of age; b)in the case of the disabled, regardless of age, cannot move freely; c) of good moral character; and d) without any visible means of support.

name: HBN-00805
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 5(a) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3779, ENTITLED 'AN ACT TO PROVIDE FOR THE REGULATION OF THE ORGANIZATION AND OPERATIONS OF SAVINGS AND LOAN ASSOCIATIONS' AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill directs loans and savings associations to grant loans to qualified borrowers of an amount not exceeding Fifty Thousand Pesos (P50,000.00) or the amount deposited by the borrower plus his four (4) month's salary or regular income whichever is higher.

name: HBN-00806
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE USE OF PLASTIC BAGS, STYROFOAM, ALUMINUM FOILS AND NONBIODEGRADABLE MATERIALS, PRESCRIBING PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits the use of plastic bag, Styrofoam, aluminum foils and non-biodegradable materials as packaging materials of goods sold by sari-sari stores, groceries, market vendors, sidewalk vendors, hawkers, department stores and similar establishments.

name: HBN-00807
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING HAZARD PAY TO ALL DULY APPOINTED MEMBERS OF BARANGAY TANOD BRIGADES DURING THEIR INCUMBENCY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants all duly appointed members of the barangay tanod brigades a hazard pay, during their incumbency, in the amount of Two Hundred Pesos (P200.00) per month.

name: HBN-00808
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEDUCTING THE COST OF DEVOLVED FUNCTIONS AND PERSONNEL FROM THE SHARE OF LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS IN THE INTERNAL REVENUE ALLOTMENT AND THE TOTAL COST SO DEDUCTED SHALL BE DISTRIBUTED AND REMITTED DIRECTLY TO THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS CONCERNED AND REVISING THE FORMULA FOR ALLOCATING FUNDS TO LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS TO CORRECT INEQUITIES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 285 OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill provides that AFTER DEDUCTING THE COST OF THE DEVOLVED FUNCTIONS AND PERSONNEL, AND THE COST OF THE CITY-FUNDED HOSPITALS, EXCLUDING CAPITAL OUTLAYS, THE TOTAL COST SO DEDUCTED SHALL BE DISTRIBUTED AND REMITTED DIRECTLY TO THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS CONCERNED AND THE NET OR BALANCE OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE ALLOTMENT SHALL BE ALLOCATED in the following manner: (a) Provinces - 23%; (b) Cities - 23%; (c) Municipalities - 34%; (d) Barangays - 20%: Provided, however, that the share of each province, city and municipality shall be determined on the basis of the following formula: (a) Population - 55%; (b) Land area - 20%; (c) Equal sharing - 25%.

name: HBN-00809
congress_website_title: AN ACT LIMITING THE HOURS OF OPERATION OF NIGHTCLUBS, COCKTAIL LOUNGES, BARS AND SIMILAR ESTABLISHMENTS, AND PENALIZING THE VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: The bill prohibits nightclubs, cocktail lounges, bars or similar establishments serving liquor, wint or intoxicating drink, from opening for business earlier that 5:00 p.m. and later than 1:00 a.m.

name: HBN-00810
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING EQUAL RIGHT TO WIVES AND HUSBAND, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 333, 334 AND 344 OF ACT NUMBERED 3815, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: The bill substitutes the terms \"adultery\" and \"concubinage\" under Articles 333 and 334 of the Revised Penal Code with the term \"infidelity\" in order to attune the Code to the fundamental equality of women and men before the law.

name: HBN-00811
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING TWENTY PERCENT (20%) DISCOUNT ON THE PURCHASE OF CELLCARDS BY A SENIOR CITIZENS WHOSE INCOME IS NOT MORE THAN ONE HUNDRED TWENTY THOUSAND PESOS (P120,000.00) PER ANNUM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7432, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'LAW MAXIMIZING THE CONTRIBUTION OF SENIOR CITIZENS TO NATION BUILDING, GRANT BENEFITS AND SPECIAL PRIVILEGES'
congress_website_abstract: This bill grants a twenty percent (20%) discount on the purchase of prepaid cellcards by a senior citizen whose income is not more than ONE HUNDRED TWENTY THOUSAND PESOS (P120,000.000.00) per annum, provided that the senior citizen shall purchase only one cellcard a month.

name: HBN-00772
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING ONE ADDITIONAL REGIONAL TRIAL COURT BRANCH FOR THE PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR WITH STATION AT THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN ISIDRO, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 14, PARAGRAPH (i) OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1981

name: HBN-00773
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO CONSTRUCT A TWO-STOREY TWELVE CLASSROOM SCHOOL BUILDING FOR THE BALICUATRO COLLEGE OF ARTS AND TRADE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALLEN, PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR, AND TO PROVIDE SAID COLLEGE THE NECESSARY LABORATORY EQUIPMENT AND FACILITIES, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00774
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT, DEVELOPMENT AND MAINTENANCE OF PARKS AND MINI-PARKS IN BARANGAYS, MUNICIPALITIES, CITIES AND PROVINCES, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Philippine Parks and Mini-Parks Development Act.\" The proposed bill seeks to establish, develop and maintain parks and mini-parks in barangay, cities, municipalities and provinces to complement the country's beautification and reforestation program. The proposal likewise supports the clean and green movement of the government.

name: HBN-00775
congress_website_title: AN ACT INVESTING IN ALL CITY AND MUNICIPAL MAYORS THE AUTHORITY TO EXERCISE EXCLUSIVE DIRECT OPERATIONAL SUPERVISION AND CONTROL OVER ALL CITY AND MUNICIPAL EMPLOYEES TASKED WITH THE DUTY OR FUNCTIONS OF ISSUING ALL KINDS OF CITY OR MUNICIPAL PERMITS AND LICENSES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The Ozone tragedy gave rise to the question as to who was responsible for the actuation of the Quezon City employees over the issuance of certain municipal permits/licenses to business establishments. To clarify the issue, the bill seeks to vest the issuance of all city and municipal permits and licenses under the exclusive direct operational supervision and control of their respective city or municipal mayor, who shall be directly responsible for any act of malfeasance, misfeasance nor non-feasance committed by city or municipal employees in the performance of their assigned tasks.

name: HBN-00776
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO GRANT MUNICIPAL GOVERNMENT THE EXECUTIVE AUTHORITY TO ISSUE ENVIRONMENTAL CLEARANCE CERTIFICATE (ECC) FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT AND OPERATION OF A POULTRY OR PIGGERY BUSINESS
congress_website_abstract: At present, poultry and piggery businesses are required to secure a environmental clearance certificate (ECC) from the Department of the Environment and Natural Resources. Because the ECC has to be evaluated and approved by the central office in Manila, the issuance of the ECC may take as long as two years. The bill seeks to grant municipal governments, which have immediate access to where the poultry or piggery is operated, the exclusive authority to issue ECCs for the establishment and operation of a poultry or piggery business with a capital investment of not more than one million pesos.

name: HBN-00777
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING PENALTIES ON ANY OWNER/OPERATOR OF A PUBLIC UTILITY VEHICLE VIOLATING THE OUT-OF-LINE OPERATION AND TAMPERING OF LICENSE PLATES, OFFICIAL RECEIPTS, CERTIFICATE OF REGISTRATION OF PUBLIC UTILITY VEHICLES AND/OR CERTIFICATE OF PUBLIC CONVENIENCE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill penalizes the owner/operator of a public utility vehicle (PUV) violating the out-of-line operation by revoking his Certificate of Public Convenience (CPC) issued by the LTFRB while the CPC of a PUV owner/operator found guilty of colorum operations shall be confiscated. It also provides that any person guilty of tampering with the license plate, official receipt and certificate of registration of PUVs shall be fined PhP50,000.00.

name: HBN-00778
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING COMPENSATION TO PERSONS WHO ARE KILLED OR INJURED WHILE COMING TO THE AID OR RESCUE OF A VICTIM AND/OR TRYING TO PREVENT A COMMISSION OF A VIOLENT CRIME, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7309, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: There are many reported cases of heroic deeds performed by plain, ordinary citizens who consider it their duty, at the risk of life and limb, to help maintain peace and order. To give due recognition for these heroic deeds, the bill seeks to provide compensation to persons who are killed or injured while coming to the aid or rescue of a victim or trying to prevent the commission of a violent crime.

name: HBN-00779
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING CERTAIN POSITIONS IN THE BUREAU OF INTERNAL REVENUE AND BUREAU OF CUSTOMS AS PART OF THE CONFIDENTIAL STAFF OF THE APPOINTING OFFICIALS IN SAID BUREAUS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to immunize BIR (Bureau of Internal Revenue) and BOC (Bureau of Customs) officers from graft and corruption practices by declaring the positions of Revenue Officer I, II, III, IV and V and Customs Officers I and II in the BIR and the BOC, respectively, as part of the confidential staff of the appointing officials of said bureaus. As confidential appointees, they may be removed from office for lack of confidence by the appointing authority.

name: HBN-00780
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE SALE OF TICKETS AND COLLECTION OF CONTRIBUTIONS FROM TEACHERS AND STUDENTS, SOLICITATION IN ANY FORM, AND/OR ANY SIMILAR FUND-RAISING ACTIVITY, IN ELEMENTARY AND SECONDARY PUBLIC SCHOOLS, AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Although the collection of contributions from school children of public primary and intermediate schools is prohibited under RA 4206, fund-raising activities remain the whole year round. The bill seeks to regulate the sale of tickets and collection of contributions and/or solicitation in any form from teachers and students in elementary and secondary public schools. It proposes that fund-raising activities be undertaken by the parents-teachers association instead.

name: HBN-00781
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING THE RIGHT TO FRANCHISEES TO DEVELOP THE RURAL AIRPORT INFRASTRUCTURE NETWORK IN THE PHILIPPINES FOR COMMERCIAL AND OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Please refer to HB 764.

name: HBN-00782
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONVERSION OF THE SAN ISIDRO AGRO-INDUSTRIAL SCHOOL IN THE PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR INTO A POLYTECHNIC STATE COLLEGE, TO BE KNOWN AS SAN ISIDRO POLYTECHNIC STATE COLLEGE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00783
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING TWENTY PERCENT (20%) DISCOUNT ON THE PURCHASE OF CELLCARDS BY A SENIOR CITIZEN WHOSE INCOME IS NOT MORE THAN ONE HUNDRED TWENTY THOUSAND PESOS (P120,000.00) PER ANNUM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7432, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'LAW MAXIMIZING THE CONTRIBUTION OF SENIOR CITIZENS TO NATION BUILDING, GRANT BENEFITS AND SPECIAL PRIVILEGES'
congress_website_abstract: The proposed measure seeks to grant a 20% discount on the purchase of prepaid cellcards by a senior citizen whose annual income does not exceed PhP120,000.00. Senior citizens, with the use of cellphones, can assist in minimizing/eliminating criminality in their communities by informing barangay officials and policemen of any untoward incident.

name: HBN-00784
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPLEMENTING THE RIGHT OF ACCESS TO INFORMATION ON MATTERS OF PUBLIC CONCERN GUARANTEED UNDER SECTION SEVEN, ARTICLE III OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: \"Freedom of Access to Information Act.\" In line with every citizen's right to be informed on the workings of the government, the bill seeks to implement the right of access to information on matters of public concern. Such information to be made available to the public include, among others, records, documents, papers, research materials, tapes, microfilm and videotapes.

name: HBN-00785
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE POSITION OF TOURISM OFFICER IN EACH PROVINCE, CITY AND MUNICIPALITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Please refer to HB 763

name: HBN-00786
title: ISLAND-TOWNS ECO-TOURISM ZONES (NORTHERN SAMAR)
long_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE ISLAND-TOWNS OF BIRI, CAPUL, SAN ANTONIO AND SAN VICENTE, ALL IN THE PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR AS ECO-TOURISM ZONES
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE ISLAND-TOWN OF BIRI, CAPUL, SAN ANTONIO, AND SAN VICENTE, ALL IN THE PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR AS ECO-TOURISM ZONES

name: HBN-00787
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE ALLOCATION OF ONE HALF (1/2) OF THE TEN PERCENT (10%) OF THE GENERAL FUND OF THE BARANGAY SET ASIDE FOR THE SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN FOR PUBLIC ELEMENTARY AND HIGH SCHOOLS IN THE BARANGAY TO AUGMENT THE APPROPRIATIONS FOR THEIR MAINTENANCE AND OPERATING EXPENSES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 32 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to allocate one-half (1/2) of ten percent (10%) of the barangay general fund to existing public elementary and high schools in the barangay for their maintenance such as repair of leaking roofs, clogged toilets, sewerage systems, pathwalks, electrical and water systems, repainting of walls due to vandalism, purchase of electric bulbs, electic fans, etc.

name: HBN-00788
title: NATIONAL MARITIME POLYTECHNIC BOARD OF TRUSTEES
long_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR ADDITIONAL MEMBERS OF THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE NATIONAL MARITIME POLYTECHNIC, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1369
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR ADDITIONAL MEMBERS OF THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE NATIONAL MARITIME POLYTECHNIC, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1369
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to provide for additional members to the Board of Trustees of the National Maritime Polytechnic to include the following: a) The Chairman, House Committee on Higher and Technical Education; b) The Chairman, Senate Committee on Higher Education, Arts and Culture; c) The Chairman, Commission on Higher Education; and d) The Regional Director, Region VII, National Economic Development Authority.

name: HBN-00789
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 18, ARTICLE 1 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8550, ENTITLED: \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DEVELOPMENT, MANAGEMENT AND CONSERVATION OF THE FISHERIES AND AQUATIC RESOURCES, INTEGRATING ALL LAWS PERTINENT THERETO, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants municipal fisher folks EXCLUSIVE fishing rights and other fishing related activities in municipal waters.

name: HBN-00790
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO UPGRADE THE SALARY SCALE OF A RETIRING GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEE BY ONE GRADE FOR PURPOSES OF HIS/HER RETIREMENT
congress_website_abstract: The bill seeks to upgrade the salary scale of a retiring government employee by one salary grade on the date of his/her retirement. The upgraded salary scale shall be the basis for the computation of the retirement benefits of the retiring employee. For an employee who opts to retire under existing laws, the one salary grade increase shall be deemed granted one year before retirement for purposes of service requirement only.

name: HBN-00791
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING GOVERNMENT-OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS TO SUBMIT THEIR ANNUAL BUDGETS TO CONGRESS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: In consonance with the Constitutional mandate granting Congress the power of the purse, the measure requires all government-owned and controlled corporations to submit their annual budget to Congress for scrutiny and approval. It also requires these entities to secure congressional approval before they incur any obligation or make payments for current operating or capital expenditures.

name: HBN-00812
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREE PORT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN JOSE AND IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF BOBON AND CATARMAN, ALL IN THE PROVINCE OF NORTHERN SAMAR, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00813
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING SENIOR CITIZENS WHOSE INCOME IS NOT MORE THAN ONE HUNDRED TWENTY THOUSAND PESOS (PHP 120,000.00) PER ANNUM TWENTY PERCENT (20%) DISCOUNT ON ELECTRICITY, WATER AND TELEPHONE BILLS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 2 AND 4 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7432, ENTITLED \"AN ACT MAXIMIZING THE CONTRIBUTION OF SENIOR CITIZENS TO NATION BUILDING, GRANT BENEFITS AND SPECIAL PRIVILEGES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: The bill grants senior citizens whose income is less than P120,000.00 per annum, 20% discount on their electricity, water and telephone bills, amending for the purpose Sections 2 and 4 of Republic Act No. 7432. Senior citizens are now in the twilight years of their lives and most of them, having retired from work, have no sufficient income to support their families, particularly at this time when prices of commodities have skyrocketed beyond the reach of minimum wage earners.

name: HBN-00814
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PENALTY FOR UNAUTHORIZED ALTERATION OF ELECTION RETURNS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Any member of the Board of Election Inspectors or Board of Canvassers who tampers, increases or decreases the votes received by a candidate in any election after the announcement of the results thereof in the polling place, unless so ordered by the Commission on Elections or a competent court, shall be criminally liable for serious election offense. If found guilty, the offender shall: (1) be punished with imprisonment of not less than six years and one day but not more than twelve years; (2) be disqualified to hold public office; and (3) be deprived of the right of suffrage.

name: HBN-00815
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE INTERNAL AFFAIRS SERVICE FOR THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE TITLE V OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED EIGHTY-FIVE HUNDRED AND FIFTY-ONE ENTITLED, \"AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REFORM AND REORGANIZATION OF THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE, AS AMENDED\" APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Under this bill, the function of the Internal Affairs Office (IAO) TO SERVE AS AN INDEPENDENT, IMPARTIAL AND OBJECTIVE INSTITUTIONAL WATCHDOG AGENCY FOR THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE is underscored. The bill contains provisions on: qualification requirements for the IAO Head; organization, appointments, entry qualification, promotions, career development and incentives, records management and disciplinary decisions.

name: HBN-00816
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING CIVIL SERVICE ELIGIBILITY TO ANY GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEE WHO HAS RENDERED AT LEAST TEN (10) YEARS CONTINUOUS GOVERNMENT SEVICE WITHOUT TAKING ANY CIVIL SERVICE EXAMINATION
congress_website_abstract: The bill confers government employees who have rendered continuous satisfactory service for at least ten (10) years with sub-professional or professional civil service eligibility, as the case may be, and qualifies them for appointment to any position under the following classifications: (1) Sub-professional Civil Service Eligibility: (a) Has rendered at least ten years continuous and satisfactory service; and (b) Has completed at least two years of college education leading to a college degree. Completion of at least 72 units in college or completion to a 2-year technical course with basic collegiate subjects, such as English and Mathematics, shall be considered equivalent to 2-year college education; (2) Professional Civil Service Eligibility: (a) Has rendered at least ten years continuous and satisfactory service; (b) Has completed a 4-year college education leading to a college leading to a college degree; and (c) A second grade or sub-professional civil service eligible.

congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TARLAC CITY - SAN JOSE VIA BURGOS ROAD, PROVINCE OF TARLAC INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MALACAMPA-MAYANTOC ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF CAMILING AND MAYANTOC, PROVINCE OF TARLAC INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
